C: 卷序 历书，乃是时间的尺度；祚史，可记国运的更替。笔者托勒密，观悬锋密阁内藏书，虽有诸王传记，却大多旨在赞颂当朝，亢昂之语有余而承启之议不足。遂穷尽悬锋建城迄今二千五百岁，囊括悬锋王朝兴衰始末，记载历代诸王群伦事迹，以昭后人，亦可垂训于后世，铭记悬锋精神之源流、尼卡多利之荣耀根本。 …… 今兹《诸王通鉴》一书，仍尚未完本。笔者随孤军掷命征战、朝不保夕，明日头悬冥河之上，亦未可知。若笔者不幸，未能亲眼见那悬锋新王登临绝顶，烦赖后人挥墨，替此书作结。 …… 卷之一 昔时纷争世初启，尼卡多利锻斫世百兵，欲取诸支柱泰坦首级。翁法罗斯万民均瑟瑟胆寒，唯有一尚武部族深受「天谴之矛」威光折服，聚众成伍、一路追随尼卡多利行迹而去。为首者名唤歌耳戈，其人骁勇异常，一人、一盾、一矛，可于百人丛中恣意冲杀，待腰悬敌将首级凯旋之时，所着胸甲仍锃亮无痕。 纷争泰坦尼卡多利与天空泰坦艾格勒之争尤为长久，为追索云层之上那百目巨鸟踪迹，尼卡多利神躯往往掣电般自一邦疾行往另一邦。故歌耳戈部族亦不得不日夜兼程，循尼卡多利那震彻天地的战吼而去。此间歌耳戈一行遍历诸邦，所历奇诡之事颇众，笔者几经考究，仅录留其中几则最得民信者。 …… 歌耳戈最广为流传之伟业即为徒手搏杀特雷托斯雄狮一事。彼时歌耳戈一行途径特雷托斯城，城主设宴相待，却无半点肉食。城主称特雷托斯城郊外有一猛狮盘踞，为害多年，城中所有肉食均要定期遣人为它送去，若猛狮腹中稍有空荡，便会冲袭城中，叼取男女老少就地嚼食。 歌耳戈部族崇尚尼卡多利战魂，同样唾弃圈守一处安宁度日，本想置此邦自生自灭。然而全族人跋涉多日未沾荤腥，饥饿难耐，遂前往特雷托斯郊外围猎猛狮。 日烈天高，歌耳戈一行执矛持盾，与荒原上与那匹凶兽相逢。平凡雄狮，往往毛发暗沉如土，而特雷托斯雄狮则形貌异常，身形庞若城门、毛色熠熠如炬，日光之下宛若黄金浇筑的巨像。见此异兽，歌耳戈战意亢昂，旋即弃矛遗盾，喝止众人，独自徒手与其角力。 角斗耗时甚寡。特雷托斯雄狮才从巢中露头，歌耳戈已近身前，轻而易举将其掀倒在地，寥寥数击便劈碎恶兽几处关节。雄狮虽颓然倒地，喉中巨声却仍能震碎常人心肝。然歌耳戈一行追逐尼卡多利数载，领受的泰坦战吼之怖，一匹恶兽岂可比拟。据传雄狮伏诛后的百余岁间，特雷托斯城郊外仍有其临死前的咆哮回荡。 …… 众人逐尼卡多利数年之久，全族皆已筋疲力竭。彼时一行人恰好行至一座信奉欧洛尼斯的城邦，当地祭司呈以神谕：天谴之锋与逐锋之人，将永悬大地之上。歌耳戈与众勇士商议几日，决定赶在尼卡多利到达之前建造一座堡垒，待尼卡多利途径之时，最勇武的战士将站在堡垒之顶将它唤住，再由全族勇士彰显战魂、求取纷争泰坦的认可与赐福。 数月以后，堡垒完工，而尼卡多利亦追逐艾格勒行至歌耳戈近处。全族人均朝着那尊神躯高呼尼卡多利之名，然尼卡多利沉溺于朝艾格勒投掷长矛，对歌耳戈等人全无反应。眼见那纷争泰坦即将离去，歌耳戈意有所逮，奔入库中取来特雷托斯雄狮的头颅——兴许这凶兽过于怖人，就连塞纳托斯也不愿将它收取，时隔数年，其头颅仍未腐烂。 歌耳戈几步跃上城墙，将狮首举在额前，藉由巨兽头腔发出震耳欲聋的战吼。这等战吼虽远不及尼卡多利，却也终于将那尊泰坦唤住。见尼卡多利拧身回首，歌耳戈耸肩发劲，只一下便将黄金狮首嵌入城墙，率众勇士再度高呼「天谴之矛」威名。高傲的纷争泰坦终于认可这批逐锋之人，将其打造的一柄锋刃赋予歌耳戈部族，一众人等以巨石相砌，层层拱卫这柄锋刃，最终砌成一座移动要塞——此即最初的悬锋之城。歌耳戈即为第一代悬锋之王，后世尊其为「悬锋建城者」、「搦狮之王」。 ……
E: Preface A chronicle is a measure and record of time, while a national fortune book records the rise and fall of a nation. I, Ptolemy, have studied most of the books in the archives of Castrum Kremnos. In the royal biographies, most are focused on praising the current rulers, filled with eulogistic words, yet short of insightful advice. To fill this gap, I've endeavored to trace the 2,500-year history of Castrum Kremnos, documenting the dynasty's rise and decline, and the great deeds of its rulers, to preserve its enduring spirit and the legacy of Nikador for future generations to come. ... My work, Kings of Kremnos, is yet to be completed. As I follow the lone detachment, with each day uncertain and the future's fate unknown, I may never have the chance to see the new king of Kremnos ascend to the throne. Should I fall before then, I leave it to future hands to complete this work. ... Volume One At the dawn of the Era Bellica, Nikador forged hundreds of warriors and weapons, determined to claim the heads of the Foundation Titans. While the people of Amphoreus trembled in fear, one warlike tribe was awestruck by the Lance of Fury's glory. United under their light, they rallied to follow Nikador's path. The tribe leader was Gorgo, a warrior of unparalleled valor. Armed with a single shield and spear, they charged fearlessly into hundreds of foes. When they returned triumphant, the enemy commander's head at their belt, their breastplate shone unscathed. The battle between the Strife Titan Nikador and the Sky Titan Aquila was long and arduous. In pursuit of the hundred-eyed giant bird above the clouds, Nikador's divine body often streaked from one city to another. Therefore, Gorgo's tribe had to march day and night, guided only by the earth-shaking battle roars of Nikador. During these relentless journeys, Gorgo and their followers traversed many lands and had countless wondrous encounters. After extensive research, I've chosen to record some of the most credible tales. ... Gorgo's most renowned feat is their barehanded battle against the great lion of Tretos. At the time, their tribe was passing through the city of Tretos, where the local lord hosted a banquet in their honor. However, no meat was served. The lord explained that a fierce lion had long occupied the outskirts of the city. All meat was regularly sent to appease the beast's hunger, for if its hunger went unsated, it would raid the city, devouring its vulnerable inhabitants. Gorgo's tribe revered the warrior spirit of Nikador and despised the idea of settling in one place for a life of peace. Initially, they intended to leave this land to its own fate. However, after days of travel without a single taste of meat, their hunger became unbearable. Driven by desperation, they ventured to the outskirts of Tretos to hunt the lion. Under the scorching sun, Gorgo and their followers, armed with spears and shields, ventured into the plain to confront the fearsome beast. Unlike ordinary lions with dull coats, this Tretos lion was extraordinary — its form as massive as a city gate, its fur gleaming like a golden flame, shining under the sunlight like a colossus gilded in gold. At the sight of this magnificent creature, Gorgo's grit ignited. Casting aside their spear and shield, they instructed their followers to stand down. They would face the beast alone, barehanded, for an ultimate battle of strength. The duel was over in moments. As the lion emerged from its lair, Gorgo struck swiftly, effortlessly bringing the beast down. With a few swift blows, they shattered several of its joints. Though the lion lay defeated, its thunderous roar still echoed, enough to shatter the innards of ordinary folks. Yet Gorgo and their followers, hardened by years of following Nikador and enduring the terrifying battle cries of Titans, felt no fear. It is said that for over a century after the lion's death, its dying roar continued to reverberate across the outskirts of Tretos. ... Years of pursuing Nikador had left the entire tribe utterly exhausted. It was then that they arrived at a city devoted to Oronyx, where the local priests delivered a divine oracle: The Blade of Fury and their pursuers shall forever hang above the earth. After days of deliberation, Gorgo and their followers made a decision. They would build a fortress for Nikador's arrival. When Nikador passed by, their mightiest warrior would stand atop the fortress to halt them. Then the entire tribe would display their indomitable spirit, seeking the Strife Titan's recognition and benediction. Months later, the fortress was complete, and Nikador, in pursuit of Aquila, drew near Gorgo's tribe. The entire tribe shouted Nikador's name towards the divine body, but the Strife Titan, fixated on hurling spears at Aquila, paid them no heed. Seeing that Nikador was about to leave, Gorgo had an idea. They rushed into the storeroom and retrieved the head of the Tretos lion — a monstrous trophy so fearsome that perhaps even Thanatos refused to claim it. Remarkably, years had passed, yet the head remained unrotten. With a few strides, Gorgo leapt onto the fortress wall, raising the lion's head high above their forehead. Using the beast's hollow skull as a resonator, they let out a deafening roar. Though not so powerful as Nikador's battle cry, it was enough to halt the Strife Titan. As Nikador turned to look back, Gorgo flung their arm and hurled the head with such force that it embedded itself in the wall. Leading their warriors, they once again shouted praises to the Lance of Fury. The proud Strife Titan finally acknowledged their resolve and bestowed upon the tribe a blade forged by the Titan's own hand. To honor the Titan's gift, the tribe began to build a fortress around it with giant stones. Over time, a mobile citadel, known as Castrum Kremnos, took shape. Gorgo was crowned its first king, revered by later generations as the Founder of Kremnos and the Lion-Slayer King. ...

C: 神悟树庭历史文献•第三卷 记录者：智种学派 希罗多塔 光历4919年 在树庭建立后，学者们在争论与分歧中保持着克制，如此过了数百年，一场关乎生死存亡的争论终于爆发。起因是对于理性与信仰的权衡。部分学者认为树庭应纯然追求知识，另一些则主张不应背离对瑟希斯的敬畏。争论日益激烈，各派学者甚至一度分裂成七个独立的团体，各自在树庭不同区域自行其是。 莲食学派从慈爱之庭迁往偏僻的林地，山羊学派的学者带着他们的奇兽隐居深林，而绳结学派的数学家们甚至扬言要离开树庭，去寻找一片「不被愚人污染的净土」。眼看这座智慧的圣地就要四分五裂，各派才不得不坐在一起商议对策。 经过三个月的反复协商，七派终于同意在逐星天井举行议会。会议持续了整整七天。根据当时的记载，第一天的辩论几近失控。敬拜学派坚持认为，一切研究都应以崇敬泰坦为根本。而曳石学派则反驳说，过度的敬畏会阻碍真理的探索。赤陶学派更是抨击其他派系「以理性之名扼杀艺术的自由」。 争执一直持续到第四天，一场罕见的雷暴雨于白日突袭树庭，众学者被迫转移至友爱之馆避雨休息。就在这个茶休的间歇里，学者们开始思考一个根本性的问题：为何瑟希斯选择以一棵树的形态降临？ 山羊学派指出，树木既需要扎根大地，又要向天空伸展；既要遵循生长的规律，又要适应环境的变化。绳结学派的数学家补充说，树的形态本身就蕴含着最严密的数理结构。而莲食学派则提醒众人，树木的生长离不开阳光、雨露、泥土的供养，正如知识的成长也需要多方的滋养。 到了第六天，各派终于就管理体系达成一致：设立七贤制度，让各派保持独立性的同时又能相互制衡。但关于首席贤者的人选，争论却陷入了前所未有的僵局。 每一派都认为自己最接近瑟希斯的理念：秘芽学派（即现今的智种学派，为方便理解，以下均以「智种学派」称之）强调对生命本质的追寻，莲食学派坚持身心的修持，山羊学派主张回归自然，绳结学派推崇严密的逻辑，敬拜学派重视神圣的仪式，曳石学派追求完美的平衡，赤陶学派则捍卫艺术的自由。 争论持续了整整一天一夜。人们提出了种种方案：轮值制、议会制、甚至抽签制，但都无法让所有人满意。就在僵持不下时，一片树叶从圣树飘落，正好落在议事桌中央。这一幕让在场的学者想起了一个古老的寓言：瑟希斯曾说，理性之树的根系与枝叶同样重要，若偏废一端，整棵树都会枯萎。 沉默良久，不知是谁先说出了一个想法：既然无人能够代表理性本身，不如让首席永远虚悬，以此向瑟希斯致意。这个提议在场间传开，渐渐获得了认同。这不仅象征着对泰坦的敬畏，也提醒着所有学者：任何人都不该僭越理性本身。 到了第七天，各派终于就管理体系达成一致：设立七贤制度，以此实现树庭内部的平衡。七贤并非单纯的学术领袖，而是一个深思熟虑的管理体系。 至此，七贤分别执掌树庭七大要务： 1、智种学派的贤者负责实验与研究的审核，确保探索不会危及树庭安全 2、莲食学派的贤者管理药圃与膳食，维系师生的身心健康 3、山羊学派的贤者监管林地与奇兽，平衡自然与人为的界限 4、绳结学派的贤者主理图书与档案，确保知识的传承与保存 5、敬拜学派的贤者主持重要仪式，维护树庭与泰坦的联系 6、曳石学派的贤者督导体技训练，培养身心合一的修行 7、赤陶学派的贤者掌管艺术教化，滋养心灵与感知的成长 其次，设立了严格的制衡机制： 1、每位贤者任期七年，不得由同一学派重复担任。 2、重大决议需至少五位贤者同意。 3、任何实验或研究若涉及三个以上学派，必须经由相关贤者联合审议。 4、各贤者有权否决本学派内的危险行为。 5、若有贤者失职，其他六贤可联名弹劾。 最后，为确保传承，还设立了继任制度： 1、每位贤者需培养三名继任候选人。 2、继任者必须获得至少四位贤者的认可。 3、不同学派的继任者需互相学习对方专长。 4、继任者需在友爱之馆中共同生活一年，培养默契。 而首席之位，永远留给圣树与理性本身。 在议定书的最后，七派共同写下一段结语：「我们追求知识，但不僭越神性； 我们尊崇信仰，但不背离理性。 如同圣树的根叶交融， 智慧与敬畏当相辅相成。」 从后续的影响来看，七贤议定的结果不仅确保了学术的自由发展，也维系了各派之间的制衡，更重要的是，它为后世树立了一个范例：真正的智慧，来自于多元的融合，而非单一的独尊。正是这次议定确立的平衡，让神悟树庭在此后的岁月里始终保持着活力。 附：现任树庭七贤人名录 莲食学派：美狄亚 山羊学派：███ 绳结学派：阿普列尤斯 敬拜学派：██ 曳石学派：████ 赤陶学派：苏鲁琦珮 智种学派：那刻夏
E: Grove of Epiphany historical document: Volume 3. Recorded by: Nousporist scholar Herodotan — Light Calendar Year 4919 Since the establishment of the Grove, scholars have maintained a level of restraint when it came to debates and disagreements. After centuries of maintaining this balance, a debate erupted that became a matter of our survival or extinction. The cause of this debate was the balance between reason and faith. A portion of the scholars believed that the Grove should act purely in pursuit of knowledge. Others argued that scholars must not deviate from their reverence of Cerces. The debate intensified by the day, as scholars from each school eventually split into seven independent groups, each operating independently in separate areas of the Grove. The Lotophagists moved from the Courtyard of Storge to a remote forest, the Caprist scholars led their beasts into seclusion, and the Nodist mathematicians even claimed that they would leave the Grove to find a "pure land that had not been tainted by idiocy." Seeing this paradise of intellect about to be divided, each school had no choice but to meet and discuss a countermeasure. After three months of constant negotiation, the seven schools finally agreed to hold a conference in the Star-Chase Atrium. The conference continued for a full seven days. According to the records from the time, the first day of discussion almost spiraled out of control. The Venerationists persisted in their belief that all research should be completed with reverence for the Titans at its core. The Helkolithists on the other hand disputed this, saying that excessive reverence would impede the search for truth. The Erythrokeramists went on to criticize the other schools for "stifling the freedom of artistic expression in the name of reason." The dispute persisted until the fourth day, when a rare lightning storm hit the Grove by surprise and the scholars were forced to move to the Library of Philia to rest and seek refuge from the rain. It was during this tea break that the scholars began to reflect on one question: Why would Cerces choose to come to earth in the form of a tree? The Caprists pointed out that trees need to be rooted to the ground as well as growing upwards towards the sky. They must follow the rules of growth whilst adjusting to the changes in their environment. The Nodist mathematicians added that the form of a tree itself contains a most strict mathematical structure. The Lotophagists on the other hand reminded everyone that the growth of a tree is dependent on sunlight, rainfall, and nutrients from the soil, much like knowledge requires various sustenance to grow. By the sixth day, the various schools finally reached an accord regarding their management structure: The establishment of the Seven Sages system would allow each school to maintain their independence while simultaneously keeping each other in balance. However, debate regarding the candidate for Head Sage led to an unprecedented stalemate. Each school insisted that their beliefs were closest to the ideals of Cerces: The Cryptogenists (currently known as the Nousporists, hereafter referred to as the "Nousporists" for clarity) placed importance on seeking out the true nature of life itself, the Lotophagists maintained the importance of cultivation of body and mind, the Caprists advocated returning to nature, the Nodists held watertight logic in the highest esteem, the Venerationists emphasized divine rituals, the Helkolithists sought perfect balance, and the Erythrokeramists stood in defense of artistic freedom. This debate endured an entire day and night. People proposed all sorts of solutions: A rotation system, a parliamentary system, and someone even proposed a lottery system. However, there was no one solution that could satisfy everyone. Just when the stalemate reached its pinnacle, a single leaf fell from the sacred tree and happened to land in the center of the conference table. This sight reminded the scholars of an ancient proverb: Cerces once said that the roots of the tree of reason are just as important as its branches. If one end is neglected, the entire tree will wither. After a long period of silence, someone proposed an idea: As no one can represent Reason itself, why do we not leave the seat of Head Sage permanently empty as tribute to Cerces? This proposal spread throughout the venue and gradually gained favor. Not only would this gesture show reverence to the Titans, it also serves as a reminder to all scholars: No one should try to overstep the authority of Reason themself. By the seventh day, the various schools finally reached an accord regarding their management structure: They established the Seven Sages system to achieve balance in the Grove. The Seven Sages were not merely leaders. They were also a carefully constructed management system. At this point, the Seven Sages each took charge of the seven major roles within the Grove: 1. The Nousporism Sage was responsible for reviewing experiments and research to ensure that investigations would not endanger the Grove itself. 2. The Lotophagism Sage managed medicines and meals to maintain the physical and mental health of the various scholars. 3. The Caprism Sage would oversee the forests and the beasts to balance the boundaries between nature and humankind. 4. The Nodism Sage took responsibility for books and documentation to ensure the preservation and passing on of knowledge. 5. The Venerationism Sage managed important ceremonies to maintain the connection between the Grove and the Titans. 6. The Helkolithism Sage supervised physical training to cultivate the practice of unifying the mind and body. 7. The Erythrokeramism Sage took charge of artistic education to nourish the growth of the soul and the senses. Following this, they established a strict system of rules: 1. Each Sage can serve for only seven years, and their role cannot be held repeatedly by a scholar of the same school. 2. An important decision requires the agreement of at least five Sages. 3. If any experiment or research involves three or more different schools, it must undergo joint review by the relevant Sages. 4. Each Sage has the right to veto dangerous behaviors within their school. 5. If a Sage neglects their duties, the other six can unite to impeach them. Finally, they established a succession system to ensure that the system can be passed down properly: 1. Each Sage must raise three candidates for their succession. 2. The successor must obtain the approval of at least four other Sages. 3. Successors of seats in other schools must learn from each other's areas of expertise. 4. The successors must live together for one year inside the Library of Philia to nurture a mutual understanding. As for the seat of Head Sage, it will forever be reserved for the sacred tree and Reason themself. At the end of the protocol agreement, the seven schools wrote a concluding remark: "We pursue knowledge, but do not overstep divinity. We respect faith, but do not deviate from reason. Just as the roots of the sacred tree intertwine, intellect and reverence too must complement one another." It is clear from the subsequent influence it has had that the Protocol of the Seven Sages not only ensured the free development of academic research but also maintained checks and balances between the various schools. Even more importantly, it sets an example for future generations: True intellect is derived from the fusion of diverse influences, not from a singular supremacy. It was the equilibrium ensured by this protocol that allowed the Grove of Epiphany to maintain its vitality in the years to come. Attachment: List of Current Seven Sages in the Grove Lotophagism: Medea Caprism: ██████ Nodism: Apuleius Venerationism: █████ Helkolithism: ████████ Erythrokeramism: Socrippe Nousporism: Anaxa

C: [哀丽秘榭港口散落的数张货物提单，纸张的一角受到海水腐蚀，部分字迹不可辨认。] 【家具提单】 托运人：████ 收货人：希洛尼摩斯 船舶名：月桂号 装货港：奥赫玛 卸货港：哀丽秘榭 货名及件数：双耳陶瓶二十只，陶罐十只 提单誊写数：3份 备注：朋友，吉奥里亚一定是在你的田地里施了魔法，叫你把庄稼们照顾得这么饱满充实。上一批运来的新麦不到三天就销售一空，云石市集的顾客都交口称赞，说哀丽秘榭的麦子品质最好，由其制成的烤饼能吃出幸福的味道。 奥赫玛工匠善于打造各类陶器，随船运去双耳陶瓶二十只、陶罐十只。愿天父护佑它们不被法吉娜的狂舞所摧毁，这些陶器会成为你谷仓中的实用储纳空间。 【工具提单】 托运人：████ 收货人：伽尔巴 船舶名：桦木快帆号 装货港：奥赫玛 卸货港：哀丽秘榭 货名及件数：弦蜡五罐，磨刀石两块，锉刀一把，箭簇模具一组 提单誊写数：3份 备注：真不好意思，老伙计！前段时间忙得很，城内所有武器工匠都被紧急征召，我手上的订单不得不搁置下来。随船多运去三罐弦蜡，作为拖延交付的补偿。 说实话，我很羡慕你的生活，能够自由地安排全天作息。我也一把年纪了，造了半辈子的箭簇，没有挽弓搭箭过一次。真希望这艘船上，也有我的位置啊。 【书籍提单】 托运人：████ 收货人：皮西厄斯 船舶名：缪斯号 装货港：神悟树庭 卸货港：哀丽秘榭 货名及件数：莎草纸卷轴五十卷 提单誊写数：3份 备注：皮西厄斯老师，树庭真的好大好大呀，比整个哀丽秘榭都大！我通过了入学考试，现在正在莲食学派门下学习呢，每天要和许许多多种古怪植物打交道，正好把老爹教我的农作知识全用上。可惜这些精致的小庄稼们离开人一天都不行，我得在树庭待好长好长一段时间，学成毕业之后就回去和您一起教书。 这些卷轴是我为村里的学生们挑的，范围涵盖历史、政治、修辞等领域。如果再有学生问起外面的世界，您就有资料供其阅览啦。好奇心就像一枚种子，它会如您所期望的那样，在哀丽秘榭生根发芽，将枝冠伸向更大的世界。
E: [Scattered cargo receipts found at the Aedes Elysiae port. The corners have been worn away by seawater, leaving parts of the writing illegible.] [Furniture Bill of Lading] Shipper: ███████ Consignee: Hieronymus Vessel: The Laurel Port of Loading: Okhema Port of Discharge: Aedes Elysiae Goods: 20 twin-eared vases, 10 dolia Copies Made: 3 Notes: My dear friend, it seems Georios has truly blessed your fields. Your harvests are fuller and more vibrant than ever. The fresh wheat from your last shipment sold out in under three days! The customers at Marmoreal Market couldn't stop praising it, saying that the bread made from Aedes Elysiae wheat carries the very taste of happiness. The artisans of Okhema are skilled in crafting all manner of fine pottery. This time, we've sent you twenty twin-eared vases and ten dolia aboard the Laurel. May sky father shield them from Phagousa's wild tempests. I trust these vessels will find good use in your granaries, keeping your golden harvest safe and sound. [Tool Bill of Lading] Shipper: ███████ Consignee: Galba Vessel: The Swift Birch Port of Loading: Okhema Port of Discharge: Aedes Elysiae Goods: 5 jars of bowstring wax, 2 whetstones, 1 file, 1 set of arrowhead molds Copies Made: 3 Notes: My apologies, old friend! Things have been so hectic here, all the weapon smiths were urgently conscripted by the city, and I had no choice but to put my orders aside for a while. To make it up to you, I've added three extra jars of bowstring wax to the shipment. Honestly, sometimes I envy you, being able to set your own schedule. I'm not getting any younger. Spent half a lifetime forging arrowheads, yet never once did I nock an arrow for myself. Sometimes, I wonder if there could've been a place for me aboard your ship too. [Book Bill of Lading] Shipper: ███████ Consignee: Pythias Vessel: The Muse Port of Loading: Grove of Epiphany Port of Discharge: Aedes Elysiae Goods: 50 rolls of papyrus Copies Made: 3 Notes: Professor Pythias, the Grove is vast, far grander than our entirety of Aedes Elysiae! I've passed the entrance exam and now study under the Lotophagists, surrounded daily by the strangest of plants. Father's farming lessons have come in handy. These delicate crops wilt if left even a day unattended, so I'll be here a long while. But once I graduate, I'll return to teach beside you. These scrolls were chosen for the village students, covering history, politics, and rhetoric. If anyone asks about the world beyond, now you'll have books to show them. Curiosity, like a seed, will one day take root, just as you wished. It will grow from Aedes Elysiae into the wider world beyond.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 状如花萼的奇异造物，赤色芯蕊，玄黑花瓣。它似在不停模仿、拼凑着现实存在的元素，试图创成新的事物。
E: A strange creation in the shape of a flower's sepal, with crimson stamens and pistils and ink-black petals. It seems to continuously imitate and piece together elements found in reality in an attempt to create new existences.

C: 「白日梦」酒店的门前广场。门前宏伟的表盘停滞不转，喷泉喷涌着金黄的糖浆，提醒宾客已身处梦境。
E: The plaza before the entrance to The Reverie. The magnificent dial stays halted and unmoving, while fountains erupt with golden syrup, reminding guests they dwell within the Dreamscape.

C: 妖精们的隐秘居所，其入口隐藏在幽深的树洞中，据说只有天真无邪的孩子才能受邀进入。
E: The secret residence for the fairies. Its entrance is concealed in a dark and deep tree hole. It's said that only pure and innocent children can be invited to enter.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 裂界中暂时停滞行动的虚影，不去触碰便不会有危险。\n无论细节如何逼真，它都只是现实的影子，是裂界仿造的玩具罢了。
E: A shadow in the Fragmentum that temporarily stays stagnant. It is not dangerous if left alone.\nAs lifelike as it may look, it is only part of the umbra of reality, a toy counterfeited by the Fragmentum.

C: 撷取虫皇子嗣之颚，凝聚天体死光。再现「繁育」的旧日梦魇。
E: Gathering the jaws of the Imperator Insectorum's progeny, condensing the light of stellar deaths, reenacting the old nightmare of the Propagation.

C: 可选加入罐中的药剂：蛇莓，香料，药草，霜状白糖，几克甜点生命的灵感，足量的魅力。
E: Optional remedies added to the jar: Snakeberries, spices, herbs, frosting, a few grams of dessert lifeform inspiration, and lots of charm.

C: 进可列阵邀击，退可诱敌聚歼——银鬃铁卫扼此瓮城、灵活应敌，确保战争最终胜利。
E: While advancing, they quickly form an intercepting formation; when retreating, they can lure the enemy into a trap for annihilation — the Silvermane Guards hold this enceinte and fight the enemy strategically, ensuring their ultimate victory.

C: 受到星核的影响，北方的雪原与裂界融为一体，呼啸的凛风夹带着经久不息的哭喊。
E: Affected by the Stellaron, the northern Snow Plains and Fragmentum have merged, and the howling bitter wind carries an incessant cry.

C: 囚徒将自己与那束劫火钉死在一处——在这埋葬了三千万世记忆与执念的彼岸。
E: The prisoner pinned themselves and the karmic flame together in one place... This nethershore where the memories and obsessions of thirty million worlds lie buried.

C: 贝洛伯格的城门外没有丝毫生命的迹象——有的只是无际的雪原与呼啸的寒风。
E: There are no signs of life outside the Belobog city gates — only the endless snow and howling wind.

C: 这片过去不见经传的矿区现在以前所未闻的巨大地髓矿脉闻名，众多纷争也随之而来。
E: This formerly ordinary mine is now known by every undergrounder for its newly discovered Geomarrow vein with incredible deposits. Countless disputes over it have ensued ever since.

C: 有着超过<unbreak>600</unbreak>年历史的贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆，陈列着诸多对这座城市而言有着非凡意义的珍贵展品。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum, which has a history of more than <unbreak>600</unbreak> years, displays many precious exhibits of extraordinary significance to this city.

C: 十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组…的集合点。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident's... meeting point.

C: 金人巷内随时随地会发生的大小事。帮助街坊邻里解决麻烦，提高商会口碑，说不定会有意料之外的收获。
E: Ordinary life problems that can happen any time in Aurum Alley. Lend a hand to the neighborhood, improve the Merchant Guild's reputation, and you may just stumble upon some unexpected benefits.

C: 记忆中衣匠的具象化，驻于世外的哀丽秘榭。
E: A manifestation of Garmentmaker in memory. It resides in Aedes Elysiae beyond this world.

C: 工造司匠人随手造就的机巧发明。原本不具灵智，如今却因为某些异变被赋予了短暂的「生命」。
E: An ingenious invention casually made by craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission. These were originally inanimate products, but have now been given a fleeting "life" due to certain abnormal changes.

C: 寒潮降临后逡巡在裂界中的虚影。它扭曲地模仿着银鬃铁卫的身形。其甲胄着装与贝洛伯格的战士们同样严整，头颅却被没有五官的燃烬所取代。
E: Shades that wander in the Fragmentum after the arrival of the Eternal Freeze. It mimics the form of the Silvermane Guards in a twisted manner. Fitted with the same uniformed armors of the Belobog warriors, its head, however, is replaced by burned ashes.

C: 贝洛伯格的执法者，守护冰雪中残存文明的最后一道阵线。被分配到不同地区的银鬃铁卫职责不尽相同，但共通的是他们保家卫民的决心。
E: The keeper of peace in Belobog, and the final line of defense protecting this last bastion of civilization in the snow. Silvermane Guards allocated to different areas have different duties, but they share a common resolve to protect their home and people.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。信仰如飞箭矢志不移，为泰坦造主的悬锋与凶矛寻取猎物，猎杀荒原中的奇兽与战场上的敌兵，射程之内无活物得以幸免。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. With faith as steadfast as flying arrows, they are the means to find prey for Kremnos' forces, hunting down beasts and foes across the wastes, and ensuring none survive within firing range.

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，能承载泰坦灵魂的强大造物。以巨剑抵挡黑潮的侵袭，亦会用巨剑带来战争的侵袭。\n天谴先锋会献祭弱小的眷属，以此暴行换得泰坦的天罚。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. With their greatswords, they stand ready to repel the rush of the black tide or turn their blade in a countering onslaught in times of war.\nFuriae Praetor will sacrifice their weaker kin, exchanging atrocity for divine punishments from the Titan.

E: Supermultimedia Entertainment System <unbreak>32</unbreak>

C: 雅努萨波利斯的另一位圣女：缇宁大人。话说，聆听神谕的缇宁大人，能否聆听到神对她的比赛结果的谕示呢？
E: Another Holy Maiden of Janusopolis: Lady Trinnon. By the way, can Lady Trinnon, who listens to prophecies, hear the gods' prophecy about her match results?

C: 比赛开始时<color=#f29e38ff>吞噬己方海豹</color>，获得其#1%的攻击力与#2%的生命值。\n黑化海豹被击败后将吐出友方海豹，且无法复活。
E: At the start of the match, <color=#f29e38ff>consumes allied seals</color> and gains #1% of their ATK and #2% of their HP.\nWhen Dark Seal is defeated, it spits out the allied seals and cannot be revived.

C: 行动中碰撞到的<color=#f29e38ff>首个</color>小海豹获得<color=#f29e38ff>额外行动</color>。
E: Grants the <color=#f29e38ff>first</color> baby seal collided with during the action an <color=#f29e38ff>extra action</color>.

C: o((•ω‡= )o「你，该不会打不过将死之豹吧？」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "You... wouldn't lose to a dying seal, would you?" )∋

C: 行动时，发射#1个<color=#f29e38ff>水弹</color>攻击随机敌方小海豹，每个造成#2%攻击力的伤害。
E: During the action, fires #1 <color=#f29e38ff>water bomb(s)</color> at a random enemy baby seal, each dealing DMG equal to #2% of ATK.

C: 每消除<color=#f29e38ff>#1个草莓</color>，则随机将场上<color=#f29e38ff>#2</color>个水果转化为<color=#f29e38ff>直线炸弹</color>。\n直线炸弹被消除时，可引爆<color=#f29e38ff>炸弹所在的行</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>列</color>。
E: For every <color=#f29e38ff>#1 Strawberries</color> cleared, randomly transform <color=#f29e38ff>#2</color> fruits on the board to <color=#f29e38ff>Line Bombs</color>. \nLine Bombs can detonate a <color=#f29e38ff>row</color> or a <color=#f29e38ff>column</color> when cleared.

C: 精彩非凡！
E: That was splendid!

C: 那…你加油？
E: Well... Good luck, then?

C: [回复：克瑞斯] 开做提前和我说声，年纪大了受不住这味道。
E: [Replied to: Kyros] Give me a heads-up before cooking. My old nose can't handle that smell these days!

C: 我方全体的火属性伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>
E: Increases the Fire DMG of all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 每个轮开始时，使敌方全体当前承受的所有持续伤害立即产生相当于原伤害<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害。
E: At the start of each Cycle, all enemies currently inflicted with DoT are immediately dealt DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG from all their DoT effects.

C: 我方目标及武器造成的风、雷属性伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: Wind and Lightning DMG dealt by ally targets and weapons increase by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 我方目标及武器造成的冰、火属性伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。
E: Ice and Fire DMG dealt by ally targets and weapons increase by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>.

C: 获得和升级【永恒之心】时，完全回复我方生命值、战技点、能量。队伍等级提高时，我方全体回复<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>生命值，恢复<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color>点战技点和<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#13[i]</unbreak>)}</color>点能量。
E: Upon obtaining and when leveling up Heart of Eternity, completely recovers all allies' HP, Skill Points, and Energy. When the team level increases, all allies restore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> HP, recover <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#12[i]</unbreak>)}</color> Skill Points, and regenerate <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#13[i]</unbreak>)}</color> Energy.

C: 将【歼灭标记】施加于1名敌方目标，若我方目标的攻击对其造成击破伤害，在攻击后使其受到等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>基础伤害的随机属性伤害并添加相应属性弱点，并发射<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2#(+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color>次激光，后续伤害为原伤害的<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3#(+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>。【歼灭标记】在敌方目标被消灭时转移给另一个敌方目标。
E: Applies "Mark of Ruin" to one enemy target. After an ally target's attack deals Break DMG to it, inflicts DMG of a random Type equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of base DMG to it and applies the corresponding Weakness Type. The DMG fires <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C2# (+<unbreak>#14[i]</unbreak>)}</color> laser(s), with subsequent DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C3# (+<unbreak>#15[i]%</unbreak>)}</color> of the original DMG. "Mark of Ruin" will be transferred to another enemy target when the original target is defeated.

C: 我方目标及武器造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1#(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>，敌方目标造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>
E: DMG dealt by ally targets and weapons increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#f29e38ff>{C1# (+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)}</color>. DMG dealt by enemy targets increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 我方目标施放攻击后有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的基础概率使攻击目标陷入【厄运】：造成的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>，受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)</color>，每陷入1个其他负面状态，造成的伤害额外降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>回合。
E: After any ally target uses an attack, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> base chance of inflicting "Misfortune" to the attacked target, which decreases their DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases their DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> <color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#13[i]%</unbreak>)</color>. For every other debuff they are afflicted with, their DMG dealt additionally decreases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>. This status lasts for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

C: 我方目标为敌方目标施加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>个负面状态后，对敌方全体造成1次等同于攻击力<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)</color>的附加伤害，并使其陷入风化、裂伤、灼烧、触电、纠缠、冰冻、禁锢状态中的随机1种，持续1回合。
E: After an ally target has applied <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> debuff(s) to enemy targets, deals 1 instance of Additional DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)</color> of their ATK to all enemies and inflict 1 status out of the following (Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, Shock, Entanglement, Freeze, or Imprisonment) to the enemies for 1 turn.

C: 我方目标击破特攻提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)</color>，击破敌方目标弱点时使其陷入冻结状态，持续1回合。
E: Increases ally targets' Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> <color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)</color> and inflict Freeze when breaking enemy targets' Weakness, lasting for 1 turn.

C: 我方目标造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak>)</color>，每次【苏生】后使自身与忆灵造成的伤害额外提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><color=#6ee0b6ff>(+<unbreak>#12[i]%</unbreak>)</color>。【苏生】后的下一次施放攻击后，对攻击目标造成等同于生命上限<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>的附加伤害。

One creation jumped onto the floor and conversed with its own reflection on the polished floor for 5 minutes. The other creations are very concerned about its mental health. 3. Two creations fell asleep while snuggling against each other. However, one of them experienced a leg cramp and kicked the other dozens of times. Both woke up from the dream and engaged in a heated argument. 4. A passing robot was updating its system today and made strange noises, waking up three creations in the process. 5. Three creations are curled up in the same nest and seeking warmth from each other. The air condition temperature for this area has been reduced.

C: 西衍先生最近打算深挖一下罗浮剑首镜流的艺术创作。他提到「镜流十三奇功」中「擒获步离狼首呼雷」的篇章，那一年步离狼卒黑压压如云，云骑天兵持阵以待…一隙月光穿过敌阵，直面那狼群枭首，西衍先生看向你——
E: Mr. Xiyan intends to research an artistic piece about the Luofu Sword Champion Jingliu recently. He says that in the "Capturing borisin Wolf-Head Hoolay" chapter of "Jingliu's <unbreak>13</unbreak> Outstanding Accolades," that year when the borisin wolves swarmed the lands like dark clouds, the Cloud Knights were at the ready, laying in wait... A streak of moonlight pierced through the enemy ranks, shining its light upon the wolf pack's leader. Mr. Xiyan looks over to you...

C: 你在丹鼎司的快递箱里翻出一枚「灵丹妙药」，它的包装上写着「包治百病，但有副作用」，副作用是什么呢，你略作考虑——

C: 本场战斗中我方目标的生命值最多降至1点，同时将受到的伤害超出当前生命值的部分转化为【负载生命值】。处于【负载生命值】状态的我方单位造成的伤害和弱点击破效率大幅降低。
E: In this combat, ally targets' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.

E: Restore HP to dispel the "HP Overload" state from all allies before Boss Mirage uses "Death Wishes For More Death."

E: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Type</color> they have increases DMG received.

C: 众星拱卫
E: Stellar Aegis

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为徘徊在裂界中的机械单元，但毫无疑问这并非人类技术造就的产物，而是裂界扭曲的力量模仿而成的怪物。\n深寒徘徊者（错误）会吸引永冬灾影，同时能降低我方的速度与冰属性抗性。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a machine unit prowling in the Fragmentum. Undoubtedly, this monstrosity is not a human creation, but one that was born out of the perversion of the Fragmentum.\nFrigid Prowler (Bug) will attract Everwinter Shadewalker and reduce its opponents' SPD and Ice RES.

C: 代码受到影响后的错误投影。参照本体为以古老机巧术铸造的镇守金人。\n无数岁月前，金人随着仙舟出航求取仙方，监管和辅助人类进行战争——但历尽叛乱后，金人最终为仙舟人所降服。\n而今所有的金人都被符箓严格宰制，用以把守机要重地。
E: A false projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is the garrison aurumatons created with ancient ingenium technology.\nCountless years ago, the aurumatons set sail with the Xianzhou to seek divine recipes of immortality, and were tasked to oversee humanity and to aid humankind during warfare. However, after countless rebellions, they were finally overpowered by the Xianzhou natives.\nNow, all aurumatons are strictly controlled with talismans, and are employed to guard important places.

C: 集中了所有拍摄资源，成为大咖中的大咖的主角斯科特。意识和灵魂被从者分散后，以千般面相展开了对开拓者的复仇。
E: Skott, who gathered all the filming resources to become the greatest protagonist of all protagonists. With his consciousness and soul scattered by a Servant, he seeks revenge from the Trailblazer in a thousand different appearances.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为「纷争」的泰坦，在疯狂中延续疯狂的战争，乃是翁法罗斯众邦挥之不去的恐惧。\n它也曾身负荣耀的威名，令众邦众神心怀敬意。而那敬畏它的城邦被踏碎，那赞颂它的诗篇被焚毁，只有恶名回荡在无光的末世，玷污全世之座背负的光辉。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a Titan of Strife that continues the mad war in their frenzy, becoming the unconquerable fear of the masses of Amphoreus.\nThey once were famed through glory, earning respect from gods and the people of the land. And yet, the city-states that revered them were sundered, and the poems that praised their name were destroyed. Only their evil reputation lingers in this lightless era and end times, tainting the Throne of Worlds's brilliance.

C: 盗火行者以灾难之力创造的分身，皆是寄宿着破坏意志的祸端。
E: Each and every clone summoned by the Flame Reaver using the Calamity Power is a seed of ruin harboring the will of destruction within.

C: 遭到黑潮侵蚀的正阳狮鹫。对杀戮的渴求成为了空洞躯壳中仅存的意志。\n虽然失去了艾格勒的赐福，但黑潮中取之不竭的能量令它成为了更加恐怖的存在。
E: Noontide Gryphon corroded by the black tide, driven solely by an insatiable thirst for bloodshed.\nEven after losing Aquila's blessings, the inexhaustible energy within the black tide has turned it into something even more horrifying.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 由星核力量幻造而成的虚影，执行着令裂界不断扩张的意志。\n智慧生命的欲求在裂界中投影形成的活体能量，犹如一颗沙砾在蚌壳中凝成了珠贝。然而驱动它的这股欲望早已扭曲，模糊不清。
E: A shadow manifested by the power of Stellaron, carrying out the Fragmentum's unceasing will to expand.\nA physical embodiment of the desires of intelligent life in the Fragmentum, like a pearl created from a single grain of sand. However, its purpose has long been twisted and distorted.

E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and has a chance to inflict Reverberation.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害，如果该目标处于【强烈震荡】状态，则额外对该目标造成物理属性伤害，同时解除该目标的【强烈震荡】状态。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target. If the target is afflicted with Strong Reverberation, they additionally take Physical DMG, and Strong Reverberation is then dispelled.

E: Immediately restores HP and gains 1 stack of Synwood Renewal.

C: 当敌方施放攻击后，为<u>能够进入【月狂】状态的敌方单位</u>附加1层【<u>嗜血</u>】，当【<u>嗜血</u>】达到指定层数时，将使其进入【<u>月狂</u>】状态。\n行动序列上出现【月狂】倒计时，倒计时回合开始时所有敌方单位解除【<u>月狂</u>】状态。
E: After a friendly unit launches an attack, applies 1 stack of "<u>Bloodlust</u>" to <u>friendly units who can enter the "Moon Rage" effect</u>. When "<u>Bloodlust</u>" reaches a certain stack, the friendly unit enters the "<u>Moon Rage</u>" state.\nA "Moon Rage" countdown icon appears in the Action Order. When the countdown's turn begins, "<u>Moon Rage</u>" is dispelled across all friendly units.

C: 在受到攻击后，会从【课堂频道】状态转变为【课间频道】状态。处在【课间频道】状态时，受到攻击后不会切换频道。
E: After being attacked, switches the "Classroom Channel" state to the "Off-Class Channel" state. When in "Off-Class Channel" state, will not switch channels after being attacked.

E: While not under the Charging state, upon reaching a certain number of Stove Heating stacks, immediately takes action and uses Stove Detonation.

C: 自身在攻击时有概率对目标施加减速状态。
E: When attacking, this unit has a chance to Slow the target.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 大概率使我方单体陷入【<u>异梦</u>】状态。
E: High chance of inflicting <u>Alien Dream</u> to a single target.

C: 在行动序列上添加【期末晚会】，每次【期末晚会】行动时，解除场上所有「蕉研组」成员的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，将全体「蕉研组」的【课间频道】状态转变为【课堂频道】状态，并施放【致博士：蕉学成果汇演】。每当有一名「蕉研组」成员的弱点被击破时，【期末晚会】的行动将小幅延后。
E: Adds "End-of-Semester Dinner" in the Action Order. Every time "End-of-Semester Dinner" takes action, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states on all Banacademic Office members on the field, switches all "Off-Class Channel" states on all Banacademic Office members on the field to "Classroom Channel" states, and uses "To the Doctor: Banacademic Report." Every time a Banacademic Office member's Weakness is Broken, the action of "End-of-Semester Dinner" is slightly delayed.

C: 在行动序列上添加【孤狼之哮】，每次【孤狼之哮】行动时，解除场上所有「斯科特」的控制类负面状态与弱点击破状态，将全体「斯科特」的【讥讽】状态转变为【狂乱】状态，并施放【致孤狼：卑劣人生】。每当有一名「斯科特」的弱点被击破时，【孤狼之哮】的行动将小幅延后。
E: Adds "Roar of the Lone Wolf" on the Action Order. Every time "Roar of the Lone Wolf" takes action, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs and Weakness Broken states on all "Skott" units on the field, switches all "Mocked" states on all "Skott" units on the field to "Rabid" states, and uses "To the Lone Wolf: Ignoble Life." Every time a "Skott" is Weakness Broken, the action of "Roar of the Lone Wolf" is slightly delayed.

C: 每当我方目标陷入【梦死】状态时，召唤一个对应的【永眠墓碣】；当我方全体陷入【梦死】状态或无法战斗状态时，战斗失败。
E: Whenever a character gets inflicted with Morbid Dream, summons a corresponding Sombrous Sepulcher. When all characters get inflicted with Morbid Dream or are knocked down, this battle will be considered a defeat.

C: 对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to a single target and units adjacent to the target.

C: 使自身进入【尔在光明中】状态，获得护盾，造成的伤害提高，受到的伤害降低，且韧性无法被削减。
E: Enters the "If We Live In the Light" state, gains a Shield, increases the DMG dealt, decreases the DMG taken, and makes Toughness immune to reduction.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated target.

C: 受到致命攻击时，攻击者的速度和造成的伤害提高。
E: When receiving a killing blow, increases the attacker's SPD and DMG dealt.

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，可使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少1层自身【战甲】，减少到0层时立即施放【像威猛暴怒的雄狮】。吸收到目标后对全体敌人造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使破坏【战甲】的我方目标恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit when attacked. When at 0 stacks, immediately uses "Resembling Furious Lion." After absorbing targets, deals massive Imaginary DMG to all friendly units and regenerate Energy to the target that destroyed "War Armor." After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合使用【在滔滔血海中沉溺】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Drowned in the Crimson Sea" in the next turn.

C: 对我方全体目标造成虚数属性伤害并施加<u>【荣耀】</u>，同时使自身获得【泰坦神躯】。【泰坦神躯】层数减少为0时行动延后，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并为我方全体恢复能量。持有【泰坦神躯】会使下次攻击造成的伤害大幅提高并大概率使所有攻击到的目标陷入禁锢状态。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to all targets and apply <u>"Glory"</u>. At the same time, this unit obtains "Titanic Corpus." When "Titanic Corpus" stacks are reduced to 0, this unit's action is delayed, takes massive Imaginary DMG, and regenerates Energy for all targets. Possessing "Titanic Corpus" will greatly increase the DMG dealt by the next attack, with a high chance of inflicting Imprisonment on all attacked targets.

C: 在行动序列上添加【黑潮】，每次【黑潮】行动时，将使我方全体目标陷入【<u>腐化</u>】，【<u>腐化</u>】数值可叠加。当我方角色受到致命伤害时，将陷入【<u>黑蚀</u>】状态；当我方全体目标陷入【<u>黑蚀</u>】状态或无法战斗状态时，战斗失败。
E: Adds "Black Tide" to Action Order. Every time the "Black Tide" takes action, inflicts all targets with "<u>Rot</u>." "<u>Rot</u>" is stackable. When targets suffer fatal damage, inflicts "<u>Tide-Corrosion</u>" on them and Charges "Healing Rainbow." When all targets enter the "<u>Tide-Corrosion</u>" state or are downed, the battle ends in defeat.

C: 对全体我方单位造成风属性伤害，目标<u>【侵蚀】</u>部分的生命值越高，造成的伤害越高，并立刻失去所有<u>【侵蚀】</u>部分的生命值。
E: Deals Wind DMG to all targets. The higher a target's <u>"Corrosion"</u> HP is, the higher the DMG dealt. All HP under the effect of <u>"Corrosion"</u> will also immediately be lost.

C: 使【残破容器】进入【共祭】状态，在数次行动内施放【幽冥的悼念】。
E: Causes "Long-Shattered Vessel" to enter the "Mutual Sacrifice" state. Uses "Underworld's Grief" in a certain number of turns.

C: 对我方全体造成物理属性伤害，消耗所有<u>【灾难之力】</u>额外造成数次少量物理属性伤害，消耗的【灾难之力】层数越多，伤害的段数越多。
E: Deals Physical DMG to all targets and consumes all <u>"Calamity Power"</u> to additionally deal several instances of minor Physical DMG. The more "Calamity Power" stacks are consumed, the more instances of DMG.

C: 对指定我方单体造成物理属性伤害。
E: Deals Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害，处于【<u>在毁灭中狂欢</u>】状态时，对受到攻击的我方目标施加【<u>黑潮热</u>】，使造成的部分伤害以持续伤害形式在一定回合内扣除。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets. When in the "<u>Revel in Destruction</u>" state, inflicts "<u>Black Tide Fever</u>" on the targets attacked, causing some DMG dealt to be taken in the form of DoT over a certain number of turns.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动时施放【罪血枭首】，选择1名我方角色承受【罪血枭首】的最高伤害和【<u>罪血腐蚀</u>】。
E: Enters the Charging state. In the next action, uses "Hemotort Decapitation." Selects 1 target to receive the highest DMG of "Hemotort Decapitation" and "<u>Hemotort Corruption</u>."

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量伤害。
E: Deals minor DMG to a single target.

C: 受到致命攻击后使我方全体能量恢复。
E: All targets' Energy gets regenerated after this unit suffers a killing blow.

C: 使自身进入【自燃】状态，之后的攻击可以施放【净炎之雨】。
E: Enters the Spontaneous Combustion state. Rain of Purifying Flames can be used in subsequent attacks.

C: 对我方全体造成大量虚数属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG to all targets.

C: 每当【反物质引擎】从弱点击破状态恢复，其弱点属性会发生改变。
E: The Antimatter Engine will change its Weakness Type every time it recovers from Weakness Break.

C: 进入蓄力状态，下次行动时对我方全体施放【末日临空】。
E: Enters the Charging state. The next action uses "Impending Doom" on all targets.

C: 对我方全体造成少量虚数属性伤害，并减少我方全体的能量。
E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to all targets and reduce all targets' Energy.

C: 召唤【「所有或一无所有」】并使我方全体进入赌局，每个【「所有或一无所有」】每次受到攻击时会使进行攻击的我方目标获得1个随机1到6的点数。下次诡弈砂金行动时，点数低于诡弈砂金的我方目标视为输掉赌局并受到攻击；点数高于诡弈砂金的我方目标视为赢得赌局且终结技被激活。
E: Summons "All or Nothing" and makes all targets enter the gamble. Every time an "All or Nothing" is attacked, the target that launched the attack will receive a random number between 1 and 6. The next time "Aventurine of Stratagems" takes a turn, targets with numbers lower than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have lost the bet and will be attacked, while targets with numbers higher than "Aventurine of Stratagems" are considered to have won the bet and will have their Ultimates activated.

E: Weakness Break Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>parts</color> multiple times to effectively reduce Boss Mirage's Toughness. <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> Boss Mirage to greatly increase the DMG taken by itself and all its parts, while recovering Skill Points and activating Ultimates for all allies.

E: When ally targets enter the "HP Overload" state, their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency are greatly reduced. Prioritize restoring their HP to dispel this state.

C: 在无尽岁月的彼岸，故事亦将迎来收尾。人们会带着一路走来的所有笑与泪，在那鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚。
E: Beyond the shores of endless time, this story, too, shall reach its end. People will carry all their laughter and tears from their journey, reuniting at the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 仙舟内洞天间的往来几乎全部依靠星槎成行。而「迴星港」正是星槎制造的重地。
E: Transportation between delves on the Xianzhou greatly relies on starskiffs, and Stargazer Navalia is the core zone to produce them.

C: 当前位面的首领挑战，请小心应对。
E: The boss of the current plane. Proceed with caution.

C: 「普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！世人同袍，万物同根，赐福之风拂大地！」 ——《谐乐颂》第一乐章 来自多个谐乐天体世界的集群星神。千面一体的希佩，宣唱着和谐一致的喜乐。 为了对抗宇宙无情的法则，智慧生命需要抹煞孱弱的私欲与个体的差别，融入同一阙谐乐中——以强援弱，以死护生。
E: "The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright. Praise the Lord! All are connected and the wind of blessing breathes across the lands!" — Odes of Harmony, I A plural Aeon from multiple harmonious worlds. The glorious Xipe of thousand faces is chanting songs of joy and happiness. To battle the brutality of the laws of the universe, intelligent lifeforms must discard their cowardly selfishness and the differences between individuals, fusing into one singular melody — to have the strong help the weak, and to protect life with death.

C: 「哲思者仰望星河，探求文明的终极目标——『筑墙，』雄浑的回声响彻脑海：『筑墙。』」 ——阿德里安•斯宾塞-史密斯，《有关星空的寓言集》 天彗星墙、亚空晶壁、巨引源基盘的砌造者，崇拜者称其「琥珀王」。其为更古老的「黄昏战争」的幸存者。 祂知晓大敌的吞噬迫在眉睫。因此不得不以光年为单位铸造障壁加以封印，隔绝保护尚有生机的世界。
E: "The philosopher gazes upon the stars trying to find the ultimate goal of civilization — 'Build a wall.' A majestic voice echoed in his head. 'Build a wall.'" — Fables About the Stars by Adrian Spencer Smith The builder of the Celestial Comet Wall, the Subspace Crystalline Barrier, and the Great Attractor Base. Followers call THEM the "Amber Lord," one of the oldest and most tenacious Aeons, having survived the "Dusk Wars." Aware of the imminence of THEIR mortal enemy's devouring, the Amber Lord forged a powerful light-years-long seal that would isolate and protect the living worlds.

C: 「你看见亿万万骏马驰驾战车，遮蔽大地，唯有其一抵达终点！但你看见车辙存在，先于所有战车的启程！」 ——《德米卡纳语大辞典》中对「无漏净子」的释义 漫长的时间里，「无漏净子」这四个字更像一则浮言虚论，散落在银河历史的残章断篇中。不同文献资料指向的人物，出生地、种族、身份，乃至人生轨迹都迥然相异，彼此也互不相识。唯一的共同点，是她们都行于「记忆」的命途。 从字面解读，无漏净子必然与「无漏主」浮黎有着千丝万缕的关联。她们会是某种特别的「记忆」令使吗？假说不计其数：星神破碎后散落银河的碎片、浮黎行走人间的万千化身、祂对于「自身」回忆的不同侧面…每种猜想似乎都能自圆其说，却也漏洞百出。 其中，一种可能性不容忽视：一位或几位无漏净子建立了流光忆庭，她们共同看守「记忆」的秘密——善见天的水晶神只是一具假身，一段「记忆」。它喻示着所有净子共同的宿命：铭记群星，直至神灭形消。最后，唯有一人飞升成真正的浮黎。 三月和长夜月，似乎与忆庭的秘密息息相关……
E: "You see millions upon millions of steeds pulling chariots, blanketing the earth, yet only one reaches the finish! But you also see how wheel tracks existed before any chariot's departure!" — Definition of "Pure Child of Anāsrava" from the Grand Dictionary of the Demicanian Language Across the long ages, the words "Pure Child of Anāsrava" seem more like a baseless rumor, scattered through the fragmentary chapters of cosmic history. Different historical records lead to figures of vastly different birthplaces, races, identities, and even life experiences. They also never knew each other. The only common thread between these women was that they all walked the Path of Remembrance. Literally interpreted, the Pure Children of Anāsrava must have countless intricate connections with Fuli, the Master of Anāsrava. Could these women be some special form of Remembrance Emanators? The conjectures are endless: They could be fragments of the Aeon scattered across the cosmos after THEIR shattering, Fuli's countless manifestations walking among mortals, different facets of THEIR memories of "THEMSELF"... Each theory seems self-consistent, yet riddled with contradictions. Among these possibilities, one cannot be ignored: one or several Pure Children of Anāsrava establish the Garden of Recollection, where they work together to guard the secret of Remembrance: That the Crystal God of the Eden of Blessed Insight is only a false avatar, a fragment of "memories." It signifies the shared destiny of all Pure Children of Anāsrava: To remember the stars until these women's mind fades and their body dissolves. In the end, only one of them will ascend to become the true Fuli. March and Evernight seem to be related to the secret of the Garden of Recollection...

C: 无敌模式
E: Invincible Mode

C: 前往{NICKNAME}的房间
E: Head to {NICKNAME}'s room

C: 开灯
E: Turn the light on

C: 了解悲伤的商铺安保背后的故事
E: Learn about the story behind the sad shop security guard

C: 通过筑梦遥眼连接不可思议的通路（再一次）
E: Use Dream's Eye to connect the inconceivable path (again)

C: 听听朝露公馆的模范侍者与告解者之间的故事
E: Listen to the story between the model attendant and the confessor at Dewlight Pavilion

C: 从缠绕「造化洪炉」的建木根系中，丰饶玄鹿诞生于此，以对抗你们破坏建木缠结的举动。
E: The Abundant Ebon Deer emerged from the Ambrosial Arbor roots wrapped around the Creation Furnace, created to fight against your efforts to break the Ambrosial Arbor coil.

C: 史瓦罗力战不支倒地，娜塔莎正欲乘胜追击。克拉拉以自身挡在史瓦罗面前，请你们不要伤害史瓦罗。
E: Svarog fell to the ground, depleted of strength. And just as Natasha prepared to deliver a finishing blow, Clara threw herself in front of it, begging you to show mercy.

C: 幕布之后，就是砂金选定的终场。小卡卡瓦夏看出砂金的紧张，提议与其「对掌」，以此祈祷母神护佑，祝砂金的演出圆满成功。
E: Behind the curtain was the finale Aventurine had chosen. Kakavasha noticed Aventurine's nervousness and suggested they "place their palms together" to pray for Gaiathra's blessing and wish him a successful performance.

C: 回望在匹诺康尼的经历，你与其他列车组成员感叹人与人之间相遇与离别的机缘，以及「开拓」的意义。
E: Looking back on your experienced in Penacony, you and the other members of the Crew reminisced on the karma that brought people together and sent them apart, as well as the meaning of "trailblazing."

C: 在无人察觉之时，乱破已在墙上绘好涂鸦，称这是恰丽卡的作品。筑梦蕉师气急败坏，要把你们赶出课堂，不然就用铁拳*蕉育*你们。
E: When no one was looking, Rappa had already drawn graffiti on the wall, claiming it was Chaletka's work. The Dreamweaver BananAdvisor was furious and threatened to kick you all out of class, unless you'd prefer some Bananenlightenment from their iron fists.

C: 万敌将悬锋印戒交予你们，它最适合成为万敌「记忆」的质料。带上这枚印戒，用它开辟前路，便是与万敌同行。
E: Mydei entrusted the Signet of Kremnos to you, as it is most suitable to become the material for Mydei's "memory." To wear this signet and use it to forge your path onward is akin to walking alongside Mydei.

C: 拍下姬子的照片后，突然现身的艾丝妲告诉你们，家中给她支取零花钱的密钥被人扣下了。你们怀疑这就是谣言制造者掌握的证据。
E: After snapping a photo of Himeko, Asta appeared suddenly and told you that the encryption key to her family's pocket money account had been taken. You suspected that this was the evidence held by the one spreading the rumors.

C: 以「外出问诊」的名义，白露与医士半夏逃出丹鼎司。广场上出现来自丹鼎司的其他医士，白露请你帮她和半夏找个地方藏起来。
E: Under the pretext of "medical visit," Bailu and healer Banxia had fled from the Alchemy Commission. In the plaza, more healers from the Commission appeared. Bailu asked you to help her and Banxia find a hiding place.

C: 你踏入一处诡异的迷境，似乎与先前所处的绥园环境略有不同。你决定谨慎探索一番。
E: You stepped into an eerie maze, its surroundings subtly different from the Fyxestroll Garden you had seen before. You decided to proceed with caution and explore the area.

C: 飞霄率领云骑军抵达长乐天，使用机巧鸟监视街道。飞霄令云骑军严加戒备，与你、彦卿前往搜索貊泽的踪迹。
E: Feixiao led the Cloud Knights to Exalting Sanctum, using cycranes to monitor the streets. Feixiao ordered the Cloud Knights to remain vigilant while she went with you and Yanqing to search for Moze's whereabouts.

C: 抓住白露后，岁阳「阿灼」终于现身。它指责你们破坏小孩子的快乐时光，决定采用大人的暴力手段同你们打斗。
E: Having caught Bailu, the heliobus Luxie at last revealed themselves. They blamed you for ruining children's innocent fun and decided to settle things the grown-up way, with violence.

C: 交谈中你们得知，岁阳「熔炬」已依附于彦卿的身上，并用高深的剑法蛊惑他。
E: From your discussion, you discovered that the heliobus Apyra had attached themselves to Yanqing and was manipulating him with advanced swordplays.

C: 按照艾利欧给出的「剧本」，星核猎手<color=#f29e38ff>卡芙卡</color>来到「黑塔」空间站执行任务。与此同时，空间站正遭到反物质军团的大肆进攻。
E: Based on Elio's script, the Stellaron Hunter <color=#f29e38ff>Kafka</color> arrived at the Herta Space Station to carry out a mission. At the same time, the space station was under attack from the Antimatter Legion.

C: 你们叫醒昏睡在路边的矿工匹克。匹克称「地火」的人已经前往矿区深处，那里满是全副武装的地痞流氓。
E: You woke up a miner named Peak who was sleeping by the roadside. Peak said that the members of Wildfire had already gone deeper into the mines, where armed thugs roamed.

C: 一个大家伙挡住了你们的去路。在操控栈桥机关之前，你们必须清除阻碍。
E: But before you could activate the bridge, a hulking creature blocked your advance. There was no choice but to take it down first.

C: 于此闹事的假面愚者引来了帮派盘查。误会解除后，米沙与黄泉向你道谢。黄泉好奇你如何影响他人的情绪，你解释自己使用钟表把戏。
E: The Masked Fool causing problems here drew the attention of the gang. After the misunderstanding was resolved, Misha and Acheron thanked you. Acheron was curious about how you managed to influence someone else's emotions, and you explained you used the Clockwork to do so.

C: 你在现实中醒来，得知是黑天鹅带你与流萤离开了那片忆域。黑天鹅建议你先向列车组的各位报个平安，随后她会解答你的一切疑问。
E: When you regained consciousness back in reality, you found out that it was Black Swan that brought you and Firefly out of the Memory Zone. Black Swan advised you to inform the Crew of your safety first, and that she will answer all your questions afterward.

C: 在钟表把戏的作用下，守卫的心情变为「愤怒」。他声称就算是梦主也不能从这里过去，并要让美梦剧团狠狠地教训你们。
E: Under the effects of Clockwork, the guard's feelings turned to "anger." He claimed that even the Dreammaster wouldn't be allowed to pass through here, and would get the Sweet Dreams Troupe to teach you a lesson.

C: 星期日出现在圆桌大厅，没有发现周围文件已被翻阅。瓦尔特与星期日谈论案件，星期日称砂金绝非凶手，但仍需警惕砂金的秘密谋划。
E: Sunday appeared at the Round Table Hall and did not realize that the surrounding documents had been looked through. Welt talked about the case with him, and Sunday stated that Aventurine was definitely not the killer. However, he still needed to be wary of his secret schemes.

C: 「知更鸟」安抚智械宾客，称天空被不速之客破坏，但没有任何无辜群众因此受伤。作为赔礼，「知更鸟」送给客人一个按钮。
E: "Robin" reassured the Intellitron guests, explaining that the sky had been disrupted by uninvited intruders, but no innocent lives were harmed. As an apology, "Robin" gave the guests a button.

C: 你为了参与枪火试炼，通过电视机变身为哈努兄弟，进入动画世界展开合作挑战，对抗恶棍保卫美梦小镇。
E: To participate in the Gunfire challenge, you transformed into Brother Hanu through a television screen, entering the cartoon world for a cooperative challenge to defend Dreamville from villains.

C: 剧目落幕，「同谐」改变匹诺康尼，奴仆仍困幻影之中。
E: The play ended as the Harmony changed Penacony, but the slaves were still trapped in illusions.

C: 黑天鹅与波提欧将与列车同行，一同踏上新的旅程。
E: Black Swan and Boothill would travel with the Express and head on new journeys together.

C: 黄泉引领你踏入「存在的地平线」，这是梦境尽头，也是回归现实的最后入口。
E: Acheron guided you into the Horizon of Existence. This was the end of the Dreamscape and the final entrance where you could return to reality.

C: 老奥帝热情招呼托帕与翡翠入座，表示期待与二人坦诚深入地讨论匹诺康尼的未来。
E: Old Oti cordially invited Topaz and Jade to sit and expressed how he was looking forward to sincerely discussing Penacony's future in detail with the two.

C: 瓦尔特留步答疑，回应你对梦境与局势的诸多疑惑。
E: Welt stopped and answered your many questions regarding the Dreamscape and the situation.

C: 花火现身透露晖长石号上有真正炸弹的消息，戏谑众人。
E: Sparkle appeared and revealed that the news about the real bomb was on the Radiant Feldspar and laughed at the group.

C: 芮克先生称，家族可以拯救流梦礁，但这未必是众人能接受的走向。他来此是为给两位游侠提供一些关联，称已备好下一幕的「大纲」。
E: Mr. Reca claimed that The Family could save Dreamflux Reef, though this might not be a direction everyone could accept. He came here to provide some connections for the two Rangers, saying he had prepared the "outline" for the next act.

C: 万维克向「禁止丢垃圾」的垃圾桶投物，结果被返还垃圾，规则逻辑显然扭曲。
E: Wonweek tossed something at the trash can that "should not have any trash tossed at it," only to have trash returned to him. The logic behind the rules was evidently twisted.

C: 两人发现扭蛋机禁止使用特定瓶盖，星期日推测需找到违规道具试验规则，
E: The two discovered that the capsule machine forbid the use of specific bottle caps. Sunday surmised that they needed to find the forbidden item to test the rules.

C: 真诚的回答使你从审判中幸存，丹恒不愿在经审判后与黄金裔合作。白厄赶到涡心，与遐蝶一同为你们作担保，阿格莱雅不再追究泄密。
E: Your honest answers got you through the trial, but Dan Heng didn't want to work with the Chrysos Heirs after being interrogated. Phainon hurried to the Vortex and, with Castorice, spoke up for you, convincing Aglaea to let the leak go.

C: 万敌隔空对你与白厄喊话，说他已经解决了六个敌人。白厄看到锁链上的落雷，与你商讨尝试用「预言算碑」解决阻碍。
E: Mydei yelled to you and Phainon from far away, bragging that he'd already killed six enemies. Phainon saw lightning bolts hitting the chains and suggested using the Prophecy Tablet to get past this barrier.

C: 你与白厄、万敌遭遇「纷争」眷属，得知已被疯狂扭曲的尼卡多利及其眷属已经忘却战斗的荣光与意义，只记得杀戮本身。
E: You, Phainon, and Mydei met some Strife Titankin and found out that Nikador and his followers had gone mad, forgetting the honor and purpose of fighting — they only remembered the killing.

C: 白厄发现远处的一个相同砝码，也许这会是解开谜题的关键。
E: Phainon saw another identical weight in the distance that might help solve the puzzle.

C: 缇宝将众人传送回奥赫玛。你们决定兵分两路，白厄与丹恒前往悬锋城支援万敌，你与遐蝶负责利用迷迷的能力来寻找尼卡多利的弱点。
E: Tribbie took everyone back to Okhema. You decided to form two teams: Phainon and Dan Heng would go to Castrum Kremnos to help Mydei, while you and Castorice would use Mem's power to find Nikador's weakness.

C: 你与大工匠哈托努斯交谈。遐蝶请求哈托努斯回忆为悬锋城打造圣器的故事，但哈托努斯表示无法记清。好在迷迷有找回记忆的方法。
E: You talked to Grand Craftsman Chartonus. Castorice asked him to tell the story of making a holy vessel for Castrum Kremnos, but Chartonus couldn't remember it well. Thankfully, Mem could help recover those memories.

C: 阿格莱雅以金线与女孩交谈，将夺回的护符还给女孩，叮嘱其保护好自己的「弱点」。为表感激，女孩选择将髀石护身符送给阿格莱雅。
E: Through a golden thread, Aglaea communicated with the girl, returning the reclaimed talisman and reminding her to guard her own "weakness." In gratitude, the girl chose to give Aglaea this cherished talisman.

C: 缇宝、缇安与缇宁靠近「岁月」泰坦，却发现欧洛尼斯已经消失不见。
E: At last, Tribbie, Trianne, and Trinnon approached the Time Titan, only to find that Oronyx had vanished without a trace.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝距离成功出逃仅有一步之遥。白厄疑惑历史上是谁在帮助圣女出逃，缇宁称答案就在记忆的尽头。
E: Tribios was only one step away from completing her escape. Phainon stopped to wonder aloud, who had aided the Holy Maiden all those years ago? Trinnon replied that they would find the answer at the end of the memory.

C: 遐蝶拒绝放弃觐见塞纳托斯，愿意将八成的积蓄给赛飞儿作路费。赛飞儿欣然归还先前窃得的物品，以神速力将你送回房间。
E: Castorice refused to give up in her search for Thanatos, and paid Cipher an additional eighty percent of her life savings for her escort. Satisfied, Cipher returned the items she stole, then used her divine speed to send you all back to your rooms.

C: 哈托努斯将形制如盗火行者之剑的神兵带给白厄，将其命名为<color=#f29e38ff>「侵晨」</color>。与武器一同交付白厄的，还有封存阿格莱雅残留神性的护身符。
E: Chartonus gave Phainon his divine weapon, a sword that resembled the Flame Reaver's, and named it <color=#f29e38ff>Dawnmaker</color>. Along with the weapon, he also gave Phainon the talisman that contained what remained of Aglaea's divinity.

C: 白厄回想起那刻夏口述的开启方法，成功激活火种匣的解锁界面。要彻底打开秘术锁，还需要借助你的力量。
E: Phainon recalled how Anaxa described the unlocking method and activated the casket's interface. But to break the arcane lock, he'd need your help.

C: 音符小姐施展同谐力量困住Lancer。老奥帝要求她继续拖住即将到来的你们，为此会将圣杯积累的力量托付给音符小姐。
E: Miss Note used her powers of the Harmony to trap Lancer. Old Oti tasked her with stalling you and the others, who were about to arrive, and entrusted her with the Holy Grail's accumulated power to do so.

C: Saber在石中剑前犹豫，怀疑自己是否适合成为王。音符小姐介入记忆，称为所有人安排了平庸而幸福的人生。当然，也包括你。
E: Saber hesitated in front of the Sword in the Stone. Was she really fit to be a king? That's when Miss Note invaded the memory. She claimed she had crafted a peaceful, ordinary life for everyone, including you.

C: 丹恒与你的身体被近似忆质的「气泡」保护，机能完好。螺丝咕姆称翁法罗斯被剧烈的「记忆」包裹，内外联系再次被阻断。丹恒决定利用自身能突破防火墙的优势，再度返回翁法罗斯，不遗余力地促成列车组的团聚。
E: Dan Heng and your body were protected by memoria-like bubbles, with all functions remaining intact. Screwllum reported that Amphoreus was wrapped in intense "Remembrance," once again severing all internal and external communication. Dan Heng resolved to return to Amphoreus, using his ability to breach the Firewall to reunite the Express Crew, no matter what it took.

C: 事关银河存亡，各方势力都有关乎自身利益的考量。无论如何，敬候佳音吧。瓦尔特提议深入涡心，查看翁法罗斯内部的样貌。
E: With the fate of the cosmos at stake, every faction had their own interests to consider. Either way, wait for some to good news. Welt suggested delving into the Vortex of Genesis to examine the interior of Amphoreus.

C: 「记忆的幼芽」努力学习新知识，认为昔涟与爱是打开监牢的钥匙，不想与昔涟分开。但要续写史诗，必须有新的「空白」。
E: The Bud of Memory tried to learn new knowledge, believing that Cyrene and love are the keys to unlocking the prison, while not wanting to be separated from Cyrene. However, to continue writing the epic, there must be a new "blank".

C: 列车上尽是虫族停留的痕迹，有些虫卵甚至已有诞育的迹象。真蛰虫的生长极为迅速，为保护列车，你们必须与时间赛跑。
E: The Express was riddled with signs of the Swarm. Some of the Insect Eggs were already starting to hatch. True Stings matured at a frightening pace, and you had to act fast to keep the Express safe.

C: 真理医生认为，可以在系统中查找你所主张的记录以降低你的嫌疑。艾丝妲提议前往主控室看看。
E: Dr. Ratio thought it might be possible to locate in the system the records you mentioned to reduce your suspicion. Asta suggested heading to the main control room to take a look.

C: 帕斯卡长期使用遭受裂界污染的元件修复自身，这就是它被识别成裂界生物的原因。史瓦罗提出应将帕斯卡格式化，此种方案有极大可能使该个体恢复正常，但代价是它会失去情感智能，这一后果令克拉拉难以接受。
E: Pascal had been using Fragmentum-contaminated components to repair itself for a long time, which was why it was being identified as a Fragmentum creature. Svarog suggested formatting Pascal, a solution that would most likely return the unit to normal, but the cost would be the loss of its emotional intelligence, a consequence Clara found hard to accept.

C: 你选择采用克拉拉的方案，并由史瓦罗为帕斯卡植入了保护程序。
E: You chose to go with Clara's solution, and Svarog implanted the protection program into Pascal.

C: 镜流站在最后一头魔物旁边，留待彦卿解决它。
E: Jingliu stood beside the last monster, leaving it for Yanqing to finish off.

C: 工造司匠人称，自己被派来排查一个古怪的问题。有计划外的星槎被制造了出来，全都从迴星港的这个码头里产出。
E: An Artisanship Commission craftsman said he was assigned to investigate a peculiar issue. Some unscheduled starskiffs were being constructed at this dock in Stargazer Navalia.

C: 你们得知驭空与晴霓是母女。驭空向你们道谢并致歉，她指责晴霓太过冒失，而晴霓也对驭空的严厉态度颇有微词。
E: You learned that Yukong and Qingni were mother and daughter. Yukong thanked you and apologized, criticizing Qingni for her recklessness, while Qingni took issue with Yukong's overbearing attitude.

C: 晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号
E: The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand

C: 「永恒圣城」奥赫玛
E: "Eternal Holy City" Okhema

C: 最后复习一次，提升<color=#f29e38ff>助理等级、星级，解锁研究内容，集齐回忆卡</color>均可提升会场秒收入
E: One last review: Upgrading <color=#f29e38ff>assistant levels, star rating, unlocking research content, and collecting memory cards</color> will all increase venue revenue.

C: 真诚地分享过往经验。
E: Share your past experiences earnestly.

C: 比他更虚无，就显得他开朗了。
E: Become more nihilistic than him. That'll make him the cheerful one in comparison.

C: 你和水灵唠家常，唠到天黑…
E: You chat with the aqua sprite until dark...

C: 失恋精选歌单。
E: Breakup Playlist.

C: 你分享的内容非常「冷」。
E: That piece of trivia is... quite something.

C: 这能有多难喝呢，你选一方汤药吧——
E: How bad could it be? Just pick a bowl of medicine —

C: 作为公司业务巩固部的专员，你被安排去参加某无机文明加入宇宙市场的磋商会议。你不敢怠慢，早早来到约定地点，却一直没等来对接的客户…据说无机生命时间感受比有机生命更强，为什么会迟到呢？
E: As a specialist in the Business Consolidation Department of the IPC, you are sent to attend the negotiation for an inorganic civilization to join the cosmic market. You arrive at the venue ahead of time but the client has yet to show up... Rumor has it that inorganic life has a stronger sense of time than organic ones, so what could have caused the delay?

C: 作为影卫，他唯一的从商经验就是购买晚饭所需的食材。因为时常找不到人，他的营收额并不高。
E: As a Shadow Guard, his business experience starts and ends with buying dinner ingredients. No surprise his sales are low — customers can't buy from someone they can't find.

C: 历史文化博物馆
E: History and Culture Museum

C: 打开最后一个木桶
E: Open the Last Barrel

C: 大量的书
E: Many Books

C: 更换照片
E: Change Photo

C: 游玩「超级祝福排排乐」
E: Play Super Blessed Dreamy Slots

C: 建筑设计图
E: Building Blueprints

C: 校长雕像
E: Dean's Statue

C: 车厢门
E: Carriage Door

C: 控制装置
E: Controller

C: 夜色归阑，曙光临近。大地上的异乡人步履不停，他们将在升起晨星的极境重逢。
E: As night wanes and dawn approaches, the outlanders march on without rest across the earth. They shall reunite at the edge of the world, where the morning star rises.

C: 有龙矫矫，其渊渺渺
E: A Dragon Gallant, Its Ocean Distant

C: 获得流云渡决胜乐园的所有以太灵
E: Obtain all Aether Spirits in the Cloudford Victory Zone

C: 探索地宫的全部房间
E: Explore all the Hypogeum's rooms

C: 累计消耗<unbreak>30</unbreak>万信用点
E: Use <unbreak>300,000</unbreak> credits

C: 点亮了<unbreak>11</unbreak>位逐火者的命路
E: Light up <unbreak>11</unbreak> Flame-Chaser's Paths

C: 累计完成#4次「凝滞虚影」
E: Clear Stagnant Shadow #4 time(s)

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 累计消耗#4点开拓力<color=#f29e38ff>（上限<unbreak>1400</unbreak>点开拓力）</color>
E: Consume a total of #4 Trailblaze Power <color=#f29e38ff>(<unbreak>1400</unbreak> Trailblazer Power max)</color>

C: 在「神奇扑满在哪里」中勘测所有感应仪反馈的异常情况
E: Survey all the anomalous feedback from the sensor in "Where Are You, Mystery Trotter?"

C: 在「地城探宝」中通关第五遗迹的浅层探索
E: Clear Surface Exploration for Ruin 5 in "Underground Treasure Hunt"

C: 在「地城探宝」中完成所有遗迹深层探索的第2层
E: Complete Deep Exploration level 2 for all ruins in "Underground Treasure Hunt"

C: 在「初花习剑录」活动中，累计领悟#4次剑招
E: Master Sword Moves for a total of #4 time(s) in the Saga of Primaveral Blade event

C: 在「开拓，友谊魔法！」活动中，完成所有「初始试炼」
E: Complete all Initiation Trials in the "Trailblaze: Friendship Is Magic!" event

C: 完成开拓任务「魔女的镜中回天」
E: Complete the Trailblaze Mission "Witch's Mirrored Reversal"

C: 累计进行#4次跃迁
E: Warp a total of #4 times

C: 在「忘却之庭」中累计获得#4星通关奖励
E: Obtain a total of #4 star(s) from clearing Forgotten Hall stages

C: 在「货币战争」中晋升等级达到#2级
E: Reach Level #2 in "Currency Wars"

C: 完成#4次「拟造花萼（金）」
E: Clear Calyx (Golden) #4 time(s)

C: 开拓等级达到#4级
E: Reach Trailblaze Level #4

C: 在折磨难度，难题等级大于等于3时通关第四位面
E: Clear the Fourth Plane at Conundrum Level 3 or higher in Torturous Difficulty.

C: 展开1次主命途为「记忆」的3星方程
E: Expand 3-star Equations with Remembrance as its main Path 1 time

C: 在本关卡中达到#1分
E: Earn #1 point(s) in this stage.

C: 在当前关卡中，积分达到#2
E: In the current Stage, reach #2 Points

C: 与「鹤运物流」达成合作并规划物流路线
E: Establish a collaboration with Heron Express and plan logistic routes together

C: 累计培育#4只造物
E: Train a total of #4 creations

C: 完成火山星球的首领挑战后解锁
E: Unlock by completing the Volcanic Planet's Boss challenge

C: 超链接对决（一）
E: Hyperlink Match I

C: 在梦境训练的#4个关卡中，击败第1阶段首领
E: Defeat the 1st phase boss in #4 Dreamscape Training stage(s)

C: 累计招募到8只奇美拉
E: Recruit 8 chimeras.

C: 在「斩邪除恶」挑战中累计获得#4星

C:
在寒潮之中严阵以待绝非易事，但雅利洛-Ⅵ的银鬃铁卫们早已习惯如此。凛冽的寒风从面甲的缝隙里穿过，就像是寒铁小刀轻轻划过。

自天外而来的怪物再次整顿军势，全副武装的士兵在大守护者的命令下严阵以待。

负责前哨的士兵们常常需要在雪地中蛰伏数日，侦察怪物们的行动。长时间的霜寒将士兵的肌肤、汗水以及填充面甲的棉绒一同冻住，往往需要热水浇灌才能将头盔安全取下。筑城者的工匠们将铸铁面盔的片状金属板弧度偏折，尽可能减少重盔在风雪中承受的阻力。

坚硬、温暖、威风凛凛，铁卫面盔的制式就这样一直传承了下来。

「你们戴着这么个面罩，到底是怎么看得清路的？」每个执勤的铁卫都曾被询问过同一个问题。
E:
It was no easy task staying prepared for battle in the Eternal Freeze, but Jarilo-VI's Silvermane Guards are used to it. The sharp cold wind howled through the gaps in the helmet, slashing skin as if it were icy razor-blades.

The monsters from beyond the sky renewed their formation, and soldiers armed to the teeth stood ready under the command of the Supreme Guardian.

Vanguards stationed forward often need to hunker down in the snow for days at a time as they look out for any monster activity. After being exposed to the elements for such a long time, the soldiers' skin, sweat, and the velvet lining of their helmet will freeze and stick together, such that hot water must be poured over their helmets for safe removal. The Architects' craftsmen then altered the curvature of the cast iron helmet's metal plates, minimizing the air resistance of the heavy helmet in the snow.

Sturdy, warm, majestic — these traits of the Silvermane Guard's helmet were passed down for generations.

"How can you even see with that thing on?" Every patrolling guard has been asked this question.

C: 两颗行星交织着彼此悲惨的宿命，天岩户间散落着一段故去的歌谣。 那歌谣无始无终、无声无息，来自无人之口，传往无人之耳。它如是写道： 高天原万里迢迢一如出云，原乃是极乐净土天成地平。 天地变漆黑大日引动潮汐，似迁徙众神垂迹来势沄沄。 八百万祸神显世屠戮无情，怎料想无上权柄反遭窃行。 出云国折剑七万三十三柄，铸为尊护世诏刀一十二名。 其一为「真」，斩「都牟刈神」所铸，可令凡人遍观法理，解构万象再造神迹； 其二为「天」，斩「天常立尊」所铸，可令高天变作墙垣，祸津众神穿行维艰； 其三为「鸣」，斩「建御雷神」所铸，可令雷光撕裂长空，星流霆击施罚天刑； 其四为「岚」，斩「志那都彦」所铸，可令裂风摧折大地，云奔雨啸狂飙不息； 其五为「霜」，斩「天之冬衣」所铸，可令时序霜结凝滞，冻土无垠刹那难逝； 其六为「命」，斩「石长比卖」所铸，可令荒冢遍开花丛，生生死死流转无踪； 其七为「烈」，斩「迦具土命」所铸，可令炽火燃烧尘寰，赫赫炎炎烛天燎原； 其八为「觉」，斩「八意思兼」所铸，可令水镜鉴往知来，不见虚实千秋万代； 其九为「础」，斩「大山津见」所铸，可令列岛高悬天边，山坼地裂崩碎阵前； 其十为「千」，斩「大己贵命」所铸，可令凡众连缀成络，形影无数潮起潮落； 十一为「束」，斩「久那止神」所铸，可令歧途尽入樊笼，邪祟诸恶咫尺皆空； 十二为「喰」，斩「八十枉津」所铸，可令常世剥蚀朽坏，神鬼难辨四魂两拆。 而后幽世皆扫，鸣金罢鏖，尽断十二寒耀； 空余荒魂鼓噪，黑日昭昭，终铸负世二刀。 其一为「始」，其二为「终」；以人为始，以鬼为终。 寸断声止，落花枯荣，败者归无，胜者…成空。 跛脚的僧侣唱着不成调的歌，持柄神力者，亦向着众神退行。 在大日的见证下，那曾经名为「出云」的土地上，人、神、鬼…皆已无处可寻。
E: The dual planets were intertwined in each other's tragic destiny, and a dead song was scattered amongst the Cave Where Light Hid. The song had no beginning and no end, had no sound and no echo, came from no singer, and was heard by none. It thus uttered: Takamagahara endless like Izumo, for it was a paradise perfect in its place. Yet the sky turned dark and the great sun pulled the tides, and the Kami left numerous trails as if migrating. The Yaoyorozu no Magakami manifested and slaughtered without mercy, yet little did they expect their peerless authority to be stolen and taken. Izumo broke seventy-thousand-and-thirty-three warrior's blades, forging the majestic Sentinels twelve in number. The first was "Truth," forged with the slain Sovereign of Revelation. It allowed mortals to comprehend all laws and order, to dissect all things and to recreate miracles. The second was "Sky," forged with the slain Eternal Zenith. It could turn the sky into walls and fortresses and pose obstacles for the Magatsu no Morokami's steps. The third was "Howl," forged with the slain Almighty Thunder. It could summon lightning to tear the sky, and the soaring meteors and thunder to serve divine justice. The fourth was "Mist," forged with the slain Everbreath. It could make winds break and shear the land, for gales to rage forever unceasing. The fifth was "Frost," forged with the slain Heaven's Winter Cloak. It could freeze and still the very order of time, to create boundless frozen wastes and stretch one moment into eternity. The sixth was "Fate," forged with the slain Spurned Sister of Mortality. It could make flowers bloom and cover barren graves, for life and death to dance in a cycle and dissipate. The seventh was "Flare," forged with the slain Flamebringer. It could summon fires to burn down the very world, to torch the skies and to char the earth. The eighth was "Thought," forged with the slain Wisdom Supreme. It could discern the past and future with the water mirror, to tell truth from lies over years beyond reckoning. The ninth was "Root," forged with the slain Father of Lands. It could command islands to float into the heavens, for mountains and valleys to burst before armies. The tenth was "Form," forged with the slain Nether Lord. It could make the masses join in unity, for endless forms to ebb and flow as one. The eleventh was "Bind," forged with the slain Omen Ward. It drove misfortune into a binding cage, for evil and demons to instantly vanish. The twelfth was "Maw," forged with the slain Woes Eighty. It could corrode and age the very mortal world and make equal Kami and Oni, leaving an entity's four souls to be sundered in twain. Then the underworld was cleared out, the wars called to a halt, and the twelve blades broken and locked. In the emptiness the dead souls grew restless, and under the black sun two blades were forged as Bearers of the world's destiny. One was named "Origin" and the other named "End," for all begun with humanity and shall end with Oni-kind. The sounds of lamentation ceased, and the dead flowers rose and fell. The losers returned to the void, and the winners... became null. The hobbling monk sang the song without a tune, for those who hold the power of Kami are walking backwards, towards divinity. Witnessed by the great sun, the land once named Izumo became completely devoid... of humans, Oni, and Kami.

C:
别跑！——赫利塔克？来得正好。
别愣在那里，快帮我抓住那只奇美拉，
本来挺乖的，尝了口莲食学派送来的零食，
现在都还在闹腾。
小心它的爪子，别看它个子不大，
那玩意儿比拉冬人的矛还锋利，
忘了提醒你，它的尾巴有微量的毒素，
从伤口开始，你的腿应该会麻痹几天。
我花了好大的精力，才这把这小祖宗培育出来，
守在树边的时候，整整默念了一千次瑟希斯的名字。
能培育出如此的生命，比起打仗，果然还是树庭适合我，
喂！不是要我讲点什么吗？你怎么走了？
E:
Don't ruuuun! Helioticus? Perfect timing.
Don't just stand there. Help me catch that chimera!
It was obedient before, but ever since it tasted a snack from the Lotophagists,
It's been restless.
Watch out for its claws. It may look small,
Its claws are sharper than a Ladon spear.
Oh, and I forgot to warn you, its tail has a trace amount of toxin.
If it stings you, starting from the wound, your leg might go numb for a few days.
I've put a lot of effort into raising this little rascal.
When I was guarding by the tree, I recited the name of Cerces a thousand times.
Given my success in cultivating such a creature, I think the Grove suits me better than the battlefield.
Hey! Didn't you want me to say something? Why are you leaving?

C:
你去过南方的沉思之森么，那里曾经有一株神树，
它拥有远远高于人类的智慧，门下的信徒无数。
它甚至宣称自己懂得比瑟希斯更多，
这招来了神悟树庭的不满，但前来辩论的贤者无一获胜。
神树抖动浑身翠绿的树叶，得意洋洋，
作为地上最聪慧的生灵，它甚至觉得自己能理解天上的知识。
粗壮的枝干向天空生长，在大地投下一道无限长的阴影，
就在穿越那朵最高乌云的一刻，天雷将它劈成两半。
那片静谧的森林，如今只留下火与灰烬，
你若想获得一点智慧，可以去寻找它燃烧的残枝。
E:
Ever visited the southern pondering woods? It was once home to a sacred tree,
which possessed far more wisdom than humans, and had countless disciples kneeling at its roots.
It even dared to claim to be more knowledgeable than Cerces,
enraging the Grove of Epiphany. Yet the sages who came forth to debate were all defeated.
The sacred tree shook its lush leaves, oozing arrogance.
As the smartest being on land, it was certain it could even parse celestial equations.
Sturdy branches clawed at the heavens, leaving an endlessly long shadow upon the earth
till lightning cleaved it the moment it penetrated the highest rain clouds.
Now what remains of the forest is only embers and ashes.
If you wish for wisdom, seek its incinerated branches.

C: #鲁珀特二世自称继承了天才俱乐部#27帝皇鲁珀特的记忆，并展开席卷寰宇的第二次反有机帝皇战争，战争期间生灵涂炭。在第二次反有机帝皇战争结束后，星际和平公司曾花费天价信用点，多次对#鲁珀特二世遗体进行鉴定，却最终得出骇人的结论：#鲁珀特二世为血肉之躯。
E: #Rubert II professed to have inherited the memories of Emperor Rubert, listed as Genius Society #27, and initiated the second cosmos-spanning anti-organic Emperor's War. With the war came terrible calamity, and at the end of the conflict, the IPC spent vast amounts of credits to repeatedly appraise #Rubert II's remains. This, however, led to a dreadful revelation: #Rubert II was a being of flesh and tissue.

C: 纯美骑士纵横星海的时代，全宇宙都为他们的风采所倾倒；这群追寻着美的高贵骑士身着光耀照人的金银甲胄，肩披丝线与星光织就的华美战袍，在头盔之下，是俊美有如天神的绝代容颜。即使在「纯美」已然消逝的现代，那些曾经一睹骑士风华的人们依然相信伊德莉拉终将归来。
E: The entire universe bowed before the grace of the Knights of Beauty while they still traversed the skies. These noble knights who chased beauty wore resplendent gold and silver armor, and donned magnificent robes woven from silk and starlight. They had divinely beautiful features under their helmets. Even in the current era when The Beauty had already faded, those who had once witnessed the magnificence of the knights still believe Idrila will one day return.

C: 与一众祸及寰宇的虚构史学家不同，卡利的王国只欢迎孩童的笑声，他们穿过菠萝果汁的洋流，和棉花糖气味的风暴，手持宝剑抵达苔草丛生的恶龙城堡，夺走它的宝藏。但虚构总归会消散，孩子们在哭闹中呼唤亲人，在长大后蔑视幻想，于是「神秘」不复存在，举剑的少年少女在自己的床上醒来。唯有身旁蒙尘的利剑，仍铭记着骑士们讨伐邪恶的荣耀。
E: Unlike the History Fictionologists who bring disaster across the cosmos, the kingdom of Kali only welcomes the laughter of children. They traverse the flux of pineapple juice, the storms of cotton candy whiffs, arriving at the moss-laden evil dragon's castle, trusty sword in hand, to wrest it of its treasures. But fiction will always fade away — The wails of children summon their guardians, and the children scorn imagination when they grow up. Thus, Enigmata ceases to exist. Young lads and lasses startle upright on their beds, waking from their dreams of brandished blades. Only the dusty-edged sword beside them remembers the glories of knights vanquishing evil.
