C:
她玩着摇杆，日复一日。 
只有一个员工的快餐店，用地下室改装的街机厅，几台陈旧的游戏机，这就是她的童年。 

她没有合法的名字，没有身份编号，只有女主人给她取的昵称。 
她也没有朋友，但她并不孤单。 
她喜欢《波恩》：两条横线，一个光点，最简单的击球游戏，她能玩上一整天。 
她喜欢《战轮<unbreak>32</unbreak>》：点阵绘成的星空中，八个迥异的色块，规则只有一条——成为第一，不论方法。 
她喜欢《几何战争》，喜欢《奥德修斯》，喜欢《星际猎豹》：这些游戏的得分记录上，满是顾客们留下的天文数字。 

她玩着摇杆，日复一日。 
直到有一天，所有的记录上只剩下一个人的名字。 

于是她放下摇杆，回头望向空空荡荡的地下室。 
在这里歇息的人很多，但留下来的却很少。 
从这里离开的人很多，但再回来的却很少。 
她眨眨眼，关掉了屏幕。 

那晚，快餐店唯一的员工和女主人告别，成为了下一个离开的人。 
名为「地下室」的游戏，在这一天结束了。
E:
She toyed with the joystick, day in, day out.
A fast food restaurant with only one employee, a basement turned into an arcade hall, several old arcade machines — this was her childhood.

She didn't have a legal name or an identity number, only a nickname the proprietress chose for her.
She did not have any friends, but she is not lonely.
She liked the game of Pong — two lines and a dot of light, the simplest of ball games. She could play it for a whole day.
She liked Battle Wheel <unbreak>32</unbreak> — eight blocks of different colors on a matrix-drawn sky. There was only one rule: Win, no matter what.
She liked Geometric Wars, Odysseus, and Star Cheetah. The score records on these games were filled with astronomical numbers left by other patrons.

She toyed with the joystick, day in, day out.
Until one day, only one name remained on all of the score records.

She set down the joystick and looked around the empty basement.
Many people have sought respite in this place, but few stayed behind.
Many have left, but few returned.
She blinked and turned off the screen.

That night, the only employee of the fast food restaurant said goodbye to proprietress, and became the next person to leave.
The game called Basement ended that night.

C: 「快，摁住这里！用力摁，止住出血！」 娜塔莎向哥哥投去慌张的眼神。在她身前躺着一个全身缠满绷带的男子，他的躯干因巨大的痛楚而扭曲、抽动着，口中不断冒出模糊不清的话语。 「…在磨蹭什么？快点，摁住！」 哥哥的命令中夹带着愤怒，以及——敏锐的女孩捕捉到了这点——微微一丝失望。娜塔莎慌忙抓住男子的右臂，用尽全身力气按压平敷在他肩部的止血棉。 从受伤的男人口中迸出撕心裂肺的呻吟，但在得到哥哥的指示之前，她绝对不能放松。 不知过了多久之后，眼前的伤员停止了呼吸，她呆滞地望着眼前流空了生命的躯壳。 「你尽力了，」哥哥说，语气恢复了往常的淡漠，「小歇一会儿吧，还有伤员在等着。」 她翻过红色的手掌，手指已经僵硬，血污的腥气扑鼻而来。娜塔莎任凭那气味搅动自己的肺腑——要踏上这条路，她知道自己能做的惟有习惯。
E: "Quick, press down here! Press down hard to staunch the bleeding!" Natasha shoots a panicked look at her brother. Before her lay a man covered in bandages from head to toe, his torso twitching and twisting with severe pain as he muttered nonsense. "What are you waiting for!? Quick, hold it down!" There is anger in her brother's order and — she is sharp enough to tell — a hint of disappointment. Natasha hurries to hold onto the man's right arm, and musters all her strength to press down the cotton gauze onto his shoulder. The man lets out a heart-wrenching moan, but she can't stop until her brother orders her to. After who knows how long, the patient before her stops breathing, and she stares blankly at the lifeless body. "You did your best," her brother says. His voice returning to its usual impassive tone. "Get some rest real quick. Some of them are still waiting to be patched up." She turns over the man's red palm. His fingers are already stiff as the stench of blood fills the air. Natasha allows the smell to rile up her emotions — she know she must get used to this if she were to continue down this road.

C: 银链星系，一场数百琥珀纪难遇的离子风暴正在逼近。年轻的珠宝名媛站在露台，远眺泛着奇异色彩的天空。  「小姐，该走了。荷露先生包下了一架星舰，我们得前往巴斯维亚星港避难。」 「银链星的人们还没收到消息？」 「为了避免骚乱，这也是无奈之举。」 「…你们离开吧，我会留下，寻求那位女士的帮助。」 「离子风暴会毁掉您所有的财富……」 「世上总有些东西无法以价格来衡量，比如…善良和生命。」 年迈的管家深深叹了口气。 年轻的珠宝名媛走入那家典当行。 「欢迎光临『慈玉典押』。来者何人，所求何物？」 陌生而优雅的声音从帷幕的另一边传来。 「善良的小姐，你心中的烦忧似乎与银链星系的灾难一样沉重。」 说话者端坐在阴影中，却散发着温润的光。珠宝名媛忐忑地抬起头。 「这就是我前来的原因。我想向您…交换一个希望。」 「拯救银链星的希望，为此你能付出多少？」 「『海洋之梦』，『圣血』，『世纪瑰宝』…这些宝石，每一枚都足以兑换一颗小行星的所有权……」 「你知道它们远远不够。」 「银链星系三分之一的矿产租用权，期限是…永远。」 「很有诚意，但依然不够。」 「我没有其他能给您的了……」 「你相信，这世上的一切都可以被交易么？」 黑暗中伸出了一只手，洁白、纤细。 名媛抬起头，她眼中将熄的光芒重新开始跳动。 「银链星系的和平，我会给你，作为代价…我要你的全部。 「你会成为公司在银链星系的代行者，往后的每一分钟，每一次呼吸，都将为琥珀王的事业添砖加瓦…… 「直到生命的最后一刻。」
E: In the Silverchain Galaxy, a rare once-in-a-hundred-Amber-Era ion storm approached. A young woman from a family involved in the jewelry trade stood on the terrace, gazing out at a sky inundated with unusual colors. "It's time to leave, miss. Mr. Horus has hired an entire starship, and we need to make our way to Basvia Starport for shelter." "But the commoners in the Silverchain have not heard of the storm, no?" "We don't have a choice. It's to prevent possible riots." "...Leave if you want, but I'll stay here and seek that lady's help." "But this ion storm will obliterate all your wealth..." "There are always things that can't be measured simply by price, such as... kindness and life." The aged butler let out a deep sigh. The young lady walked into the pawn shop. "Welcome to Bonajade Exchange. Who are you? And what do you seek?" An unfamiliar and elegant voice rang from behind the curtain. "Oh, kind lady. The worries in your soul seem as turbulent as the raging calamity in the Silverchain Galaxy." The speaker in the shadows emitted a warm light. The young lady looked up anxiously. "Yes, this is why I'm here. I seek... for a hope." "A hope of saving the Silverchain Galaxy, I see. What price will you pay in return?" "The Oceanic Dream, the Sacred Blood, and the Jewel of the Century... Each of these gems would be sufficient to redeem ownership of an asteroid..." "You know they are not nearly enough." "A lease on a third of the Silverchain Galaxy's mining industry... and the contract lasts for eternity." "Your sincerity is impressive, but I'm afraid that's still not enough." "But I don't have anything else to give to you..." "Do you believe that everything in this world can be traded?" A hand reached out from the darkness, white and slender. The young lady looked up, and the flicker that was fading in her eyes began to pulsate anew. "I will bring peace to the Silverchain Galaxy. As for the price... I want the entirety of you." "You will become the IPC's agent in the Silverchain Galaxy. From this moment on, every huff of your breath and every minute of your life will contribute to the Amber Lord's great cause..." "Until the very end of your life."

C: 面对那从异乡漂泊而来的青年，织者与貌如孩童的先知偶尔会提及逐火与黄金裔的历史。 织者无光的双眼仿佛能看穿他内心的迷茫，而先知的天真烂漫又令他感受到家的温暖。 「也就是说，黄金裔，是天赐的命运……」 青年鼓起勇气说道。 织者摇了摇头。 「不如说，那是漫长的苦行。」 青年将氤氲麦香的过去珍藏心中，他加入圣城的军团日夜训练，直到高深的剑术变得如同呼吸一般简单。 在那场震惊世人的死斗中，悬锋的王储与他僵持十个日夜，那大开大合的挥斩之间，他仿佛早已把自己当成视死如归的剑。 当然，更多的时候，青年总以风趣轻松的态度示人。 「我只是希望让别人感到亲切和自在。」 关于这一点，他的友人虽然嗤之以鼻，但也知晓正因如此，白发青年在圣城平民与贵族中享有信赖和美名。 去往树庭求学的岁月，对逻辑本不感兴趣的青年，在翻烂书坊的典籍后，常在辩论场上以机智的演讲取胜。 虽然老师的锋芒令他避之不及，但他深知自己正缺那份坚持自我的勇气。 只是当青年从战场归来，医师为他包扎完伤口后，依旧思忖良久。 「白厄阁下…你是不是总在夜里惊醒，或者无法入睡？」 他并不在意。 要踏上那击落神明的路，他必须将自己雕刻成众人需要的模样。
E: Facing the young drifter from afar, the weaver and the childlike seer would sometimes speak of the Flame-Chase and Chrysos Heirs. The weaver's sightless eyes seemed to see through his inner turmoil, while the seer's bright innocence gave him a warm sense of home. "So... the Chrysos Heirs were destined by the heavens?" The young man asked, gathering his courage. The weaver shook her head. "No. It's more like a long, grueling pilgrimage." The young man tucked away the wheat-scented memories of his past and joined the holy city's legion, training day and night until difficult swordplay became as natural as breathing. In a death match that stunned the world, he battled the crown prince of Kremnos for ten days and nights. In each sweeping strike, he wielded his blade as if he'd already offered up his life without hesitation. Of course, more often than not, the young man greeted the world with humor and ease. "I just want people to feel comfortable around me," he would say. Though his friends often scoffed at that, they knew it was that very spirit that earned the silver-haired youth the trust and respect of commoners and nobles alike in the holy city. During his years of study at the Grove, even though he had little interest in logic, the young man often triumphed in debates with his sharp wit after poring over books until the pages wore thin. Though he could not outcompete his teacher's wisdom, deep down he knew — it was the courage to stay true to himself that he still lacked. Yet when the young man returned from the battlefield and after the physician had bandaged his wounds, there was still a long silence. "Lord Phainon... do you often wake in the night, or find yourself unable to sleep?" He didn't mind. To walk the path that would strike down the gods themselves, he had to carve himself into the shape the people needed him to be.

C: 女人的协助者从暗处走到了台前，这个外貌年幼的少女似乎已经从空间站的数据库里抓住了自己想要的信息。\n目标是回廊深处的房间。\n「星核就在里面？」「它能告诉我们星核在哪里。」
E: The woman's helper emerges from the darkness and steps forward. This young-looking girl seems to have found the information she was looking for in the space station's database.\nThe target is the room in the depths of the corridor.\n"Is that where the Stellaron is?" "It can tell us where the Stellaron is."

C: 空间站的外部危机似乎得到了控制，但科员们仍然处于不安之中。\n不知道阿兰的情况怎么样，去看看他吧。
E: The space station's external crisis seems to be under control but the researchers remain uneasy.\nNot sure how Arlan is doing. Let's go check on him.

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.

C: 打开第二道大门的权限只掌握在克拉拉手里，而克拉拉此时又回到了铆钉镇搜集材料。\n不久前刚从那里回来的你很清楚：铆钉镇究竟是个怎样凶险的地方。在这里，你已经发现克拉拉的护卫机器人受损严重，并得知克拉拉被独自困在了「淬火工坊」…\n克拉拉现在正处于危险之中——尽快赶到工坊，保护克拉拉！
E: Only Clara, who has returned to Rivet Town to collect materials, has the authorization to open the second gate.\nBeing there not long ago, you are well aware of how vicious of a place Rivet Town is. Here, you already discovered Clara's robot guardian to be heavily damaged and learned that Clara is trapped in the Tempering Workshop all by herself...\nClara is in danger — hurry over to the workshop and protect Clara!

C: 可可利亚不愧为大守护者。为了庆祝你们重返上层区，她甚至悉心安排银鬃铁卫夹道欢迎，可谓是关怀备至。\n但铁卫们却不似可可利亚那般贴心——他们为了尽快完成任务，似乎只想把你五花大绑之后丢进克里珀堡。\n你们现在已俨然成为全城瞩目的大明星了…还是依丹恒所说，先想办法去机械屋避避风头吧。
E: The Supreme Guardian Cocolia has her Silvermane Guards lined up on both sides of the road to welcome you and your companions back to the Overworld. Such a grand reception can only come from a worthy ruler.\nThe Guards, however, are not so keen on the idea of putting up a show. To complete their task as soon as possible, they'd rather see you hogtied and thrown into the Qlipoth Fort.\nYou and your company are now talk of the town... Maybe you should listen to Dan Heng and go to the workshop to avoid unnecessary attention.

C: 你在这个神秘的空间醒来，被朦混的星空笼罩，被琥珀色的命运包裹。\n你记得自己的身体被可可利亚的枪尖贯穿——这里是死后的世界吗？但你的意识如此清醒，身体也轻盈如初…脑海中某个浑厚的声音似乎在指引着你，告诉你「我还活着」。\n也许你的同伴们还在与可可利亚厮杀。无论如何，你必须找到办法回到他们的身边。
E: You wake up in a strange place surrounded by nebulous stars, seemingly enveloped by an amber-colored destiny.\nThe last thing you remember is being pierced by Cocolia's lance... Could this be the afterlife? But your mind is still very clear and your body still has strength... These resounding voices in your head seem to be guiding you, telling you that you are still alive.\nYour companions might still be in fierce combat with Cocolia. You have to find a way to get back to their side, no matter what.

C: 丹鼎司中，遍地狼藉残骸，一场大战刚刚打响。正当你们想要厘清情势，猜测胜负时，远处传来幸存者的呼救。
E: The Alchemy Commission lies in total chaos with a large-scale skirmish just kicking off. Just as you plan to stay away and assess the situation, you hear the sound of survivors calling for help.

C: 在所有人面前，丹恒显露出他不愿为人所知的面貌——持明龙尊之相，并以其力量分开古海之水，露出通向建木玄根的道路。\n在你们前行时，绝灭大君幻胧已捷足先登，深入其中，擘画着对罗浮长生种的阴谋。
E: In front of everyone, Dan Heng revealed an appearance that he was unwilling to show to others — that of the Vidyadhara high elder. Using that power to part the waters of the ancient sea, he revealed the road leading to Roots of the Arbor.\nWhile you were moving forward, the Lord Ravager Phantylia had swooped ahead, going deep inside the area and plotting a conspiracy against the long-life species of the Luofu.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n触碰这台神秘的机器后，你发现自己变成了一个不怎么爱说话的卡通人物。根据游戏设定，你现在打倒石头老板，没收他的非法所得物。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAs you touch the mysterious machine, you realize that you've been transformed into a taciturn cartoon character. According to the game story, you will now defeat Boss Stone and confiscate his illegal items.

C: 万事俱矣，是时候直面那位橡木家主了。祝你好运。
E: Now, you're all set to meet the head of Oak Family. Good luck.

C:
你的创伤永远无法抚平
你的█伤永远无法抚平
你的█伤永远无█抚平
你█ █伤永远█法抚█平
你█ ███ █伤永远无法█ ███ ███ ███
E:
Your wounds will never heal
Your █ound█ will never heal
Your █ound█ will n██er heal
Yo██ █ound█ will n██er heal
Yo██ █ound█ w███ n██er ████

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 出人意料的是，为你们戴上冠军桂冠的并非知更鸟，而是她的哥哥星期日。在这里，他终于表明自己的全部意图，但他似乎并不打算与你们刀剑相向，而是寻求彼此理解的可能性。\n他向你们提出一连串问题，令你感到有些手足无措。但不必担心——如果你对星期日的问题感到迷茫，那就从自己的经历中寻求答案吧。
E: To everyone's surprise, the person present to crown you champion is not Robin at all, but her big brother, Sunday. Here, he finally reveals his true intentions, but he does not seem to want to fight you, instead seeking the possibility of reaching a mutual understanding.\nHe asks you a series of questions that leave you a little lost, but fear not - if you are confounded by Sunday's questions, just look for the answers in your personal experience.

C: 时间回退至你们尚未离开流梦礁的时间点。姬子从黄金的时刻归来，更捎来了一个强有力的推断：「钟表匠」怀中空无一物的梦泡与门童米沙或许有着千丝万缕的联系。\n为了求证，你们携米沙一道，再次进入米哈伊尔的梦泡——如无意外，一切真相就潜藏在这段稚子的长梦中。
E: Time reverses to the point before you left Dreamflux Reef. Himeko returns from Golden Hour with a powerful deduction: There may be some inextricable link between the empty dream bubble that the Watchmaker is holding and Misha the bellboy.\nIn order to prove it, you take Misha back into Mikhail's dream bubble... If everything goes as expected, the truth may be lurking here in this long dream of the child.

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 黑天鹅向你揭示了一个令人毛骨悚然的事实：原来在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还。\n不过，事情还有转机。忆者表示，在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处致命的破绽。而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。\n现在，你已经看穿了太一之梦的迷障——但要想让整个阿斯德纳清醒，只有你们还远远不够……
E: Black Swan reveals a bone-chilling truth to you: It turned out the entire Express Crew, as well as everyone in Penacony, lost their lives in their battle against Sunday. There were no survivors.\nHowever, there is still a chance to turn this around. The Memokeeper points out that there is a fatal flaw in the story that you experienced. Behind this fatal flaw lies a glimmer of hope.\nNow, you have seen through the illusion of Ena's Dream... However, if you wish to awaken everyone in Asdana, you will need far more people on your side...

C: 可憎！龙•邪祟又在以师长之名残害忍徒，宣扬邪祟之说。身为与缭乱•忍侠搭档的开拓上忍，你怎能忍受此等恶行发生在眼前，难道你已合眸安眠了吗？正义的球棒如金刚杵般坚硬了！\n虽然这段话非常热血，但按照剧本，你还是得陪这龙…猴演演戏。
E: Atrocious! The dino fiendling is once again terrorizing ninjas, spreading malevolence under the guise of mentorship. As the Trailblaze advanced ninja, partnered with the Dazzling Ninja Hero, how can you stand by and watch such wickedness? Have you closed your eyes and entered the eternal sleep already? Your baseball bat of justice is now as firm as a vajra scepter!\nDespite the inspiring dialogue, the script dictates your compulsory involvement in this farce with this dino... I mean, this monkey.

C: 好一个不要笑挑战——我快笑得裂开了原来并非空谈。\n为了解决眼前的异状，先在附近和「停云们」谈谈吧，或许会有哪一位很好说话呢？
E: So much for a "try not to laugh" challenge... Turns out people can really split themselves from laughing.\nTo solve this anomaly at hand, go chat with these Tingyuns nearby. Maybe one of them will be easy to talk to?

C: 幸存者的名字往往就是「不幸」，正因她曾为绝灭大君所害，天才才得以扭转生死。
E: Survivors are often called "unfortunate." It was because she lost her life due to the Lord Ravager that the genius was able to reverse her death.

C: 告别真是一种奇妙的存在——无论经历多少，仍是无法熟稔。但也无需熟稔，正因离别的存在，人们才会渴盼步入重逢。\n向自己的妹妹告别，慢慢地，极为珍惜地…道别。
E: Farewells are truly a miraculous thing... No matter how much you've experienced it in your life, it's not something you ever get used to. But that is okay. Without farewells, we would never have reunions to look forward to.\nSay farewell to your little sister. Take your time... A long and valuable... farewell.

C: 借黄金狮首之口，{NICKNAME}一行人得知疯溃的尼卡多利正在酝酿针对奥赫玛的恐怖袭击。事已至此，唯有继续前进，挫败恶意的源头。
E: Through Chryseus Leo, {NICKNAME} and the party learned that the maddened Nikador is planning a devastating attack on Okhema. With events taking this dire turn, their only option is to press forward and eliminate the source of this malevolence.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所说，欧洛尼斯让{F#她}{M#他}看到了星核猎手…那是一段理应不存在，却无比鲜明的记忆。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, Oronyx showed {F#her}{M#him} the Stellaron Hunters... It was a memory that should not exist, yet it seems so vivid and realistic.

C: 在这段不存在的记忆中，{NICKNAME}竟得到了记忆星神浮黎的瞥视。也许是欧洛尼斯的馈赠，{F#她}{M#他}的身边出现了一个奇妙的生物。{F#她}{M#他}看上去有些…惆怅？好在{F#她}{M#他}很快就振作起来了。
E: In this nonexistent memory, {NICKNAME} actually received a glance from Fuli, the Aeon of Remembrance. A marvelous creature appeared next to {F#her}{M#him}, perhaps a gift from Oronyx. {NICKNAME} seems a little... despondent, but thankfully {F#she}{M#he} quickly regained composure.

C: 昔日流思遍地的树庭，如今却陷入诡异的静默。{NICKNAME}一行人设法进入树庭，发现内部似乎情况不对……
E: The Grove, once filled with scholarly discourse, has now fallen into an eerie silence. {NICKNAME}'s group manages to enter, only to find that something seems amiss inside...

C: 对于我们伸出援手击败尼卡多利一事，阿格莱雅表现出真挚的谢意，诚备厚礼、邀我与{NICKNAME}前往英雄浴池一叙。
E: Aglaea shows sincere gratitude for our help in defeating Nikador, preparing generous gifts and inviting {NICKNAME} and I to the Hero's Bath for a discussion.

C: 与盗火行者的意外遭遇，导致欧洛尼斯的火种被提前取出。众黄金裔们希望由{NICKNAME}来承担岁月的神职。\n开拓总是会面对如此的时刻，将自己的命运与他人的命运深深地结合在一起…只有{NICKNAME}自己能决定{F#她}{M#他}的命运走向何方。
E: An unexpected encounter with the Flame Reaver led to the premature extraction of Oronyx's Coreflame. The Chrysos Heirs hope that {NICKNAME} will take on the divine role of Time.\nTrailblazers always face moments like this, where their fate becomes deeply entwined with that of others... Yet only {NICKNAME} can decide where {F#her}{M#his} destiny leads.

C: 冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。\n世人皆知灰黯之手，却鲜有人知晓塞纳托斯的另一只手——如今，你们终于相遇了。\n跟随着塞纳托斯前进，顺道一观她看顾的这片花海吧。
E: Just as the legends say... The nether realm is truly a sea of flowers.\nEveryone knows of the Hand of Shadow, but few know of Thanatos's other hand — And now, you have finally met each other.\nProceed with Thanatos, and behold the sea of flowers that she watches over.

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 白厄与昔涟孩提时的游具——「神谕牌」，它所映照出的，是那熟悉而又陌生的，逐火英雄们的身姿。它是否象征着确凿无疑的命运之线？亦或只是舞台上的迷雾布景？其时，{NICKNAME}仍不得而知。
E: The "oracle cards," childhood toys of Phainon and Cyrene, reflect the figures of Flame-Chase heroes, both familiar and strange. Do they symbolize the unyielding threads of fate? Or are they merely foggy backdrops on this theatrical stage? At this moment, {NICKNAME} could not yet tell.

C: 悄悄地偷看对手们的情报，打枪滴不要。
E: Peek at the enemy teams' intel on the sly. Nice and slow.

C: 就算没召唤出从者，你银河球棒侠照样无敌于世间！
E: Even if you failed to summon a Servant, nothing in the world can stop the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 放弃回到舞台的想法吧，你只是个普通人，没法成为拯救世界的英雄。
E: Give up on returning to the stage. You're just an ordinary person who wasn't meant to save the world.

C: 你很想知道在结界里帮助你的奇怪男人是不是Archer，但你的直觉告诉你，他多半不会说实话。
E: You're dying to know if the strange man who helped you in the field was Archer. But your gut says: If he is, he's not telling.

C: 神话已偏移了原定的轨迹，若命数是天上的巨星，那它的游离或会牵动太阳，也会牵动今夜的潮汐。\n你摸不到星，但可以站在潮汐里，感受波澜拍打你的脚踝。\n那是海在向你诉说它的忧虑。
E: The myth has drifted from its destined course. If fate is written in the stars, then their gravity pulls not just the sun, but the very tides at your feet.\nThe stars may be untouchable, but the tide isn't. Stand in its flow and feel how cosmic forces lap at your ankles.\nThat's the ocean whispering its worries, wave by wave, shore to soul.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 阿德勒先前说自己不知道呜呜伯行踪，但此刻他却与呜呜伯密谋着什么。\n你决定上前问清这究竟是怎么一回事……
E: Adler previously said he didn't know where the Wubbaboo was, but he's actually conspiring with it right now.\nYou decide to go up and ask what exactly is going on...

C: 前往其他房间深入调查
E: Go to other rooms to investigate more deeply

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助完成一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to complete a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 一落地就在行政区遇到了华劳斯，没想到华劳斯在贝洛伯格竟有一段奇缘……
E: You encounter Wallace in the Administrative District as soon as you touch down. Who would have thought that Wallace would have found themselves amid a Belobog romance...

C: 行走在「开拓」命途上的人们，总会在旅途中遭遇各类奇人奇事。这些琐碎的故事不仅填满了开拓者们的日志，同时也加深了他们与各个世界之间的联系。
E: Those on the Path of Trailblaze will encounter all kinds of strange people and odd anecdotes during the journey. Not only do these trivial stories fill up trailblazers' journals, but they also deepen their connections to all worlds.

C: 你答应了史考特的比试邀请，尽管你明知他是故意在激你应战，但你对未知的挑战充满了好奇，你决定去一探究竟。而在擂台之下，「掘掘博士」早已为你安排好了应战的对手。
E: You accept Scott's invitation to participate in the competition, even though you know this is exactly what he wants. You're curious about the unknown challenge, so you decide to give it a try. Dr. Dig has arranged an opponent for you.

C: 拍卖会上人来人往，坏家伙们专门选在这个时候做坏事，鼹鼠党岂能坐视不管。\n你倒要看看这些坏人做了什么伤天害理的事情…嗯？抢劫乳臭未干小孩子，真亏他们能干得出来。住手！
E: It's crowded at the auction, and criminals might seize this opportunity to wreak havoc. Of course, the Moles will not stand by idly.\nWhat have these bad guys done? ...Robbing a kid? Hey, stop!

C: 在为史考特找到他想要的怪物盔甲后，你如愿拿到了奖金尾款。但你想起盔甲上那令人浑身不适的气息，你不免有些担心。尽管你先前特意交代过此事，但你知道，他未必会把你的话当回事，你决定回去看看……
E: After finding the monster armor for Scott, you finally receive the rest of the reward. But something about that strange armor makes you worry. Although you've mentioned this to him, you know well that he might not take it seriously. So you decide to check on it again...

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 佩拉和玲可已经将露营地搭建完毕。接下来，她们决定为露营餐收集食材——顺便寻找不大可能出现在城郊雪原的地髓激活元件。
E: Pela and Lynx have finished setting up the camp. Then they decide to gather food as well as trying to find a Geomarrow Activation Element, even though it would be incredibly rare to find one out in the Outlying Snow Plains.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你们从公子哥华劳斯口中得知，他的「朋友」诺尔伯特最近行径古怪，或许这件事与展品盗窃案有所关联？\n无论如何，你们都该把这条消息带给布洛妮娅。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou heard from the rich boy Wallace that his "friend" Norbert has been acting strange lately. Perhaps this is related to the exhibit thefts?\nNo matter what, you should bring this news to Bronya.

C: 正当我随着剑痕残迹一路寻去，有位姐姐被几只魔阴身围困。真是怪了，云骑军封锁港口，怎么还有旅客困在这儿？罢了罢了，她孤身一人难免遇险，少不得在完成任务前我得护送她走上一段路。可惜她眼罩黑纱，似乎目不视物，看来无缘见识我舞剑的英姿了。
E: When I follow the sword marks, a lady was trapped by several Mara-struck monsters. Odd, with the Cloud Knights locking the port, why are there travelers being stuck here? She would be in danger traveling alone, I should escort her to safety before completing my mission. It's a shame that her eyes are covered with a black cloth, so she won't be able to see my graceful swordsmanship.

C: 没想到十王司与太卜司都各有所需，你只要去帮雪衣活捉要犯，就有机会让雪衣大人行个方便，这可是赚了呀。\n到底是哪个小倒霉蛋儿，要被捉去供判官拷问了呢？
E: Both the Ten-Lords Commission and the Divination Commission need something of you, and you only need to apprehend the criminal for Madam Xueyi to ask for a favor from her. This is a great deal!\nWhich poor sod needs capturing and questioning?

C: 边塞诗人说「用炽热的战斗激情碰撞诗歌的灵感吧！」\n你在看到边塞诗人的一瞬间就理解了，或早或晚，你肯定是要打它一顿的。\n就是现在了。
E: The Borderland Poet said, "Draw the inspiration of poetry from the burning passion of combat!"\nYou understand the moment you see the Borderland Poet. Sooner or later, you must give it a thrashing.\nThe time is now.

C: 小聪发来信息了，赶紧确认一下吧，也许是下一位诗人的位置。\n难不成还是来催进度的？你办事，还有人敢不放心？
E: Cong sent a message. Hurry up and check it out. It may be the position of the next poet.\nPerhaps he's still bugging you about the progress? Are there still those who doubt your capabilities?

C: 就如同你所担心的，小聪从未认真了解过静斋其人，甚至做不到投其所好。只好拜托你去打听一下。\n当然了，你发现了静斋的拒绝多少有些不太自然，也许仔细问问会有什么新线索。\n难道那位叫作孤屿的诗人，不令人在意吗？
E: As you feared, Cong never got to know Jingzhai serious and didn't even know what she really liked. You have no choice but to go ask around.\nOf course, you found Jingzhai's refusal to be a little suspicious. Maybe you'll find some new clues if you ask carefully.\nDoesn't that poet, Guyu, stir concern in anyone?

C: 按照镜流所说，她此番重回仙舟召聚旧友，是要重温彼此情深意笃时立下的约定。而在此前，她想去几处地方瞧瞧，缅怀故人。
E: According to Jingliu, she returned to the Xianzhou and collected her old friends this time to reminiscence about the promises they made when their hearts still beat as one. However, she wishes to visit some places before that, and to pay respect to bygone comrades.

C: 正论也好、歪理也罢，只要能说服大善人们接受放生机兵，就算全面胜利！
E: Whether it's right or wrong, as long as the Benevolent Ones can be convinced to accept releasing the automatons, it's a win!

C: 「挑战观众」…你也看过一些三月七硬塞给你的推理小说，对这样的桥段并不陌生。但一般在作品中负责挑战读者（或者观众）的，不都是作者或是侦探角色吗？怎么到了花火这里，就变成凶手本人跳出来下战书了？比起「挑战观众」，这大概更接近于「挑衅观众」吧…真不愧是花火。\n无论如何，祝君狩猎愉快。
E: "Challenge the audience"... You have read a lot of detective novels that March 7th shoved into your hands and are no stranger to this kind of plot. Although, normally it's the job of the author or the detective to challenge the reader (or audience), is it not? How is it that in Sparkle's game, it's the murderer who's throwing down the gauntlet? Surely this is closer to "threatening the audience" than challenging...? It's just what you've come to expect from Sparkle.\nEither way, happy hunting.

C: 三月七逃课了。不知道这是否符合你对三月七的预期，但事实便是如此。她的授业恩师现在要请你（作为三月七的家长代表）去金人巷。\n你似乎突然理解了很多孩子的父母不愿意参加家长会的原因了。
E: March 7th has skipped practice. Did you see this coming? Oh well, it happened anyway. You receive an invitation from her mentor to drop by Aurum Alley (as March 7th's guardian).\nYou get why parents with kids balk at having to attend parent-teacher meetings now...

C: 抵达罗浮，迎面而来是星槎渡口人满为患的景象。
E: Arriving at the Luofu, you are greeted by an overwhelming sight of starskiffs.

C: 时光流逝，转眼演武仪典即将召开在即。在即将登上擂台的时刻到来前，年轻的剑士们眺望空中的斗舰，与远来之客抒发己见。但关注此刻的并不只有他们，迴星港中，另有不速之客图谋不轨……
E: Time goes by, and the moment of the Wardance has arrived once more. Right before the young swordmasters are about to step into the ring, they look up at the fighter jet in the sky and start expressing their opinions to the visitors from afar. But they are not the only ones focused on this moment, for in Stargazer Navalia, certain uninvited guests weave their schemes...

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 在飞霄的提议下，众人放弃大张旗鼓的搜猎，转而揣度猎物的所思所求。而迴星港这个狼踪初现之地，会成为继续追索步离人的猎场。
E: Following Feixiao's advice, everybody abandons the large-scale hunt and begins to speculate about their prey's motives and agenda instead. As for Stargazer Navalia, the site where the wolves were first spotted, it shall become the hunting ground for the continued pursuit of the borisin.

C: 美梦报社发来消息，据说某位在现实中英年早逝的演艺界巨星出现在了匹诺康尼。\n爱凑热闹的你决定前去一睹这位「巨星」的风采。
E: According to the Sweet Dream Times's reports, a certain deceased superstar has appeared in Penacony.\nIntrigued, you decide to catch a glimpse of this "superstar."

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 顺着记忆的场景，继续探索奥尔拉的过去吧。
E: Follow the scenes of this memory and keep exploring Orla's past.

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你不是爱心泛滥的类型，但你依旧愿意提供最低限度的帮忙——仅限有人报销时。
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou are not the overly loving type, but you are still willing to provide the bare minimum amount of assistance... Provided that you will be reimbursed.

C: 谈话接近尾声时，苏克提瑞斯的弟子来报：有一伙受伤的外邦人躲进了重渊…\n你慷慨解囊，为那群可怜人选购了最昂贵的优质物资——这足以成为他们近来最好的消息了。
E: As your discussion was coming to an end, Soctires' disciple came with word: A group of wounded outlanders has hidden themselves away in the Abyss.\nYou show extreme generosity and buy the most extravagant and luxurious supplies for the poor outlanders — this will be the best news they have had in a long time.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 迷路的呜呜伯看上去不太聪明的样子，还是回去反馈确认一下情况吧！
E: The lost Wubbaboo doesn't seem to be the sharpest tool in the shed. Let's go back and report the situation!

C: 呜呜，呜呜，找不到路了呜……
E: Wub-boohoo, wub-boohoo... I can't find my way back...

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n为了交到朋友，他想出了一个策略——策略的第一步是为他拍摄一张照片。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nHe has a plan to make more friends, and the first step is to have a photo taken.

C: 鼹鼠党的尤利安在这里东张西望，似乎在盘算着什么…该不该和他搭话呢？
E: Julian of the Moles is looking around here, as if planning something... Should you talk to him?

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n你打听到了和塔米拉有关的趣闻，快去把你的发现告诉塞琳吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nYou discovered a fun trivia about Tamila, so go and tell Celine right away.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 第一重秘术锁成功解开。继续打开第二重秘术锁吧。
E: The first layer of the arcane seal has been successfully unlocked. Proceed to unlock the second layer.

C: 「贼灵」巴特鲁斯讲述起了自己的英雄事迹，究竟它是如何巧妙地化险为夷。
E: Spirithief Bartholos recounts their heroic deeds, telling how they cleverly turned danger into triumph.

C: 根据帕姆的说辞，在车厢内找到可疑的绒毛。
E: According to Pom-Pom, the suspicious fur can be found in the carriage.

C: 试着向史瓦罗与克拉拉讨教一些管理学经验。
E: Ask Svarog and Clara about their managerial experiences.

C: 你再次加入了铁卫禁区的联合演习。\n演习的目标是击败名为「少校」的机器人。想办法通过禁区的齿轮栈桥，找到「少校」吧。
E: Once again, you join a joint training in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone.\nThe objective this time is to defeat a robot called Major. Find a way to get past the gear bridge in the restricted zone and locate Major.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 铁墓之战暂时尘埃落定，银河诸文明终于从毁灭手中夺下自己的未来。作为身处事件核心的一方，星穹列车的工作还没停止，联军各势力先后与领航员姬子进行联络。这其中大多是礼尚往来的客套话，但也不乏暗流涌动的交锋与思量……
E: The Battle of Irontomb has temporarily settled, and the civilizations of the cosmos have finally wrested their future from the hands of the Destruction. As a key player at the heart of these events, the Astral Express's work isn't over yet, with various forces in the alliance reaching out to Navigator Himeko one after another. While most exchanges are merely courteous formalities, undercurrents of strategic maneuvering and careful deliberation flow beneath the surface...

C: 你在奥赫玛意外得到一份古老的卷轴，上面记载了一个神秘的仪式。按照卷轴记载的步骤，找齐所有材料，在指定地点下召唤出来的会是什么呢？
E: Unexpectedly, you come across an ancient scroll in Okhema, detailing a mystical ceremony. Follow the instructions carefully and gather all the necessary materials. What will be summoned at the designated location?

C: 追上她！
E: Catch up to her!

C: 你和瓦尔特再次遇到了驭空的女儿——晴霓。她刚和母亲大吵了一架，心情非常不好。陪她散散心吧，毕竟替人排忧解难也是星穹列车的宗旨。
E: Welt and you again meet Yukong's daughter, Qingni. She had just had a big fight with her mother, and is in a very bad mood. Help her clear her mind. After all, helping people solve problems is also a goal of the Astral Express.

C: 实验助手工作正式开始！去问问看温世玲本次实验还缺少什么素材吧。
E: The work of a lab assistant has officially begun! Go ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 某种与「钥匙」有关的…不好说，雷金的灵感真的靠谱吗？
E: Something to do with "keys"... Is Regin's intuition trustworthy?

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是磐岩镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Boulder Town...

C: 随着故事的推进，事情也变得越来越离谱。现在龙尊造像竟然让你…为新任龙尊接生？\n你开始觉得，这个故事和你的冒险传奇已经没什么关系了，但西衍先生却认为，这是为了商业化所必须的妥协。
E: As the story progresses, the plot gets more and more outrageous. Now, the Statue of the High Elder is even asking you to... act as a midwife for the next high elder?\nYou are starting to feel this story has nothing to do with your own adventures anymore, but Mr. Xiyan thinks this is the compromise necessary for commercial success.

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，你自告奋勇要担任「推广大使」，可得肩负起责任。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." As you have volunteered to be the "Promotional Ambassador," you must be able to bear the responsibilities of your duties.\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？\n就让这些倒霉蛋化作艺术的一部分吧。
E: The trial of the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?\nSuppose you best incorporate your unfortunate adversaries into this artistic expression.

C: {NICKNAME}——就让他们记住这个即将响彻寰宇的名号吧。
E: So, let them never forget the name {NICKNAME}, and let the galaxy be shaken when your memory is invoked.

C: 你们将此事的来龙去脉告知景元，请他前往祈龙坛劝说彦卿。
E: You inform Jing Yuan about everything and request his assistance in heading to Dragonprayer Terrace and reasoning with Yanqing.

C: 浮烟大方承认了自己的所作所为，并将藿藿的线索告诉了你们，甚至不需要用「武斗」的方式套取线索。\n尽管这其中有诈，但是当下救人要紧。
E: With surprising candor, Cirrus confesses to its deeds and reveals crucial information about Huohuo's whereabouts, even sparing you from a fight.\nAlthough this raises suspicions, the top priority remains rescuing Huohuo.

C: 你没有猜错，这次的发帖人是三月七，她发现了照片总是拍到不该有的东西。也许列车上真的有问题，应该好好查一下。\n先和三月七聊聊吧。
E: You guessed it right. The poster this time is March 7th. She noticed that her photos are always capturing things that shouldn't be there. Maybe there's actually something wrong with the Express, and it should be investigated.\nSpeak to March 7th first.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了你的同伴们，你必须深入其中、将失散的大伙重新集结起来。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away your companions. You have to delve into the dream to reunite with your lost companions.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n小星星向你提出了问题，你的回答是……
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nStarlet has asked you a question. Your answer is...

C: 让我们搜查赃物，为匹诺康尼伸张正义！
E: Let's search for the stolen goods and bring justice to Penacony!

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！/本层有三位员工，去找找他们吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThere are three staff members on this floor. Go find them!

C: 应物科的科员捷德有事找你，你见她神色有异，又刻意压低声线，不知道她找你究竟是为了什么……
E: Geed, a researcher from the Department of Implement Arts, wants to see you for something. She is looking very suspicious and deliberately lowering her voice, and you're not sure why she wants to see you...

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 不知所踪的「沉眠」出现在了这里…它似乎想说什么。
E: The missing "Dormancy" has appeared here... It seems to be trying to say something.

C: 终极挑战就在眼前，但周围似乎发生了一些奇怪的事情。
E: The final showdown is just ahead. But strange things are happening around you.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。 三月七任命你为「剑术助教」，为她合理安排训练生活，你要和她二位师父一起，在短短十五日里将三月七培养成独当一面的剑术高手。 也许故事还能有其他的走向，请务必试试！ 「十五日后，罗浮之巅，双剑西来，天外飞仙。」
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days. March 7th makes you her "assistant swordplay instructor," leaving you in charge of her training schedule. Alongside her two masters, you have fifteen days to train March 7th into a swordswoman capable of holding her own in a duel. Perhaps the story can go in other directions. Please give them a try! "The ultimate Luofu duel begins in fifteen days. Watch a pair of swords whiz through the skies in a peerless swordplay."

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n返回原先的位置，给玲可和邓恩讲讲你刚才的经历。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nGo back to where you were and tell Lynx and Dunn what you just experienced.

C: 你终于拥有了一个宽敞、舒适的房间。快泡一个惬意的热水澡，给这次劳动赋予一个具有仪式感的收尾吧！
E: You finally have a spacious and cozy room. Take a warm, relaxing bath, and give this round of labor a ceremonious ending!

C: 没想到目前的形势如此严峻…为了拯救即将解散的队伍，带领你的奇美拉努力工作吧！
E: The situation is even worse than you imagined... Take charge of your chimeras, keep the team together, and save the day!

C: 为什么这位浴场的王者要选择站在奇美拉那边呢？去听听他的说法吧。
E: Why would the King of the Baths decide to side with the chimera? Have a chat with him and listen to what he has to say.

C: 与奇物交互揭开监控室的秘密
E: Interact with the Curio to unravel the secret in the Monitoring Room

C: 寻找裂界出口，逃脱追捕
E: Find a way to leave the Fragmentum and shake off the pursuers

C: 继续深入矿区
E: Continue deeper into the mines

C: 继续深入矿区，寻找奥列格
E: Continue deeper into the mines and find Oleg

C: 在孤儿院寻找物资
E: Search for supplies in the orphanage

C: 跟随机器人帕金斯
E: Follow Perkins the Robot

C: 离开太卜司，乘槎前往工造司
E: Leave the Divination Commission and take a skiff to go to the Artisanship Commission

C: 破坏建木缠结
E: Destroy the entangled Ambrosial Arbor coil

C: 追寻开拓者等人的去向
E: Find out where the Trailblazer and the others are

C: 离开可疑的房间
E: Leave the suspicious room

C: 寻找任意一扇门离开这里
E: Leave this place through any portal

C: 跟随记忆中的流萤
E: Follow the Firefly in the memory

C: 联系列车组
E: Contact the Crew

C: 与三月七交谈
E: Talk to March 7th

C: 与？█？？交谈
E: Speak with ?█??

C: 登上舞台，与砂金对峙
E: Get onstage and confront Aventurine

C: （可选）与瓦尔特交谈
E: (Optional) Speak with Welt

C: 通过第二道「演技派」考验
E: Pass the second "School of Acting" test

C: 前往第三道关卡的入口
E: Go to the third stage entrance

C: 探索两侧的房间
E: Search the rooms on either side

C: 让三月七和蒙塔娜姐们也来嗨！
E: Hit up March 7th and Montana! Let's chill together!

C: 寻找一反常态的三月七
E: Seek out March 7th, who seems to be out of sorts

C: 与白厄一同前进，扫清敌人
E: Travel with Phainon and eliminate the enemies

C: 寻找声音的来源
E: Find the source of the sound

C: 与克拉特鲁斯交谈
E: Speak with Krateros

C: 参加缇安的葬礼
E: Participate in Trianne's funeral

C: 与缇里西庇俄丝一起逃离
E: Escape with Tribios

C: 与凯妮斯交谈
E: Speak with Caenis

C: 前往根石之间，寻找那刻夏的实验室
E: Search for Anaxa's lab between the cornerstones

C: 与「长老」阿蒙内特交谈，了解行刑人的使命
E: Speak with "Elder" Amunet and learn about the duties of an executioner

C: 前往「穹顶关塞」晨昏之眼，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Fortress of Dome" Eye of Twilight and continue your adventure

C: 乘坐浮台，回到云端遗堡的穹顶
E: Ride the platform and return to the domed roof of the Cloudedge Bastion Ruins

C: 逃离翁法罗斯
E: Escape from Amphoreus

C: （可选）在谷仓寻找神谕牌
E: (Optional) Find oracle cards in the barn

C: 见证第一次永劫回归的结局
E: Witness the end of the 1st Eternal Recurrence

C: 调查奇怪的「尸体」
E: Investigate the strange "body"

C: 与昔涟对话，讨论未来的计划
E: Talk to Cyrene about the future plans

C: 参与同盟会议
E: Participate in the Alliance meeting

C: 应对新客人的到访
E: Deal with the arrival of new guests

C: 卧底环节！窃听凯撒的密谈
E: Undercover mission! Eavesdrop on the Imperator's secret talks

C: 跟随三月七离开…？
E: Leave with March 7th...?

C: 品鉴秩序之子的瞩望
E: Contemplate the aspiration of the Order's chosen

C: 与丹恒对话
E: Talk with Dan Heng

C: 追上前方那道记忆的身影
E: Chase after that figure of memory ahead

C: 踏上「记忆」的命途，铭记银河众生
E: Embark on the Path of Remembrance and remember all life in the cosmos

C: 铁墓的危机已经解除，但故事尚未结束
E: The crisis in Irontomb has been dispelled, but the story isn't over yet

C: 播下涟漪，进行第四次回望
E: Cast ripples and initiate the fourth gaze backward

C: 找到阿兰，倾听空间站的星声余音
E: Find Arlan and listen to the space station's star echo remnants

C: 向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Report to Asta remotely

C: 收集信标数据
E: Collect beacon data

C: 询问阿兰关于修行的事情
E: Ask Arlan about the trial

C: 保护虎克，击败孤儿院的怪物
E: Protect Hook and defeat the monsters in the orphanage

C: （可选）寻找买家，目标是卖出高价
E: (Optional) Find buyers and try to sell the toy at a high price

C: 沿着线索向前搜索
E: Follow the clues and search onward

C: 与朗道姐弟交谈
E: Talk with the Landau siblings

C: 旁听银鬃铁卫与「地火」的会谈
E: Listen to the meeting between the Silvermane Guards and Wildfire

C: 向战场深处推进，搜救沿途的难民
E: Move deeper into the battlefield and help the refugees on the way

C: 解开军械箱谜题
E: Solve an Armory Box puzzle

C: 前往大矿区与佩拉会面
E: Go to the Great Mine and meet up with Pela

C: 前往长乐天，寻找丹士咨询「龙蟠虬跃」的药理
E: Head to the Exalting Sanctum and ask around for Draught of Draconic Surge's recipe

C: 将收集到的拓片交给陶德
E: Hand the collected rubbings over to Todd

C: 前往三月七的房间与她对话

C: 病历上写着这人不过两百余岁，刚加入云骑军，哪来魔阴身发作的道理？你…你再仔细瞧瞧？

E: Excuse me, have you seen three outworlders? One of them's older — wears glasses — calm demeanor?

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 只要能找到一点点卡芙卡的痕迹就够了，就算她躲藏得再隐秘，也逃不过「谛听」的追踪。
E: All we need to do is look for any trace left by Kafka. It doesn't matter how good she is at hiding, Diting will find her.

C: 是美少女和可爱小狗之间的心灵感应！
E: That's just the psychic bond between cute girls and cute puppies!

C: 打扰了，请问两位有看见一位狐人经过吗？
E: Excuse me, any chance you saw a foxian lady pass by?

C: 从这两张嘴里说出来的话还能信吗…？
E: I find it hard to trust anything you've just said...

C: 刚才还在这附近的，我想想，她往迴星港的方向去了，应该就在那边儿。
E: She was just here, give me a second... Oh, she was heading towards Stargazer Navalia — that's my guess.

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 走吧，恩公，事不宜迟，咱们应该很接近她了。
E: Let's go, benefactors, time is of the essence. We must be close.

C: 欢迎，列车团的各位，你们逮住我啦。
E: Welcome, Astral Expressers. Looks like you caught me.

C: 知道啦，知道啦，咱们去那边看看！
E: I know, I know, let's go and have a look!

C: 保守点一比一平。
E: Let's play it safe and say it was a draw.

C: 等等…谁说战事不利来着？「药王秘传」蓄谋已久，手段了得，但我军也未见劣势，怎能说战事不利？
E: Wait... what's all this about a difficult conflict? The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have been scheming for a long time, but our army is in no way inferior. How can things be so difficult?

C: 不过，「药王秘传」的人怎么也料不到将军敢请外援，当然也不会为了对付短生种而作准备。
E: However, the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus could never have guessed that the general would seek outside help — they won't be prepared against short-life species.

C: 言归正传，熄灭丹炉而不受其害，这件事只有你们能办到。意下如何？
E: To return to the matter at hand, only you can douse the elixir crucibles without being harmed by them. What say you?

C: 等等，是你们啊——几位快些进来，外边危险。
E: Wait, it's you...! Quickly, in here! It's dangerous outside.

C: 各位还请到阵中稍候，一切等太卜大人返回后再作主张。
E: Please wait in the camp — we'll decide on our next steps once the master diviner returns.

C: {NICKNAME}，你还记不记得…可可利亚。
E: {NICKNAME}... do you still remember Cocolia?

C: 云骑军的训练那么严格，怎会失控成这样？
E: The Cloud Knights undergo such thorough training. How could they lose control like this?

C: …还没！卡芙卡，还没！
E: ...Not yet, Kafka! Not yet!

C: 虽然窥探持明的秘密有些不妥……
E: Perhaps it is a little inappropriate of me to pry into the secrets of the Vidyadhara...

C: 这便是「三爪」中的最后一处。
E: The last of the three talons is here.

C: 我从符卿处收到了报告。幻胧潜伏之深，处心积虑，实在令人防不胜防。
E: I received word from Lady Fu. The depth of Phantylia's infiltration, along with her meticulous planning, makes her extremely difficult to guard against.

C: 那个坏东西！果然在这儿等着咱们。出来啊，幻胧！
E: That witch! She was here waiting for us the whole time. Show yourself, Phantylia!

C: …好啊，那就再添把火吧。卡芙卡！
E: ...Is that so? Let's heat things up then. Kafka!

C: 对军团的危险程度，我们显然应该再度评估了。
E: The present danger posed by the Legion clearly demands a re-evaluation. We should proceed cautiously.

C: 「建木」一直保持静止。有赖各位的浴血奋战，罗浮安全了。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is dormant. Thanks to everyone's hard-fought battles, the Luofu is safe once more.

C: 这些东西里，会不会还有别的没送出的礼物啊，就像岩明先生收到的那件一样。咱们再瞧瞧？
E: Could there be other things similar to what Yanming got? We should take a look.

C: 这场战争结束后，就像是害怕去触碰战争留下的伤痕一样。罗浮仙舟一直沿着航路休养生息，吐纳贸易……
E: The scars of that war never truly healed. Still, the Luofu traced out its arc of recovery, and continued to trade...

C: 停云也为其他人准备了礼物？她还是我记忆中的那个停云…
E: Tingyun prepared gifts for others, too? That's just like her...

C: 仪式所需的星槎还在准备中，各位完成了手头的事情，就请回到我这边。
E: We're still preparing the starskiff for the ceremony. Please, everyone, come back to me when your work is complete.

C: 数千年前，联盟成立时，诸仙舟共盟一誓，并铭刻玉兆盟载为证。天地荒灭，不渝此誓。
E: Back when the Alliance was first established — all those thousands of years ago — the Xianzhou ships swore an oath, etching the record into a jade abacus. The world may crumble and the heavens may fall, but this oath shall never be broken.

C: 我这个人比较成熟稳重。
E: Of course, I'm the mature, adult-type.

C: 打开这扇门…看看瑰丽的梦境吧，趁你还记得。
E: Open this door... Take a look at the mesmerizing dreamscape, while you can still remember.

C: 你准备怎么拉他们下场？
E: How do you intend to pull them off the stage?

C: 你还记得列车收到的「邀请函」吗？
E: Do you remember the invite that the Express received?

C: 通过客房的入梦池就可以去往「真正的匹诺康尼」，准备好了就出发吧。祝你在梦中玩得愉快。
E: Past the guest room's Dreampool is the real Penacony. Let's get ready to move out. Pleasant dreams.

C: 说来有些在意，杨叔似乎也发现了，知更鸟小姐的声音听着有些疲惫…我不知道怎么形容，就是和平时不太一样？
E: You know, it's weird. Welt noticed it too, about how Miss Robin's voice sounded somewhat weary... I can't quite put my finger on it, but it was different than usual?

C: 这里看起来好怪异。
E: This whole place looks weird.

C: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼的十二梦境之一，对应时间为「午夜」——在这里，梦中的时间永远停留在零点前的瞬间，明天不会到来，而这一夜的狂欢也永远不会结束……
E: Golden Hour is one of the twelve dreamscapes in Penacony, and its time coincides with midnight. Here, the dream's time is forever stuck in the moment before midnight. Tomorrow will not come, and this night of revelry will never end...

C: 「黄金的时刻」是什么？
E: What is "Golden Hour?"

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
E: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

C: 谢谢，我们走吧！
E: Thanks. Let's go!

C: 当然不用啦！说什么呢。
E: Of course not! What were you thinking?

C: 不要把情感寄托在这种东西上。
E: You shouldn't attach your feelings to stuff like this.

C: 哎，说到这个，正好——伙计，咱俩难得在这匹诺康尼见上一面，不如让我带你们在这附近好好逛逛吧。
E: Speaking of which... Old pal, since fate brings us here, I'm obliged to give you a tour of this area.

C: 要绕到对面，恐怕得跑好长一段路——各位，咱们坐弹球机蹦到对岸去吧！
E: It takes a long time to reach the other side on foot. How about we just bounce over there using the pinball machine!

C: 女孩侧过身，看向远方，像是在回避你的视线。半晌，她才回头，轻轻开了口。
E: The girl turns her body sideways, gazing into the distance, as if evading your gaze. After a momentary pause, she finally turns back and softly speaks.

C: （桑博…到底是什么意思？流萤在隐瞒什么吗？）
E: (What did Sampo mean? Is Firefly hiding something?)

C: 不懂规矩的家伙，看我怎么收拾你！
E: You broke the rules! And now you're gonna pay the price!

C: <size=36>都是应该的！</size>
E: <size=36>You're welcome!</size>

C: 恐怕没这么简单吧？
E: I don't think it's that simple.

C: 如果米娅在这儿，我们就能高歌一曲，她一定懂我的感受！
E: If Meeya were here, we would sing a song together. I'm sure she would understand how I feel!

C: 嘿嘿，你瞧，我没骗你吧——这个约会场合是不是很棒？你看嘛，这周围的景色是不是很迷人？
E: Haha, you see! I told you this would be a great spot for a date, right? Check it out? Isn't the view enchanting?

C: 接下来的事，会有点超乎你的想象……
E: What happens next is going to blow your mind...

C: 你真的…太盲目了。
E: You're just so... blind.

C: 可以带上我一起吗…
E: Can you take me with you...

C: 匹诺康尼必须自救
E: Penacony must save itself

C: 欢迎来到现实——白日梦酒店——你最熟悉，也是最安全的地方。
E: Welcome to reality. More specifically, The Reverie, the safest and most familiar place you can be.

C: 这位异乡人一定是想让我们明白，眼下的纷争是多么可笑…您用行动证明了自己。此物象征着我们的追随与憧憬，希望您能收下！
E: The outlander must be trying to help us understand how foolish this dispute of ours was... You have proven yourself with your actions. This signifies our loyalty and longing. We wish for you to have it.

C: {NICKNAME}，看着我…冷静些，深呼吸，好吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, look at me... Calm down, deep breaths, all right?

C: 《谐乐颂》诚不我欺——「愚者的言语起头是愚昧，末尾是奸恶的狂妄」……
E: The Odes of Harmony talks about honesty — "The words of a fool begins with foolishness and end in treacherous arrogance"...

C: 「熔火骑士」萨姆，据称此人是格拉默铁骑的余党，先天的基因改造战士，认知异于常人，行事决绝、不留余地，是不亚于卡芙卡和刃的危险分子。
E: The Molten Knight, Sam, is reportedly a remnant of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry — a genetically engineered warrior. He possesses superhuman perception and acts decisively — he'll leave no margin for error. This individual is every bit as dangerous as Kafka and Blade.

C: 那我就安心了。
E: That's good then.

C: 是吗…那你很厉害，是受过什么训练吗，是否可以教教我？
E: Is that so... You're good then. What sort of training did you have to undergo? Can you teach me?

C: 两位来得正巧，这片梦境危机四伏。既然我们目的一致，不如结伴同行吧。
E: Your arrival is timely — this Dreamscape is fraught with danger. Since our destination is the same, how about we join forces?

C: 这…你怎么看，{NICKNAME}？
E: Hmm... What do you think, {NICKNAME}?

C: 人们为何选择沉睡？我想……
E: Why do people choose to sleep? I think...

C: 我已决定，离开这里。
E: I've decided. I'm leaving this place.

C: 哦，我可算想起来了…朋友！那之后，咱们玩了场愉快的游戏。
E: Oh, I remember... my friend! After that, we played an enjoyable game.

C: 她没有别的路可走，只能从侧廊离开。
E: She had no other way to leave but from the side corridor.

C: 总算回到大堂了，这样就……
E: Finally back at the lobby. If that's the case...

C: 现在，机会来了。只要我们能<color=#dbc291ff>弄清「知更鸟之死」的真相</color>，就能还死者一个公道，同时还能收获谈判的筹码，请家族上桌。
E: Now we have our chance. So long as we can <color=#dbc291ff>get to the truth behind her death</color>, we can have justice for Robin while also gaining a valuable bargaining chip for bringing The Family to the table.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: …欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}卡卡瓦夏{RUBY_E#}。
E: ...Welcome to this sad world, {RUBY_B#Child Blessed by Gaiathra}Kakavasha{RUBY_E#}.

C: 如果不是那女孩练歌练到嗓子都哑了，就只有一种可能：家族出了问题，或者是知更鸟自己出了问题。为了弄清这点，我才想尽办法要和她见上一面……
E: If that girl hadn't gone hoarse from singing practice, there'd only be one possibility: Something was up with The Family, or Robin herself. To get to the bottom of this, I tried every way I could to meet her...

C: 我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
E: My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.

C: 是么……
E: Is that so...

C: 这是「邀请函」最初被交付时残留的记忆…片刻就中断了。那么之后是……
E: This is the residual memory from when the 'invitation' was first delivered... they were abruptly interrupted. Then, what happened next is...

C: 您好好好好好，欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基基基基基基底模型——
E: Hel—l—l—l—l—o. Welcome to the Golden Hour ba—a—a—a—a—se model —

C: （踢它一脚。）
E: (Give it a kick.)

C: 嗯，我更相信要做好准备的是他。
E: Yeah, only I believe he's the one who should be prepared to face me.

C: 呵，金黄色的石头啊。它的色泽和克里珀圣体的光芒如出一辙。
E: Ha, the golden stone. Its color and glow are similar to that of Qlipoth's body.

C: 我们又见面了。
E: We meet again.

C: 这不就结了嘛，我们要找的就是他呀！
E: He'll do! He's the one we've been looking for!

C: 「此后该地区逐步沦为『泛星系奴隶市场』的枢纽，大量星际海盗亦将此地据为己有，对临近星区贸易航运造成极大的威胁——」
E: What was left of the sector became a hub for the Interstellar Slave Market and has fallen into the hands of space pirates, posing a significant threat to trade and shipping in the neighboring sectors...

C: 哦，又一个好奇的人。你别说，这是我入行时最想做的题材，结果被台长按住了。
E: Another curious soul, I see. Well, that was actually the topic I was most into when I entered the industry, but my boss shut it down.

C: ——敬自掘坟墓的父辈。
E: ...To our forebearers who dug their own graves.

C: 用这杯「漫长的告别」向你致意，守望者——
E: Here's to you, watcher, with this glass of "The Long Goodbye"...

C: 但按理来说…无论有什么重大要务，家族禁地总该留些人在后方待命吧？
E: But no matter what their main priorities are, there should always be someone left at the mansion, right?

C: 或许这就是星期日如此重视这件事的原因。
E: Perhaps that's why Sunday is taking this matter so seriously.

C: 他们好像不是那么在意「死亡」…反而更在意谐乐大典和「钟表匠」。
E: They don't seem to care much about "Death"... Instead, they're more concerned about the Charmony Festival and the Watchmaker.

C: 也许家主们就是用这座模型来商议要事的。
E: Maybe the heads of The Family use that model for discussing important matters.

C: 难道你心里没点数吗……
E: I'm pretty sure you already have some ideas...

C: 前提是你真能做到。
E: That is, if you can do what it takes.

C: 真开心呀，来这儿的路上，爸爸还带我见识了*蕉皮电影*。
E: I'm so happy! On our way here, Papa even brought me to see a flim.

C: 真是个怪问题。家就是有爸爸、妈妈、姐姐在的地方……
E: What a strange question. It's where Papa, Mama and Big Sis are...

C: 为了解开「钟表匠」的谜团，我们势必需要公司手中的信息。纵使前方危机四伏…但迎难而上才是「开拓」，对吧？
E: To solve the mystery of the Watchmaker, it is crucial to get the IPC's intel. The path ahead is fraught with danger... but what's Trailblazing without a little danger?

C: 虚张声势对我们没用。如果真能做到，你先前有的是机会。
E: Your bluff isn't fooling anyone. If you could really do that, you would have done so earlier.

C: 我不需要寻求什么。
E: I'm not looking for anything.

C: 你也要到那里去？
E: Then are you going too?

C: 当然。因为我是受母神赐福的孩子。
E: Of course. For I am a child who received the blessing of Gaiathra Triclops.

C: 我不如他和卡芙卡那样通晓人心，也没有银狼和刃的一技之长。我所擅长的种种，大多也只适用于无需怜悯的恶徒。
E: I don't know people's hearts as well as he and Kafka do, nor do I have a specialty like Silver Wolf and Blade. Most of the things that I'm good at only apply to villains who need no mercy.

C: 现在轮到你了。
E: Now, it's your turn.

C: 而后，我的种种尝试皆以失败告终。直到不久前，一道血红的刀光劈碎了梦中的高墙，令你们跌落到这深层的梦境中，我才得以将你和同伴们一个个唤醒……
E: And after, all my attempts proved futile. It wasn't until not long ago, when a crimson blade of light shattered the high wall of the dream, causing you all to fall far into the abyssal depths of the Dreamscape, that I was able to awaken you and your companions one by one...

C: 你看出来了啊。
E: That's right.

C: 呵…果然。
E: Huh... I knew it.

C: 如我所想，砂金给你的这枚筹码…是个小型发信器。
E: As I suspected, this chip Aventurine gave to you... is actually a miniature transmitter.

C: …祝你好运，瓦尔特。
E: ...Good luck to you, Welt.

C: 而这两位年轻的无名客…身世离奇，身怀绝技。
E: And you two young Nameless... you have very interesting life stories and extraordinary skills.

C: 不会，我时日无多，反倒希望有人能陪我说说话——更何况是像您这样尊贵的女士。方便的话，想聊聊吗？
E: Not at all. With little time left, I yearn for meaningful conversations, especially with someone as esteemed as you. Do you mind if we chat?

C: 担心会让你悲伤，我没有在信件中提及此事。
E: Well, I didn't mention what happened to it in my letters, because I didn't want to upset you.

C: 瓦尔特先生理应知晓，家族子民亲如手足，在祂的光芒下拥抱团结、万众一心，一切二心在「同谐」面前无所遁形。
E: Mr. Yang should know that those belonging to The Family toil together as if they were kin, embracing solidarity and unity under THEIR Light. All duplicity is laid bare before the Harmony.

C: …也对，常人怎么可能踏足此地呢？
E: ...I see. After all, this realm is off-limits to ordinary souls, right?

C: 这是一个好问题，也很难回答，至少…我不知道答案。
E: A good question, and a profound one... I don't know the answer.

C: 突然！从天而降的甘霖滋润了你们的嘴唇，唤醒了你们奋斗的精神。
E: Suddenly! Sweet rain falls from the sky, wetting your lips, and rousing your spirits.

C: （站起来，准备出发）
E: (Stand up and prepare to move out)

C: （心灰意冷地离开）
E: (Leave dejectedly)

C: 太棒了！可惜，你的朋友并不认同。看着你债台高筑的样子，她深感未来无望，然后——
E: Fantastic! But it's a pity, your friend does not agree. Seeing that you're up to your eyeballs in debt, she sees nothing but despair in her future, and then...

C: 把最热烈的掌声，献给两位年轻有为的来宾吧！
E: Let's give a round of applause to our aspiring young guests!

C: 适者生存没什么不好…
E: There's nothing wrong with being the fittest...

C: 呼…谢谢你们啾，我感觉自己差不多已经七分熟了啾。
E: Phew... thank you guys, tweet. I feel I'm about seventy percent cooked, tweet!

C: 如果我没猜错，纯美骑士团应该也收到了「钟表匠」的邀请函，对吧？
E: If I'm not wrong, the Knights of Beauty also received an invitation from the Watchmaker, right?

C: 求求你了，我说的都是真的！
E: I'm begging you, all I speak is the truth!

C: 如果他被抓到了，猎犬们会网开一面吗？答案是不可能。他们无法承担相应的后果，也自然不会冒险给予援助。
E: Should he be apprehended, could the Hounds afford to turn a blind eye? The answer is a definitive no. They couldn't bear the resulting consequences, and thus, wouldn't dare extend a helping hand.

C: 而「自然」总是伴随着掠夺与牺牲…它的反面，叫做「秩序」。
E: Nature is always accompanied by predation and sacrifice... Its antithesis is known as Order.

C: 铁尔南…我怎么可能忘记他，每一个不眠的夜晚我都在问自己，为什么当时没有和他一起出发？
E: Tiernan... How could I ever forget him? I've spent countless sleepless nights asking myself why I didn't go with him back then.

C: 我们诚邀各位莅临匹诺康尼大剧院，参加即将开幕的谐乐大典。当然，各位要登上的不是观众席，而是舞台中央。
E: I'm cordially inviting you all to the Penacony Grand Theater to participate in the upcoming Charmony Festival. And of course, you won't be in the audience, but on center stage.

C: 米沙，你终于来啦！
E: Misha! You've finally come!

C: 你们生来便是「秩序」的双子，命运注定会有一人踏上这条道路，抵达应至的结局。
E: You and your sister were born as twins of the Order, and one of you is destined to follow this path to the end.

C: 「抱歉，让你久等了，三月七小姐。」
E: "My apologies for the delay, March 7th."

C: 「看吧，他们的刑期早已结束，公司的狱卒也已被驱逐。可这些囚犯仍是奴隶之身，因为囚禁他们的不是外物，而是内心。」
E: "As you can see, their sentences have long ended, and the IPC guards have long been expelled. Yet, these prisoners remain enslaved, not by external forces, but by the confines of their own minds."

C: 呃…帮助你们？需要做些什么？
E: Uh... You want us to help you? What do you need?

C: 别担心，{NICKNAME}老早就活蹦乱跳啦。倒是你，丹恒，要不先给{M#他}{F#她}介绍一下这位牛仔是谁？
E: Don't worry, {NICKNAME}'s been up and about for a while now. But hey, Dan Heng, why don't you introduce this cowboy to {M#him}{F#her} first?

C: 况且，若是像星穹列车这般可靠的观察员在场，讨论想必一定能进展得更加顺利。怎样，各位意下如何？
E: Besides, if there can be reliable observers from the Astral Express present, discussions will go more smoothly. So, what do you all think?

C: 好啊，三月七小姐。我答应你，休息时间里你绝对不会在自己的房间里看见我。
E: Understood, Miss March. I promise you, you'll never see me in your room while you're taking a break.

C: 不过别紧张，事实尽管骇人，但还未到无可挽回的地步。各位仍有一线生机，而我正是为此而来。
E: But don't panic. The truth, as horrifying as it may be, is not yet irreversible. There's still a glimmer of hope, and that's why I'm here.

C: 可惜这位小米沙说到底也不过是个特别的忆域迷因。就算「开拓」的力量再怎么让他神通广大，唯独一件事是他无论如何也做不到的——
E: While Misha is a rather special Memory Zone Meme, and he was granted power by the Trailblaze... there's still one thing that he shouldn't be able to do—

C: 江户星全票通过……
E: All votes for Edo Star...

C: 卡卡瓦夏
E: Kakavasha

C: 维里塔斯•拉帝奥
E: Veritas Ratio

C: 黄泉，知道这是什么吗？
E: Do you know what it is, Acheron?

C: 流萤小姐，是她早早从梦中醒来，在星海间找到列车，将有关「秩序」残党的一切带给了我们。这其中或许有剧本的助力，而代价……
E: Firefly. She awakened from the dream ahead of others, discovered the Express amidst the stars, and brought us valuable information about the remnants of the Order. She may have been aided by the script, and it came at a cost...

C: 但如果这正是逝者们期望的结果，你还想令它做出改变吗？
E: But if this is what the departed ones expected, should you try to change it?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>请问，你会愿意栖身其中吗？</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>I would ask — Would you wish to stay?</color>

C: 敬不完美的明天。
E: To the imperfect tomorrow.

C: 你用手抵住梦泡，浓稠的忆质应力聚拢，又以指腹为中心向四周拉伸，仿佛织成一张细密的网，轻轻托住你的手心。
E: You press your hands against the dream bubble and the thick viscous memoria converges under strain, then stretches outward from your fingertips. As if weaving a delicate web, it gently cradles your palm.

C: 老奥帝就喜欢和聪明人聊天，可以省掉套路和表面功夫，直奔主题！这次既然邀请了公司代表上船，二位大抵也能猜到我想讨论的议题了吧？
E: I always enjoy talking to smart people because we don't have to beat around the bush, we can just get straight to the point instead. Since I invited you IPC ambassadors on board, I'm sure you've figured out the topic I'd like to discuss, yes?

C: 在这一步知难而退，你们就能更加体面地退场…也省得在大谈判桌上丢了公司的颜面。
E: If you back off now, you can make a smooth exit... and prevent the IPC from losing face during more important negotiations.

C: 还有什么事想问吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Is there anything else you'd like to ask, {NICKNAME}?

C: 看来这次，「交换苹果」的环节要被省略了。
E: Looks like we'll be skipping the "exchanging apples" step this time around.

C: 没有永远的盟友，也没有永远的敌人。希望我们能从这场交易中…各取所需。
E: There are no permanent allies or everlasting enemies. So, let's both... take what we need from this deal.

C: 我今天来，就是为了帮你们除掉最难拔的那根钉子。我相信你能给这一单收个好尾，小叶琳娜。
E: I came here today to help you sort out the toughest issue. I trust you'll be able to wrap things up quite nicely, little Jelena.

C: （一下子就消失不见了，原来星穹列车也在这啊。）
E: (Huh, vanished in the blink of an eye. So, the Astral Express is here, too.)

C: 哈…哈哈…哈哈哈哈！！天无绝人之路，属于「赌圣史黛西」的时代终于要来了！
E: Ha... Ha... Hahaha!! Finally, my luck has turned for the better! A great new era for Stacy the Master Gambler has arrived!

C: 你看这船上多热闹啊，真不错。等哪天不忙了，我也要在生态舰上举办个大派对，到时候一定会邀请你的。
E: Look at how bustling this ship is, not bad! Someday when I'm less tied up, I plan to host a grand party on my eco-ship, and you'll be on the guest list.

C: 我没觉得自己因此受伤。
E: I never felt hurt by this.

C: 就是就是～无敌！
E: That's right! Unparalleled!

C: 你不喜欢？好吧，那我现在是「炸弹恶魔」了。
E: You don't like it? Fine. I'm now the Bomb Demon then.

C: 放马过来吧！
E: Bring it on!

C: 如果你也去过「仙舟」罗浮，那我们很可能见过面。
E: If you've been to the Xianzhou Luofu, it's likely we've met.

C: 为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在这里。
E: A fitting end to the tale of the departed — one could not ask for a better farewell. Go on, they're all here.

C: 这是什么意思？你应该不可能和我的过去有关…我的意思是，那里已经无从追溯，只剩一片「虚无」。
E: What do you mean? It's improbable that you've crossed paths with my past self... What I mean is, there is nothing left to retrace there — only Nihility.

C: 救命，我不想上学！
E: Help! I don't want to go to school!

C: 其实，我也没上过学。
E: Actually, I've never been to school before.

C: 你仔细观察，它眼中映出的并非是你的身影，而是一个…巨大的香蕉？
E: If you look closely, you'll see that its eyes don't reflect your image, but instead... a giant banana?

C: 银河忍法帖•前情提要
E: Previously on Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions

C: 同学们，这不对，这绝不是梦想之地的年轻人该有的样子。所以今天，蕉授要告诉大家一个好消息——
E: My dearest students, this is not the way. This is not how youngsters in the Land of the Dreams should behave. So today, I bring you good news.

C: NG——家族的演员，有我在的地方就是片场。
E: No good! Cast member of The Family, do remember that everywhere I stand is a set.

C: 哈哈，在考场上还要对着考官说笑，你很有「表演欲」啊。
E: Haha! Joking with the examiner during an exam. You have a desire to perform.

C: 不要命。
E: I'm willing to put my life at risk.

C: 那就由{NICKNAME}来设计，丹恒来制作吧。
E: In that case, {NICKNAME} can do the design while Dan Heng makes the dessert.

C: 是辣椒，我放了辣椒！
E: It's chili! I put chili in it!

C: 辣、好辣……
E: Spicy...! So spicy...

C: 不买。
E: No sale.

C: 不愧是学长…
E: Setting quite the example as our senior...

C: 刚才你提到的「违反校规的学生」是怎么回事？
E: What's going on with the student who broke school rules?

C: 呃…她好认真啊，这种类型叫什么来着？中二病？
E: Um... She's taking this really seriously. Is this what people call chuunibyou?

C: 好耶！那你们选出一位摄影师吧，比起模特，这项挑战更考验摄影师的技巧！
E: Great! Now choose a photographer among yourselves. This challenge will put the photographer's skills to the test more than the model's!

C: 所以，你也是「巡海游侠」的一员？
E: Does that mean you're also a Galaxy Ranger?

C: 只是放些大家都喜欢的装饰而已，没冒犯任何人。
E: I'm just putting up a decoration everyone likes. I'm not hurting anybody.

C: 大庭广众的，别讲这些，你也该改改好为人师的毛病了。
E: Do you have to say these things out in the open? You need to fix your bad habit of lecturing people.

C: 请留步，游侠先生。我一开始的疑问，你还只字未提。
E: One moment, Mr. Ranger. You haven't answered my question from earlier.

C: 问就完了，先试试，总比打进去方便。
E: I might as well give it a shot. Gotta be easier than breakin' my way in.

C: 愉快？蕉！破事儿一个接一个。
E: Enjoying? Hah, more like going bananas! Bananas, I just can't catch a break.

C: 永生是在死亡前的那一刻被爱。
E: Eternal life is about being loved in the moment right before death.

C: 我明白了，那…祝一切顺利，我也会试着寻找杂音的源头，之后再见了，波提欧先生。
E: I see... Then I wish you all the best. As for me, I will try to trace the noise to its source. We'll see each other again later, Mr. Boothill.

C: 而知更鸟小姐…或许您才是解决这一危机的关键。
E: As for Miss Robin... you may just be the key to resolving this crisis.

C: 如果有人想变成猴子，我不否认那是一种志向。
E: If there are people who aspire to become monkeys, I won't deny them of that dream.

C: 这就对了，需要的人我保准给你带齐。
E: That's the way. Leave the rest to me. I'll make sure to get everyone we need.

C: 怎么说？
E: So, you in?

C: 你试图与它进行交流，这在其他世界可能有点蠢，但在匹诺康尼就再正常不过了——哪个钟表小子粉丝没跟自己的钟表小子玩偶有过倾心吐胆的经历呢？
E: You try to communicate with it, an act that would be slightly silly in other worlds, yet so reasonably normal on Penacony — which fan of Clockie hasn't had a heart-to-heart conversation with their own Clockie doll?

C: 但是无用！它的箱盖纹丝不动，彷佛从设计之初就无法打开一般，这让你想起了匹诺康尼街道上那些打不开的门。
E: But it is useless! Its lid does not move an inch, like it was designed to never be opened. This reminds you of those unopenable doors along Penacony's streets.

C: 打起精神来，别睡过去啦。
E: Stay awake. Don't fall asleep.

C: 我们可以相信乱破吗？
E: Do you think we can trust Rappa?

C: 没错，想想那些能让你平静下来的事物吧——
E: Exactly, think about the things that bring you peace—

C: 想想美丽的沙滩…
E: Visualize a beautiful beach...

C: （然后，想好要创造的事物……）
E: (Then, visualize what you want to create...)

C: 唔，真不讲道理！
E: Ugh! How unreasonable!

C: 《银河忍法帖》有云：「蟒蛇没有脚掌也能倏来忽往，蝠鲼没有翅膀也能腾空飞翔。」
E: As stated in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions: "Pythons slither without feet, as manta rays glide without wings."

C: 我也不知道，这是社团规定的，或许是说这个级别的社员很能干吧！
E: I don't know, but it was decided by the club. Maybe members in this tier are more capable, haha!

C: 务必小心。
E: Please be careful.

C: 不知道，但借此我们可以验证一些猜想。
E: We'll find out, but this is one way to confirm some of our assumptions.

C: 这些<color=#dbc291ff>变成小猴的人</color>真的是自愿的吗…？
E: Did those people... willingly <color=#dbc291ff>become monkeys</color>?

C: 你可以的。
E: You'll get there.

C: 我就知道这学生不靠谱…算了，除了睡蕉小猴以外的内容也不重要。
E: I knew this student wasn't reliable... Forget it. Focus on Slumbernana Monkey only. Nothing else matters.

C: 不及格！太浮夸了。
E: Fail! Rein in your ego!

C: 停止拍摄？不不不，这出戏还没结束呢——
E: Stop? No, not yet. The show still isn't over—

C: 又清醒了。
E: Oh, I've regained my senses.

C: 木遁•生蕉之术！
E: Through Mokuton: Banana-jutsu!

C: 还是说，此情此景——让你想起从前了？
E: Or... could it be that this familiar scene reminded you of your past?

C: 说到底，你也是一只为没用的梦想挣扎的可怜猴啊。
E: In the end, you too are just a pitiable monkey, struggling for worthless dreams.

C: 哎呀…这位朋友，你还真是冒昧。
E: Ah my friend... you really are bold.

C: （敢这么乱翻我的脑子，难怪联觉信标会变成这鬼样。这破东西做不到这事，它背后的混蛋在哪？）
E: (Messin' around in my head like that, no wonder the Synesthesia Beacon's all screwed up. No, this busted thing can't do it alone. So who's the scoundrel behind all this?)

C: 上•三番苦行得正尽觉之卷
E: Part One: Epiphany via Tribulation

C: 临、兵、斗、者…破。
E: Rin, Pyou, Tou, Sha... Break!

C: 我不知道啊，肯定是黑客入侵——我马上就去处理。
E: I have no idea... Someone must've hacked in. I'll check on it right away.

C: 仇恨总有一天会消解，但人们心中的忍道…不会。
E: The hatred in one's heart might dissipate one day, but the way of the ninja within their hearts will never be forgotten... ever.

C: 当、当然是真的！
E: O—Of course!

C: 等等，上次演讲的是谁来着？
E: Hold on, who was the speaker last time?

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 这次是丹恒的幻影吗……
E: Are we up against Dan Heng's apparition this time...?

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}本尊——这片战场的主宰。
E: The one manipulating this battlefield is... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} themself.

C: 这…我要不就依成本价，送遐蝶小姐一个顺水人情吧。希望以后，多多支持我的小店哈。
E: Uh... I suppose I can sell it to you at cost as a sign of goodwill, Miss Castorice. Just promise to support my business in the future!

C: 呱，礼物，我的礼物…
E: Waaaah, my gift! My gift...

C: 所以…我想和两位交朋友，听两位讲有关天空的故事！阿格莱雅女士，奥赫玛好不容易拿出这么珍贵的礼物，就让我也沾沾光吧？
E: Can we be friends? I'd love to hear your tales of the sky! And ooh, it's a rare occasion that Okhema presents such an invaluable gift to guests. Lady Aglaea, may I have the honor of tasting it, too?

C: 三月七会喜欢这番绝景么？你有些拿不准；丹恒或许……
E: Would March 7th appreciate this sublime scene? You're uncertain. Dan Heng, perhaps...

C: 好个舌灿莲花的孩子…吾就承蒙夸奖了。
E: What a smooth-talking child... I'll accept your praise.

C: 第七百五十二届大辩论会决赛的议题是？
E: What was the topic for the grand finals of the <unbreak>752</unbreak>nd Great Debate?

C: 没错，正是「开拓」，唯有「开拓」。你气沉丹田，微微颔首，合上双眼，一时间如老僧入定。在你眼前的并非一片漆黑，而是万千银河如画卷般徐徐展开……
E: Indeed, it is "Trailblaze," and only "Trailblaze." You center your breath, nod slightly, and close your eyes, entering a state of deep meditation. Before you is not darkness, but a vast tapestry of countless galaxies unfurls like a scroll...

C: 你置入一枚固态净水，很快融化得无影无踪。
E: You placed a piece of solid water, and it quickly dissolved without a trace.

C: …小卡，你说话也太难懂了。总而言之，就是要我们把那朵花取来嘛？
E: ...Cal, you're making things sound too complicated. All you want us to do is to retrieve the flower, right?

C: …希望泰坦不会迁怒于我们。
E: ...I hope that the Titan will not take their anger out on us.

C: 嗯…这倒是个不错的问题。
E: Mmm... A good question.

C: 也许，我们可以再试试看…消散的蝴蝶，会不会再对「金枝誓言」产生反应？
E: Perhaps we can try again... Let's see if the butterfly will still react to the Golden Bough of Vows despite having dissipated.

C: 缇安和小小咪，想在附近看看，有没有机关什么的……
E: Trianne and Memmy were looking around to see if there were any mechanisms nearby...

C: 事已至此，就由我来起头好了……
E: Well, in that case, I can start...

C: 谜题般的试炼、多疑却直诚的性格、称{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}为吾爱，还有……
E: The riddle-like trials, your distrustful-yet-sincere character, referring to {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} as your love, and...

C: 呵呵，毕竟树庭的学者们为了捍卫吾之火种，不惜赴火蹈刃，从容就义…吾既贵为尊神，若只眼睁睁看着人子们舍己成人，未免太没面子。
E: Hehe, after all, the scholars of the Grove have always been willing to lay down their lives to defend my Coreflame... As a respected god, it would be too embarrassing if I were to do nothing and simply watch the children of humanity give up their lives for me.

C: 也是…我们即将踏上的战场。
E: And also... the battlefield that we're about to step onto.

C: 并非…半神。
E: You're not... demigods.

C: 唔，接下来…把它献给蝴蝶就可以了？
E: Uhh, so... We just have to present it to the butterfly?

C: 不，恰恰相反：我正要结束这血腥的循环……
E: Nay, quite the contrary. I will end this cycle of bloodshed...

C: 你们和我没什么两样…
E: You lot are just like me...

C: 为了救世主！
E: For the Deliverer!

C: （来喝点么，伙计？）
E: (Want to grab a drink with me, pal?)

C: 哼，总算学会礼仪了，倒也不算太晚。
E: Hmph, you've finally picked up some manners. Better late than never.

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 别急，你的好日子要到头咯！
E: Just you wait. Your good times are coming to an end!

C: 然后，他竟然还大胆踏入了{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}「天谴之矛」{RUBY_E#}的试炼…当然，以失败告终。
E: He then brazenly stepped into the trial of the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}... And naturally, failed.

C: （把娃娃放上去……）
E: (Put the dolls on...)

C: 「神明眷顾沃土，遍地欣欣如火。十二星宿如目，巨人举杯对酌。」
E: "Happiness abounded in this lush land by gods chosen. Giants raised their glasses in a toast beheld by the twelve constellations."

C: 但要记得█ █缇里西庇俄丝█ ███ ██ █ █
E: But remember this, █ █ Tribios...█ ███ ██ █ █

C: 学习，改变命运！
E: Learning can change your destiny!

C: 灵魂磨损，直至归于尘土，那就是*我们*的命运。
E: Souls will be spent until they dissolve into dust — such is our fate.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…真的是在考验*我们*吗？
E: Is {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... really putting us through a trial?

C: 这…怎么回事？
E: Wh—What's going on?

C: 你是说…这黑袍剑士不仅与黑潮有关，还在四处猎取火种？
E: Are you saying that the black-robed swordmaster is not just tied to the black tide... but is also hunting for Coreflames everywhere?

C: 是说把黑色的家伙，丢到过去，再关起来吗？因为有记忆碎片，开启入口当然没问题，可剩下的……
E: I just have to throw that black-cloaked guy into the past, and lock them there, right? With the memory fragments, I can open a door no problem. As for the rest...

C: 只能说——相信人家和{NICKNAME}一起，就什么都能做到吧！
E: Well, let's just say that {NICKNAME} and I can do anything as long as we're together!

C: 那祭司姑娘的医术…不简单啊，她或许远没有你我想的单纯。
E: That priest girl's medical talents are truly exceptional... She might be far from the ordinary girl we envisioned.

C: 感激不尽。再会了……
E: You have my gratitude. Then, farewell.

C: 希望我们能于温暖西风的彼岸再会。
E: May we reunite on the other side, where the warm west wind blows.

C: 期待和你并肩作战！
E: I look forward to fighting beside you!

C: 请一路小心。
E: Have a safe journey.

C: …奥赫玛人？你为什么在这里……
E: ...An Okheman? Why are you here...?

C: 缇安…我们找到的时候，她已经变成这样了。
E: Trianne was already like this when we found her...

C: 奥赫玛的风中有阳光的味道……
E: We smell sunlight in the wind of Okhema...

C: 你以前最喜欢这里了。对吧，缇安？
E: This was your favorite spot, wasn't it, Trianne?

C: 这么简单，当然可以啦。缇里西庇俄丝可是最厉害的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}圣女…小圣女！
E: That's it? Of course I can! Tribios is the most amazing Holy Maiden of {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}... Well, little Holy Maiden!

C: 但如果明天来不及，那就明天的明天；如果明天的明天也不行，就等到下一个明天。如果过了很久很久，妈妈都没回来……
E: If not tomorrow, then the next tomorrow. If not the tomorrow after that. But if I still haven't returned for a very long time...

C: …等我，母亲。
E: ...Please wait for me, Mother.

C: 在那暗无天日的十年间，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}最后一次睁眼时……
E: After those ten years of darkness, when {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#} opened their eyes for the last time...

C: 圣殿过去的通路意外的杂乱啊…是有人故意为之么？
E: The path to the temple was in quite a state... Did someone do it on purpose?

C: 我们就在那鲜花芬芳的西风尽头重聚吧。
E: We will meet again at the end of the west wind where flowers bloom in spring.

C: 若汝能圆融些，吾便不必时时遭汝针锋相对，更能率性提点你了。
E: If you were more accommodating, you wouldn't be opposing me all the time, and I could teach you more freely instead.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！孩子，把抹了蜜的小嘴先收收。我看重的可不是你带给我的情绪价值。我邀请你加入，是希望你全力以赴，成为「幸存者」。
