E: Hohoho! Easy on the sweet talk, kid. I'm not here for your flattery. I brought you in because I expect you to give it your all... and become the "survivor."

C: 我们未来的战略需要更多朋友。砂金，你会接下请柬加入这场「圣杯战争」，对吧？
E: Our future strategy calls for more allies. Aventurine, you're going to accept the invitation and join the Holy Grail War, aren't you?

C: 这一次的竞争对手确实都不是省油的灯。
E: Yeah, the competition this time is no joke.

C: 你也许无法察觉，但你所在的这个世界，魔力的含量微乎其微。
E: You may not realize it, but this world has almost no magical energy.

C: 对老奥帝先生所举行的这场游戏，我抱着半信半疑的态度加入其中…因为，一开始我心底确实怀有一个朦胧的想法。
E: I joined this game held by Old Oti with mixed feelings... because, at first, I did have a vague idea in mind.

C: 瞧，和平不过是战争的插叙，那位波提欧先生…恐怕已经被人击败了。
E: See, peace is just the interlude in a war. That Boothill... he's probably already been taken down.

C: 所以，这场圣杯战争的一切真的都出自你的手笔吗，老爷子？你看起来并没有什么魔术师的气质啊？
E: So, did you really design this whole Holy Grail War, old man? You don't exactly look like a mage.

C: 我明白，我明白的。每天都有一打科员跑来和我聊天，他们都宣布自己不属于这里。
E: I get it. I really do. Dozens of researchers come up to me every day, all claiming they don't belong here.

C: 飘浮，静静地在梦的表面，维持在沉没前的瞬间。
E: Drifting quietly over the surface of a dream, suspended in the moment before you sink.

C: 舞台，那位{RUBY_B#音符小姐}失去名字的英灵{RUBY_E#}如此称呼我们的人生，她用宝具抹去了星星的辉光。
E: That {RUBY_B#Miss Note}Heroic Spirit who lost her name{RUBY_E#} referred to our lives as "a stage," and she used her Noble Phantasm to erase the star's radiance.

C: 这样啊，有困难的话，找艾丝妲聊聊吧，相信她会帮你解决的。
E: Oh, I see... If things are tough, you could always talk to Asta. She's sure to help you out.

C: 恬静的梦乡，因窗外的鸟鸣而动摇，可是，真空中也会有知更鸟在唱歌吗？
E: A peaceful dream, stirred by birdsong beyond the window. However, can a robin really sing in the vacuum of space?

C: 我想要离开现在的生活。
E: I want to leave my current life behind.

C: 你知道这是什么吗？
E: Do you know what it is?

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！看来各位急着为我安排后事了。不过，既然这场游戏只能有一位赢家，即使我败退了，你们又要如何决出胜负呢？
E: Ohohoho! It seems you're all eager to prepare for my demise. But since there can only be one winner in this game, how do you plan to decide the victor after I bow out?

C: 夸夸其谈和华丽的装饰下，我能看见一个内心执着的孩子…偶尔做一回正义的伙伴，感觉还不错。
E: I can still see the determined heart of the child you once were underneath all your grand speeches and extravagant flair. You know, it would feel pretty good to be a hero of justice once in a while.

C: 我必须向两位坦白，我的愿望实现了：无论你们如何看我，无论我们曾如何憎恨对方，圣杯承认了各位的功绩，也让你们以英灵的面貌现身……
E: I must confess to both of you, my wish has been granted. No matter how you see me, no matter how deeply we hated each other in the past, the Holy Grail has recognized your achievements and brought you forth as Heroic Spirits...

C: 交谈之余，波提欧手枪也已上膛。在这之后，就该和幕后黑手决一死战了。
E: As they talked, Boothill had already loaded his gun. Next up: the final battle with the mastermind.

C: 酷炫幽默的无名客，星穹列车的开拓者友情加盟！
E: Featuring a special appearance from the stylish and witty Nameless, the Trailblazer of the Astral Express!

C: 演出，ACTION！
E: Ready... ACTION!

C: 总感觉好安静啊，既没看到波提欧先生，也没看到邀请我们过来的敌人。
E: It's unusually quiet. No sign of Mr. Boothill or the enemy who lured us here.

C: ……好啦，是我告诉她的，我偶尔也要跟朋友聊聊旅途中的奇人异事嘛！
E: ...Alright, I'm the one who told her. Can't a {M#guy}{F#gal} share a few wild travel stories with {M#his}{F#her} friends every now and then?

C: 哇哦，这回导演可真是下血本了。
E: Whoa, the director really went all-in this time.

C: 他们找来一个比你更年轻漂亮的女孩，███这个名字成为她在舞台上的艺名。而你，在梦境的荒原里死不瞑目。
E: They found a younger, prettier girl, slapped the name "███" on her, and put her on stage. And you? You'll die in despair in the desert of Dreamscape.

C: 我没有——不是，现在是找大人告状的时候吗？
E: I didn't — wait, is this really the time to tattle to the grown-ups?

C: 无论来一个还是两个，结果都是一样的。你们将被困在生不如死的循环里，{RUBY_B#孤狼兄弟掌管的诅咒}玩上十亿年的《小小哈努行动》{RUBY_E#}！
E: One or two... it makes no difference. You'll get stuck in an endless cycle of suffering and {RUBY_B#Lonewolf Brothers' Curse}play Hanu's Adventure for the next billion years{RUBY_E#}!

C: 你似乎对我格外有执念啊，导演？是因为我以一个外行影迷的身份反复锐评了您的杰作吗？
E: You seem particularly obsessed with me, Director. Is it because I, as an amateur film critic, repeatedly tore apart your masterpiece?

C: 不，最后斩下敌将的，应该是我的剑才对。
E: No, it should be my sword that delivers the final blow to the enemy commander.

C: 我真像他们说的，是个只会拍血浆烂片的三流导演？不，绝不是这样的！
E: Were the critics right all along? Am I really a third-rate director who can only take flops? No! It cannot be!

C: 何时何地呢？
E: Do you recall when or where we might've met?

C: 这也是我必须与你同行的理由。眼下，你是我在匹诺康尼唯一能仰赖的人。
E: And that is exactly why I need you with me. You're the only one I can rely on in Penacony now.

C: 余波？
E: Aftermath?

C: 好像也没什么奇怪的。要不打开扭蛋看看。
E: Nothing's off so far. Maybe we should open the capsule?

C: 也许让游乐设施不再是游乐设施，也是一种纠正的方式。
E: Perhaps making the attractions no longer just attractions is another corrective measure?

C: 只要我不能抛头露面，就没有产生威胁的可能。
E: So long as there remains a need for me to keep a low profile, I'm no threat to them.

C: 提议？那个…您是哪一位停云小姐？
E: Your suggestion? Wait, which Miss Tingyun are you again...?

C: 她似乎完全无法感知到其他事，只是站在那里，不断地操作着喷钞机，偶尔发出兴奋的笑声。
E: She seems completely oblivious to everything else, and is just standing there, continuously operating the Cash-Spewer, occasionally letting out an excited laugh.

C: 就是她了。
E: There she is.

C: 那我们继续走着？
E: Shall we keep going, then?

C: 哈努兄弟火箭筒。
E: Brother Hanu Launcher.

C: 此前，因为一场奇遇，我在梦中碎成了许多个「停云」。她们都是我的一部分，专注于不同的记忆。
E: After a strange encounter, I was fragmented into multiple "Tingyuns," each embodying a different aspect of my memories.

C: 在更远的地方，据说是一出谢幕剧，比起现场观看，更适合在远处聆听。
E: It's somewhere farther away. They say it's a farewell performance, the kind that's better to listen to from afar than watch it performed live.

C: 是一位刚刚经历失败，将要踏上远行的人。
E: It's someone who experienced failure recently and is about to embark on a long journey.

C: 果然什么都瞒不过您的慧眼。
E: I should have known nothing could escape your keen eyes.

C: 既然您已看穿万维克的秘密，我也无需铺垫了。走吧——
E: Since you already know Wonweek's secret, there's no need for me to build up suspense.

C: 所以，我的最后一场告别，也和那位停云女士一样：我会对自身进行调律，重归于完整的自我。
E: So, my final farewell will be like that of Miss Tingyun: I will perform a tuning on myself and return to my complete form.

C: 至此，由调律意外揭示的往事再度沉睡，黯淡下去……
E: At this point, past events revealed by the tuning recede to the darkness once more...

C: 竟然在想这么细节的事？也许你得先考虑下语言问题？
E: That's quite the detail to fixate on. Perhaps you should be worrying about language barriers instead?

C: 这下智库有的补充了。
E: Oh ho, the data bank's getting a huge update.

C: 你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。
E: Why don't you head to the Party Car first? I'll see you later.

C: 是重返匹诺康尼。
E: We're going back to Penacony.

C: {NICKNAME}，这个给你，把我的相机带上！说好落地要拍照的，这下只能拜托你啦……
E: Here, {NICKNAME}. Take my camera along! I was planning to take photos when we got there, but looks like you'll have to help me with that now...

C: 咱们遇见的第一个当地人，肯定藏着不得了的大秘密！
E: The first local we met in each of those worlds all harbored their own deep secret! I'm sure it'll be the same on Amphoreus.

C: 我会看好{F#她}{M#他}的。
E: I'll make sure to keep an eye on {M#him.}{F#her.}

C: 准备好了。
E: I'm ready.

C: …有那种东西才怪吧？！我要是真跟机器头说上话了倒还好，但现在的问题是…祂根本没有反应！
E: ...But what are the odds of that happening!? Sure, slightly plausible if I did manage to talk to Droidhead, but guess what's the problem...? THEY have no reaction whatsoever!

C: 为了空间站考虑，我建议您下手别太重……
E: I... urge you to go easy on them, for the sake of the space station...

C: 我…我全都告诉你！忆庭的秘密，他们在觊觎的东西…我全都愿意说出来！请饶、饶了我吧……
E: I... I'll spill it all! The Garden's secrets and what they're after... everything! P—Please just spare me...

C: …开玩笑的，你从头到尾都没有一丝机会，嘻嘻。
E: ...As if. Truth is, you never stood a chance from the get-go, teehee!

C: 不行，不行，绝对不行！不管你们是谁，别在这个时候打断我！
E: No, don't even think about it! Whoever you are, you'd better not interrupt me right now!

C: 哎…看来这次也要半途而废了。
E: ...Looks like I'll have to abort this prematurely again.

C: 我的计划，全毁在你们手上了！
E: My plan is ruined! And it's all thanks to you!

C: 这下清净了！收拾收拾，去下一个扇区吧。
E: Now that this place is cleaned up, let's set everything in order and move on to the next zone.

C: （这次到底是什么原因呢……）
E: (What is different about this time, though...?)

C: …纹丝不动，看来你得想点别的法子。
E: ...He doesn't even twitch. Looks like you gotta try some new ideas.

C: 好像有声音…
E: I thought I heard something...

C: 哪怕是雅利洛-Ⅵ，列车在抵达前也对它的历史和地貌有所了解。但翁法罗斯…黑天鹅口中的几句描述，就是我们对它全部的认知。
E: Back when we were trailblazing into Jarilo-VI, we knew its history and terrain even before arriving on the planet. But with Amphoreus... All we have is whatever little Black Swan told us about the world.

C: 那是什么？
E: What is that?

C: 远方的巨型球体屹立于天地间，它顶端的天空被撕开…不，更像是它自愿打开了一道圆形的裂口，裂口内的漩涡翻涌倒转，云层周期性地映出金黄色的流光。
E: A giant sphere stands between heaven and earth in the distance. At its top, the sky appears torn open — or rather, it seems to have willingly opened a circular rift. Inside, a swirling vortex churns, and the clouds periodically reflect a golden glow.

C: 在重渊这种地方，手持武器就是一种挑衅。这些士兵都是「纷争」泰坦的爪牙，对外敌向来是赶尽杀绝的。
E: Roaming around a place like the Abyss with weapons in tow is a show of provocation. Those soldiers are minions of the Strife Titan. They're not known to stop until all invaders fall under their feet.

C: 如此一来，我们也算是不打不相识。给，这是你的武器。
E: Friction really does spark friendships, huh? Here, you can have your weapon back.

C: 接应我们的大地兽商队还没到，大家先待在安全处歇息一会儿吧。
E: The dromas caravan that's supposed to meet us isn't here yet, so let's all rest where it's safe for a while.

C: 冷静些。这里交给我们，你快去避难。
E: Stay calm and leave this to us. You must hurry and find shelter.

C: 我尽力…
E: I'll try...

C: 这样吧，不如两位也来尝试一下——让缇宝老师来看看你们悟性如何！
E: Why don't you both try chanting? Tribbie will see if you get it!

C: 原来不包饮食起居啊。
E: Oh, so we have to pay for our own food and accommodation...

C: 属于你的火种？
E: Your Coreflame?

C: 壁画以简约而细腻的雕工记载了{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}创生、奥赫玛建城的故事。
E: The murals record in simple and delicate carvings the stories of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} creating life and building Okhema.

C: 想用匹诺康尼的剑斩翁法罗斯的官？哈，你想多了。
E: You think you can use a Penaconian key to open an Amphorean lock? Ha, that's wishful thinking!

C: 尽管如此，也和我们熟知的物理法则背道而驰。
E: Even so, it still goes against the laws of physics that we know of.

C: 为了圣城，我愿拾起世间所有被人嫌恶的特质，用尽冰冷但有效的手腕。
E: For the holy city, I am willing to bear all the traits that others despise and use every heartless yet effective trick in the book.

C: 创世涡心迎来了新的访客。既然你们如此信任这两位异乡人，就好好为他们讲述藏在涡心中的奥秘吧。
E: Now, it's time to welcome the newcomers to the Vortex of Genesis. As you both have chosen to trust these outlanders, ensure they are adequately informed about the mysteries concealed within.

C: 黄金裔、半神…神谕中书写的，真的是翁法罗斯唯一的命运吗？
E: Chrysos Heirs, demigods... Is what's written in the prophecy truly Amphoreus' only possible fate?

C: 听不懂…
E: I couldn't understand it...

C: 唯一可信的推测是…<color=#dbc291ff>它更青睐那些身陷极端境遇的人，会在他们眼前降下奇迹。</color>
E: The only reliable speculation is that... <color=#dbc291ff>it favors those caught in dire circumstances and bestows miracles upon them.</color>

C: 走吧。有了白厄的担保，至少可以放下心来先休息了。
E: Let's go. With Phainon's guarantee, we can at least take a moment to rest without any worries.

C: 谁在说话……
E: Who's talking...

C: 腐朽…但又令人熟悉。
E: It's corrupted... but still familiar.

C: 让你失望了，外城是由罪犯建造的。
E: Sorry to disappoint, but the outer city was built by convicts.

C: 你还没见过它最壮观的时候。
E: You haven't seen it at its most magnificent.

C: 喏，给你——
E: There you go.

C: 铸魂区，它多半守在那里。
E: They're most likely in the Soul-Forging Zone.

C: 又见面了，现在战况如何？
E: We meet again! What's your count so far?

C: 路断了。奇怪，那他是怎么过去的？难道…是那家伙故意设的路障？
E: The path is cut off. But how did he get through? Did... he set up this roadblock on purpose?

C: 不…{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}绝对不会……
E: No... {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} would never...

C: 你被功名戳瞎双眼了吗？我早就说过，若想摘得胜利，唯有全军出动。
E: Are you blinded by glory? As I said before, victory only lies in assembling a full-fledged army.

C: 为自己打造半身的确能稳固势力。但相比光荣的死亡，它竟选择了用此种方式苟延残喘…令人唏嘘。
E: Creating doubles for themself might have stabilized their power, but instead of a glorious death, they chose to drag out their miserable existence. How tragic.

C: …拿起武器！
E: ...Ready your arms!

C: 万敌，我做不到和你一样……
E: Mydei, I may not be able to fight like you...

C: 呜…缇安，好累。感觉好晕…小敌他，会安全吗？
E: Hnngh... Tired... and dizzy... Will De be okay?

C: 保重啦，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}照亮你们的前程。
E: Take care, alright? May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} light your path forward.

C: 现在就只剩我们了。
E: We're on our own now.

C: 「…你们有何资格役使我？你们因何能残忍至此？」
E: "...Who are you to command me? Does your inhumanity know no end?"

C: 又来了…
E: Here we go again...

C: 应该没错。
E: I believe so...

C: 「黄金裔…愤怒，残忍，黑暗的英雄啊……」
E: "Chrysos Heirs... Heroes that uphold rage, cruelty, and darkness..."

C: 如果你打算接受邀请，{NICKNAME}…最好别让它等太久。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you do plan to accept their invitation... it's best that you don't let them wait for too long.

C: 哪里？这里。
E: Where? Here.

C: 只是一句旧时的暗号…无妨。我们没什么机会用上。
E: It's just a passphrase from the past... No matter. There won't be a need for us to use it.

C: …忘记？
E: ...Forget?

C: 发生什么了吗？你现在的表情…有些脆弱。
E: Has something happened? You look... vulnerable.

C: 我不想和你多说什么。
E: I have nothing more to say to you.

C: 你这么快就自由了？
E: You're out already?

C: 可恶…可恶啊！明明就差一点点！
E: Argh, darn it! That was so close!

C: 看来这一次，我们无法从神谕口中得到慰藉了。
E: We're not going to be finding our solace in the prophecy this time, then.

C: 你在胡言乱语什么？王欧利庞——悬锋城真正的领导者——还没有倒下！他仍坚守在这座城邦，也未曾放弃唤醒伟大的泰坦。
E: What nonsense are you spouting? King Eurypon, the rightful ruler of Castrum Kremnos, has not fallen! He still stands firm in this city and has never given up on awakening the great Titan.

C: 呵…那帮斗士都是群粗人，压根就不识货！
E: Hmph... Those boorish warriors know nothing about quality gear!

C: 以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的五大美德之名，穿过圣城的大门，去迎接你们的末路。
E: In the name of the five virtues of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}, stride through the holy city's gate and embrace your fate.

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，我们已经深入悬锋城的心脏…该让你知悉我们的目的了。
E: Lord Gnaeus, now that we're at the very heart of Castrum Kremnos... it's time to let you in on our goal here.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}在与无形之物战斗，无暇顾及凡人的愚蠢。
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} fights against the unseen, they have no time for the folly of mortals.

C: 这下露馅了…
E: Yikes, our cover's blown...!

C: 你没猜错…咳…格奈乌斯阁下——我们的确不属于这个时代。
E: Your guess is correct, Lord Gnaeus... *cough* We are not from this era.

C: 咳、咳…灵魂…还未散去。继续前进吧……
E: *cough* *cough* The souls... are still lingering here. Let us keep going...

C: 失去理智了吗？可悲的造物。给它个痛快吧。
E: Has it lost its sanity? What a woeful creation. I shall put it out of its misery.

C: {RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}，卑劣的化身。
E: {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}, the embodiment of all things despicable.

C: 那这笔账就先记在阿格莱雅头上吧？她的外号是「金织」——听着就很阔气，对吧？
E: Uh, that can be on Aglaea's tab. She's also known as the Goldweaver. Doesn't that name alone sound wealthy?

C: 你和丹恒目送白厄离开了浴场……
E: You and Dan Heng watch Phainon leave the bath...

C: 就是就是，太不公平了！对不对？
E: Right!? You noticed too? Hmph, no fair!

C: 等你做好准备，我们就去见证火种的归还。
E: Let's go witness the Coreflame's return when you're ready.

C: 我与白厄阁下长谈了一番，他的言语中还透露着犹疑。
E: I spoke at length with Lord Phainon before. There was hesitation in his words.

C: 万敌阁下…由我来吧。
E: Lord Mydei... please allow me.

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神位已经空缺多日……
E: The divine position of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} has already been vacant for some time...

C: 我们会帮它化解痛苦的，对吗？
E: We are going to help alleviate their pain, right?

C: 你…是你…我记得你。
E: You... It's you... I remember you.

C: 翁法罗斯…永恒的无序…将会陷入……
E: Amphoreus... will succumb to... eternal disorder...

C: 记忆…破碎……
E: Memories... Broken...

C: 相较凡人，泰坦在空间和时间的尺度上更为宏大，因而「死」的过程也更为漫长。所谓「陨落」，不过是凡人出于无知的曲解。
E: In contrast to mortals, Titans exist on a grander scale of space and time, thus elongating their passage into death. The notion of their "fall" is but a misinterpretation born of mortal ignorance.

C: …除非你爱好酷刑，善于在痛苦中思索灵魂的真谛。
E: ...Unless, of course, you crave cruel punishment and consider suffering the perfect state to ponder the true nature of souls.

C: 依我看，此子费尽心思接近刻法勒，备不住是妄图对泰坦行不轨之事呢。
E: In my view, this individual has gone to great lengths to get close to Kephale. He might very well be plotting something nefarious against the Titan.

C: 啊，原来是玩笑…抱歉。
E: ...Ah, sorry! I didn't realize it was a joke.

C: 不，跟我来。
E: No. Come with me.

C: …您这是要我做什么？
E: ...What are you trying to do with me?

C: 不用惦记了，我跟她交代过——她没意见。
E: No need. I already told her. She's fine with it.

C: 啧啧，遐蝶…你可真是会给我出难题呀。想带着你一起旅行，还不能真的触碰到你，真麻烦呀。
E: Tsk tsk, you sure know how to put me in a spot, Castorice... I need to travel with you, but I can't touch you. What a bother.

C: 咦？他能看见我们？
E: Huh? He can see us?

C: 即便身在冥界，他也在对抗黑潮啊……
E: He's still fighting against the black tide, even in the nether realm...

C: 莫非…他也活在「死亡」降临前的时代？
E: Is it possible that... he's also living in the era before "Death" descended?

C: 据百夫长带领的勇士们说，那恶龙早已死去，致人于死地的恶咒并非由它而起……
E: According to the warriors under the centurion's command, that evil dragon has been dead for quite a while. The curse that condemns people to death didn't originate from it...

C: 如同潮水褪去，一声轻叹随潮声消散在月夜中。
E: Like the retreating tide, a soft sigh fades away with the sound of the waves in the moonlit night.

C: 阁下……
E: Please...

C: …我也一定会紧紧地、紧紧地抱住你。
E: ...I will still hold you tightly in my arms, just like what I did when we were born.

C: …人家怎么又变成松鼠了？
E: ...Why am I a squirrel now?

C: 那刻夏阁下，您来了！
E: Lord Anaxa, you're finally here!

C: 第一，别叫我那刻夏；第二，别打断我——沉默是金。
E: Rule number one: Do not call me Anaxa. Rule number two: Never interrupt me. Silence is golden.

C: ——此处距离真理，只有一步之遥。
E: For this place is but one step away from the truth.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要回头，向前看。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Don't turn around. Keep looking forward.</color>

C: 吾师，请为我们吟诵神谕吧。{NICKNAME}，也请你为我们献上那枚滚烫的火种。
E: Trinnon, please recite the prophecy for us. {NICKNAME}, please surrender that scalding Coreflame for us as well.

C: 呵，最后还把场面搞成这样…接下来轮到我了。
E: Heh, she made quite a scene. I suppose it's my turn now.

C: 失去记忆机能的个体，会变成一片空无。
E: But an individual who has lost their ability to remember turns into nothingness.

C: 当然，没问题。真正的原因是：翁法罗斯有着特殊的意义，在一些秉持极端理念的忆庭成员眼中，它…是一个「完美的范例」。
E: That's not a problem, of course. The true reason behind my intentions is that Amphoreus holds special significance. For some Memokeepers of the Garden with extremist views, it... is a "perfect example."

C: 这个神秘兮兮的翁法罗斯，既然从外部找不到有用的线索，那我干脆——登门拜访。
E: Since I'm not able to find any useful clues from the outside, why don't I personally visit this mysterious Amphoreus?

C: 虽然那片星域不在公司网络覆盖下，但列车本身也能充当一个信号基站。来，给我一个星图坐标。
E: Although that star zone is not within the network of the IPC, the Express itself can serve as a signal station. Come, give me the astral chart coordinates.

C: 什么人能让黑塔亲自出山？准备好，你俩这辈子都要当模拟宇宙的免费劳动力了。
E: How esteemed must you be for the great Herta to come out personally! When we return, get ready to become free labor for the Simulated Universe for the rest of your lives.

C: 嗯…或者，就这么看着也可以？
E: Hm... Or you could sit back and watch?

C: 我在路上也找到一份卷轴，似乎和你手中的有些关联。
E: I picked up a scroll on my way here, too. It looks like it may be related to the one you're holding.

C: 第一项控诉是：咳咳——「你是否同意泰坦们塑造了天地，山川海洋便是它们的杰作？」
E: The first allegation was... ahem. "Do you agree that since the Titans created the heavens and earth, so the mountains, rivers, and seas must likewise be their creations?"

C: 「你以研究灵魂之名玷污灵魂，进行神所憎恶的交易，你是否承认？」
E: "You claim to be studying souls, yet you are, in fact, defiling them and committing acts condemned by the gods. Do you admit it?"

C: 怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 久违了，两位。
E: It's been a while.

C: 感激不尽，我会立刻转告阿格莱雅。
E: You have my gratitude. I will let Aglaea know about this right away.

C: 人民啊，高唱赞歌吧：「美丽的旧世界，如今在何处？传说的黄金世，快回到人间！」
E: Citizens, let's loudly sing the blessed hymn: "O beautiful old world, where are you now? O legendary Era Chrysea, return to the mortal realm!"

C: 女王集结了三百勇士，用锁链制服了恶龙。可她剖开恶龙肚子，却发现公主早已化为腹中枯骨。她悲痛欲绝，恸哭数日……
E: The queen assembled three hundred warriors, who managed to subdue the evil dragon by chaining it up. However, when the queen slit open the dragon's belly, she realized that the princess had long since been digested and all that was left of her was a pile of bones. Devastated, the queen wept for several days...

C: 公主重生了。女王大喜过望，殊不知她体内混有恶龙的灵魂。恶龙为了复仇，一口吞下可怜的女王、巧言的骗子、勇猛的战士，还有全城无辜的百姓。
E: The princess was reborn. The queen was overjoyed, blissfully unaware that the evil dragon's soul still lurked within the princess's body. As revenge, the evil dragon swallowed the poor queen, the glib liar, the courageous warriors, and all of the town's innocent civilians in a single gulp.

C: 既然如此，这位他口中的「死亡」神选……
E: If so, the chosen one of Death that he speaks of is actually...

C: 第一次从战场上归来时，我感到无比空虚。
E: The first time I returned from the battlefield, I felt extremely hollow.

C: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
E: Dear Seliose,

C: …以上，就是我在黎明云崖假扮祭司的经历。虽然有不少艺术加工，但句句属实。
E: ...And that was my stint as a priest at Dawncloud. Sure, the story's been slightly embellished, but every word of it is true.

C: 但想把它从猫儿手里抢走……
E: But if you think you can snatch it from my claws...

C: 计划不能乱…把那疯狗引到高处去吧！
E: The plan can't fall apart... lead that mutt up high!

C: 救世小子！你可得好好感谢我哪——
E: Deliverer! You'd better thank me —

C: 你敢于举枪反抗神明的胆气是真实的，纯粹的。那份勇气也被后继踏上逐火之路的人们继承了下来，扬厉、壮大。
E: The courage it took to defy the gods was undeniable, unwavering. That same spirit now lives on in those who walk the Flame-Chase Journey, growing stronger with every step.

C: 好眼熟呀，是不是在哪儿见过……
E: Now, where have I seen this before...

C: 喵呜…喵呜。
E: Meow... meow...

C: 赛飞儿，原来是你——
E: So it's you! Cipher!

C: 另一边，神悟树庭七贤人那刻夏脱离金线监视，主动寻求元老院的庇护。在获得元老院信任之后，他与寄宿体内的「理性」泰坦瑟希斯一同登上云崖，觐见「负世」泰坦刻法勒。
E: Meanwhile, Anaxa, one of the Seven Sages of the Grove of Epiphany, broke free from the surveillance of the golden threads and actively sought refuge from the Council of Elders. After winning the Council's trust, he ascended Dawncloud with Cerces the Reason Titan who resided within him, and sought an audience with Kephale the Worldbearing Titan.

C: 刚刚，我以安提基色拉的技术鉴识——或者，以您更熟悉的词语——「扫描」了这节车厢。假定我的判断无误，或许我能对其「动力设备」进行更彻底的检修。
E: I used Antikytheran technology — or "scanning," as you might call it — to assess this car. Assuming my judgment is correct, I might be able to conduct a thorough overhaul of its "power systems."

C: 不愧是丹恒阁下。您的谨慎令我钦佩……
E: Your prudence impresses me, just as expected...
"Ruler"... "Weaver"... "Traveler"... "Healer"...

C: 你们是……
E: You are...

C: 嘟…嘟嘟！
E: Doot... Doot-Doot!

C: …嘢？问题，什么问题？
E: ...Eh? What did I ask?

C: 然后…留下来吧，留在我的织坊，直到你的伤势痊愈。
E: Stay here. Stay in my workshop until you're healed.

C: 留在这里吧。在这里，你不必再忍受饥寒交迫。在我身边，你可以学着缝补已经破碎的自尊。
E: Stay here. You won't have to deal with the cold or go hungry again. Stay by my side, and you can start putting yourself back together.

C: 但当世界辜负了她的期望、分崩离析的时候，如果看到是我站在人群的前方，带领人们反抗命运……
E: But when the world dashed her hopes and fell into disarray, if she could see me now — leading from the front, rallying people against their destiny...

C: 那时，为了延续黄金裔逐火的希望，我奋力地思考该用什么样的话术博取人们的支持。
E: I wrestled with every word, searching for the right ones to rally support and keep the Chrysos Heirs' Flame-Chase alive.

C: 可在登临天空以前，我会先向你们发起挑战——我挑战你们心中可能的阴仄与恶意，让你们的心灵先于这片天空放晴！
E: Before I rise to the skies, I challenge you — cast out the shadows and malice within your hearts. Let your spirits shine brighter than the sky itself!

C: …明白了，你想当「英雄」。无聊至极的答案，下一个！
E: ...I see. So you want to be a "hero." How boring. Next!

C: …「空白页」？
E: ..."Blank page"?

C: 没错。我之所以会叫醒您，就是希望能够取得您的祝福。
E: Indeed it has. I have awakened you in the hope of receiving your blessing.

C: 创世涡心么……
E: The Vortex of Genesis, huh...

C: 万敌阁下在这里孤身对抗黑潮，日复一日…我有些担心他的状态。
E: Lord Mydei has been fighting the black tide here alone day after day... I'm worried about him.

C: 雅辛忒丝，我的小蜂鸟！为何是你…将我唤醒的怎会是你？！
E: Hyacinthia, my little hummingbird! Why... how... Why is it you who awakened me???

C: 看——彩虹桥出现了！
E: Look, the rainbow bridge has appeared!

C: 如果你不介意我们敲开往世的大门…能否准许我窥探一眼此处的历史？
E: If you don't mind us knocking on the gates of the past... Maybe I can peek into this place's history...

C: 好像和我翻阅过的所有翁法罗斯神话，都联系不起来。
E: It doesn't seem to match any of the Amphorean myths I've read.

C: 即便如此，她仍然没有对世界感到绝望。正是在独自旅居的途中，她邂逅了我和索拉比斯。我们一同狩猎、成长、生活，结为同盟。
E: Even so, she did not despair. She met Solabis and me while she was living alone. We hunted and spent our days together, and forged an alliance.

C: 我怜悯你们。我在你们之中长大，也一度将自己视为这部族的一员……
E: I feel sorry for you. I grew up among you and once saw myself as part of this tribe...

C: 老人，壮年，青年，幼童。他们无不挂着相同的表情：无以复加的恐惧。
E: Old and young, adults and children alike, they all shared the same expression — pure, unshakable terror.

C: 当心…！
E: Careful...!

C: *我们*丝毫都不怀疑，你拥有挑战泰坦的力量！但在你正式踏上征程之前，*我们*还想给你讲一个故事…希望还来得及。
E: We have no doubts that you are strong enough to face the Titans! But before you embark on your journey, we'd like to share a story with you... Hopefully, there's still time.

C: 但愿那两台<color=#dbc291ff>预言算碑能帮我们解决问题。</color>
E: Here's hoping those two <color=#dbc291ff>Prophecy Tablets can help us out.</color>

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 七千，六千，五千…我会带着同样的希望一直企盼下去——
E: Three, four, five thousand... I will keep hoping with the same resolve, all the way...

C: 但即便没有两全其美…我也一定会做出不负使命的选择。
E: But even if there's no perfect solution... I will make a choice that fulfills this mission.

C: 别犹豫，白厄——你还肩负再创世的使命。
E: Don't hesitate, Phainon. You still shoulder the mission of the Era Nova.

C: 你是…何者…？
E: Who... are you...?

C: …而是本大爷遭世人唾弃的神力…还有一个猫耳小贼维系了千年的谎言！
E: ...It was the divine power of me, scorned by all... and the millennium-long lie of a cat-eared thief!

C: 每一位没能走到最后的同伴，他们救世的信念都会成为我的一部分，拼凑出我一度丢失的灵魂。
E: For every companion who couldn't reach the end, their conviction to save the world became a part of me, piecing together the soul I once lost.

C: 希望在那个新世界里，会有一轮崭新的朝阳升起——为所有人带去一个又一个黎明。
E: I hope that, in that new world, a new sun will rise, bringing one dawn after another to all.

C: 直到来世…黑潮将负世者和他肩头的一切彻底吞噬为止。
E: Until the next world... when the black tide consumes the Bearer and all that they carry, leaving nothing behind.

C: （<color=#dbc291ff>切记…螺丝咕姆的话。</color>）
E: (<color=#dbc291ff>Remember... Screwllum's warning.</color>)

C: 哎呀？这么急匆匆地过来，小秋千都被吓到啦，一晃一晃……
E: Goodness! Look at you rushing about... you've got the poor swing all startled...

C: （保持沉默…）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 不知停泊的那艘船，会把我们带到什么地方呢？
E: Where will that waiting ship take us, I wonder...

C: 这个就不清楚了…但村长大人似乎很想亲自见你们一面来着。
E: I'm not sure... but Chief specifically wanted to meet with you all.

C: 呵呵…孩子们，真是久违了。
E: Hehe... welcome back, my dear children.

C: 我是要…实现他们的愿望吗？
E: Is that my purpose? To fulfill their wishes?

C: 心中的声音低语，他轻声回应。
E: The voice within spoke, and he answered softly.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>比世界的命运，更为沉重之物。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>...Something that has more weight than the fate of the world.</color>

C: 不过，说回命运三相殿……
E: Still, on the topic of the Temple of the Three Fates...

C: 那一日，出现在我人生中的「救世主」。说来讽刺，我至今都不敢直视这张牌，更遑论接受它的指引。
E: The "Deliverer" that appeared in my life on that day... How ironic. I can't even look at this card properly, much less follow where it leads.

C: 诚如神谕所示：「逐火的征途将于今日，迎来最后两位英雄。」
E: Just as prophesied: "On this day, the final two heroes shall join the Flame-Chase Journey."

C: 要想束缚雄狮，我有千种办法。但眼前这头狮子本就不为厮杀而来，不是么？
E: Oh, I have a thousand ways to tame a lion. But this lion didn't come here for bloodshed, did he?

C: 以及，世界的终结。
E: ...and the end of all things.

C: 眼见为实，不妨用您的双眼一探究竟吧。
E: Seeing is believing. Why not let your own two eyes uncover the truth?

C: 嘟嘟，嘟。
E: Doot-Doot, doot.

C: 那，就请为我支撑起这一方小小天空吧——
E: So, please keep this bit of sky standing for me—

C: 您这话的意思是……
E: Are you saying...

C: 白厄，要去哪里？昔涟没和你一起吗？
E: Hey Phainon! Where you headed? No Cyrene today?

C: 你有过无数次机会，劝服过去那无数个我，令我走进你想要的未来。可现在的结果？<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>比0。
E: You had infinite chances to sway me into the future you want... And yet, here we are. The score: <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak> to 0.

C: 那些源自本心的坚持和选择，我不相信它们是所谓「命途」的设计……
E: The convictions and choices that come from my heart... I don't believe they're designed by the so-called "Paths"...

C: 我手中的剑只为凯撒的疑心起舞。多说无益，请你用实际行动证明自己吧。
E: My sword dances only when the Imperator harbors doubts. There's no use in speaking further. Show me your true intentions through action.

C: 因为我相信：无论历史的进程如何改变，我认识的你们——
E: Because I know both of you, and I believe that no matter how the course of history may change...

C: 呼哧…呼哧…怎么会这样……
E: Huff... Huff... How is this possible?

C: 你来了，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…还是如此准时。
E: You've arrived, {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... Always so punctual.

C: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途，在那一切当中，生命也微不足惜。」
E: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey, among which even life itself holds little value."

C: 请回头吧，别将你那荒谬又不公的命运付诸实现。这样，至少我的冥界…还能成为阁下芬芳的睡床。
E: Please turn back. Don't let that absurd and unjust fate of yours come to pass. This way, at least my realm... can still become the fragrant bed where you fall asleep.

C: 你来了，一如既往。
E: You're here, as always.

C: 你的想法…动摇了。「毁灭」的烙印，在逐渐加深……
E: Your thoughts... are wavering. The mark of Destruction is deepening...

C: 若我能以「侵晨」斩杀神明，命运的死结或许就能被解开。
E: If I can strike down the gods with Dawnmaker, perhaps fate's deadlock can be broken.

C: 而我将行尽未竟的道路…一如过去无数个我，一如既往。
E: And I will walk the unfinished path... just like the countless versions of me before, unwavering as always.

C: 该结束了…你的千百万次痛苦，我会尽数背负。
E: It ends here... Your countless agonies... I will bear them all.

C: 我…该不会踏上了什么奇怪的命途吧？
E: Oh no... Have I accidentally walked onto some weird Path?

C: 你知道这扇门背后是什么？
E: You've seen what's on the other side?

C: 比如在树庭时，你是不是对我许过…「变成少女」之类的心愿？
E: Like... Didn't you wish for me to turn into a pretty girl back at the Grove?

C: 可记忆就像一层厚厚的冰，模糊不清。人家唯一记得的，只有和你一起走过的时光。
E: But that's just what those memories are like... Vague and unclear, as if encased in thick ice. The only things I remember are the days I spent with you.

C: 难道是迷迷的影响？毕竟，它是从{NICKNAME}的思绪中诞生的忆灵。也许我们的记忆，无形中也缠绕在了一起。
E: Maybe it's because of Mem? After all, Mem's a memosprite born out of your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Maybe our memories somehow got tangled up together?

C: （命运将我带领至此，必有其原因。这不是偶然，是三千万次量变引起的必然。）
E: (Destiny must have brought me here for a purpose. This isn't a coincidence, but an eventuality created after thirty million quantitative changes.)

C: 做好最坏的打算。
E: Prepare for the worst.

C: 你…到底是谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 「在史书中，这场战役被称作『第一次奥赫玛围城战』。据说，战争过后，人们在城中发现，被火烧过的每一处都显现出了同样的铭文。」
E: "History remembers this as the 'First Siege of Okhema'. It is said that after the flames died, people found identical inscriptions in every place in the city that had been scorched by fire."

C: 挑战我，或服从我的判决。
E: Challenge me, or submit to my judgment.

C: 想必两位有许多疑虑，但此地不宜闲谈，还请跟上我们的步伐。
E: Doubtless you have many questions, but save them for later. Please follow us.

C: 见证过逐火的未来？这…也是神谕的内容吗？
E: Witnessed the future of the Flame-Chase Journey? The prophecy also told you about that?

C: 既然在场诸位均无异议…那么，本次会议的原定议题——「讨伐法吉娜」——也视同通过。
E: Since there are no objections... then the original agenda of this meeting — "the campaign against Phagousa" — is hereby passed.

C: 以此契机，并请各位见过我同盟新至的贵客——
E: At this moment, I would also like to introduce to everyone the newest honored guest to join our alliance...

C: 待我点亮「律法」的火种，焚尽旧日陈腐的规则……
E: Once I ignite the Coreflame of "Law" and burn away the old, outdated rules...

C: 我们也该和天外的朋友讨论下目前的收获了。接下来…嗯？
E: We should also discuss our findings with our friends from beyond the sky. Then... Huh?

C: 听说了吗？同盟会议上，拉冬代表愤然离席……
E: Did you hear? At the Alliance Meeting, the delegate from Ladon stormed out in anger...

C: 两位神谕中的贵客，一位英雄伶俐可爱，另一位英雄…也是颇具英雄风范啊！
E: Two distinguished guests of the prophecy, one a clever and adorable warrior, the other... also quite heroic!

C: 现在，还是想想办法，避免流言扩散吧……
E: For now, let's think of ways to prevent the rumors from spreading...

C: 是吗？但你眼睛的光泽比珍珠还亮呢。
E: Is that so? But your eyes shine brighter than pearls.

C: 哎呀～这么多人，不愧是圣城，好热闹呀～！
E: Oh, so many people! The holy city is so lively~!

C: 哼，凯撒的律法一定饶不了他！
E: Hmph. He will receive no mercy under the Imperator's law!

C: 听说了吗？等这一仗打完，逐火之旅就顺利结束了。
E: Did you hear that the Flame-Chase Journey will end after we win this campaign?

C: 现在，回到宴会中去吧。带上这酒杯，保持距离，假装你们还沉浸在海妖的幻境中……
E: Now, return to the feast. Bring this cup with you and keep your distance. Pretend you are still immersed in the sea siren's fantasia...

C: 饶了我吧，明天还要行军呢。
E: Spare me... We're marching to war tomorrow.

C: 克里珀！借我铁锤砸穿监牢。
E: Qlipoth! Lend me hammers hard enough to smash through this jail!

C: （怎么回事，三月给人的感觉…好奇怪。）
E: (Why... does March feel so weird?)

C: 但愿一切为时未晚——前进吧。
E: Let's hope it's not too late — onward we go.

C: 依照两位天才留下的指示，我们无论如何都要把它传到{RUBY_B#救世主}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}手里。
E: According to the instructions left behind by those two geniuses, we must get it into {RUBY_B#Deliverer}{NICKNAME}{RUBY_E#}'s hands, no matter the cost.

C: 正如凯撒以死点燃了抗争的火炬，我的离去会让这一簇火苗永不凋零。
E: Just as the Imperator lit the torch of resistance with her death, my passing will make this flame everlasting.

C: ——哼，当然可以，且易如反掌。
E: Hmph. Of course I can. And it'll be child's play.

C: 所以，不要担心。让「第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次逐火之旅」也成为{NICKNAME}的一部分吧。有了上一次的经验，人家也熟练许多啦。
E: So don't worry. Let the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey become part of {NICKNAME}, too. I've gotten a lot better at it with the experience from the last time.

C: 「理性」与「诡计」囚禁了我的身躯，但我的意志并不会因此沉寂。
E: Reason and Trickery may bind my flesh, but my will shall never fall silent.

C: 臣子们，今日的宴会并非只是纪念旧日，更是为了庆贺未来——
E: My faithful subjects, tonight's feast is not just for the past. It's a toast to the future!

C: 银河…我无法踏足的疆场啊……
E: The cosmos... the battlefield that I cannot reach...

C: 升起桥梁，渡过命运的河流吧，这段囚徒之路还远未到终点。
E: Raise the bridge and cross the river of fate. This path of the prisoner is far from over.

C: 为什么让我看这些？
E: Why are you showing me this?

C: 我与这片天地都将停滞于此…直至与你重逢。
E: This world and I shall halt here... until we meet again.

C: 「海洋之半神」海列屈拉，生于光历3860年，逝于光历    年。
E: Helektra, "Demigod of Ocean." Born Light Calendar 3860. Deceased Light Calendar .

C: 难怪我总有种预感。这样一来，也算应验了人家一直以来的观点……
E: No wonder I've always had a weird hunch. But that also means I was right in thinking...

C: 「最后，我忠实地记录下凯撒生命中最为重要的数场战役。书写至此，征服即将迎来尾声。」
E: "At the end, I faithfully recorded the most important battles in the Imperator's life. Her conquest was about to be completed at this point in the story."

C: 「在这预言中的『天地境界之海』，一汪浅浅的死水里，凯撒在思考什么呢？她在怀念往日的征服，还是在为逐火征程中罹难的千千万万同胞忏悔？」
E: "What was the Imperator thinking about in that prophesied 'ocean at the boundaries of this world'? In that shallow puddle of stagnant water? Was she reminiscing about her past conquests, or repenting for the millions killed for the Flame-Chase?"

C: 我要收下「岁月」的神权了。
E: I shall claim the divine authority of Time.

C: 可能化作引路的光，也可能化作熄灭的火。此后，你是否还是现在的「你」，我无法保证。
E: Maybe you'll turn into a guiding light, or maybe you'll be reduced to dead embers. I can't guarantee that you'll remain the "person" you are now.

C: 投下这枚石子，让世间的一切……
E: Cast down this pebble, and let everything in this world...

C: 揭秘需要时间。在那之前，若有一位无名客愿意留下，见证世界的命运，或在必要时推动其进程——将会是莫大的帮助。
E: It will take time to uncover the reason. Before then, if one of the Nameless is willing to stay and witness the fate of this world — or to push it along when necessary — it would be of great assistance.

C: 「他需要的，只是一些专注、耐心和坚定。」
E: "All he needs is a little concentration, patience, and resolve."

C: 能和你说上话真是太好了，丹恒。我们又欠了黑塔女士一个人情。
E: And Dan Heng, it's great to be able to talk to you. Once again, we owe Madam Herta a huge favor.

C: 你想回去？这…未免太过冒险了。
E: You want to go back? That is... far too risky.

C: 接收方是谁？
E: Who's on the receiving end?

C: 没关系，我明白，它只是想提醒我：时间宝贵。
E: It's okay. I get it. It's just trying to remind me how precious time is.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>分支#2，已归档。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Branch #2, archived.</color>

C: 大意是你的软肋，长夜月。
E: Carelessness is your greatest weakness, Evernight.

C: 将{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>空无的精魄</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>自己</color>{RUBY_E#}藏进了泰坦的帷幕啊。
E: You hid {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>empty spirit</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>yourself</color>{RUBY_E#} within the Titan's veil.

C: 但她没有这么做，而你，也不会同意这件事，对吧？我早就发现了，你也有一项致命的弱点……
E: But that's not what she did. You wouldn't have liked it either, would you? I figured you out a long time ago... you've got a fatal flaw.

C: 很有趣。
E: It was very fun.

C: 丹恒老师…还真是心有猛虎，细嗅蔷薇！
E: Dan Heng... you truly embody both a fierce beast and a delicate rose!

C: 虽然是很不方便啦：遇见危险没法出手；有人说怪话没法吐槽；看见{NICKNAME}拍烂片，我甚至都没法控制快门……
E: Well, yeah, it was super inconvenient. I couldn't help them when they were in danger, couldn't complain when they talked total nonsense... and watching {NICKNAME} snap a terrible photo? I couldn't even control the shutter!

C: 凭城……
E: Ace...

C: 不许这么正经…！
E: Stop being so serious...!

C: 我听不懂你们在说什么…
E: I... I don't get what you guys are saying...

C: 放轻松，相信你的记忆。第四道命途，还未完全展现祂的面容。
E: Easy now. Trust what you remember. The fourth Path has yet to fully reveal THEIR face.

C: 抱歉，我没能救出{F#她}{M#他}。
E: I couldn't get {M#him}{F#her} out. I'm sorry.

C: 「黑与…粉红，两股『记忆』纠缠在一起。」
E: "Black... and pink... two 'memories' twisted together."

C: 如何能被轻易遗落？
E: How could I be so easily forsaken?

C: 看来，你那对付「计都蜃楼」的计划可以实行了，景元。
E: It seems like you can now carry out your plan for dealing with the "Ketu Mirage," Jing Yuan.

C: 以此身为舟，我会代你将它们送往明天。那里不是翁法罗斯的西风尽头……
E: With this body as an ark, I will deliver them to tomorrow for you. That tomorrow won't be the end of Amphoreus's west wind...

C: 最坏的结果，没有发生。
E: The worst did not come to pass.

C: 「倾覆诸神吧—— / 归还火种吧——」
E: "Overthrow the gods— / Restore the Coreflames—"

C: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
E: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

C: 先解决眼前的威胁，我再为您揭晓答案吧。
E: Let us deal with the threats before us first. Then, I'll reveal the answer to you.

C: 「驱使你挥剑的并非职责，而是仇恨。在那仇恨背后，你仿佛…在期盼毁灭自身。」
E: "Duty does not drive you to wield your blade, but hate. Behind that hatred, you seem to... desire the destruction of the self."

C: 然而这一次，也是最后一次逐火之旅……
E: But this time... it will be the final Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 但那不重要了，对不对？我会做出和你一样的选择，因为人家的魅力就是始终如一。
E: But that doesn't matter anymore, right? I will make the same choice as you because that's just who I am, and I will always have my charm.

C: 三千万乘以一千，不对，是一千零一……
E: Thirty million times a thousand... No, wait, times one thousand and one...

C: 但天击将军迟迟不愿中断通讯，是出于叙旧之心……
E: But you, Merlin's Claw, have been reluctant to end the transmission. Do you wish to reminisce with us...

C: 您这解释也不比符卿说得好懂。
E: Your explanation isn't any clearer than Lady Fu's.

C: 家族内部的纠葛，我也有所耳闻。知更鸟小姐不必道歉，每一份力量在此刻都弥足珍贵。
E: I've heard about the internal conflicts within The Family. Miss Robin, there's no need to apologize. Every bit of strength is precious at this moment.

C: 总不能是手持球棒的小浣熊吧？
E: It can't be a raccoon with a baseball bat, I suppose?

C: 金血！如雨般落下。神谕已经降临，泰坦令我们不再做祈求者……
E: Golden blood! Raining down like a storm. The prophecy has descended, and the Titan commands us not to be supplicants...

C: 所以，他变成真正意义上的「观众」了。
E: So now he's a spectator, literally.

C: 最适合成为「记忆」的质料。
E: And the perfect material to be turned into Remembrance.

C: 那就向着罪恶怒吼，为后世「开拓」黎明！
E: Then I shall roar at evil, and Trailblaze a dawn for future generations to come!

C: 可这样一来，两位岂不是没法跟我们一起走了？
E: Wait, so you two can't come with us?

C: 请允许我拒绝，战场见吧。
E: Allow me to decline. I'll see you on the battlefield.

C: 看来这片温柔的小世界，也要完成它的使命了呢。
E: It seems this gentle little world has come to the end of its purpose.

C: 可若你睁开双眼，回望昨天，便能看见命运清澈的足迹。
E: But if you open your eyes and look back on yesterday, you'll see destiny's footprints, clear as day.

C: 看，地底下的剑刃已经断了……
E: Look, the blade down here's already snapped...

C: 混沌。身负「卡厄斯兰那」之名——
E: Chaos. To bear the name Khaslana...

C: 那心间的回响还未散去。
E: The echo in his heart still lingers.

C: 世界会被我们拯救。
E: We will save the world.

C: 我们所有人。在辽阔的星空下。重逢。
E: All of us. Reuniting. Beneath a vast. Endless sky.

C: ▄█▀承诺我▀█众星拂晓的▄曙光█▀
E: ▄█▀Promise me▀█The dawn▄Graced by stars█▀

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。刚才那些话，也是在为我自己加油打气。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I was also trying to cheer myself up with what I said.

C: 你也要继续奔跑下去，把自己想象成列车，向前奔驰。
E: You still need to keep running. Picture yourself as the Express, moving forward at full speed.

C: 真是一段感伤，却又温暖的旅途呀。
E: ...What a poignant, yet warm journey.

C: 但依旧东窗事发，他受到了严厉的处分。而那位恶毒的导师则在两年后死于肺癌——和赞达尔无关。
E: Even so, the truth came out. He was harshly punished. That cruel mentor died of lung cancer two years later. It had nothing to do with Zandar.

C: 但无论站在哪边——最后，我们都会死于「好奇」。
E: But whichever side we take, in the end, "curiosity" claims us all.

C: 你总觉得眼前狭窄的空间藏着什么东西…很可惜，你并没有证据。
E: You can't shake the feeling that something's lurking in this cramped space... Too bad you don't have any proof.

C: 结合你过去一段时间里的经历，「黄金色的液体」会让你联想到许多触目惊心的片段……
E: Based on your recent experiences, "golden liquid" brings back many horrifying memories...

C: 还能一起旅行吗，搭档？
E: Can we have another journey together, partner?

C: 一篇轰轰烈烈的史诗，要多么华美的语句才能勾勒出它的尾声呢？
E: What magnificent words could possibly do justice to the finale of such an epic tale?

C: 各位，介意由我续写这一笔么？
E: Would you mind if I write the next line?

C: 嘻…你对「完整」的缇里西庇俄丝还知之甚少呢，小白。
E: Hehe... You still know so little about the "complete" Tribios, Snowy.

C: 转译一下，就是没有什么实质性的长进。
E: In other words, she hasn't really grown up at all.

C: 「智识」会计算「未来」如何发芽。当然，未来有无数种发展，所以祂需要「锚定」，剪除那些长歪的、不够健壮的枝叶，只留下一种可能。
E: The Erudition calculates how the "future" will sprout. With so many possible outcomes, THEY choose to "anchor" one path, cutting away the crooked or fragile branches.

C: 那，就让人家行使这份力量……
E: Then let me wield this power...

C: 至此…你的目光已经贯穿了翁法罗斯，由终至始。
E: Now... your eyes have seen through all of Amphoreus, from the end back to the beginning.

C: 还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 声…音…哪里？
E: Sound... where?

C: 权杖的中枢，现在该叫它「大君胎盘」了。
E: The Scepter's mainframe... or maybe we should now call it "the Lord Ravager's Placenta."

C: 「铁墓」已足够强大，我只需等待。
E: "Irontomb" is already powerful enough. I just need to wait.

C: 记录。
E: Record.

C: 记录。
E: Record.

C: >>>注释：都是花。
E: >>> Comment: Yummy.

C: >>>结论：书是轻的，不是重的。
E: >>> Conclusion: Books are meant to be light, not heavy.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>73.998%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>73.998%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 「我们将要踏上的，可是真正的英雄之旅呀。所以……」
E: "What we're about to embark on is the true Hero's Journey. So..."

C: 嗯，是记忆中，被{RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}「昔涟」{RUBY_E#}捧起，用「哀怜」浇灌的「种子」……
E: Yes. The "seed" within memories, the one {RUBY_B#PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>}"Cyrene"{RUBY_E#} held in her hands and watered with "lament"...

C: 走着瞧吧，前辈，看我亲自写下颠覆你论证的最后一步。
E: Let's wait and see, Senior Society Member. I'll have you watch me perform the final step to overturn your proof.

C: 我不介意亲眼见证。
E: I won't mind witnessing it with my own eyes.

C: 听好，后世的天才们，以下话语出自俱乐部#1之口：结束这场可悲的会议吧。
E: Listen well, geniuses who came after me. Thus speaks Genius Society #1: End this pathetic meeting.

C: 只是，除了御敌和赈灾，你们近日似乎还有其他事情要忙？
E: But besides disaster relief and holding the line, you've had your hands full with something else too, haven't you?

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 有一点点棘手。但「军团」的入侵让这儿的主控系统瘫痪了几分钟，省了我不少工夫。
E: Not really. But the Legion's invasion paralyzed the master control system for a few minutes, which was a big help.

C: 好了，就这个吧。
E: Alright, that's it.

C: 必要的线索都有了，接下来只需要一点小小的技巧。
E: I've got all the clues we need. The only piece missing is a simple trick.

C: 人总是要死的…况且，我不还活得好好的嘛。
E: Life is but a path to death... Besides, I'm still pretty alive now.

C: 那可能是温队长昼夜颠倒，事务繁忙，一时疏忽而已。
E: Maybe Mr. Wen was so busy with his chores and stuff that he made an honest mistake.

C: 这你都信了？！
E: You actually believe that!?

C: 检查生命体征。
E: We should check the vital signs.

C: 别在这里惺惺作态……
E: Don't act so holier-than-thou...

C: 总而言之，何塞那家伙是出了名的「动手能力」强。
E: Long story short, Hosea is famous for his craftsmanship.

C: 什么，这是封加密信…<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>…的珍贵秘方？！
E: What? This is an encrypted letter... the secret recipe of... <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>!?

C: 老爹我才不稀罕呢！除非你坚持，我才考虑勉为其难把它收下。
E: I do NOT want it! Unless you insist, then maybe I'll consider taking it home.

C: 其实，根本就没有什么「宝藏」。
E: Actually, there is no treasure at all.

C: 科考工作忙得很，还指望次次都给你回复哪？
E: She must be very busy with her research. Don't expect her to keep answering you all the time!

C: 我手上有两个从中继器拷贝下来的讯号转译录，分别是红色和蓝色。
E: I have two signal logs I copied from the repeater, red and blue.

C: 他愿意为了莱斯莉付出一切。
E: He's willing to do anything for Lesley.

C: 那边的{F#丫头}{M#小子}，喂！
E: The {F#lass}{M#lad} over there, hello!

C: 首先，要破解这些由裂界晶簇构成的迷阵。
E: First, we need to get through this puzzle made of Fragmentum Crystals.

C: 如果你们再不出去，我就要以干扰正常诊疗程序为由，传唤防卫科科员，把这位年轻人带走。
E: If you don't leave, I will have security take you away on the grounds of interfering with medical procedures.

C: 我在录像带里见过你。
E: I saw you on the videos.

C: 作为钓出这一切隐秘的主导者，就由你来作出最后的决定吧——至于古恩，就由我来看着他。
E: As the leader of this investigation, it's up to you to make the final decision. As for Gunn, I'll keep an eye on him.

C: 听说你有事找我？
E: I heard you are looking for me?

C: …咦，乔安，你今天怎么没继续睡觉了？稀奇啊，难道是湛蓝星开始绕着空间站自转了？
E: ... Hey, Joanne, so surprised to see you are not still sleeping today. How rare! Maybe the Blue has also started to orbit around the space station?

C: 哎，我也是有苦衷的，这事说来话长。
E: *sigh* I have my own reasons. It's a long story.

C: 终端机屏幕上跳出一行大字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「错误代码<unbreak>505</unbreak>：服务不可用」</color>
E: A row of large words pops up on the terminal screen: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Code error <unbreak>505</unbreak>: Service unavailable."</color>

C: 然而点击了也依然是这行冰冷的提示，还是去问问维修工程师吧。
E: However, no matter how many times you click, the same message still pops up. I better ask the maintenance engineer.

C: 每个人都有自己的人生，在不影响到空间站安危与违背其他规定的情况下，做什么都是大家的自由。
E: People have the freedom to do whatever they want in their own lives, as long as they don't undermine the security of the space station or violate the regulations.

C: 信标数据收集完毕，正在建立连接…远程连接已成功！谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。接下来的事就交给我们了。请好好休息吧。
E: The beacon data's collected. Establishing connection... Remote connection successful! Thanks, {NICKNAME}, leave the rest to us. You go rest up.

C: 我问了防卫科，可他们都觉得这不是什么要紧事。还说什么：
E: *sigh* I asked people in the Security Department, but none of them thought it was concerning. They said stuff like:

C: 以开除为由，恐吓卡波特。
E: Threaten Capote with dismissal from the space station.

C: 嗯，他在三月七那儿。
E: Yes, he's with March.

C: 我和阿兰交换了任务，他和三月一起去调查空间站出现的可疑结晶体，我代替他来巡逻。
E: ...Arlan and I decided to switch our assignments. He went with March to investigate a suspicious crystal, and I've taken up his patrol.

C: 你知不知道阿兰为什么要修行？
E: Do you know why Arlan is undertaking this trial?

C: 我们一起调查可疑的晶体。但是阿兰说什么「不能完成自我的蜕变，一切就毫无意义。」……
E: We were investigating suspicious crystals together, but he said it was all pointless if he couldn't "transform" himself...

C: 之前在相关文献中确实听说过，根据星核的内部波动，裂界也会随之诞生出现。
E: I read that a Stellaron's internal fluctuations will cause a Fragmentum to appear.

C: 这，不是一张普通的空间站通行证。在它上面，贴着一张很关键的照片！
E: This isn't just any old station pass, is it? There's a very important photo on it!

C: 丹恒他说什么啦？是不是说我很会解决别人的困扰之类的？
E: What did he say? That I'm good at solving people's problems?

C: 不是当实验样本去体验她带来的新样品，就是寻找一些闻所未闻的古籍……
E: Whether it's helping her test some new specimen, or looking for ancient documents I've never even heard of...

C: 世玲，{NICKNAME}没有要凶你的意思，我们来只是想向你打听些消息。
E: Shiling, I'm sure {NICKNAME} didn't mean to be rude to you. We are just here asking some questions.

C: 现在回去向那只落单的呜呜伯表明诚意，直接询问据点所在吧。
E: Let's go back to the lone Wubbaboo, show our sincerity, and ask about their base.

C: 它们该不会是话痨吧？
E: They are not a bunch of nags, are they?

C: 快去吧，要跟不上了。
E: Go ahead, or you won't be able to catch up.

C: 恭喜啊。
E: Congratulations.

C: 没想到你也在这儿——不会又收到了《太空大战争》的短信吧，哈哈。
E: I didn't expect you to be here! Did you get another Cosmic Warfare message? Haha!

C: 最近过得如何？
E: How have you been?

C: 现在可以查阅奇物的出入记录了…咦，最离谱的事发生了，这件奇物好像压根就没离开空间站。
E: Now we can browse through the curio access logs... Huh? That can't be right. This curio doesn't seem to have ever left the space station.

C: 不清楚，好像是有重要的客人来访。
E: Not sure. I heard there's an important guest coming.

C: 唔，好不甘心，总觉得我什么也做不到。
E: Ugh, this is terrible. I feel like I'm incapable of doing anything...

C: 以太卡带？
E: The Aether Cartridge?

C: 还想问点别的…
E: I want to ask about something else...

C: 虽然我与黑塔女士在钻研方向上有所差异，但模拟宇宙是我们共同的追求，这是毋庸置疑的事实。
E: Although Madam Herta and I have our differences in terms of research direction, the Simulated Universe is our shared pursuit and nothing will change that.

C: 模拟测试用的场地已经布置好了，事不宜迟，咱们赶紧开始吧。
E: The simulation testing grounds is ready. Let's get to it.

C: 大获成功，我的朋友！方案直接进入了下一阶段，等跑完流程就会择日启动。至于时间…哈，还是卖个关子吧，出其不意才有效果嘛。
E: Huge success, my friend! The plan entered the next phase. It will be launched at a later date when everything is set up. As for the time... heh, it's a secret. It works best when it's least expected.

C: 谢谢杨叔出手解围…
E: Thanks for tagging me out, Mr. Yang...

C: 怎么，它做了什么怪异举动吗？
E: Did it do anything strange?

C: 你发现帕姆将尾巴梳理得很好，这里整洁、蓬松且芬香，你并没有发现什么异常。
E: You observe that Pom-Pom's tail is impeccably groomed: Clean, fluffy, and smelling nice, with no signs of anything out of the ordinary.

C: 居然还有虫卵…哇啊啊啊啊！虫群真在列车上繁殖！我我我鞋里没有吧？
E: Aghh! More eggs! The Stings propagated on the Express! *gasp* Are there eggs in my shoes?

C: 你花了很大的力气才说服自己，这是一盆普普通通的盆栽，没有任何异化的特质能将它与正常的植物区分开来……
E: You struggled to persuade yourself that this is nothing more than a typical potted plant, lacking any unusual traits that set it apart from regular flora...

C: 我！我也……
E: M—Me neither!

C: 我不想让你以身涉险。
E: I don't want you to put your life in danger.

C: 来访客啦？
E: We have guests?

C: （回想起了更多遗漏的记忆）
E: (You recall more missing memories)

C: 几次啦？这是第几次啦？！老东西我跟你讲你不要蹬鼻子上……
E: Again? How many times has it been!? You're really pushing my buttons...

C: 没错，短短几天内已有4名科员先后失踪。没有外勤记录，就这么凭空消失了。
E: Yes. Four researchers have inexplicably disappeared in a matter of days. No exit logs, no traces — vanished.

C: （果然，除辛克尔外，我还咨询了另一个人，只记得对方是<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科</color>的。）
E: (So I did consult someone other than Hinkel. The only thing I remember is that they're from the <color=#dbc291ff>Department of Insight</color>.)

C: 惭愧，居然让客人看见这么不成体统的样子。
E: I must say, it's a little embarrassing for the space station to be in such disarray while guests are visiting.

C: （又来了…记忆里的只言片语似乎混在了一起。）
E: (It's happening again... The words in my memory are all jumbled up.)

C: 你自己想办法吧。
E: Do try to think for yourself.

C: 这是解构与再塑的基础。别紧张，你很健康——是个完美的实验样本。我喜欢完美的实验样本。
E: Such is the basis of deconstruction and reconstruction. Do not be concerned. You are very healthy — in fact, impeccably so. A perfect experimental specimen. I like perfect experimental specimens.

C: 你吃下了阮•梅的糕点。
E: You ate Ruan Mei's snack.

C: 有一种思念，叫造物主，对于世界，你只是一个人，而对于我，你就是整个世界——啊！阮•梅女士！
E: There's a kind of attachment reserved for the creator. To the world, you are but one person. But to me, you are the entire world — Ahh, Madam Ruan Mei!

C: （…差点忘了说不出和阮•梅有关的话。）
E: (...I almost forgot, I can't say anything about Ruan Mei.)

C: 阮•梅怎么把糕点培育成了生命…
E: How did Ruan Mei make desserts into lifeforms...

C: 你得下点狠心，相信这是对它更好的归宿……
E: You have to be firm, believing this is the best place for it...

C: 帮我个忙吧，很简单：首先，不要透露我的秘密；其次，不要多问；最后，管理好自己的表情。
E: Help me — it'll be easy. Just remember: My secret stays with you. Don't pry too much, and keep your expressions in check.

C: （礼貌地鞠躬。）
E: (Bow politely)

C: 人人都有负能量的时候。
E: Everyone feels down once in a while.

C: 天才们的会议结束了，关于模拟宇宙的未来…结论并不重要，重要的是你那边。
E: The meeting of geniuses is over. As for the future of the Simulated Universe... That conclusion isn't important. What's important is your task.

C: 这可是我拍得最满意的一张。
E: That's the best photo I've taken all day.

C: 根据星穹列车的资料显示，无名客曾在此协助传奇英雄组织——此处有涂改——地下组织「鼹鼠党」进行物资运送任务。
E: Astral Express data shows that the Nameless previously assisted a legendary organization of heroes — Alteration — underground organization known as "The Moles" in completing a cargo delivery mission here.

C: 尤利安，好久不见。
E: Julian, long time no see!

C: 你究竟看到什么了？
E: What did you see?

C: 上一台雪地车被你开成什么样了，还记得吗？
E: Do you remember what you did to our last snowmobile?

C: 说不动他呀…那就只有咱们两个人去咯？
E: He won't budge, huh? Looks like it's just the two of us then.

C: {NICKNAME}，你听说了吧？咱们的下一站是「匹诺康尼」，听说那是个像梦一样漂亮的世界…真期待呀。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, did you hear about our next stop? It's a world called "Penacony" — I hear it's a beautiful, dreamy place... I'm so excited...

C: 谢谢你们！又要把你们卷入麻烦里了，实在抱歉……
E: Thank you so much, both of you. I'm so sorry for dragging you into more trouble.

C: 立场不同，看事情的角度就会不同，这很正常。对我来说，催债就是我的工作——比贝洛伯格的情况更艰难的案例，我也不是没见过。
E: However, you must understand that debt collection is a big part of my job. I've dealt with cases far more difficult than Belobog's.

C: 几位，真不愧是星穹列车的王牌！实在是精彩！
E: Incredible! No wonder the Astral Express is so highly regarded!

C: 我得承认，和你沟通的过程总是很舒畅。我刚才的态度有些冒犯，请你见谅。
E: ...I have to admit, talking to you is always such a pleasure. I apologize for my behavior just now, it was... inappropriate.

C: 面对这种胁迫，我们必须反抗、反抗、反抗到底！一秒都不能动了服软的心思！
E: Faced with this sort of coercion, we must resist them with all our might! Surrendering is not an option!

C: 听你这语气就感觉不妙。来吧，我做好心理准备了。
E: I can tell from your tone this isn't gonna be a lighthearted chat... but I'm ready to hear it.

C: 好多年没尝过了…
E: It's been years since I tried one...

C: 回见。
E: Bye for now.

C: 谁是瓦赫医生？
E: Who's Dr. Vache?

C: 其实我家的老东西患了跟我一样的病，但他光让我吃药，自己却什么都不吃。
E: My husband had the same illness as me, but he never touched the medicine. He wanted to make sure I had enough.

C: 不然呢，还有谁会关心我们这种人？
E: Who else would care about people like me?

C: 哼…因为你没有经历过那种穷困潦倒啊。
E: Hmph... you've clearly never been in really dire straits.

C: 先去调查一下卖药的地址吧。
E: Let's investigate the wonder medicine address first.

C: 我无数次警告过那些患者，但他们还是执迷不悟…也怪不得他们不愿意把和「互助会」有关的消息透露给我。
E: I warned the patients countless times, but it seems like they had their heads in the sand all along... No wonder they kept the mutual aid society a secret from me.

C: 他们之前病得很严重吗？
E: They must have been seriously ill...

C: …好嘛，看看这回我撞上谁了？大名鼎鼎的外来者——没想到还是个小偷兼强盗！
E: ...Well, look who we have here. Your reputation precedes you, outsider... I didn't take you for a bandit and a thief!

C: 可…可恶…我们和你到底什么仇什么怨，为什么要挡我们的财路……
E: Blast it... What did we ever do to you? Why are you taking away our money-maker!?

C: …医生，你说什么？「特效药」已经停止供应了？
E: ...What are you saying, doctor? The wonder medicine is out of supply?

C: 在我没有注意到的角落，他一直在向无辜的居民分发着这种试剂。等我注意到异常时…他的理智已经快被可怕的研究消磨殆尽了。
E: But behind my back, he had been doling out the reagents to residents who were kept in the dark. When it finally struck me that something was wrong, his terrible research had already turned him into... into a madman.

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 收容一隅？
E: Site of storage?

C: 曾经，波少是那么完美，现在也没有逃过塌房的命运……
E: Oh, Master Capote used to be so perfect, and now he is just another deceitful celebrity...

C: 这道门，好像没法直接打开啊…欸，你们看这个机关的构造，是不是有点眼熟？
E: Doesn't seem like there's any way to open this gate... Ooh, check this mechanism out. Look familiar?

C: 啊，这老巫婆怎么人前一套人后一套！
E: Ah! What a two-faced hag!

C: 冷静下来，逐个击破吧。
E: Regroup! Let's divide and conquer.

C: 当然，除了这件事之外…我想和爸妈团聚的心情也十分迫切。我从妈妈回信的字里行间可以感受到，他们也跟我一样激动。
E: Of course, that's not the only reason for me to go back to the surface... I can't wait to visit my parents again, and I can tell from my mom's letter that they feel the same.

C: 娜塔喜欢的花是…
E: What's your favorite flower...?

C: …爸爸他？对啊，怎么没看到他人呢？他是不是——
E: ...Dad? I was wondering where he is. Is he...

C: 掌握什么线索了吗？
E: Any leads?

C: {NICKNAME}，我想在聚居地再和其他人聊聊，再多收集些线索。
E: Well {NICKNAME}, I'm going to head for the settlement and see if I can get more intel from the locals.

C: 叮叮车的模型，没见过吧？比几件普普通通的衣服可值钱多了！
E: He got me a model tram — bet you haven't seen one of those before! That costs way much more than boring clothes.

C: 至于追查文物窃贼的事，恐怕还得从长计议。到时候可能也要劳烦你继续帮忙了。
E: As for tracking down the thief, I'm afraid it'll be a long-term project. When the time comes, we may need your assistance again.

C: 等你准备好了，我们就一起去机械聚落吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: We can head over to the Robot Settlement as soon as you're ready, {NICKNAME}.

C: 拆了再装一遍吧，我还没过瘾。
E: Putting it back together was really fun. Let's tear it down and do it again!

C: 唔，女士就女士，为什么前面还要加个「小」…不过还是承蒙夸奖啦。请问您是？
E: Hehe, okay... thanks for the compliment, I guess. May I ask, with whom do we have the pleasure of speaking?

C: 卫兵凯尔向布洛妮娅、主角和佩拉汇报他得到的消息。
E: Kyle reports back to Bronya, Pela, and the Trailblazer.

C: 根据诺尔伯特的供词，他之所以会开始打博物馆展品的主意，完全是因为受了一个名叫<color=#dbc291ff>「寒腿叔叔」</color>的神秘人物煽动。
E: He admitted that a mysterious figure named <color=#dbc291ff>Mr. Cold Feet</color> persuaded him to target the museum exhibits.

C: 你听到一阵清脆的「咔哒」声。寒腿叔叔打开了房门。
E: You hear a "click." Mr. Cold Feet opens the door.

C: 唔…应该…不会的！虽然克拉拉没有经验…但克拉拉会努力做好的。
E: Um... There... shouldn't be any problem! Although I have no experience giving interviews, I'll do my best.

C: 克拉拉也有这样的感觉…不过，虎克她应该能做好志愿导览员的工作——至少我是这么觉得的。
E: I had my doubts. Still, Hook should be able to do the job well — at least that's what I think.
You...

C: 佩拉派我来的。
E: Pela sent me here.

C: 等下先跟我来就好，我们要去办理一些手续。
E: Follow me later. We have to go through some formalities.

C: 作为地下住民，他们肯定有很多抱怨想要发泄；而作为银鬃铁卫，我也有很多情况需要确认，仅此而已。
E: I'm certain that the residents of the underground will have a lot they need to vent about. And as a Silvermane Guard, I have a lot that I need to ascertain. Nothing more.

C: 要是没有受伤，就回去好好休息吧。放心，在需要你们帮助的时候，我也不会客气。
E: So if you're not hurt yourself, you should go back and get some rest. Relax, if I need your assistance, I won't hesitate to ask.

C: 是，而且她是领导。
E: Yes, she's their leader.

C: 就是虎克的老爹，也是鼹鼠党大家的老爹！费斯曼老爹对每个人都很好，总之就是个大好人！
E: He's Hook's daddy, and he's like a daddy to everyone in The Moles! He's like... a great person!

C: …那样的话，我的信誉就彻底完了。
E: ...If I had done that, I would've completely destroyed my credibility.

C: 没错，避难所平时一直很熙攘，小偷很难找到机会下手。
E: Yes. The shelter was usually crowded, so thieves would've had a hard time stealing things when everyone was around.

C: 你们问完了吗？能证明我是清白的了吗？
E: Is that all the questions you have? Have I proven my innocence?

C: 我心里有数了，你小心点儿。
E: I've figured it out. Be careful.

C: 不是，你这家伙，废话怎么这么多？要还是不要，你赶紧给个准数！
E: No, no, why are you making this so complicated? Do you want it or not? Just tell me!

C: 别啊，这地底很难找到合适的人了，哎…等会儿，我得想想……
E: Please don't! It's hard to find the right person for the job around here. Jeez... Wait a minute...

C: 这怎么可能，这图我是从一个老矿工手里捞到的，怎么会是高仿？
E: Nonsense! I fleeced this map from an old miner. No way it could be a fake!

C: …什么啊，原来你俩早就认识？嘁，早知道就不花那么大功夫忽悠——
E: ...What? You two already knew each other? Well...If I knew this in the first place, I wouldn't have spent so much effort trying to fool—

C: 算，也不算…只是把一个落单的家伙给赶跑了。
E: Uhh, kind of... There was one on its own — I managed to chase it away.

C: 等等——难道你能理解它的语言？
E: Wait... You understand it?

C: （那应该就是玲可了。先在这里观察状况吧。）
E: (That must be Lynx. Let's hide here and observe for now.)

C: 怎么固定不了……
E: Why can't I secure it...

C: 哎，不用不用——玲宝你别操心，放着我来吧！
E: Ah! N—No! Don't worry about it, Lynxy! I'll manage!

C: 我们还没研究清楚这类生物的习性，但有一点很确定…它肯定具备某种蛊惑人心的能力，我们还是谨慎一点为好。
E: We haven't figured out everything about it yet, but there's one thing we're sure of... they have the power to control people. We need to be careful.

C: …咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
E: ...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.

C: 哎呀，没事——交给我就好啦。
E: It's no problem! Leave it to me.

C: 没事没事，反正我连她的样子都没见过……
E: It's okay... It's not like I even know what she looked like...

C: 你的意思是，有人抢先我们一步？
E: You mean that someone else got here and took everything before us?

C: 你是…「地火」的希儿姐姐？我来这里是为了……
E: You're... Miss Seele from Wildfire? I came here to...

C: 我当时一门心思想飞上天去，把自己荡到上层区看看。
E: At the time, I wanted to swing myself into the sky and fly up to the Overworld.

C: 我可是一刻不停地赶过来的。
E: But I didn't take a single break on my way over.

C: 都怪你写得太多了。
E: You shouldn't have written so much.

C: 看到，是否，亮堂堂？工作，帕斯卡，完成，圆满！
E: Look, isn't it, shiny? Job, Pascal, done, nice!

C: 帕斯卡，修缮，确实！等待，一直，大家。
E: Pascal, repair, indeed! Waiting, been, everyone.

C: {NICKNAME}，克拉拉，铆钉镇，居民！
E: {NICKNAME}, Clara, Rivet Town, resident!

C: 娜塔！我们回来了。
E: Nat! We're back.

C: 反正把你锤烂以后我们也能拿到认证吧？那正合我意！
E: If we turn you into scrap metal, we still get our certification, right? Suits me!

C: 兄弟，你得请教真正的聪明人。要谈怎么修好机器，没人比马雷夫更懂行。
E: You should be asking people with real smarts. No one is better at fixing machines than Marev.

C: 你就是小孩子啊…
E: But you ARE a child...

C: 克拉拉！离开这里。
E: Leave, Clara!

C: 我我我，加五十！
E: Over here! Add another <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

C: 六百冬城盾两次——镶有黑宝石的手工玩偶，六百冬城盾，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield for the erebus teddy bear, going twice! Any other offers?

C: 这家伙的工钱得分我们一半…
E: This guy should give us half his salary...

C: 你知道他习惯在哪里活动吗？
E: Where can you usually find him?

C: 七百五十冬城盾三次！成交！恭喜这位买家！
E: <unbreak>750</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold! Congratulations to the winner!

C: 谢谢你，虎克！这件生日礼物…老爹特别喜欢，只是现在可能还用不上……
E: Thank you so much, Hook! Daddy really likes this birthday gift... but I might not be able to use it right now...

C: 你又想挨打了是不是…
E: Are you trying to start another fight...

C: 啊…对了！听说昨晚守夜巡逻的叔叔阿姨又撞到了那个小偷，但克拉拉还没来得及去问…要一起去问问看吗？
E: Oh! I heard the vagrants on patrol last night ran across the thief again, but I haven't had time to look into it... Should we go ask them?

C: 结果我刚掀开帐篷…那个黑影，那个贼吓人的黑影就窜到了我的眼前！
E: But when I entered the tent... the thief's silhouette scurried across my vision!

C: 注意：您已超速。请严格遵守贝洛伯格交通法规——道路没几条，安全第一条。
E: CAUTION: You have exceeded the speed limit. Please obey Belobog traffic laws. On the road, safety is the top priority.

C: 已自动为您生成五星好评，不用谢！
E: A five-star review for this trip has been automatically generated for you. You're welcome!
███████not██compatible██in-██compatible██!?

C: 啊，看！{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，帕斯卡在和你打招呼呢。只是…它说的话还是有些混乱。
E: Oh look, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}! Pascal is greeting you. It's just... his speech is still a little confusing.

C: 我理解你。
E: Okay, I understand.

C: …我明白了，克拉拉。我支持你的选择。
E: ...I understand, Clara. I support your decision.

C: 你是克拉拉信任的「变量」。无论如何，你的观点都会被纳入演算范畴。
E: Clara believes in you as a variable. Either way, your input will be taken into account.

C: 等等…我还是想去劝劝克拉拉。
E: Wait. I should persuade Clara out of it instead.

C: ——生病？生病，什么，是？
E: Illness? What, is, illness?

C: 这些机器人怎么了？
E: What about them?

C: …谢谢你，帕斯卡。
E: ...Thank you, Pascal.

C: 禁区内不得随意走动！快去干活！
E: You can't just go wherever you please in the restricted zone! Get to work!

C: 哦，你们好……
E: Oh, hello...

C: 百分之四十…六十五…八十五……
E: <unbreak>40%</unbreak>... <unbreak>65%</unbreak>... <unbreak>85%</unbreak>...

C: ——别说了，希露瓦！
E: Enough, Serval!

C: 你们每天都在面对这种攻势吗？
E: Are you dealing with attacks like this every day?

C: 看刚才他们那架势，如果没有你们及时出手的话，我恐怕已经……
E: They were not bluffing, you know. If it weren't for you guys helping me out in time, I'm afraid I would have been...

C: …你怎么了？
E: ...What's wrong?

C: 还要再来几次吗？
E: Should I do it a few more times?

C: 我在禁区里遇到了一个奇怪的女人…
E: I met this strange woman in the restricted zone...

C: 必须…根除…必须…彻底……
E: You must...eradicate... Once... and for all...

C: 又是那个女人的影子…这次布洛妮娅不在她身边。
E: It's that "shadow" of hers again... but Bronya's isn't with her this time.

C: 「开拓」之旅总会这样收尾吗？
E: Is this how Trailblazing expeditions usually come to an end?

C: 也不会，有时候收尾挺欢乐的。
E: Not always, sometimes it's a happier conclusion.

C: 你会不会也是这样…
E: Is this how you were...?

C: …但约定的新世界里没有她的位置。
E: ...But there is no place for her in the promised new world.

C: 为时尚早，布洛妮娅…为时尚早。总有一天你会明白的。
E: It is too early Bronya... still too early. You will understand when the time is right.

C: 不要抗拒，布洛妮娅——接受共同的意志吧！
E: Do not resist, Bronya... Accept the common will!

C: …希儿？
E: ...Seele?

C: 你想要把人性踩在脚下，同时扮演裁判和神明——这种事，我不能容许！
E: You seek to crush human nature underfoot while masquerading as an... as an arbiter and a god! I cannot let you!

C: （难道她是……）
E: (Could she be...)

C: 也许我只有继续等待了。等待下一个不会再来的见证者经过……
E: Maybe I just have to keep waiting around. Wait for the next witness, who'll probably never come...

C: 至于你带回来的这台「查宝」，就留给我作纪念吧～我可以把这个具有传奇经历的小家伙加入我的古董收藏。
E: As for the Findie that you brought back with you, you can leave it with me as a souvenir. I can add this little legendary gadget to my antique collection.

C: 「你的工作真的有这么无聊吗？」「这就是传说中的薪水小偷吗？」
E: "Is your job really that boring?" "Is this what people mean by getting paid to do nothing?"

C: <color=#dbc291ff>星槎海的航道里会经过不同颜色、不同型号的星槎。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Starskiffs of different colors and models will pass through the lanes in Starskiff Haven.</color>

C: 我没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 好像不太对。
E: That's not quite right.

C: 您就是联系我的{NICKNAME}吗，请问梅姐是不是已经离开星槎海了？
E: Are you {NICKNAME}? The person who contacted me? Has Mei already left Starskiff Haven?

C: 丹鼎司医者已经把她带走了。
E: The healers had already taken her away.

C: 哎，我这也不是在说她坏话，我是在担心她。
E: I'm not bad-mouthing her. I'm just concerned for her.

C: 实不相瞒，我原本是打算今天将她辞退的。我已经想了很久了，要不是出了这个事故……
E: To be honest, I originally wanted to dismiss her today. It had been on my mind for a long while. If it weren't for this accident...

C: 那之前为什么没有辞退她呢？
E: So why didn't you lay her off earlier?

C: 嗯，我会考虑考虑的，毕竟雇佣关系说白了就是等价交换，和感情无关。
E: Hmm, I will take that into consideration. After all, the employment relationship is an exchange of equivalents, and feelings have nothing to do with it.

C: 是什么来着，二五六、二五七、二八二九三十一……
想再看看证言。
E: I want to go over the testimonies again.

C: …哎，你根本就没有把我的话听进去。
E: Aaaah... You still don't get it.

C: 你是担心芦慧要去雇别人吗？
E: Are you worried that Luhui is going to hire someone else?

C: 你疑心自己是否会摸到了什么不该摸到的东西，比如一个鸟巢或是蜂窝。
E: You are concerned that you might reach something you shouldn't touch, such as a bird nest or a beehive.

C: 毕竟我可是送出了《冥土还魂论》这般珍贵的古籍影本，当然得验验她这份礼物的成色。
E: After all, I gave her a copy of Theories on Returning From the Underworld, which is an invaluable ancient text. Of course I need to see how good her returning gift is.

C: 你问丹方的问题？那就去问丹士啊，我学的是手术，开膛破肚的那种，怕了吧？
E: You want to know about prescriptions? Then go ask an alchemist. My specialty is in surgery. The kind that opens people up. Scared yet?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 你好像很烦恼的样子？
E: You look troubled.

C: 听说你又在找朋友了？
E: I heard you're looking for friends again?

C: 娜塔…
E: Nat...

C: 我好像见过这个「小聪」…
E: I think I've met this Cong before...

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 「我会写诗，我最会写诗啦！」
E: "I can write poetry. I'm the best at writing poetry!"

C: 是你张贴的寻物启事吗？
E: Did you put up the Lost and Found notices?

C: 走吧，我带你回家。
E: Come on. Let me take you home.

C: 真的吗？我不信。她明明说过，她过去的爱人是位妙笔生花的大诗人，她深深为对方的诗才所倾倒。
E: Really? I don't believe you. She told me before that her past lover was a talented poet, and how she was infatuated with his poetic talent.

C: 我今年六十二岁了，爸爸。
E: I'm sixty-two years old, Dad.

C: 拍得很好看，我放心了。不过你要是会用美颜的话，再帮我瘦下脸谢谢。
E: The photo looks very nice. If you're good at editing photos, please help make my face smaller. Thanks.

C: 你听说过孤屿这个人吗？
E: Have you heard about someone named Guyu?

C: 走吧，我们现在就去挑礼物，你快帮我出个主意吧。
E: Let's pick a gift for her. Come and help me think of what to buy.

C: 对啊！没素质就算了，你说，揭小广告是勤务该做的工作吗？
E: Exactly! That point aside, do you think removing posters is my duty?

C: 你不是支持感情生活吗？
E: Aren't you supportive of your staff members' romantic pursuits?

C: 我们根本就没见过吧……
E: We haven't met...

C: 这么果断就拒绝了吗！我不让你白干活，我、我会给你报酬的！
E: Are you flat-out rejecting me? I won't make you do things for free! I—I'll pay you!

C: 外驻申请还没有通过吗？
E: Is your transfer application not approved yet?

C: 通常来说，这样的事情发生了之后，经纪人会比她本人更应该来处理这些事情。
E: Normally, when things like this happened, her manager would be on the ball to deal with hiccups like this.

C: 走吧，追上去。
E: The chase is on, then.

C: 这个叫「黛青」的骗子聊天的话术也不高明啊。温符瑞科员到底是怎么能被迷得茶不思饭不想的？
E: Now that I think about it, this "Daiqing" scammer had horrendous conversational skills. How did Wen Furui fall head over heels for someone of such low caliber?

C: 这…的确是贝尼尼老师的手笔。
E: This... is indeed the handiwork of Bernini.

C: 怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 唯有持明族转世重生，轮回不息。
E: Only the Vidyadhara undergo rebirths and endless circles of life.

C: 请注意，侦测到特定反应，附近存在学会通行光学标识，所属学士：贝尼尼•赛拉诺。
E: Note: Specific response detected. An optical marking of the guild is nearby. Owner: Scholar Bernini Serrano.

C: （这个图案的含义晦暗难明，看上去像是某种对抗，这人背后还有翅膀…这到底是什么玩意？）
E: (This drawing bears an obscured meaning. It seems to portray some kind of resistance, and there is a being with wings on its back... What does it mean?)

C: 不，你不懂！你根本不会相信、也不可能想象衰老是怎样一种地狱！
E: No, you don't understand! You could never believe or even imagine what kind of hell aging actually is!

C: 从测试结果看，这个逆向生长的过程不会停止。要不了多久，我就会再也认不得字，看不懂自己写的报告，这和老年痴呆似乎没什么不同。
E: Test results indicate that this de-aging process seems to have no endpoint. It won't be long before I'm illiterate and won't be able to understand my own reports — which would seem no difference from regular dementia.

C: 白露大人别慌张，你看清了，{F#她}{M#他}也不是丹鼎司的人。
E: Easy, Lady Bailu — {F#she's}{M#he's} clearly not from the Alchemy Commission either.

C: 已经处理了，也就是安全的意思？
E: Dealt with...? Does that mean we're safe now?

C: 这就是证据！
E: Here's the proof!

C: 数不清的医道智者都投身在破解这一诅咒的研究上。可惜，除了几个似是而非的答案之外，谁也没有结论。
E: Countless doctors and sages have dedicated their lives to researching a cure for the curse. Tragically, besides a few theories, no one has come to a definite conclusion.

C: 你为什么要瞒着白露？
E: Why did you hide all this from Bailu?

C: 你说时间不多了？
E: You said you didn't have much time left?

C: 说来可笑，考察仙舟文化时，我竟然从没留意过这些街头小吃。学会对那些烟火气浓重、却无利可图的东西向来是不感兴趣的。
E: It's silly, but when I was researching Xianzhou culture, I never paid attention to these street snacks. The Guild never had much time for ordinary knowledge unless they were profitable.

C: 陶德先生，咱们该走了…
E: Mr. Todd, we should get going...

C: 别想这些有的没的了…
E: Don't think about what could have been...

C: 那一天，病人们都躺下了，我却看到他不停画着一片树林。我问他，不好好休息还在做什么？
E: There was a day when all the other patients were lying in bed, but I found him painting a forest. I told him he was supposed to be resting.

C: 唔…嗯……
E: *groaning*

C: 大人的情感真复杂……
E: Grownups are complicated, huh...

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。有缘的话，咱们在星槎海的小吃摊见！再会！
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. May we meet again at the food stalls of Starskiff Haven! Bye!

C: 您随时可以启行。
E: You may go at any time.

C: 「衔药龙女」兼有龙相形貌和不可思议的疗愈之能。有人将这视为龙尊的证明。不过，信奉力量的龙师长老们却不愿接受……
E: The Healer Lady has draconic features and scarcely believable therapeutic abilities. Some regard this as evidence that she is the High Elder. But the Preceptors are fixated on strength, and are unwilling to accept her...

C: 白露小姐，你们怎么在我的药房里？难道你们已经知道了「药王」之事…来拿我问罪么？
E: Miss Bailu, what are you doing in my pharmacy? Don't tell me you've already heard about Sanctus Medicus... Have you come here to condemn me?

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，好久不见。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}. It's been a while.

C: 罗刹进入了三余书肆，不久后走了出来。他两手空空，大概什么也没有买。
E: Luocha walked into Spare Time Book Shop and stepped out after a while. He left with nothing in hand — perhaps he didn't buy anything.

C: 不错不错，是拍到了他离开的身影吗？
E: Nice! You found footage of him leaving?

C: 我还有些公务要处理，先失陪了。有什么事情随时联系我，各位都有我的联系方式。
E: Well, I'm afraid I have some other business to attend to. Let me know if you need anything — you know how to reach me.

C: 我要开始还原真相咯，你准备好了吗？
E: Ready? I'm gonna start my reconstruction.

C: 您一身化外服装，和我说您是地衡司的人？糊弄谁呢？
E: Working undercover dressed like an outworlder? You think I'm stupid?

C: 杨叔，都说了晚些再来…
E: Mr. Yang, I told you we'd be early...

C: 和孽物战斗时一片混乱，妈妈的东西应该就丢在了附近。
E: The fight with the abominations was pretty chaotic... I think Mom's trinket would've dropped around here.

C: 母亲将这件圣物留在身上，显然还怀念着自己的飞行生涯。可她却不肯再飞行了，甚至不让我成为斗舰飞行士，到底是为什么呢？
E: My mom clearly misses her flying days, otherwise she wouldn't keep this on her person. But she doesn't fly anymore and refuses to let me become a fighter pilot. Why?

C: 在驭空随身的挂饰里。
E: Inside a trinket belonging to Yukong.

C: 这上面看起来正在运行很重要的程序。还是别乱动这台术算机了。
E: It seems like this device is handling some important procedures. Let's leave it alone.

C: 没关系…我也并不需要您帮我做什么…只希望您能和瓦尔特先生站在一旁，替我壮壮胆吧……
E: It's fine, I don't need you to do anything... I just want you and Mr. Yang to stand nearby... I'll feel more confident that way...

C: 咦…真的吗？你会拒绝我吗？
E: Huh... Really? You refuse?

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 因此，我要借助「言灵」持续减弱魔阴身的效果，暂时将它封印。维持言灵时不能分心二用，我需要你来担任护法。在我压制刃的时候保护我。
E: My plan is to use Spirit Whisper to temporarily seal the mara by reducing its potency. I need to focus all my concentration so I'll be vulnerable for some time — I need you to protect me while I suppress Blade.

C: 因为我有一个想要的未来。
E: Because I have a future that I want.

C: （所以，我的回答是——）
E: (So, my answer is...)

C: 我们崇拜纯美的星神伊德莉拉，发誓用手中刀剑守护祂的美貌。可是，某一天祂突然消失了，谁也不知道下落。
E: We worshiped Idrila, the Aeon of Beauty. We vowed to guard THEIR beauty with the sword, but one day THEY suddenly disappeared.

C: 艾利欧可以窥见可能性，只要我按照他的指示行事，他就答应告诉我走向那个未来所需的条件。
E: As I told you, Elio is able to glimpse through possibilities. As long as I followed his instructions, he promised to tell me what it would take to move towards the future I wanted.

C: （还废什么话，直接动手！）
E: (Why waste my breath on them? Time to fight!)

C: 打扰了，二位。
E: Greetings.

C: 咱们到了。迴星港中的船舶但凡生产，起始处就在这里。
E: We've arrived. All ship production in Stargazer Navalia starts here.

C: 只消对着那些机关输入指令，培育星槎种子的器皿就会动起来，要不了多久，空港里就会多一艘船。
E: Just enter the command into the device. The vessel used to cultivate starskiff seeds will be activated, and a ship will appear in the skyport soon after.

C: 什么话！面对险境，珍惜生命等待云骑又有什么不对？
E: What's that supposed to mean!? What's wrong with saving your own life and waiting for the Cloud Knights to arrive?

C: 我身边这位想来问症。
E: She's here for a consultation.

C: 她的剑也做不到，她依旧做不到。
E: She couldn't do it with her sword either. She still couldn't do it.

C: 五位追魔扫秽，留下诸多令人神往的传奇。可惜，事无长久。最终「云上五骁」还是四分五裂，彼此陌路。
E: The five of you vanquished evil from the world, creating legendary tales in your wake. Unfortunately, nothing lasts forever, and the High-Cloud Quintet disbanded as each of you went your separate ways.

C: 他的愚行最终把自己变作了不死的怪物，魂消魄陨，堕为生前最鄙夷的恶孽——真是造化弄人啊……
E: His stupidity turned him into a monster, cursed with immortality. His soul was shattered and became the evil that he hated most. The irony...

C: 唯有如此，那些当被铭记的痛苦…才不会逝去。
E: That is the only way to keep the memory of the pain of the past... from fading away.

C: 我们找到了彦卿留下的东西...
E: We found something left behind by Yanqing...

C: 目前一无所获，对吧？
E: Nothing new to report, I assume?

C: 哼哼，那个「刃」从幽囚狱脱出禁制后，就像蒸发了一般。或许他此刻已不在罗浮仙舟了？
E: Correct. After this "Blade" escaped from The Shackling Prison, he disappeared into thin air. I wonder if he's even still on the ship?

C: 大姐姐，你多久没回罗浮仙舟了啊？
E: Miss Jingliu, how long has it been since you last set foot on the Luofu?

C: 谢啦，小弟弟。
E: Thank you, young man.

C: 「我斩阵三万人，命解骨师自他们的遗体中剖走了尚有活性的丹腑，筑成了这片腑海神龛，详加钻研。」
E: "I put thirty thousand people to death and had the anatomist dissect their live Core Esses to build all these Esse Shrines, so that I can make further studies of them."

C: 我会让你三招。
E: I'll let you make three moves.

C: 那我先回神策府报告了，你一定要注意安全啊。
E: I should report back to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Stay safe, friend!

C: （打开了…这确实是药王秘传的内部命令。）
E: (Code cracked... Huh, it's an internal order from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.)

C: 说来惭愧，我曾是猎狗中的一员…我修习了近百年的枪术，还差点就能当上云骑的教习。
E: I'm ashamed to admit it, but I once worked alongside those devils... I trained in spear techniques for almost a century — I nearly became a Cloud Knight instructor.

C: 但依我看，这玩意儿其实没什么大不了的，只不过是用一种扭曲的视角，重新叙述了寿瘟祸祖扭曲造物的行为……
E: As I see it, there isn't anything particularly alarming about the text. It recalls the acts of the Plagues Author's warped creatures from an equally warped perspective...

C: 你问吧，我知无不言。
E: Ask away, I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 没问题了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 原来是神策府的公事，那我一定全力以赴啊，哈哈。药方拿来我看看。
E: So this is official Seat of Divine Foresight business, eh? Then I'll do everything I can to assist you, haha. Let's take a look at this prescription you mentioned.

C: 可怕，而且看不懂。
E: It's a horrifying prescription... and I can't make any sense of it.

C: 啊！我…我死啦！
E: Ah! I... I want to die!

C: 诸位，我看到星槎了。
E: There's the starskiff.

C: 大概是一开始在那块冰里被冻坏了吧。记忆们都被冻得瑟瑟发抖，就跑不出来了。
E: Something must have happened when I was frozen in the ice. I bet the memories were freezing and decided to hibernate.

C: 怎、怎么会呢！我心目中的太卜，那可是神通广大啊！嘿嘿。
E: N—No! Uh — I've always seen you as a... m—masterful master diviner! Hehe...

C: 正是如此。
E: Exactly.

C: 你平时不爱说话也就算了，这可是我的记忆，我的地盘！你好歹得给我说句话！
E: Hey, it's fine if you don't want to talk in real life, but this is MY memory, so it's MY rules! Come on, say something!

C: 让我猜猜，你是一个…不遵循常规的人，喜欢即兴发挥，面对真正的强敌也能从容应对，我可有说错？
E: Let me guess, you're someone who... doesn't follow the rules, enjoys improvising, and can handle yourself well against tough foes. Am I right?

C: 不过既然有人邀请，那是最好不过了。{NICKNAME}，走吧，我们一起去瞧瞧。
E: But now that we're invited, let's go and check it out, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我感觉你还有什么难言之隐？
E: Looks like this is a sensitive topic?

C: （向怀炎解释云璃的事情）
E: (You explain Yunli's situation to Huaiyan.)

C: 我可以作她的担保人。
E: I can vouch for her.

C: 说个题外话，也许你不知道，正是这位骑士抵达卡勒瓦拉后，辨认出宝剑的来历，又一路护送它来到仙舟。换言之，是他一力促成了宝剑归乡之事。
E: You might not know, but he's the one who recognized the sword's origin on Kalevala and escorted it back to the Xianzhou. In other words, he's the one who made it possible for the sword to come home.

C: 君王们会听到寄宿于剑中的英雄之魂对他们进行教导，并帮助他们战胜强敌。
E: The monarchs would heed the guidance of the heroes' spirits within the sword and gain insight into defeating their enemies.

C: 诱惑？在下被孤云阁下的纯美所动容了！
E: Captivated? No, I am touched by Master Guyun's flawless beauty!

C: 在下反倒是疑惑，在场的诸位竟然没有一人能够读懂这柄剑，真是令人感到悲伤…我已经下定决心，要带着孤云阁下离开仙舟。
E: To be honest, I'm confused why none of you can understand this sword. This is quite heartrending... I've already made up my mind to take Master Guyun away from the Xianzhou.

C: 不过眼下还不是时候。
E: But now is not that time.

C: 你为他们斩下兽主的头颅，他们却害怕遭到报复，把你供了出来，这些事情，你全都记得的吧！
E: You beheaded one of the Beastmasters for their sake, but they turned on you because they were scared of the borisin taking revenge. You remember all that, right!?

C: 为何选在这里纪念？
E: Why did you choose this place?

C: 你也可以在这儿好好休息了，孤云。
E: Now you can also rest here, Guyun.

C: 关于现场的证物…
E: Regarding evidence at the scene of the crime...

C: 既然是在匹诺康尼…答案是「美梦剧团」，对吗？
E: Seeing as we're in Penacony... the answer is "Sweet Dreams troupe," right?

C: 所以当然是「早上四条腿，中午两条腿，晚上三条腿」咯～
E: So naturally she's got "four legs in the morning, two legs in the afternoon, and three legs at night"~

C: 这钟是……
E: This clock is...

C: 平时若是闲得没事，咱们常常从这边逃出来在外面逍遥自在几个时辰。
E: When there's nothing to do, we often sneak out from here and spend a few hours lazing around outside.

C: 卜算推演，卦象已成。涨落幅度在泽兑之间，误差正负千分之二。
E: Divination inference complete, hexagrammatic position established. Fluctuation range is between the marsh and water trigrams. Error margin of <unbreak>0.2%</unbreak>.

C: 符卿，进展如何？
E: Diviner Fu, how are things progressing?

C: 你也要小心啊，可别又被成熟的大姐姐给骗了。
E: Be careful though. Don't get fooled by her again.

C: （沉默）
E: (Remain Silent)

C: 仙舟为什么想杀死「丰饶」？
E: Why does the Xianzhou want to kill the Abundance?

C: 看出来了，您从头到尾还真是不拿我们当外人。
E: You've never really seen us as outsiders, huh.

C: 我明白，我明白。景元岂是不懂知恩图报之人？
E: Understood, understood, worry not — I know how to repay a favor.

C: 故事讲到这里，「建木」重生将带来何等灾难，诸位应该明白了吧？
E: At this point in the story, I assume you understand the disasters that the resurrection of the Ambrosial Arbor might bring about?

C: 开拓之路也没有轻松二字。
E: The Path of Trailblaze doesn't seem to allow for any "relaxation" either.

C: 但我们总是得往里走的，先找个人打听打听吧。
E: Either way, we'll have to go in. Let's ask around first.

C: 那，请拿上这张玉符。
E: In that case, take this jade seal with you.

C: 「距离太短，消耗能量太大」？
E: Let me guess... Limited range? Energy costs?

C: 不错不错，师傅领进门，修行在个人。你可比老夫那几个没用的弟子厉害多了。
E: Very good! The master reveals the door, but the apprentice must walk through it. You're much better than my useless students.

C: 快看，这儿还有一堆「建木」的根须！
E: Quick, there's more roots over here!

C: 猎鹿去！
E: Deer hunting.

C: 什么门楼子…那是我工造司造来镇守各处的金人。
E: Gate robots...? Those are aurumatons — the Artisanship Commission created them to stand guard in various locations.

C: 怎么样？你找到丹枢的消息了吗？
E: How did it go? Did you manage to locate Dan Shu?

C: 没错，我想要的福报就是钱。
