E: That's right. Money is the only reward I want.

C: 哈，妙啊。听说那颗星球因为大灾难而就此断绝音信了。
E: How intriguing. It is said that the planet was never heard from again after it was struck by a large-scale disaster.

C: 相当顺利…
E: It went without a hitch...

C: 你不要再推卸责任了！要么你让这棵两千年的古树重新长出来，要么你找丹鼎司栽种两千棵树，你自己选吧！
E: Don't pass the blame to someone else! You must either revive this ancient tree or grow two thousand trees as compensation — your choice!

C: 看来你们收到了消息…
E: Seems like you got the memo...

C: （看来这里的道路似乎被某种幻觉扭曲……）
E: (It seems like the paths here are being twisted by some sort of illusion...)

C: 剪剪剪、剪纸成兵，奉我敕令！灵符一道，诸患弥平！
E: P—P—Paper to might, carry this fight! Talisman of strength, evils to spite!

C: …葫芦里应该封印了不少的岁阳，走吧，我们去和雪衣大人汇合。
E: ...There are plenty of heliobi in the gourd now. Let's go and meet up with Madam Xueyi.

C: 呜啊啊啊啊啊——！！！
E: Uwhaaaa—!!!

C: 灵符灵符灵符！
E: Talismans! Talismans!! Talismans!!!

C: 若按太卜司的分类，它们是来自天外的能量寄生物，以妖异火焰形象出现的「星火之精」。
E: According to the Divination Commission's classification, they are energy parasites from the cosmos itself. They are "Starfire Essence" that materialize in the form of strange fire.

C: 尾巴…已被寒鸦大人镇伏在我尾巴上了，不会危害别人的。
E: Tail... was subdued and sealed in my tail by Madam Hanya. He won't harm others.

C: 尾巴，是其他岁阳吗？
E: Tail, is it another heliobus?

C: 放心！我会带你出去！
E: Calm down! I'll get you out of here!

C: 真受不了啊！要是我能重获自由，老子第一时间先吞了浮烟那杂碎，再把你这个成天哭哭啼啼的小怂包啊呜一口也吃了。
E: Ugh, I've had enough of this! As soon I swallow that coward Cirrus, I'm gonna devour this little crybaby too!

C: 藿藿，若吾与寒鸦上阵依然无法制住那妖物，对付它的重担就落到汝身上了。
E: Huohuo, if both Hanya and I are unable to suppress that demon, then you will have to defeat it.

C: 等等，我再仔细考虑一下。
E: Wait, let me think about it.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}不用担心我。藿藿没事，我还得振作起来，继续执行任务呢。
E: Don't worry, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I'm okay. I need to pull myself together and finish the job...

C: 可是……
E: But...

C: …请稍等一下，我、我想问几个问题辨别真伪。
E: ...Wait. I want to ask a few questions... to see if you're the real person.

C: 雪衣判官与寒鸦判官是何关系？
E: What is the relationship between Judge Xueyi and Judge Hanya?

C: 藿藿，快到这边来，穿过镜子。
E: Come here, Huohuo. Come through the mirror.

C: 虽然火大，她确实是这么看待老子的。
E: Hmph. I may not like it, but that is how she sees me.

C: 感谢您告知我柯柯娜小姐的近况——我会派人再多给她送些「特调」。
E: Thank you for informing me of Miss Cocona's recent situation. I will dispatch people to deliver more of the "special drink" to her.

C: 要不还是先把特调喝了吧？
E: Why not drink the special drink first?

C: 我…我还不确定。
E: I... I haven't decided.

C: 嗐，我开玩笑的，年纪一大就喜欢唠叨…先陪我一起逛逛吧，我太久没听过你的声音了，多少有点惦记呢。
E: Ha, I was just joking. You know how people ramble on at my age... Accompany me around the store. I haven't heard your voice in a while, and I do miss it.

C: 开心点嘛，娜娜——我可是很擅长机动球的！你瞧——
E: Cheer up, Cocona... I'm a pro at Roboball! Look...

C: 在那之前，我要努力训练，争取以最好的状态给你带回奖杯。柯柯娜…你真的不来看吗？
E: Before that, I have to train hard and reach my best state to bring back the trophy for you. Cocona... Are you really not coming to see me?

C: 好，那就这么决定了——等着看我凯旋吧，娜娜！到时候，我们老地方见……
E: All right. It's decided then. Await my triumphant return, Cocona! When the time comes, we will meet at our old haunt...

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}…您真的是个奇怪的人。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}... You really are a strange one.

C: 谢谢您…至于其它的事，我还是不去多想了吧。
E: Thank you... As for the rest of what happened, I think I'd better leave that be.

C: 我是柯柯娜的老朋友。
E: I'm an old friend of Cocona's.

C: 直到身边一位善良的护士小姐告知，我从那场可怕的事故中幸存下来——我这才得以确认周遭世界的真实性。
E: That was until a kind young nurse by my side informed me that I had survived a terrible accident... This was the moment that I realized that the world around me was in fact, real.

C: 在他轮廓清晰的脖颈两侧，皮下血管的脉络开始凸显，跃动清晰可见。你好像突然理解了：于刹那间溃堤的绝望，抵得上百十载的星霜流年。
E: Veins on either side of his graceful neck begin to protrude as his pulse becomes visible to the naked eye. You suddenly realize that this moment of despair weighs on him as heavy as a century of suffering.

C: 推开房门。
E: Push open the door.

C: 请帮帮他吧，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
E: Please, help him, {NICKNAME}.

C: 也许有一个办法可以验证我们的成果。
E: There may be a way for us to test the results.

C: 我想是的。对抗蛮不讲理的事物，或许只有最直接粗暴的方式才能奏效。
E: I think so. Sometimes, violence is the only way to combat something that does not respond to logic.

C: 你最近…好像总是露出有些悲伤的表情呢。是工作上发生了什么事吗？
E: Lately, you... you've been looking sad. Did something happen at work?

C: 这一切都是我的错…怪我曾经太迟钝，太乖戾，太过自以为是。
E: This is all my fault... I was slow, unreasonable... obnoxious.

C: 我好像看见了…看见了…我自己。我身体里的莱斯利•迪恩…他好像在对我微笑，好像在对我说：「做得好」。
E: I feel like I can see... I can see... myself. The Lesley Dean inside my body... It's as if he's smiling at me and saying: "Well done."

C: 三号候选人「佩德罗」，出身于皮皮西人的航行世家，航行经验丰富。
E: The third and final candidate is Pedro, a Pepeshi hailing from a lineage of navigators, and is a veteran spacefarer.

C: 你有什么好的建议吗？
E: Do you have any good suggestions?

C: 遵命！
E: Aye-aye, Cap'n!

C: 我宣布，从现在开始的十个系统时，你就是白日梦酒店唯一的大堂经理！
E: I hereby announce that for the next ten system hours, you are The Reverie's one and only Lobby Manager!

C: 为了不让前台看上去过于空荡，你找来了一些石头老板的气球作为点缀……
E: To liven up the front desk, you add some Boss Stone balloons as decorations...

C: 哦，no…你早该学会听取理性的意见的。这下糟了。
E: Oh no... you realize that you should have listened to reason long ago, and now you find yourself in trouble.

C: 好消息：现在有很多空房！
E: Good news! There are plenty of vacancies right now!

C: 你懂个宝贝！我的眼睛看得清清楚楚，只是脑子没转过来而已！
E: You don't know fudge! I can see things crystal clear — just my brain hasn't caught up yet!
*sigh*...

C: 嗨呀，就知道你要这么说！好歹给我留一点，够在匹诺康尼好好玩一圈就行！
E: Hey, I knew you'd say that! In any case, just give me a little time — enough for a little fun around Penacony!

C: 知更鸟小姐…时间差不多了。
E: Miss Robin... It's almost time.

C: （算了，救人要紧…赶快去梦境里找人吧。）
E: (Never mind. Saving lives comes first... I should find Qingque in the Dreamscape right away.)

C: …嗨？你也是被骗进来的？
E: ...Hi? Did they trick you into joining them too?

C: …你是认真的吗？
E: ...Are you serious?

C: 出发！
E: Let's go!

C: 不用谢！
E: No worries!

C: 咱不能让客人们空手回去嘛！
E: We can't send our guests off empty-handed!

C: 列车组往返罗浮多次，即便我们是作为神策府邀请的客人，送别之事倒也不必太过郑重。今日小别，以后仙舟联盟若有事相商，请随时联系我们的列车长。
E: The Crew visits the Luofu all the time. Even if we are guests of the Seat of Divine Foresight, there's no need to go to all the effort of a formal send off. We'll say a goodbye for now, but if the Xianzhou alliance has anything further to discuss in the future, please don't hesitate to contact our conductor.

C: 哪里哪里，这本是丹鼎司分内之事。
E: Not at all. This is all simply the work of the Alchemy Commission.

C: 青雀小姐所言极是，可是丹鼎司从来不卖后悔药，就算我现在想备份也晚了。
E: What you said is true, but it's too late for regrets. It's impossible to make a copy of it now.

C: …你要是说得再复杂些，我们也听不懂，这些就够了。走吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: That's enough for us. If you keep using more of these fancy words, we ain't gonna understand anything. Let's just head out, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们俩一起进去吧。
E: Let's both go in.

C: 这上面写的不是星槎，是「金人」。这俩字，很好认的吧？再找找。
E: This design talks about aurumatons, not starskiffs. Easy enough to tell apart, no? Keep going.

C: 唉，咱们爷俩的师徒缘分只有二十来年，实在太过匆匆了。
E: *sigh* We've only had twenty years of apprenticeship between us, and it's all gone so fast.

C: …遗憾也是一种美。
E: ...Regret also has its own beauty.

C: 有道理，要是铖杰再去收个徒弟，徒弟再去收徒弟…就能超越时间了吧？
E: Makes sense. If you take on an apprentice, and then that apprentice takes on their own apprentice... Wouldn't that transcend time?

C: 没有吧。
E: Nothing.

C: 很担心你能不能完成。
E: I'm worried you won't be able to complete it.

C: 是啊。但是这话从自己嘴里说出来，就像是用自己的手给自己挠痒痒，谁会笑啊？
E: Indeed, but when I'm the one who says it, I can't feel the impact of those words.

C: 我，必须成为工造司的匠人，这样才能让一切有意义。
E: I must become a craftsman of the Artisanship Commission to make everything worthwhile.

C: 星槎是不是坏掉了？
E: Is the starskiff broken?

C: 再说了，只是想让其他师傅帮我看看的话，也做不到了。就在刚才，星槎也没了。
E: Even if I wanted to ask for the opinions of other craftsmen, it is no longer possible now that the starskiff has been ruined.

C: …你这样胡乱桥接在金人上，非常危险。
E: ...It's very dangerous to modify the aurumaton sloppily like this.

C: 我说它「漏洞百出」，只是一种客气的说法。

C: 对象动机，不明。敌意等级，零。测谎结果，通过。

E: Ha... ha...

C: 我…老子没退路了！

E: We're stalking—

E: I'll listen to their thanks and then yell out my winning slogan:

C: 星槎海有这么热闹吗？今天人真是格外多啊！都快听不清彼此说话了！

C: 各单位迅速集结！注意保护人群。

C: 我在匹诺康尼梦到你了。
E: I dreamed about you on Penacony.

C: 建木。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 哎，不辛苦，倒是劳你拨冗迎接了。
E: Heh, don't mention it. Thank you for taking the time to welcome me.

C: 长久以来，罗浮持明族与丹鼎司有着千丝万缕的合作，若灵砂小姐不能自外其间，想要改变丹鼎司的局面，恐怕很难。
E: The Vidyadhara and the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu have always been intricately connected. If you cannot distance yourself from these ties, Miss Lingsha, changing the situation within the Alchemy Commission may be quite challenging.

C: 「军之强弱，非在其卒，实在其势。审势之成，乃明强弱。」将军所言，属下受益匪浅。
E: "The might of an army dwells not within its pawns, but within the force of its collective momentum. Recognizing this fact reveals the true measure of power." Thanks for enlightening me, General.

C: …就算是名动一方的衔药龙女，也没法子么？
E: ...So, not even the famed Healer Lady could help?

C: 仙舟剑术好哎，真的好！
E: Oh, yeah, Xianzhou swordplay is really good! Like really, really good!

C: 炎老有此美意，景元就在此谢过了。

C: 将军…彦卿尚未出师，哪里来的资格传授他人剑术。

C: 那就这么定了！谢谢怀炎将军的厚爱。
E: Then I'm on board! Thank you for your kindness, General Huaiyan.

C: 巨大的凶面漠然毫无响应，大门纹丝不动。
E: The intimidating countenance has no response whatsoever. The gate doesn't budge.

C: 可凡在银河行走的，是个人都应听说过星核猎手的昭彰恶名。各位无名客为何如此相信他们的一面之词，莫非是有人沾亲带故？
E: However, everyone in the Cosmos knows of the Stellaron Hunters' reputation. So, why did you place so much trust in them? Could it be that some of you have a connection with them?

C: 拒绝回答
E: Refuse to answer anything.

C: 不妨事，但也要记得，辩驳亦如战场，越是犹豫，便越是远离胜利。
E: No problem, but remember that a debate is like a duel. The more you hesitate, the farther you are from victory.

C: 还放咱们回来吗…？
E: Will you let us come back...?

C: 还有，去往下一层之前，务必要吃下这丸丹药。
E: And please take this pellet before proceeding.

C: 要去录事厅，须经由此处悬梯，通过寒冰狱。
E: To reach Scrivener Hall, we must take this elevator and go through the Frozen Prison.

C: 前往中转狱层
E: Go to the Transitory Hold floor

C: 尽管十王司判处呼雷受无间剑树之刑，令其日日苦楚，万世不休。但吾很明白，曜青使者们最想看到的是呼雷咽气的死状……
E: Even though the Ten-Lords Commission sentenced Hoolay to the Forest of Swords, suffering every day for the rest of his life, I understand that the Yaoqing messengers want to see him dead...

C: 虽然我也不想看到她每次如此轻率地消耗自己的身体，就像一个可以被轻率替换的零件那般。但……

C: 吾…明白。小妹…保重，汝和吾…毕竟不同……

C: 他的镇定只是一时的药效。但药效很快就要过去了，对吧？
E: His composure is only a temporary effect of the medicine, and it will wear off soon, right?

C: 云骑…为什么要封锁港口？
E: Closed the ports...? Why would they do that?

C: 没、没什么。
E: No, it's nothing.

C: 步离人想去哪儿呢？
E: Where do those borisin want to go?

C: 上次我们跟踪步离人的位置就在这里，看上去跟平时一样。
E: This is where we ran into the borisin last time. It looks the same as usual.

C: 云骑大哥，你知道步离人越狱的事情了吧？
E: You're aware of the borisin prison break, right?

E: As I said, I'd sacrifice my dignity for your return! As long as you can come back to the borisin packs, there's still hope!

C: 告诉她，我将从这儿开始，杀穿罗浮仙舟。从现在开始，分享我狼血的子嗣会在每一处闹市中奔逐狩猎，以妖弓的信众为食。

C: 我想想…嗯，要是从这里去往观众席，得搭星槎换乘，坐上两个时辰吧！不然不够气派啊！

C: （快速走开）
E: (Leave quickly)

C: 什么？！你就是三月七！！
E: What!? You're March 7th!?

C: 也就是说到处都会发生袭击？
E: You're saying that there will be attacks all over?

C: 那个闯入幽囚狱的劫犯。末度…你还真是一只无论如何都摁不死的臭虫啊。

E: (Presents poisoned wine)

E: I can bend the rules for a short visit for an esteemed guest. I will inform you when time's up.

E: Was there a need to go this far?

C: 好家伙，吾师果然没看错你。

C: 我们不用考虑犯罪的动机，也不需要追溯罪犯悲惨的童年。法律的归法律，道德的归道德，就这么简单。
E: We need not consider the motives for the crime, nor investigate the criminal's tragic childhood. Law is law, morality is morality. It's that simple.

C: 哟，卡拉培，又在祈祷呢？

C: 等等，那不是盔甲，是裙子啊——

C: 不说话就当你默许了吧。恩人，那就先告辞了，还得去给她找张大地民尺寸的床。

C: 哈哈哈，满溢之杯在上！法吉娜的典礼中，最需要注意的礼节便是不要讲礼节！
E: Hahaha, oh great Chalice of Plenty! The most important thing during the festival of Phagousa is to not observe any etiquette!

C: 哎呀，这没什么难的，跟着歌曲舞动身体就行了。
E: Come on, it's not difficult! Just move your body to the rhythm.

C: 嘿呀，不要小看人类的学习能力——海辣丝儿！
E: Hey now, don't underestimate a human's ability to learn... Halnals!

C: 她是入侵者！
E: She's an intruder!

C: 第二个猎物，是你的胞亲。他在攀爬城墙，想要在幕匿中潜入市集饱饮鲜血，却被你击碎了头颅。
E: Your second prey is your own family. He climbs the walls under the cover of night to feast on the dead, so you take your aim and shatter his head.

C: 赞美法吉娜！赞美云石天宫！
E: Praise Phagousa! Praise Marmoreal Palace!

C: 阿…阿卡迪亚…帕里斯……
E: Ar... Arcadia... Paris...

C: 不要慌张，请允许我们占用你的一点时间，为你介绍帕西提亚——我们的先知。
E: Don't panic. Please allow us a moment of your time to introduce Pasithea — our prophet.

C: 帕西提亚，我来救你！
E: Pasithea, I'm here to save you!

C: 说起这个「幽灵」，我和它也算是老相识了。
E: Speaking of this "ghost," you could say it and I are old acquaintances.

C: 这不是很正能量吗？
E: Isn't this a really positive vibe?

C: 只要你们能把遗留在命运重渊的天外之音带给我，我就能从中找到它的踪迹，从它的口中得到答案。
E: As long as you can bring me the echoes from beyond the veil left behind at the Abyss of Fate, I will be able to find traces of the Titan's whereabouts and hear the truth from their mouth.

C: 对…不起。
E: So... rry.

C: 我现在简直怀疑，这全都是扎格列斯的把戏，让一个废物挂上圣女的名声，然后来愚弄我们。

C: 我知道，那些言辞放纵的诡辩家，越来越多的人开始倒戈向他们。就因为这原因，就要欧洛尼斯为你们「降下」一次神谕？
E: I know. The fervent ranks of those loose-tongued sophists swell by the day. So that's why you want Oronyx to "bestow" a prophecy upon you?

C: 虎克，你这是…
E: Hook! What are you...

C: 她想听你讲些新鲜的天外故事，免得留下遗憾。
E: She wants to hear your fresh stories from beyond the sky, so she won't have any regrets.

C: 童话有什么不好？你的故事里有抗争、勇气和爱，正是孩子们应该学习的品质。
E: What's wrong with fairy tales? That story contains defiance, courage, and love. Exactly the qualities children should learn.

C: 你们负责军备，前阵时间也不清闲吧？
E: You're in charge of military supplies, must've been pretty busy lately, huh?

C: 席卷半个银河的危机在你看来仍算「寻常」，果然是艺高人胆大啊。

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}嘛。来得正巧，我有一个好消息和一个坏消息，想先听哪个？

C: 好像都还近在眼前…
E: It all still feels like yesterday...

C: 米哈伊尔一向欢迎来访者。对于那些迷路的人，他总会给出指引。

C: 迷……路？
E: Lost?

C: 老师，您之前搜罗的考卷我已经全部写完了。对，连那套「银河密卷」一起，虽然计算起来有点复杂，不过我还是拿到了满分。
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, I have finished all the examination papers you collected before. Yes, even with the "Cosmos Secret Volume," although the calculation is a little complicated, I still got the highest score.

E: What do you need? If you want anything fixed, put in an application through the terminal.

C: 那你效率还挺高。
E: You're pretty efficient then.

C: 你应该也听说了吧，那个会说话的防盗门…大家对它各有看法，但是没有人关注到点子上！
E: You've heard about it too, right? The security door that talks... Everyone has an opinion on it, but no one had grasped the heart of the issue!

C: 我也没什么好说的了。
E: I don't have anything else to say.

C: 效果拔群！
E: It's so effective!

C: 真的吗？我怎么没注意到呢？
E: Really? I've never noticed it.

C: （将拍好的照片给她看）
E: (Show her the photos.)

C: 这可真是了不起的发现！有生之年，真想能亲眼欣赏一下那些美丽又野性的野生动物啊……
E: This is an outstanding find! Oh, I really want to look at those beautiful and majestic wild animals with my own eyes...

C: 本以为我俩同为名门出身，能有许多共同语言，但没想到他居然对莱姆士汀家保持着如此谬误的偏见。这个朋友，不交也罢。
E: I thought since we are both from notable households, we would have a lot in common, but I didn't expect him to have such a nasty prejudice against my family. I don't need friends like him.

C: 哦哦，燃起来了！
E: Ooh, that's a great ambition!

C: 当然是阿…不对不对，我才不能告诉你！作为鼹鼠党的首席情报官，保护线人可是我的义务！
E: It's... Uh, no, I can't tell you! As the Chief Intelligence Officer of The Moles, it is my duty to protect the informant!

C: 伊蕾恩姐姐，你还好吗？
E: Elaine, are you okay?

C: 辛苦你们啦！以后我要是遇上什么麻烦，肯定会记得找「鼹鼠党」帮忙的。
E: Thank you so much! If I encounter any problems in the future, I will definitely remember to ask The Moles for help.

C: …作气！…苦干！…不移！
E: No time... Hard work... Onward!

C: 唔，居然堆积了这么多…这帮大人到底行不行啊！
E: Oh, there's so much stuff piled up here... Can we really rely on these people?

C: 咕嘟…唔…好多了，这下好多了……
E: *glug* Umm... Good, I'm feeling better now...

C: …你别装了，我早就知道你是个乐于助人的家伙。
E: ...Come on now, you never shy away from giving people a little help.

C: 你是在挖苦我吗？我告诉你，作、作战基础一零一，场外支援也是非常重要的……
E: What's with the sarcasm? Listen here, i—it's Combat Basics <unbreak>101</unbreak>! Support off the battlefield is of equal importance...

C: 我就知道，以前没白关照你这个新兵蛋子！那、那我就回后勤单元等你的好消息了。
E: I knew I didn't waste my time taking care of the new generation of soldiers! W—Well then, I'll return to the logistics unit and wait for the good news from you.

C: 那莉拉怎么办？
E: Then how about Lila?

C: 送给一位年轻美丽的女士。
E: The flowers will be given to a beautiful girl.

C: 那我推荐您买上一株「侯爵夫人」——这是贝洛伯格最尊贵、最美丽、也是最难培育的一种花。
E: Then my recommendation would be the Marquises. They are the most exalted, beautiful, and delicate flowers in Belobog.

C: 好的，感谢你的配合。我看看…教育程度：「半文盲」。
E: Okaaaay, thanks for that. Let me see... level of education: Semi-literate.

C: <unbreak>14</unbreak>辆。
E: Fourteen.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈，别说这种话嘛，你能见到我，就说明我已经初步认可了你的能力。
E: Hahaha, don't be like that. The fact I'm even meeting with you means that I'm interested in your prowess.

C: 年轻人，有缘再见吧。
E: Until we meet again, youngster.

C: 耐心等候？亏他们说得出口！
E: Patience? You dare talk to me about patience?

C: 收下这些吧，这是你应得的。我要去…「耐心等待」了。往好处想，也许在这期间我还能研究出什么新的科学理论呢！
E: Take these, and you deserve them. I'm going to go and "exercise some patience" then. Looking on the bright side, maybe I can put this time into working on a new scientific theory!
Four.

C: 小女子以为她所钟爱的一定是名贵的花卉，因此来衬托她高贵的本质…原来如此，原来她的灵魂有着这样的渴望……
E: I thought that she'd definitely buy some precious rare flowers instead, to match her noble self... But actually, there is this craving and desire in her soul...

C: 拜托你，去机械屋问问看，塔米拉小姐平常将加热器开到多大的档位呢？
E: Please, can you go and ask at the workshop what level Tamila turns her heater up to?

C: 谢谢你，从今天开始，小女子终于可以成为另一个塔米拉了。这让小女子想起了一段很美的唱词~
E: Thank you. Starting today, I can finally become the second Tamila. This reminds me of the lyrics of a beautiful song~

C: 说说看吧。
E: Go on.

C: 你怎么还不去做义工？
E: Why haven't you gone to your volunteer work yet?

C: …倒也不必顺着我的话往下说。我知道，你是来替他求情的，对吧？
E: ...You didn't have to run with what I said. I know you're here to ask me to leave him alone, right?

C: 我来帮你行使正当权益！
E: I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!

C: 呼…不吐不快啊。全都说出来舒服多了——多谢你听我说这些有的没的。
E: Ahhh... It feels so good to say all that... Thank you for listening to me.

C: 我…可这怎么可能？什么裂界？什么回声？
E: I — But how? What Fragmentum? What echo?

C: 什么裂界？回响又是啥？{F#姐们儿}{M#哥们儿}说的我咋都听不懂呢？
E: What's a Fragmentum? What's an echo? I ain't getting whatcha trying to say.

C: 面前的男子颓丧地垂着头，又恼又恨地抽泣了起来。
E: The man before you lowers his head in defeat, and starts to sob in anger and frustration.

C: 这东西…是叫「科技护具」吗？真是叹为观止的创意……
E: Is this thing called... High-Tech Protective Gear? What an astounding idea...

C: 我…坚持不了了……
E: I... can't hold on anymore...

C: …我猜你只是在敷衍我。
E: ...You're just humoring me, aren't you?

C: …那是酒坛。
E: ...They're wine jars.

C: 海滩上空无一人。
E: There is no one to be seen on the beach.

C: 可千万别尝试「将『一个愿望』变成『三个愿望』」啊，这是我诚挚的警告，上一次这样尝试的人已经被关在瓶子里了。
E: But don't even think about making that one wish into three. I'll warn you now that the last person who tried that has already been sealed into a bottle.

C: 来实现我的愿望吧！
E: Then, please grant my wish!

C: 就是你刚刚喝的茶啊！
E: The tea you just drank, of course!

C: 算了算了，我回头再研究看看。这茶令你出现短暂失忆的副作用了，实在抱歉。
E: Whatever, I'll look into it later. I'm really sorry for the memory loss side effect it caused.

C: 来来来，且等我为你泡一杯试试。
E: Why don't you come over and give it a try?

C: 「烈焰浓茶」新品的研发，看起来只是喝杯茶的功夫，谁能想到杜老板在背后竟付出了如此艰难的牺牲，竟要以牺牲头发为代价，着实令你感叹不已。
E: Developing the new Flaming Potent Tea seemed as simple as adding some random ingredients, but you didn't realize that Boss Du was so committed that he even sacrificed his hair. You are impressed by his perseverance.

C: 抱歉刚刚走神了。
E: Sorry, I just got lost in thought.

C: 「西塔罗斯古玩店」
E: "Theodoros' Antiques"

C: 场地预订表上写着：「即将开讲——吉奥里亚与塞纳托斯是同位体的可能性与其论证」，旁边画着一只一脸疑惑的大地兽，还有一行「胡说八道」的批注。
E: Written on the venue's reservation list: "Next Lecture: The Possibility of Georios and Thanatos Being a Singular Entity and Its Argumentation". Beside it, a drawing of a dromas' doubtful face, along with a remark that reads "Balderdash."

C: 什么样的声音能扰乱军心？弥斯的手指在金键上跳跃，位置、强弱和时长各有不同，风管中仿佛有清泉涌出。
E: What kind of song could chip away at enemy morale? Misia's fingers dance across the golden keys, playing different notes at different dynamics for different lengths. The effect is like a geyser of springwater gushing out of the pipe.

C: 它不会咬人，却用另一种方式击倒了你。
E: It doesn't bite, yet it finds another way to knock you off your feet.

C: 身为传说中的「救世主」，身负那样沉重的预言，他会有怎样的压力？倘若失败，他又会面临怎样的责难？
E: Just what kind of pressure is he under, shouldering the burden of being the legendary and prophesied "Deliverer?" If he were to fail, what kind of blame would he face?

C: 历经数个琥珀纪的接力，「诸世界重建计划」于近日顺利进入第三阶段，大批来自「弁才天国」的文化遗产得到修复。
E: After several Amber Eras of relentless effort, the "Worlds Reborn Initiative" has recently successfully entered into its third phase, marked by the extensive restoration of cultural heritage from Benzaitengoku.

C: 天神从不因享乐而自惭，它乘着海浪来到人间，令水泉流过的每一颗心溢出欢喜。
E: The godly never feels guilty of enjoyment. They ride the ocean waves to humanity, and fills every heart with water, passing through with joy.

C: 口渴的人来到水边，却融化在月亮的倒影中。
E: The thirsty approach the water, only to dissolve in the moon's reflection.

C: 「全世之座」刻法勒
E: "Throne of Worlds" Kephale

C: 阿格莱雅大人，除却迫在眉睫的尼卡多利危机，还有一事。又有一座遥远的城邦失去联络了。
E: Lady Aglaea, we have another matter besides the looming threat of Nikador. We have lost contact with another distant city.

C: 看样子你这是在赶我走啊，那不聊这些远的，我还真有些事想请教——
E: I see you're trying to get rid of me. I'll change the topic. There is something that I actually wish to ask you...
Oh...

C: 日后，你可愿做王师，授其武艺、护其不受毒计迫害，待其成王，便如拱卫王欧利庞一般，用生命捍卫迈德漠斯的王冠？
E: When that time comes, would you become his mentor? Teach him martial arts, protect him from malicious plots, and give your life to protect his throne when he becomes king, as you have with King Eurypon?

C: 在我像你一样，还是个毛头小子的时候，歌耳戈曾与我共事狩猎，我亲眼目睹了她搏杀雄狮的壮景。
E: When I was a sprout like you, I hunted alongside Gorgo. With my own eyes, I saw her kill a lion with her bare hands.

C: 吾师，我且问你：我的母亲，果真是这般期许我的么？弑父夺位，继续那无休无止的征伐之路？
E: Master, let me ask you: Did my mother really have such expectations of me? Did she wish for me to commit patricide, to steal the throne, and continue this endless conquest?

C: 明白了，少主。只是，容我再多嘴一句：悬锋孤军中不乏像我这样已经将你视作新王的人，你只需一声令下，悬锋孤军便会举矛为你掷命。
E: I understand, young master. Please just allow me one final word: There are many like myself in the Kremnoan Detachment who already see you as the new King. You need only give the order, and the Kremnoan Detachment would raise their spears and give their lives for you.

C: 你记住了「曾与遐蝶交谈过」
E: You remembered "Talking with Castorice."

C: 向金丝与根系交汇间，泰坦的蝶褪悬置于此。金蝶如潮，鳞粉似流光于血液中播撒「亲族之爱」。
E: Where golden threads intertwine with roots, the Titan's exuviate rests here. Golden butterflies flow like tides, their shimmering scale dust spreading "a love between kin" through the bloodstreams they touch.

C: 圣树粗壮的枝干向四周努力伸展，即使光芒被黑暗所吞噬，它也依然保持着思考的姿态，仿佛在清醒地见证着自己的消逝。
E: The thick branches of the sacred tree stretch outwards, persisting in their posture of contemplation, as if bearing witness, with clarity, to their own vanishing.

C: 你眺望着高耸入云的圣树，叶片间闪烁着点点微光，像是天上坠落的星辰。
E: You gaze upon the towering sacred tree, its leaves twinkling like fallen stars.

C: 说说看，树种好处都有啥？
E: Tell me, what's so great about the Seed?

C: 两侧的火盆不知燃烧了多久，却始终保持着相同的高度。 真不知是雕像在守护火焰，还是火焰在守护着某个古老的预言。
E: Flanking it are braziers that burn with unwavering flames, their height unchanged no matter how long they've been alight. It's unclear whether the statue protects the flames or if the flames guard some ancient prophecy.

C: 啊？怎会如此？他瘦骨嶙峋的，刚才在桥上都差点叫风刮到山崖底下，哪有半分国王的样子？
E: Huh? How can that be? He's skin and bones! The breeze on the bridge almost blew him down into the ravine just now. They don't look anything like a king?

C: 怎么样怎么样，波塔莫斯，快告诉我们，这里头是怎样的光景？
E: Well? Tell us, tell us, Potamos! What is it like in there?

C: 询问艰深难题。
E: Ask some challenging questions.

C: 随着你的触碰，金色的流体缓缓上升。那流体仿佛有生命般舞动，在装置顶部凝聚成一团温暖的光球。
E: Golden liquid rises slowly at your touch. It moves and dances as if alive before coalescing into a warm ball of light on top of the device.

C: 可惜我只是一介衣匠，并非阿格莱雅大人本尊。若是她在这儿，估计会有更多感慨吧。
E: Pity. I am but a Garmentmaker, not Lady Aglaea herself. Were she here, she'd surely have more to say.

C: 错误…无法侦测…已经完成。
E: Error... detection failed... task complete.

C: 把地儿给我挪挪。
E: Move your bwubber, meow.

C: 是我卡了还是你卡了？
E: Am I lagging or is it you?

C: 似是感应你的注视，为首者向下探寻，直至与你的目光相遇——他脚边的大型沙漏，沙粒竟开始逆向流动——
E: Sensing your gaze, the leader of the group looks down, locking eyes with you. At his feet, the large hourglass begins to flow in reverse —

C: 熄灭圣烛。
E: Extinguish the holy candle.

C: 你沉沉睡去，你醒了过来。四周静悄悄的，只有水声荡漾——猜猜看，发生了什么？
E: You drift into a deep sleep, only to wake to an eerie silence, save for the gentle lapping of water. Guess what happened?

C: 门廊顶部的巨型圆灯投射出如日光般的光辉，如此高大的门扉，你不禁猜想，这扇门原本是为谁而设？
E: The giant circular lamp atop the porch casts a radiance akin to sunlight. Faced with such towering doors, you can't help but wonder: For whom were these gates originally designed?

C: 还会有其他商品吗？
E: Will there be more items later?

C: 这不是无名客该干的事。
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing.

C: 你不是第一次置身海底，只可惜，此时此刻， 那位与海渊源颇深的挚友不在你的身边……
E: This isn't your first time beneath the sea. It's just this time, that old friend who shared a deep bond with the sea isn't here to see it with you...

C: 在长长的墓志铭末尾——
E: At the end of the long epitaph...

C: …为什么突然说起这对臂鞲？
E: ...Why bring up these bracers all of a sudden?

C: 别忘记，我已经履行约定，退行到了无尽的长夜当中。现在我们的会面，还有我接下来要和你说的话，都是我提前留下的有关「告别」的碎片。
E: Don't forget, I've already fulfilled my promise and regressed into the eternal night. Our meeting now, and the words I'm about to share, are fragments of "farewell" that I left behind in advance.

C: 欧洛尼斯到底是怎么知道的？
E: How did Oronyx find out then?

C: 说好要把后背被交给彼此，结果兄弟本是同窝虫，大难临头各自飞——
E: We promised to have each other's backs, but in the end, some brother it is that turned out to just be fair-weather friends, and when trouble came, it abandoned me—

C: 强烈的刺激会让你放松对潜意识的防守，只有这样，我们才能复制你的记忆呀。
E: A strong stimulus will lower your guard against your subconscious. Only then will we be able to copy your memories.

C: 「流光忆庭」的人在这里？在列车上……
E: Someone from the Garden of Recollection is here? On the Express...?

C: 关于我的记忆…
E: About my memories...

C: 你可是{RUBY_B#万界之癌}星核 {RUBY_E#}的载体耶！能在那样一股力量进入身体后还好好活着，甚至使用它的力量……
E: You're a receptacle for a {RUBY_B#Cancer of All Worlds}Stellaron{RUBY_E#}! You're able to survive and even wield its power...

C: 明白。立即开始布置禁区演练的场地。
E: Got it. Setting up the venue for restricted zone drills.

C: 真的吗？可是我们没有什么东西能作为回报…即使这样您也愿意出手相助吗？
E: Really? But we don't have anything to offer in return... Would you still be willing to help out, anyway?

C: 不必多说，带路吧。
E: Say no more. Take me there now.

C: 谢谢！您已经帮了我们太多——接下来的事就交给我们吧。
E: Thanks! You've helped us out so much already, so leave the rest up to us.

C: 现在出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我知道的只有这些了。不过，我的伙伴们也跟它打过交道。
E: That's all I know. But, my buddies have also interacted with it.

C: 我们已经见过它了。
E: We've seen it before.

C: 阮•梅女士教导过我，真理越辩越明，真相亦如是。既然今天大家都在，那咱们就来辩个清楚——
E: Miss Ruan Mei taught me. The more you debate, the clearer the truth becomes. Since we are all here today, let's have a debate!

C: 咳咳，或许我在私德上有亏，但阮•梅女士委派给我的事务，我尽力做到了最好，从未欺骗过大家一丝一毫。
E: Ahem, maybe there is something wrong with my ethics, but whatever Ruan Mei assigns me, I will do my best. I have never lied to anyone.

C: （帮我开下门！）
E: (Please open the door!)

C: 佩佩高兴地望着你。
E: Peppy stares at you happily.

C: 不知道！人家正呼呼呢，一睁眼就到这儿来了。既然你也在，难道说……
E: No clue! I was deep in sleep, and the next thing I knew, I woke up here. Since you're here too, does that mean...

C: 所以睁大眼睛，一起来读书吧！我们要收集好多好多睡前故事，然后——{NICKNAME}，你来念给人家听！
E: So, let's keep our eyes peeled and dive into reading together! We need to collect tons of bedtime stories — then, {NICKNAME}, you can read them to me!

C: 有故事的地方就有迷迷，难道人家是「记忆精灵」吗？可这个称呼不够可爱……
E: Where there's a story, there's Mem. Could I be a "memory spirit"? No, that name's not cute enough...

C: 既然现在有时间…如果要和人家告别，你会说些什么呀？只是好奇！
E: Since we have time now... If you had to say goodbye to me, what would you say? Just curious!

C: 接收指令: 第<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>步，向右
E: Order Received: Step <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, Rightward

C: 别害怕，掉不下去
E: Don't worry. You won't fall.

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's get to it!

C: 你要是想暂时歇歇，我便先回授事厅里待一会儿去
E: If you want to take a break, I'll go back to the Conclave Hall for a while.

C: 你急了你急了。
E: Someone's salty.

C: 这次怎么是这种风格的？
E: What's with the style this time?

C: 我真的不错，我真的很不错。我的朋友，我想骄傲地告诉你……
E: I'm really awesome. I'm really awesome. My friend, I'd like to proudly tell you that...

C: 除了我，还有高手？
E: There's another pro besides me?

C: 呵，你就嘲笑我吧！让我闭关修炼一番，咱们下个三百年再战！
E: Haha, go ahead and mock me! I'll go into seclusion for training. Let's battle again after three hundred years!

C: 要怎样做游戏才会被抓进牢里？
E: How do you get arrested and sent to jail for developing games?

C: 请记住「枘凿六合•Remake」天下第一！我先去忙去了。
E: Just remember that "Hexanexus: Remake" is the world's number one game! I should get to work now.

C: 当然，最为稳妥的选项。我欣赏你，因为我也会选一样的路。
E: Of course, that is the optimal choice. I admire you, because I would make the same choice.

C: …我还有别的选择？
E: ...I have other choices?

C: 你触碰这棵树的根须，一只落有蝴蝶的宝箱随之显形。
E: You touch the roots of the tree, where a treasure chest upon which a butterfly had landed appears.

C: 二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。
E: The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.

C: 嗯…有位织者想要把自己锤炼得像山之民一样坚韧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铁匠的火炉上</color>锻炼耐性呢。快让它知难而退吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to be as resilient as the Mountain Dwellers. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the blacksmith's forge</color>, honing their endurance and patience. Hurry and retrieve them before they get in the way.

C: 我找到了许多若虫。
E: I have found many nymphs.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望踏上传奇的旅途。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的环形轨道上</color>，干劲满满地向前爬着。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns to embark on a legendary journey. The golden thread brings tidings: They now diligently crawl <color=#dbc291ff>along the circular track of the corridor</color>.

C: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
E: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

C: 全部熄灭了。
E: They've all been extinguished.

C: 不细心的人就该受到惩罚。交回悬锋战士的称号，从新兵开始重新练起吧喀！
E: Those who do not pay attention to detail should be punished. Return the title of Kremnos Warrior, and begin your training anew as a recruit, crrk!

C: 大庭广众之下，怎么可能有宝箱等着你去打开？正因这是元老们的财物，大家才不敢轻举妄动。我是看你要逾越公民的界限，这才及时出手制止。
E: Why would there be a chest just sitting around waiting for you to open it in a public place? No one dares to blindly interfere with it because it is the property of the elders. You were going to cross the line for a citizen, so I rushed to stop you.

C: 塔兰顿才不管这个。
E: Talanton has no interest in this.

C: 这就是上天的报应啊！
E: That's divine retribution!

C: 当搬运工吧，老巴特。
E: Be a transport worker, Old Bart.

C: 桀桀，不愧是我的老伙计。因为巴特鲁斯自己也想不清楚。
E: Hehehe, good one, old buddy. That's exactly what's going on in my mind. Nada.

C: 桀桀桀，你的身手果然越来越好啦！能有你这样的侠义之士保护着翁法罗斯，我巴特鲁斯就算是香消玉殒…咳咳，咱这是在胡说些什么啊。
E: Hehehe, your skills have gotten impressive! With a valiant hero like you protecting Amphoreus, I, Bartholos, can rest in peace... Ahem, what nonsense am I spouting?

C: 不过是不是漏了什么？
E: But isn't something missing here?

C: …啧，可恶，说漏嘴了。没办法，那就休怪咱无情无义——
E: Tsk, curses, I blurted it out. Well then, don't blame me for what follows—

C: 最好真的是惊天秘密。
E: It better be actually world-shaking.

C: 现在你总算和我搭话了……桀桀桀，巴特鲁斯决定了，今天不是你被我踩扁，就是我被你踩扁！总之得有人陪我玩才行！
E: But now, at long last, you speak to me... Hehehe, that settles it! Either you squash me, or I squash you! One way or another, someone's playing with me today!

C: 咳咳咳咳，这下咱俩能说上话了。什么？你说为什么不直接搭话？发生了这么多事情，还有人真的在意路边的一串紫葡萄？
E: Ahem ahem, now we can finally talk. What? Why didn't I say anything earlier? After everything that's happened, who would care about a bunch of purple grapes on the roadside?

C: 「——给你的老伙计留一个踩着七彩祥云来救你的机会吧，桀桀。」
E: "Do give your old pal a chance to swoop in and save the day like a hero does, heheh."
...Shh!

C: 是有点…不知该怎么形容。
E: It's a little... How should I put it?

C: （无奈地耸耸肩膀。）
E: *shrugs in resignation*

C: 哎呀，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！这下可巧了，正好正好，我的老师、还有老师的老师，都和你介绍一下！
E: Ah, isn't this {NICKNAME}! What a coincidence! Perfect timing — let me introduce you to my teacher and my teacher's teacher!

C: ——阁下，我能否借「头」一用？
E: — Excuse me, may I borrow a "head"?

C: 只有「枕头」可以吗？
E: Will a pinhead do the work?

C: 《于长夜重返大地》
E: Back to Earth in Evernight

C: …我的未来在哪？
E: ...Where is my future?

C: 这…也是舞台装置做到的？
E: Is this... also part of the stage mechanism?

C: 要是你感兴趣，就自己去摸索摸索吧。
E: If you're interested, explore it yourself.

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 你真没事？感觉不大对劲…
E: You sure you're okay? You don't seem like yourself...

C: 难道出货了？！
E: Did we pull the jackpot!?

C: 声音没有回答。
E: The voice does not answer.

C: 机巧也好、血肉也罢…都不过是有形之物。只要姑娘不介意我用的手段……
E: Be it mechanical or organic, we're still dealing with composite substances. I just hope you'll tolerate my methods...

C: 你、你是怎么做到的——这根本不是医术吧！
E: H—How... What kind of "medical knowledge" is this!?

C: 它会读取我的思想？
E: Does it read my thoughts?

C: 总之，这是一次筹划已久的版本升级：更长的流程，更多的内容，更好的奖励，以及更诡异的难度曲线——所以做好准备，再回到「模拟宇宙」beta测试去吧。
E: Overall, this is a long-scheduled version update with longer gameplay, more content, better rewards, and a more bizarre difficulty curve — so get ready and prepare to get back into the Simulated Universe beta test!

C: 「呃，就是这么单调。」男人的声音说，他似乎是真的很抱歉。
E: "Uh, yeah, that's how monotonous." The man says as if he is genuinely sorry.

C: 好啊，你玩了就知道。
E: Alright. You'll find out soon enough.

C: 听说难度会高一点，敌人也会变得更强。螺丝咕姆说按照他的模型，你有<unbreak>60%</unbreak>的可能性在首次挑战时输掉，不过反正没啥损失。
E: Apparently it's more difficult with stronger enemies. Screwllum said that, according to his model, you have a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> chance of losing the first time, but it's not like you'll actually lose anything.

C: 怪声音…但浮黎在哪里？细碎的声音被海潮声掩盖，你突然发现自己置身在海洋中！这是一片红色的海洋……
E: The odd sounds... Where is Fuli? As the delicate and intermittent sounds are drowned out by the sound of waves, you find yourself in the middle of the ocean! It is a sea of red...

C: 虫潮自不知名的洋流小岛涌现，汹涌地席卷宇宙：它们的行军路线掠过一片又一片星系，很快…一切都被啃噬干净。那些虫群席卷了无数的大地，直到连人的尸骸也被吃得空空荡荡。
E: The Swarm, emerging from an uncharted islet, ravages through the Cosmos, turning numerous star systems into barren wastelands... Soon, everything is devoured. The Swarm consumes countless worlds until not even the corpses of their victims remain.

C: 这只「血罪灵」像是烟雾般不断变化、翻转着；最终，它的形象固定下来：一只佝偻着背的「血罪灵」在你面前萦绕…香味与血腥味扑面而来。
E: As a Sin Thirster shifts and transforms like smoke, it eventually takes on a hunched human-like form. When it lingers near you, you detect both an alluring fragrance and the scent of blood.

C: 你克制住摘下她*面罩*的欲望！忆泡里没有记录这些。
E: You resist the urge to remove her *mask*! This is not recorded in the Memory Bubble.

C: 可那真的是阿哈的神启吗？你无从得知，很可能并不是；但阿哈却在后来承认了这点，并给出数十种帮助众神的方法！假面愚者立即开始行动，他们偷走悲悼伶人的贡多拉，并不小心带走了一批藏在船底的无名客。远航的路途并不顺利，内斗不断：你们对路径一一排查，为不被阿哈愚弄费尽心机——意识到的时候，船上已塞满了各个世界，各个派系的热心人，而愚者们却不见了。
E: But was that truly a divine revelation from Aha? You had no way of confirming it and found it highly suspect, even though Aha admitted to it later and claimed that he had provided numerous ways in which the Masked Fools could help Aeons. Urged by Aha, the Masked Fools stole the Mourning Actors' gondola and accidentally took a group of the Nameless who were staying at the bottom deck along with them. The journey was full of twists and turns. You checked every possible path to protect yourself from Aha's lies. Before you realized it, the gondola was packed with an eager motley of passengers from all worlds and factions, but the Masked Fools were nowhere to be found.

C: 然后你们在这里等了很久很久，直到确信——你们的确没来错地方，但这不妨碍阿哈还是有办法骗到所有人。
E: And then, you wait for what seems an eternity, only to realize that even though you have arrived at the correct place, Aha has still found a way to deceive you all.

C: 插曲结束后，你们又恢复了不停拉扯的日常。直到你们因撞见蛰虫的翅粉陷入谵妄，在混乱中，一位无名客不小心翻了个跟头，意外摁下了前往伊莱狄希纳星域的按钮。
E: After the end of that intermission, you all resume your daily antics. That is, until you all get caught in a miasma of Insect wing powder and plunge into a state of delirium. In the ensuing chaos, a Nameless accidentally trips, does a full somersault, and hits the button that sends you all to the Elydichna Starzone.

C: 当这一切结束后，天外合唱班的歌声中突然出现了一重不协和音程：据说那是「秩序」与「终末」的擦肩而过。
E: When all this ends, a dissonant interval is suddenly heard in the Beyond the Sky Choir's singing: It is said that this is when Order and Finality brush past each other.

C: 这是谁？
E: Who's this?

C: 「在古琥珀纪中的某个时刻，噢！那真是一个不起眼的时刻。捕食者、被捕食者，猎手、猎物，被捉弄者与捉弄者…千星寰宇、物种百态、战争兵器与那罄竹难书的罪，全都在命运偶然的交合处爆发！——凡人压根无从得知，在那样万千族群诞育的瞬间，塔伊兹育罗斯于孤独与仇恨中飞升成神。」
E: "At some point in the ancient Amber Era, oof! It was an absolutely uneventful time. Predators and prey, the hunters and hunted, the tricked and the tricksters... myriads of stars and organisms, weapons of war and countless sins, all came together at once and exploded at a fortuitous point in fate! Mortals had no way of knowing that Tayzzyronth ascended as a god in its loneliness and hatred in that split moment when endless species were born."

C: 边星贸易战争•其一
E: Borderstar Trade War (I)

C: 斯蒂芬、阮•梅和螺丝咕姆刚刚也*死*过？
E: Stephen, Ruan Mei, and Screwllum also just *died*?

C: 你知道在那亘古的沉眠之后，发生了很多故事；一切围绕着铸铁的王座开始。你没有什么想法，也未得到解惑，只能继续向前，探寻自己的脚步何时结束。
E: You know that many things took place after the slumber, and it all started with the cast iron throne. Without gaining any new insights and having your questions answered, you have no choice but to keep going, wondering when to stop.

C: 它——帝皇鲁珀特。你抬头仰望它…庞然巨物，你只在它的脚踝附近，但悲伤的、刺骨的寒气让你无法靠近。在冷冽的雾霭中，金属绽放着战火也无从掩盖的光辉。你与它对视——
E: Here it is, Rubert the emperor. You look up at the gargantuan figure, whose ankle is nearby. Yet, its melancholic and biting cold aura prevents you from coming any closer. Amid the frigid mist, the metal emits a glow that cannot be obscured even by war. You look into its eyes...

C: 就是现在，又一次，一如既往。她将猎物绑在椅子上，亲吻它的额头，同时将刀刃刺入腹中。
E: And now, once again, as always. She binds the prey to a chair, kisses its forehead, while sinking the blade into its abdomen.

C: 极致无机：「宇宙王座」•其一
E: Supreme Inorganic: Universe's Throne (I)

C: 一缕香炉的烟雾散去，香槟与杯盏止于半空。人们沉默，会场中只留下方才冰冷的宣判。
E: As a wisp of smoke from the incense burner disperses, glasses of champagne freeze in midair. Everyone falls silent, and the only thing left in the ballroom is the recent icy judgment.

C: 再见了，战友。
E: Farewell, comrade.

C: 声音被破碎的咽喉吞没，你什么也没能说出口。值得庆幸的是，这应该是你失去的最后一样东西，你已经不再会因此感到痛苦或是悲戚。就像是重新回到了母亲的腹中，渐渐褪去四肢，萎缩回胚胎，化作一个细胞。
E: Your voice is swallowed up by your broken throat, and you cannot say a thing. Luckily, this should be the final thing that you ever lose, and you will never again feel any pain or sadness because of it. Things are just like returning to the womb, as you gradually lose your limbs and shrink back into an embryo, converging into a single cell.

C: 廉价垃圾！
E: Cheap trash!

C: 你蹲下身仔细检查了一番，这一枪，终于是打结实了。
E: You squat down to give thing a careful examination. This shot finally got you some results.

C: 你探出腹部的发光器，辐射将云卷中的水滴蒸发，它们上浮，又在遇冷后凝聚，化作大雨落下。
E: You stick out the shining device on your belly, and the radiation evaporates all the water droplets inside the cloud. They float up, condensing as they hit cold air before falling down as heavy rain.

C: 当你看到那从街角开始蔓延的火焰逐渐失去控制时，你知道你的夙愿将要实现了——一场完美谋杀。你的仇人此刻就在那个街角的宾馆午睡，你用望远镜观察了他葬身火场的全程。你燥热难耐，浑身是汗。
E: As you see the flames that spread from the street corner beginning to lose control, you know that your wish is about to be realized... A perfect assassination. Your nemesis is currently taking a nap in the inn on the corner. Using your binoculars, you watch the entire process as he burns to his death. Your body grows hot and you start to sweat.

C: 「克丝黛拉，你是这些年唯一一个对学派核心研究精神提出质疑的人。你为什么认为自己能够代表年轻学者？」一位白须苍髯的学者说。
E: "Chrystella, you are the only person to express doubt in the core research spirit of our school in many years. What makes you think that you can speak on behalf of young scholars within our school?" Retorts a salt-and-pepper-bearded old man.

C: 「虽然我们不能直接观测星神，但祂们对宇宙造成了深远影响，各个文明都有相关纪录……」你必须夺回课堂的主导权。
E: "Although we cannot directly observe Aeons, THEY have had a profound influence on the entire universe. Every civilization has their own records regarding THEM..." You must take back control of the classroom.

C: 「无需道歉。相比那些假装聆听的人，你的反馈至少是真实的，而真实恰恰是真理的前置条件。」
E: "No need to apologize. At least your feedback is honest, unlike all those people that just pretended to listen. Honesty just so happens to be a prerequisite for truth."

C: 数十台被集中至同一片星域的「权杖」，冰冷的电子管线将它们的演算系统连接。但机械巨构回应的，唯有沉默。
E: Dozens of Scepters are gathered in the same star quadrant, with frigid electrical cables interconnecting their extrapolation systems. However, the mechanical megastructure only responds with silence.

C: 无智慧的细胞，杀戮的兵器，能够在一微秒内湮灭整个恒星系的帝皇之剑。
E: Cells without sentience, weapons of massacre... The Emperor's sword that can annihilate a whole galaxy in a nanosecond.

C: 死亡率判定为——<unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％。
E: Death probability calculated as — <unbreak>99.99</unbreak>％.

C: 一道孤波。
E: A solitary wave.

C: 工具不配替帝皇思考。
E: Tools are not worthy to replace the Emperor's thought.

C: 修正表述：是黑塔女士的目标。黑塔女士一直希望能拓宽宇宙的知识总量。而她个人的研究，起于「学派战争」时代留下的{RUBY_B#孤波算法}一道难题{RUBY_E#}。
E: Rectified statement: It is Madam Herta's objective. Madam Herta has always hoped to amplify the total knowledge throughout the universe. As for her personal research, it originates from {RUBY_B#solitary waves theory}a conundrum{RUBY_E#} left over from the era of the "Scholars' Strife."

C: 黑塔无视你和螺丝咕姆，将目光重新放到眼前的数据流上。你们很快意识到，她并非被困在了「不可知域」，只是——单纯忘了出来。
E: Herta ignores you and Screwllum and casts her gaze back towards the data flow before her. Quickly, you realize that it is not that she is trapped in the Unknowable Domain. She simply... forgot to come back.

C: 把已知的知识比作圆圈，知识越多，圆圈越大，圆圈外的未知也越多。评价：非常巧妙的比喻。
E: Comparing one's own knowledge to a circle, the greater your knowledge, the larger your circle, and the more unknowns lay outside your circle. Appraisal: A very astute metaphor.

C: 好酷的出场！
E: What a cool entrance!

C: 终于等到你了。
E: You're finally here.

C: 这是推卸责任！
E: This is just irresponsible!

C: 你俩要不关心关心我？
E: Can the both of you show me some concern?

C: 「『权杖』…全完了！我还没像帕提维娅那样…提出我的问题啊！」她在狂风中跺脚。
E: "The Scepters... It's all over! I haven't even gotten the chance to ask my question... like Patavia did!" She stomps her foot in rage.

C: 没有死亡。
E: There is no death.

C: 一场突兀的宴会，扎入体内的针管，拘束的枷锁和实验舱壁。倘若早知道，在老人面前展示祂的赐福，会被幕布后的诸位「邀请」至此，你是否会做出相同的选择。
E: An impromptu gathering, a needle that shoots into your skin, chain restraints, and the experiment pod walls. If you had known sooner that showing THEIR blessings to the elder would have won you an "invitation" here from the people behind the curtain, would you have made the same choice?

C: 不过另一种观点也不是空穴来风。你应该看到了，在一小段数据中，东方启行出现在「寂静领主」的对面。这两人产生过接触，具体关系不明。
E: However, the other version isn't totally baseless. You must have seen that Dongfang Qixing appeared opposite the Lord of Silence in a small section of the data. The two have come into contact before, but their relationship was unknown.

C: 「毫不意外，斯蒂芬把捅的篓子丢给我了。」黑塔叉腰，「他说『变强』是游戏中的永恒乐趣之一…你看着办吧。」
E: "As expected, Stephen chucked his problems to me." Herta puts her hand on her hips. "He said 'growing strong' is one of the eternal joys in gaming... just do whatever you think will work."

C: 你从未见过如此富丽堂皇的图书馆，它没有屋顶，被笼罩在无垠的星夜穹顶之下。
E: You have never seen a library as opulent as this. Without a roof, it is enveloped by the boundless, starry sky.

C: 「黑塔邀请我参与这个项目，培育宇宙。」她摇头。「我和她可不一样。虽然在很多地方，我和黑塔很像是知己…但总的来说，我们没什么交情。」
E: "Herta invited me to participate in this project and nurture the universe." She shakes her head. "I'm different from her. Although we appear like the best of friends in many aspects... the truth is, we aren't that close with each other."

C: 所有顾客都沉浸在超声鱼波的脑筋膜按摩之中。你一口吞下盘子里的*鱼眼*，感受社会性梦境袭来——庇尔波因特星球迎来黎明发展期，天空中定期会下星际货币雨，你手握公司发售的债券，幸福正在增值。
E: While the other customers are enjoying the piscatorial ultrasonic wave cerebral fascia massage, you stuff a fish eye into your mouth and plunge into a social dreamland. Pier Point is seeing a period of development during which the galactic currency will be raining down regularly from the sky. You are thrilled, as you own the IPC's bonds.

C: 你得到了一杯鸡尾酒！你「咕嘟咕嘟」地喝了下去…睡意席卷了你。
E: You receive a glass of cocktail! You gulp it down... Soon, a wave of lethargy hits you.

C: 他叹着气离开了。
E: He leaves with a sigh.

C: 这里的一切装饰都昂贵而夺目…你来到了柜台前。
E: Every piece of ornament here is posh and dazzling... You walk up to the counter.

C: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
E: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

C: 你抹去了符纸上的血液，上面写着：安慰。你十分失望……
E: You wipe the blood off the talisman on which it reads: "Consolation." You are very disappointed...

C: 这个隐藏关卡将使你怀疑人生！
E: This hidden stage will make you question your life choices!

C: 金属伟大，金属神圣，超越有机，不再为人。
E: Metal is great. Metal is divine. Metal will surpass the organics and humans will be no more.

C: 自暴自弃，选择了最诡异的。
E: You decided to throw yourself to the wolves and order the strangest thing on the menu.

C: 一入钓鱼深似海，想想你空空如也的钱包，顿时就没那么想抛竿了。
E: The gateway to fishing opens into an abyss. The mere thought of your empty purse abruptly stops your cast midway.

C: 不过，来都来了，不再看看还有哪些人在扭蛋里吗？
E: But, since you're already here, might as well see who else is in those capsules?

C: 「品味不错，朋友。」愚者大笑，「黄金熔铸的面具，贸易中转星域塔列，如果你读过银河经济史，就应该认识他，拍卖了塔列<unbreak>12</unbreak>％的重力，和<unbreak>51</unbreak>％强互作用力，嗝。」
E: "Your tastes ain't bad, friend." The Fool roars in laughter. "A mask cast from gold. The commercial logistic hub, stellar region Tarle. You should know him if you've read Cosmic economic history. He auctioned off <unbreak>12%</unbreak> of Tarle's gravity and <unbreak>51%</unbreak> of its strong nuclear force *hiccup*."

C: 你的膝盖中了名为金钱的一箭。
E: Your knee is hit by an arrow called wealth.

C: 安享此刻，才能迎接明日。
E: Only by cherishing this moment can one embrace tomorrow.

C: 不必在意他们，你会遇见一只蝴蝶，塞纳托斯派出的信使，为你指引冥界的方向。
E: Ignore them, and you will encounter a butterfly, the messenger of Thanatos, guiding you toward the nether realm.

C: 死亡将生命的绳结交予雅努斯，重新与现实连接。而灵魂便沿着丝线，一无所有地抵达来生。
E: Death hands the life knot back to Janus, reconnecting it with reality. Souls then travel these threads, arriving empty-handed in the afterlife.

C: 「小猫咪乖乖，再闹我就把你门牙打掉！」巨狮眨了眨十只眼睛，一脸不可置信，但是很快它变得更加暴怒，张开血盆大口扑向你。
E: "Listen up, kitty — keep acting up, and I'll knock your front teeth out!" The giant lion freezes, its ten eyes blinking in sheer disbelief. Then, its shock twists into unrelenting fury. With a deafening roar, it lunges straight for you, jaws unhinging.

C: 「是变形种，我们不少兄弟都被骗了，你得小心。」驻场警官把详细情报通过脑机绳传给了你，突然你感到脑子一阵剧痛。
E: "It's a shapeshifter. It's already tricked a few of our officers — stay alert." The on-site officer sends a data packet straight to your neural link. The next thing you know, a stabbing pain rips through your skull.

C: 你当然听说过天舟的惨剧，但你笃定过于明目张胆才是失败的原因。你睿智地选择了飞行器小型化的技术路线，甚至开创性地用棉花糖把自己伪装成一团云彩。
E: The tragedy of the skyship is no secret, but you're convinced its downfall came from being too conspicuous. With that in mind, you took the smarter route — miniaturization. And for an extra touch of brilliance, you used cotton candy to disguise yourself as a drifting puff of clouds.

C: 尼卡多利也吃瘪了。
E: Even Nikador was humbled.

C: 人只是习惯了依赖泰坦。
E: Humans are simply accustomed to relying on the Titans.

C: 扎格列斯这次闯大祸了。
E: Zagreus's is in big trouble this time.

C: 「鲜花无法永远盛开，终将凋谢而化作尘泥；巨树不可矗立不倒，必会腐朽并沦为枯木。」
E: "Fresh flowers cannot bloom eternal, and eventually they will wilt and become dust and ash. Giant trees cannot stand eternal, and eventually they will decay and become withered woods."

C: 黝黑的珍珠，如深沉的陪伴。
E: A black pearl, as if a profound companion.

C: 折磨人这块，神是专业的。
E: The divine are experts at torturing people.

C: 第二次，这位首领在岸边挖出沟壑，希望能以此阻拦海浪的前进，但法吉娜的力量将深沟填满，再度冲上海滩。
E: The second time, the leader carved deep trenches along the shore, hoping to halt the advance of the waves. But Phagousa's power filled the ravines and surged onto the beach once more.

C: 法吉娜受了恭维，又听这话颇为巧妙，顿时心满意足。
E: Phagousa, pleased by the flattery and amused by the clever words, was instantly satisfied.

C: 直至后世，人子诞生，他们亦将延续刻法勒的喜恶，于白昼劳作，于夜晚歇息。
E: And so, in the ages to come, when humankind was born, they too would inherit Kephale's nature — working beneath the sun and resting beneath the stars.

C: 生命在海洋里。
E: Life is in the ocean.

C: 古老的歌谣口口相传，讲述那遥远的过去，巨人刻法勒的使命。
E: Ancient songs passed down through generations tell of that distant past — the mission of the giant Kephale.

C: 日落而息。
E: Rest at night.

C: 还真是两头不得罪。
E: That's really tactful.

C: 天谴之矛真不是盖的。
E: The Lance of Fury is really something.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: （将光锥放回柜子里）
E: (Return the light cone to the cabinet)

C: 正确的、中肯的、明智的、客观的、立体的、一针见血的！
E: Correct, impartial, wise, objective, 3-dimensional, and to the point!

C: 「飞天纸鹤」内藏玄机。
E: The mystery contained in the Flying Paper Crane.

C: （沉默不语）
E: (Silence)

C: 空间站真是鱼龙混杂，你知道前阵子保卫科抓住了一个企图修改程序语法的谜语人吗？
E: This space station really is a mixed bag. Did you know the security team caught a Riddler trying to edit the system syntax?

C: 《星神之下：作为意志与表象的低维世界》说的是我们处在一个低维世界里，感应星神的存在时，可能遇到的是一种更高维度的投影。
E: Beneath the Aeons: The Low-Dimensional World As A Will and A Surface Phenomenon talks about us living in a low-dimensional world, and the Aeons we sense are simply projections from a higher dimension.

C: 行，签了协议，我的忆泡随你玩吧！只要别让流光忆庭的人看见就没问题，其实我觉得看见了也多半没事……
E: Now that you have signed the agreement, you can do anything you like with my Memory Bubbles. Just make sure you are out of the sight of entities from the Garden of Recollection. In fact, I don't think there will be any trouble even if they catch you...

C: 真忙啊，卢卡小哥！
E: Busy times, huh, Luka!

C: 哈哈哈，这可是秘密！还是赛场上见真章吧！
E: Hahaha, well, that's a secret! You'll have to wait and see.

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 你感觉自己的脑机温度急剧上升。你拼命转动义眼，左看右看，发现四周根本没人——那第十九个是谁？难道你已经暴露了吗？附近有没有巡警？或者……
E: You can feel a sharp rise in the temperature of your brain computer. You roll your prosthetic eye around to check your surroundings, but there is no one around you. Who is the <unbreak>19</unbreak>th? Have you been caught? Is there a police patrolling nearby? Or...

C: 想到这里，你欣快地钻入那氢与氦团聚而成的粘稠大气，开始寻找该从何处下口——要先尝尝炽热的熔融岩核吗？还是冰爽的氨云？你简直要挑花眼了……
E: With this in mind, you happily burrow into the viscous atmosphere made of hydrogen and helium. You start looking for a place to begin your meal. Do you want to taste the scorching molten core first? Or the cool clouds of ammonia? It's a buffet of planetary proportions...

C: 你怜爱地揉了揉大概是它头顶的部分。这稍微令你感到宽慰，就像平时那样…如果没有它，你早就受不了这严酷的施工环境和一成不变的工作生活了。
E: You lovingly rub what you assume is most likely its head. Like always, this brings you a bit of comfort. If you didn't have this little pet, you wouldn't be able to stand the harsh construction environment and the monotony of work and life.

C: 泥土味苦，但我甜——多吃甜食有利健康嗡~
E: Mud tastes bitter, but I am sweet... Eating sweet things is good for your health~

C: ——你已经做好决定了，没人能说服你改变想法。挥镐吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: You've made your choice. No one is going to change your mind. Get that pickax moving, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这样真的好吗？这磐岩镇上居然还有这种大善人，实在有点让人难以置信啊……
E: Is that really OK? Who knew that Boulder Town still has such saintly souls?

C: 磐岩镇名吃，炸岩居蟹！
E: Boulder Town's famous dish, Deep-fried Rock Crab!

C: 多谢惠顾，伙计！
E: Thanks for your business, pal!

C: 我想说什么，你心里清楚！
E: You already know what I was going to say!

C: 总之，你先拿给她看看吧，不满意的话就来找我——我随时都有空！
E: Anyway, get that picture to her. If she isn't satisfied, then come back. I'm free anytime!

C: 唉，我和其他虫都聊不来喀。只有你，我的朋友，愿意倾听我的诉说……
E: *sigh* I can't really talk to other bugs. Only you, my friend, are willing to hear me out...

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 喀喀——看到这些堆叠的石料了吗？它们都是重要的物资，必须好好清点喀。
E: Crrk crrk — See that stack of rocks over there? They're all really important materials and need to be carefully counted.

C: 这个柱子…为什么它不会被奇迹影响？为什么它没法被修好喀？
E: This pillar here... Why hasn't it been impacted by the miracle? Why can't it be fixed up?

C: ——至少那不会弄脏你的衣服。
E: At least you won't get your clothes dirty.

C: 伟大的{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！神秘的化身、永夜的星芒！只消看您这一眼，我此生便无憾了喀！
E: O mighty {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}! The incarnation of enigmas, starlight of eternal night! One glimpse of you fulfills my existence, crrk!

C: 你继续说。
E: Go on.

C: 要是哪天刻法勒的火种被人偷走了，元老院还像群鸵鸟一样后知后觉，我也完全不意外。
E: If one day the flame of Kephale is stolen, and the Council of Elders remains oblivious like a bunch of ostriches, I wouldn't be surprised at all.

C: 黑潮来势汹涌，家人们都被冲散了，不知何时才能再度相见……
E: The black tide came crashing in, scattering my family far and wide. Who knows when we'll see each other again...

C: 但你一定有那样的时刻，在你的童年时光，在旅途中，或者只是再普通不过的一瞬间，某一句话、某一道风景、某一个笑颜，让你觉得自己依然能够活下去。
E: But there must have been a moment — whether in your childhood, during your travels, or just an ordinary instant — when a word, a scene, or a smile made you feel like you could keep going.

C: 驾，飞天坛递！
E: Giddy-up, Flying Amphora!

C: 还挺好理解的吧？
E: Pretty understandable, right?

C: 你应该离开，除非你相信自己是一个破局之人……
E: You should leave, unless you believe you're different...

C: 不知道是谁给堆在这里了，反正和我没有什么关系。
E: I'm not sure who stacked them all here, but it has nothing to do with me.

C: 机巧鸟！快醒醒！
E: Cycrane! Wake up!

C: 注意看，眼前的这个男孩叫小帅，这个女孩叫小美。<color=#dbc291ff>他们俩各自负责在<unbreak>10</unbreak>个花盆里种花。</color>
E: There is a boy called Little Johnny, and a girl called Little Susie. <color=#dbc291ff>They have each been tasked with planting flowers in ten pots.</color>

C: 我真的吃不下了…
E: I really can't eat anymore...

C: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
E: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

C: 哟，这位客官！「优惠」倒没有，我们已经是罗浮最低价啦，不能更优惠了。可说到活动……
E: Hey, dear customer! There are no "discounts" here. We already have the lowest prices in all of the Luofu. We can't discount things any further. But speaking of events...

C: 别急，我必须先瞧瞧你和雷力能不能合拍。麻烦你们两位一起过来一下。
E: No worries. Let me see if you and Leili are compatible. Please step over here.

C: 不，你不能。如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>——这件事太危险了，容不得讨价还价。
E: No, you can't. If you insist on doing it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. This is too dangerous. There's no wiggling room.

C: 好吧，那就给你。
E: Fine, here, take them.

C: 你将疑似装有「小型中子辐射炸弹」的包裹沉进了波月古海……
E: You sink the parcel likely containing the mini-neutron bomb into the Lunarescent Depths...

C: 谢谢你，青镞。
E: Thank you, Qingzu.

C: 肯定炸不了，不信我演示给你看——
E: It won't. I can demonstrate for you—

C: 什么？原来他在另一边？我就说怎么没见到他……
E: What? He's on the other side? I was wondering why I didn't see him...

C: 导演用于监控拍摄现场的闭路电视，可惜这里没有导演，也没有演员。
E: A closed-circuit monitor is used by the director to keep an eye on-set. Unfortunately, there is no director here — nor any actors.

C: 井盖下的热气升腾而起，迅如雷电，像是追逐着什么，笔直地向更高处散去。
E: The hot steam from under the manhole cover bursts upwards like lightning, as if it is chasing something, before dissipating straight up into the heavens.

C: 上有钟表小子。
E: Clockie is up above.

C: 该是我们的，总有一天会让他们加倍奉还。
E: One day, we'll have them pay back everything that belongs to us... Twofold!

C: 已经荒废的列车轨道，梦境的仁慈让它得以逃脱杂草丛生的命运。
E: An abandoned railway — the Dreamscape's magnanimity has allowed it to escape the fate of being invaded by overgrowth.

C: 在久远的过去，筑梦师们常常聚集在这里，无数曼妙的想法自谈笑间呱呱坠地。
E: In the distant past, the Dreamweavers used to gather here, myriad wondrous ideas conjured among cascades of jovial banter.

C: 听完，听完再去。
E: Let's finish listening before we leave.

C: 法吉娜就会祝福你。
E: And Phagousa shall bless you.

C: 我可以免票吗？
E: Do I have to pay to enter?

C: 悬锋人从不欠人情。
E: Kremnoans never leave debts of gratitude unpaid.

C: 便注定要在人世间灭亡。
E: One must inevitably perish in the mortal realm.

C: 之前和丹恒乘客他们说过的呀，仙舟「罗浮」上有不少有好吃好喝的东西呢！你们答应过我要带一些回来——
E: I told Dan Heng and them before that the Xianzhou Luofu has so many delicious snacks! You all promised to bring me back something...

C: 帕姆对这个什么奶特别满意！
E: I really like this puffy-whatsit milk!

C: 总…总之就是！看到{NICKNAME}乘客的进步和成长，我很开心！
E: A—Anyway! It's great to see your continued growth, {NICKNAME}!

C: 唔，听起来好像不错。
E: Ooh, that sounds good.

C: 得赶在其他乘客看到列车长如此失态模样之前，找到纽扣才行！拜托你了{NICKNAME}乘客！
E: Pom-Pom has to find that button before any other passengers see me like this! Please, {NICKNAME}, help Pom-Pom find it!

C: 这是帕姆最宝贝的绿植，哪怕叶片的颜色稍微黯淡一些，它都能快速察觉。
E: This is Pom-Pom's most prized plant. They'll notice even if one leaf is ever-so-slightly darker.

C: 怎么检查，用鼻子嗅吗？
E: How do you check things? Some kind of sniff test?

C: 我是咸口…
E: I prefer salty food...

C: 我看你像落枕啊…哎算了算了，反正也不是大事。你就回去热敷一下，吃点止痛药一下，或者按摩一下啥的，总之避免二次受累拉伤就行。
E: Sounds like you're suffering from a stiff neck... Well, it isn't a big deal. Just apply a warm compress on your neck, take some painkillers, or massage your neck. Anyway, just avoid straining or spraining the muscles again.

C: 阿兰！
E: Arlan!

C: 变得更加圆润可爱了。
E: You look rounder and more adorable.

C: 诶，帕姆想要小机器人吗？啊，我上次的确说过这事……
E: Oh, they do? Ah, I did mention the robots to them that last time...

C: 哎…看来是帕姆的运气不太好……
E: *sigh* It seems that Pom-Pom doesn't have the best luck...

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你也是来听歌的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you also here to listen to music?

C: 留声机是用碟片的，想听什么你自己找不就好了。
E: The Phonograph uses discs. Just find the disc of the song you want to hear.

C: 列车长在这儿干什么呢？
E: What are you doing here, conductor?

C: 嗯，帕姆看得出来，擦拭长枪时，他的眼神里除了警觉外，还有一丝怀念。
E: Hmm, Pom-Pom can tell that when he polishes his spear, there isn't just alertness in his eyes, but a glint of longing, too.

C: （成功了。）
E: (Got it.)

C: 没错，正是在下！
E: That's right! That's me!

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 开始吧，{NICKNAME}教官！战斗真是让人热血澎湃！
E: Let's begin, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}! Combat really gets the blood flowing!

C: 我能帮得上忙吗？
E: Can I help?

C: 细心的你在漆皮有些剥落的转轮键盘电话机边发现了一张小卡片。「正当权益会社」，后附了一串数字——大概是电话号码，你想。
E: You spot a small card next to the rotary dial telephone with peeling paint. It reads "The Rightful Rights Society" followed by what you think is a phone number.

C: 玛丽，快说台词！
E: Say your line, Mary!

C: 不得不说，高手总是滴水不漏的。所以，你准备出什么？
E: Gotta say, aces are airtight for a reason. So, what's your move?

C: 哈，这个想法可真是太邪恶了——但崇高道德似乎对此表示并不在意……
E: How evil! But the higher powers don't seem bothered by it...

C: 你基本上能够确认这位正与你面面相觑的男子是谁了。如果你将画像带回列车交给那人过目，他恐怕会露出与画中完全一致的表情。
E: You can basically confirm who this guy looking down at you is. If you take the poster back to the train and show it to that person, he'll probably show exactly the same expression as is in the poster.

C: 在你眼前的是一个近乎等身的球型仪器。从它布满灰尘的状态可以看出，已经很久没有人用手转动过它了。
E: In front of you is a spherical device that is almost as tall as a person. The amount of dust on it suggests it has not been used for a while.

C: 这下糟了——她一定是早就发现你在这里鬼鬼祟祟，出于情面才没有立即制止你。怪不得你总觉得附近有道凌厉的目光呢……
E: This is bad — she must have found out you were snooping around here ages ago, but didn't stop you because she cared. No wonder you always feel as though a burning gaze is affixed upon you...

C: …等下，你认真的？这可是在广场上，大庭广众众目睽睽之下…退一万步说，就算没有人看见，它可是公共设施啊！这么做你的良心不会痛吗？
E: ...Hang on, are you serious? This is the plaza, in full view of the public... Take one big step back here: Even if nobody saw you, it's a public amenity! Wouldn't your conscience prevent you from doing this?

C: 这可不是白给的…
E: It comes with strings attached...

C: 即将正式进入学习环节。您准备好了吗？
E: Initiating learning phase: Are you ready?

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 你见惯了云骑军手执阵刀的威风模样，便有样学样擎住刀柄，信手一挥。
E: You've seen enough Cloud Knights brandishing their Devastator Glaives around, so you hold the handle and swing it around with ease.

C: 啥？
E: Wuh?

C: …什么意思？
E: ...What do you mean?

C: 既然如此…我正好有一事相求。有些东西在你身上是蜕去俗骨的阻碍，却恰好能为我所用。
E: In this case... I actually have a request. There're some things on you that's preventing you from shrugging off your mortal shell, but are in fact quite useful to me.

C: 「可悲的陌生人：」
E: "O pitiable stranger,"

C: 继续探索
E: Continue exploration

C: 我看看…咱们先去<color=#dbc291ff>积玉坊</color>那边找找看吧，记录显示有货物是在那附近丢失的。
E: Let me see... How about we head to the <color=#dbc291ff>Trove of Verdure</color> first? The record shows that some items were lost in that area.

C: 夕葵大人说，恶意破坏栖木的犯人在<color=#dbc291ff>观颐台</color>附近，赶紧操控物流鸟去那里找找吧。
E: According to Lady Xikui, the culprit who vandalized the roost is near the <color=#dbc291ff>Elixir Research Terrace</color>. Let's send a courier cycrane over there right away.

C: 啊！那人是不是在破坏栖木？这就是药王秘传的信徒吧！
E: Ah! Are they vandalizing the roost? It's Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, isn't it?

C: （靠太近容易打草惊蛇，离远点拍照记录位置告知梓桥吧。）
E: (Getting too close might alert them. I should take a photo from a distance to mark the location and notify Ziqiao.)

C: 是我没错。
E: That's me.

C: 你认错人了。
E: You've got the wrong person.

C: 谢谢你，这枚小小的零件我一定会好好保存的。不过，我不能白白拿走这枚小零件，这样吧，我把这个铁盒送给你吧。
E: Thank you. I will hang onto and cherish this. But surely, I can't just take without giving something back, so how about you have this iron box here?

C: 「鲛人泪」是真的吗？
E: Are Draconic Tears real?

C: 以物换物的规矩。
E: The rules of barter.

C: 我一听就来精神了啊！毫不犹豫地就跟着他走了，然后他就骗我钻进了这个集装箱……
E: I got really fired up when I heard that! So I followed him without hesitation, and before long he'd tricked me into this container here...

C: 太好了，你回来了！我刚才差一点点就以为你不会回来了！快，顺着快递箱的门缝把衣服递给我吧，我开始觉得冷了……
E: Excellent, you're back! I almost thought you weren't going to come back for me! Quickly, pass me the clothes through the courier package. It's starting to feel a little chilly...

C: 让全世界都充满「枘凿六合」！让人们沉浸在「枘凿六合」的幸福里。
E: To saturate the world with the Hexanexus! To let everyone immerse themselves in the pleasure of the Hexanexus.

C: …我很难认同你的观点。
E: ...I have a hard time agreeing with your point of view.

C: 我不信，你让我再多去做几个你试试。
E: I don't believe it. Let me make a few more custom changes for you.

C: 再见了…啊，差点儿忘了，给。这是我承诺给你的「秘社终身社员」奖励。
E: Goodbye then... Ah, I almost forget: Here you go. This is your gift as our latest Lifetime Hex Club Membership.

C: 不，还不能这么说……
E: No, I can't quite say that...

C: 我们走吧？
E: Are we leaving?

C: 什么电影把你气成这样？
E: What movie made you so angry?

C: 你以为，如此优秀的期刊会请谁来当主笔？
E: Who do you think such an outstanding periodical would hire as its chief editor?

C: …咳…总、总之，这次给你添麻烦了。要是之后遇到什么困扰，可以来找我。
E: ...*Ahem*... A—Anyway, sorry for any trouble caused this time around. If you have any problems later on, you can come and find me.

C: 可以这么说。毕竟单凭凡人的寿命，我可没机会活到现在。
E: That's one way of putting it. After all, based on the lifespan of mortals I shouldn't be alive right now.

C: 感觉会变成旅游景点…
E: Sounds like it'll become a tourist destination...

C: 等年老后，韦兰的脑子已经被过多的改造压垮。疼痛与幻觉每天折磨着他，把他变成了狂躁易怒又神经兮兮的…怪物。
E: In his old age, Wyland's mind became overwhelmed by excessive mods. Pain and hallucinations tortured him daily, twisting him into a mad, irritable, neurotic... monster.

C: 好在科琳船长总是留有后招：来匹诺康尼之前，我曾联系到一位与家族关系匪浅的线人，让他帮我搞了些内部资料，也许有助于解开谜语。
E: Luckily Captain Colleen always has a backup plan: Before coming to Penacony, I got in touch with an informant who's tight with The Family, and asked him to get me some inside intel that might be useful when it comes to solving that riddle.

C: 公司员工离开了。
E: The IPC workers leave.

C: 这次航行结束后，我就脱队单干了。
E: After this voyage was over, I left the team and struck out on my own.

C: 从这件事中我学到了教训：有些人脑子里只能装下最低贱的欲望，不要试图让他们理解你。
E: I learned a lesson from all this: Some people can only entertain the most vulgar of desires. Never try reasoning with them.

C: 直到他为我也戴上一副面具，我才感觉生锈的肺又活了过来——这玩意是公司推出的空气过滤器！在那么肮脏的环境里，没有这个还真是寸步难行。
E: It wasn't until they put the same mask on me that I realized I could breathe freely again... That was an air purifier mask made by the IPC! It was impossible to get around without that in the filthy environment.

C: 《班尼古堡》，《末世班尼》——奇迹本杰明的作品可都是划时代的！
E: Benny's Castle, Apocalyptic Benny... The works by Miracle Benjamin are groundbreaking!

C: 全靠你了，伙计！
E: I'll count on you then, buddy!

C: 骗谁也别骗了自己。
E: You can lie to whomever you want, but not yourself.

C: 奇迹本杰明一定会逆转风评！我们要把所有资源都投入到我们的下一个项目——《班尼古堡：海底新生》。看扁我们的人，都给我等着吧！
E: We'll turn the table eventually! We're going to channel all our resources into our next project: Benny's Castle: Seabed Rebirth and prove those who look down on us wrong!

C: 小孩子的梦里都是欢声笑语，哪像我…不像我……
E: Kids only have happy dreams, unlike... unlike me...

C: 「希望某日宇宙中的所有人都能坐在一张桌子上，快乐地共饮苏乐达。」
E: "I hope that one day, everyone in the universe can enjoy SoulGlad at the same table."

C: 我怀着满腔热忱将这份企划递交给费曼——我那个苛刻又无能的领导——可他却将我的企划批判得一文不值。
E: Bursting with confidence, I handed the proposal to Feinman, my demanding yet incompetent boss, only to receive harsh criticisms from him.

C: 他是不是说我打压他，还联合其他人一起排挤他？
E: Did he tell you I treated him oppressively and ostracized him along with others?

C: …所以就是说，为什么要针对我啊！啊？为什么啊！
E: ...So, why does he only treat me this way? Why!?
Ha...

C: 我要在这梦境里复制出一个完美的她…一个绝对还原她真实形象的倒影。为此，我需要有人<color=#dbc291ff>帮我记录下她最真实的形象</color>……
E: I need to create a flawless replica of her in the dreamscape... a reflection that perfectly represents her. And for that, I need someone to <color=#dbc291ff>record her true self</color>...

C: 我曾经爱上过一个人——啊…那个真正带给过我快乐的人，那个差点为我的情爱生涯画上句号的人……
E: I once fell for someone who brought me immense joy... Someone who almost made me believe that my love life had reached its peak...

C: 喜剧片…希米亚影业…啧，这还真不是鸢尾花家系擅长的领域，怎么才能给波波特找到这种机会呢……
E: Comedies... Himemia Films... Tsk, that's not our strong suit. How can I get Popott an opportunity in that area...?

C: 芙尔拉低下了头，露出凝重的神情，这份严肃在皮皮西人稚嫩的面孔上反倒有些滑稽。
E: Forla lowers her head with a solemn expression, which looks somewhat comical on a Pepeshi's youthful face.

C: 芙尔拉微微颤抖，你看到她的眼角闪烁泪光——她完全抛下了自己的面子，哇哇大哭起来。
E: As Forla trembles slightly, you notice tears glistening in her eyes. She then bursts into tears and lets go of all her pretences.

C: 嘁，本来听说匹诺康尼有位会唱「纯美之歌」的歌手，我就毫不犹豫买了演出的门票…这下可亏大了。
E: Tsk... I heard that there's someone at Penacony who could sing "the Song of Beauty," so I didn't even blink when I bought the ticket for the performance... What a disappointment.

C: 亲爱的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，谢谢您刚刚的支持。请问您问到听众们的感受了吗？
E: Dear {M#sir}{F#lady}, thank you for your support earlier. Have you asked the audience about their thoughts?

C: 到了那个时候，听众与经纪人都不能再禁锢我的歌喉，我将自由地唱出我想唱的歌曲！
E: When the time comes, neither my audience nor my manager will be able to confine my voice. I will have the freedom to express myself through the songs I truly desire to sing!

C: 总有一天…总有一天我会把你们的傲慢撕碎！把你们都当作我成名的垫脚石！
E: One day... one day, I will pulverize your arrogance! You will all become stepping stones on my path to fame!

C: （静静观察）
E: (Observe silently)

C: 说来话长，我曾是星际和平公司「传统项目部」的刑事案件调查员，但…我犯下了巨大的错误。
E: It's a long story. I was once a criminal case investigator for IPC's Traditional Project Department, but... I made a huge blunder.

C: 再多「{RUBY_B#醒来}死{RUBY_E#}」几次，我说不定真要变得不正常了…不过梦里净是些怪家伙，跟他们比起来，我都算不上问题儿童，哈哈！
E: I might really go bonkers after a few more "{RUBY_B#wake}deaths{RUBY_E#}"... By the way, I still think I'm almost normal compared to the other weirdos here, haha!

C: 什…？！你、你把我当什么人了！我可不是…哦，想来你还不知道我的身份——
E: Wha...!? Wh—What kind of wrong idea are you getting? I'm not... Oh, I see. I haven't told you anything about me...

C: …呼…吓、吓死我了…差点就没命了……
E: ...Phew... Th—That was scary... I almost died...

C: 我见识过星球被毁坏后的样子，所以明白眼前景色的宝贵。
E: I've seen what a devastated planet looks like, so I value the beautiful scenery I get to enjoy now.

C: 此刻的薇丝普依旧气势逼人，你却敏锐地发觉，这种无形的压迫力似乎*并不仅来源于她本人*。
E: Whisper remains as imposing as she was before, but the unseen force that you sense apparently is not *emanating from her*.

C: 在你释放完钟表把戏的瞬间，麦考先生的脸上闪过了一连串的神情——从困惑到扭曲，从扭曲到痛苦…最后定格在了悲伤之上。

C: 但至少你暂时为我安抚了我的兄弟姐妹…解放了他们残余的怨念化成的迷因。
E: But at least you've offered temporary solace to my brother and sister... releasing the animosity lingering in those memes.

C: 理应如此——这间公馆是为了供五大家主合议匹诺康尼的重大事宜才设立的。「黄金的时刻」里的那番景象并不是梦境的全部，我相信你能明白这个道理。
E: I should hope so — it was built for the five major family heads to collectively discuss any matter critical to Penacony. The scene in Golden Hour isn't all there is to the Dreamscapes. I'm sure you get what I mean.

C: 全匹诺康尼最正点的货。
E: The finest goods in all Penacony.

C: 呔！你这战争贩子，先吃俺开拓者一棒！
E: Listen up, warmonger! I'll give you a taste of some Trailblazer medicine!

C: 从明天起，学校实行全封闭式管理！不许私自外出、与校外人士厮混；学生必须参加晨跑，还得早中晚各拍一张宿舍照片发到辅导群里！
E: From tomorrow onward, this school shall be managed as an enclosed institution! No student shall be permitted to leave the university and fool around with outsiders. Furthermore, not only will students be required to participate in morning runs, but they'll also have to send a photo of the dormitory to the counseling group chat every morning, afternoon, and night!

C: 不错，很会抓重点——你想啊，匹诺康尼如今几十亿住民，都是土生土长的本地人吗？当年的囚犯们这么能生？
E: Not bad, at least you are able to grasp the important concept. Think about it: Do you believe that billions of people that reside in Penacony today have been born and bred here? Surely you don't think the prisoners who once inhabited this place had so many offsprings?

C: 我传达了你的寄语…
E: I've relayed your words...

C: 可惜财富学院的课程不怎么注重德育，里面出过许多臭名昭著的星系级经济罪犯，被校友戏称为「最匹诺康尼」的学院——都进了监狱嘛。
E: Unfortunately, there isn't much emphasis placed on ethics in Fortune Academy's courses. As a result, many notorious galaxy-class financial criminals are alumni of the academy. This has led to it being jokingly referred to as the "most Penaconian" academy, as some of the students have actually become prisoners.

C: 校长啊…听起来是不是像个大官？其实也没想象中那么自在。至少在折纸大学，校长能决定的东西不是很多。
E: The dean, huh... Although it sounds like a powerful position, it is not as unrestrained as you would imagine. At least in Paperfold University, there isn't much that the dean actually has authority over.

C: 那盏灯之所以一直在这，是因为每个借灯的人都能记得把它放回原位。
E: This lamp remains in its current position because anyone who borrows it knows to return it to its original spot.

C: …不会只有我恐高吧……
E: I can't be the only one afraid of heights, right...?

C: 这种机械臂拥有和人类相同的五根手指，可以持握各种装备，是最能适应复杂工作的结构。
E: If a robot like this has five fingers like a human, it can hold various kinds of equipment which will allow it to be a suitable apparatus for complex tasks.

C: 啾？原来不是妃色夫人呀，吓死鸟了啾。
E: Tweet? It's not Lady Vermilion. Really spooked me, tweet.

C: 哈、哈努兄弟啾！我超级崇拜你的啾！
E: B—Brother Hanu, tweet! I'm your biggest fan, tweet!

C: 算了算了，我还是回去给其他伙伴讲述钟表小子的故事吧啾。
E: Forget it. I should return to my other peeps to talk about Clockie's stories, tweet.

C: 你发出了一个很酷的「哼」——酷到让眼前的小鸟都歪了歪头。
E: You let out a cool "Hmph," so cool that the birdie tilts its head at you.

C: 谢谢你啾…不对，谢谢你哼。
E: Thank you, tweet... I mean, thank you, hmph.

C: 我也想住进去啾…
E: I also want to live there, tweet...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，有个爱挑战的小家伙最近在尝试一种新的锻炼方法，其中一条似乎包括了<color=#dbc291ff>「烈火灼烤」</color>的字样啾…唔，这傻孩子不会当真了吧……
E: Hiya! Let me think: A little one that loves challenging others is recently trying a new training regimen, which involves something about <color=#dbc291ff>"fiery roasting"</color>... Ugh, I hope that silly child didn't take it seriously...

C: 太厉害了客人，竟然已经把所有帮手都带回来了啾！
E: Amazing! You've brought back all the helpers, tweet!

C: ——如何向一个蠢鸟解释何为「蠢鸟」啾？
E: ...The most annoying thing about idiot birds is that you can't explain the concept of an "idiot bird" to them, tweet!

C: 谢谢你，我有新点子了，要赶紧回去记下来才行~
E: Thank you for the inspiration, I have to go and note this down quickly~

C: 我是来帮忙的。
E: I'm here to help.

C: 只要有「魔法硬币」，就可以唤醒在下潜藏的记忆啾！
E: All you need is a Magic Coin, and I can reawaken my latent memories, tweet!

C: {F#折纸鸟行了个花哨的礼，圆滚滚的身子原地转了一圈，最后轻轻地碰了碰你的手背。}{M#折纸鸟行了个花哨的礼，圆滚滚的身子原地转了一圈，定格一个疑似鞠躬的姿势。}
E: {F#The origami bird takes a fancy bow, then twirls its round body and touches the back of your hand gently.}{M#The origami bird takes a fancy bow, then twirls its round body and assumes what seems to be a bow.}

C: 如果有能唤醒记忆的「魔法硬币」就好了啾！可惜本公子的库存已经用完了啾……
E: If only I had a Magic Coin that awakens memories, tweet! Alas, I've used up all of mine in stock, tweet...

C: 您好，欢迎参加折纸小鸟飞行竞技大会，祝愿您能取得好成绩啾。
E: Hello, welcome to the Origami Bird Flying Race. May you attain the best results, tweet!

C: 你在说些什么莫名其妙的啾？小鸟听不懂啾。
E: What in the world are you sputtering about, tweet? I don't understand, tweet.

C: 啾啾，我要给小镇里的每只小鸟都炫耀一遍！
E: Tweet tweet, I'm gonna show off to all the birdies in town!

C: 愿我们能够一起，捍卫美梦小镇里的石头和树枝，还有苏乐达啾。
E: May we stand together to defend Dreamville's stones and branches. And SoulGlad, tweet.

C: 有点惊悚。
E: That's kinda creepy.

C: 朋友，要来点饮料吗？啾啾。
E: My friend, how about a drink? Tweet tweet.

C: 你不禁开始好奇：它会是甜的吗？
E: Your curious mind begins to wander: Is it sweet?

C: （向一旁的铁卫寻求帮助）
E: (Call for help from the nearby Silvermane Guard)

C: ....噗...您说得对，我们这就去办。
E: ...*snickers*... Quite right. We will do that immediately.

C: 史瓦罗没有出现。
E: Svarog does not appear.

C: 玲可取出自己的热水瓶，开始帮你脱困。你的舌头从冰冷变得滚烫，直到最后才与栏杆分离。
E: Lynx pulls out her hot water flask and begins to help you. Your tongue goes from freezing cold to scalding hot, until it finally breaks free from the fence.

C: 折纸小鸟又不是真的纸，怎么会打湿呢…应该不会吧？啾？
E: Origami birds aren't made from actual paper, why would we get wet... Or would we? Tweet?

C: 糟了！突然想起来，我还有行李没有带，希望现在飞回大树还来得及啾！
E: Oh no! I suddenly remembered that I left some luggage at home. I hope it's not too late to fly back to the Great Tree, tweet!

C: 如果想念一个人，为什么不直接面对面说话啾？
E: If she misses someone, why doesn't she just talk to that person face-to-face, tweet?

C: 我才是潜水冠军！
E: I'm the diving champ! Me!

C: 是我最喜欢的冰点苏乐达啾！
E: This is my favorite Ice SoulGlad, tweet!

C: 你们是否愿意…
E: Are you willing to...

C: 反馈按钮藏这么深？
E: The feedback button is too well hidden!

C: 我也没想到啾……
E: I didn't expect it either, tweet...

C: 我想和你的老板聊聊。
E: I want to speak to your boss.

C: 细心的你一定发现了——你敲打的气球没有爆破啾。
E: Your meticulous self probably noticed — the balloon you hit didn't pop, tweet.

C: 可惜你把我的气球打破了啾……
E: Sadly, you burst my balloon, tweet...

C: 十倍杠杆下去，我就是最富有的小鸟啾！
E: With a tenfold leverage, I'm gonna be the richest bird ever, tweet!

C: 要么老实交罚款，拿钱资助本地建设；要么就去关禁闭，给其他人做个反面教材。你自己选吧！
E: You have a choice. You will either pay a fine that will go towards local construction efforts, or you will be locked up and confined as an example of negative behavior for others to learn from.

C: 算是吧，我才建好的。
E: Sure, I just built it.

C: 抱歉，我只是顺手。
E: Sorry, I'm just passing by.

C: 我知道它们在哪。
E: I know where they are.

C: 真的？
E: Really?

C: 是吧，它好好看！
E: Right? It's beautiful!

C: 奇怪，接头的线人，怎么不见了，我…我明明通知过他。
E: Wait, where is my contact? I... I definitely informed him about my arrival.

C: 自然数和质数哪个多？
E: Are there more natural numbers or prime numbers?

C: 丹枢大人，这就是您以前工作的地方吗？这个地方空气好新鲜啊。
E: Is this where you used to work, Lady Dan Shu? The air is so fresh here.

C: 这故事蛮假的。
E: Your story is hardly convincing.

C: 哎，别提了…我实在是太倒霉了，倒霉到快要过不下去了……
E: Well... I'm just so unlucky... I can't take it anymore...

C: 之前寻短见的听众帮我留下了录音资料，你拿走吧，肯定能用得上的。
E: An old listener who self-deleted left behind some recording material for me. You take it. I'm sure you'll put it to good use.

C: 我好像知道这个故事，然后呢？
E: I really want to hear what happens in this story. So, what's next?

C: 我帮不了您，因为您已经有了太多的答案。
E: I cannot help you, because you already have too many answers.

C: 虽说是平平无奇的香炉，它却如此突出。
E: It may be merely a normal incense burner, but in a way it's also outstanding.

C: 奇怪的皮皮西离开了。
E: The strange Pepeshi left.

C: 这是一面鼓，人类最古老的乐器之一。虽然不知道它为什么出现在这里，但它敲起来想必非常好听。
E: This is a drum, one of humanity's oldest musical instruments. Though you have no idea why it would be here, you know it will make a great sound when played.

C: 是吗…看来还得再找几个知情人士。
E: Really...? Looks like we'll have to find a few other witnesses, then.

C: 这感觉太不真实…
E: This doesn't feel real...

C: 你看着它，一动不动；它没看你，但同样一动不动。
E: As you look at it, it does not move; It does not look at you, but continues to just lie still.

C: 幸好这次发现得早，那玩意没对你造成什么严重的危害。现在快把它交给我吧！
E: Thankfully, this was discovered quickly this time, and it has not been able to cause any serious damage to you. Please entrust it to me, now!

C: 再说了，让更多人知道我的技术厉害，不是很好吗？可以把名声打出去不说，指不定还能吸引到些有头有脸的人物。
E: Plus, it's not a bad thing for people to see how amazing my skills are, right? If I get my name out there, maybe I can catch the attention of the big shots.

C: 你将那块金属碎片递给了他。很显然，面前的老人认识这件物品。他反复摩挲着手中的零件，轻声的叹息恍如整个琥珀纪那般漫长。
E: You hand the metal fragment over. Evidently, the old man in front of you is familiar with this object. He runs the part through his hands repeatedly as he lets out a sigh as long as the Amber Era itself.

C: 要是这些无聊的闲话，使您心生怜意的话……
E: If this pathetic story of mine has roused just a little pity in your heart...

C: 您的慷慨仗义，小女子将永远铭记于心。
E: I shall remember your generosity and kindness in my heart for eternity.

C: 还有什么能为你做的吗？
E: Is there anything else I can do for you?

C: 这种显而易见的事，小女子自然明白。
E: That is obvious. I know that.

C: 拆开外壳…拿出零件…挨个擦拭…再次拼装……
E: Remove the casing... Take out the parts... Clean them one by one... Put them back again...

C: 我到底接受它们中的哪位呢…您能和那几位酒瓶都聊一聊，然后给我一些建议吗？
E: Which of them should I choose? Can you talk to each of the bottles and give me some suggestions?

C: …旁边那两个家伙，别想妨碍我！只要能借这个机会一飞冲天，我愿意使用任何手段，付出任何代价……
E: ...I won't let the other two guys stand in my way! I'm ready to do whatever it takes to make this work...

C: 瞧我说什么？那小子总有天得栽别人手里。死相这么惨，绝对是被仇家找上门了。
E: What're you lookin' at me for? That kid was gonna get what was comin' to him one day. Lookin' at this grisly scene, looks like one of his enemies finally got their revenge.

C: 他和老板有过节。
E: He and his boss have had disagreements.

C: 银狼…
E: Silver Wolf...

C: 恭喜你，看来确实是你更重要。
E: Congratulations! It seems you are more important.

C: 要钱吗？
E: Do I need to pay?

C: 免费就摸。
E: I'll touch if it's free.

C: 你也可以反抗，不过到那时——命和钱，你一个也留不下！
E: Or you could fight back. But, if you do... then ya won't have money or a life!

C: 托他的福，有人开了面包店、有人当了服务员、而我成了个教人防身的老师…呵呵，但你看看我现在的样子，已经不配被称为老师了。
E: Thanks to him, some people opened bakeries, some became waiters, and I became a self-defense teacher... Hah, but look at me now, I ain't worthy to call myself a teacher no more.

C: 那我就不客气了！
E: Then I won't hold back!

C: 那些宇宙中的补品饮料都炒到几十万信用点了，我们苏乐达只需要几张苜蓿币就能带走，你还不满足？
E: Those supplements and health tonics get sold for tens of thousands of credits elsewhere in the universe, but you can walk off with a bottle of SoulGlad for just a few Alfalfa credits! What is there to gripe about?

C: 还未来得及发表看法，你忽然感觉袖子被人轻轻扯了下。
E: Before you even get the chance to speak your mind, you suddenly feel a gentle tugging at your sleeve.

C: 还给猎犬家系。
E: Give it back to the Bloodhound Family.

C: 哼，还是被那家伙逃掉了。
E: Hmph, we lost him.

C: 还有…{NICKNAME}，你也是。
E: {NICKNAME}... This applies to you, as well.

C: 嗯，走吧。
E: Yeah, let's go.

C: 寒鸦从一旁路过，听见嫌疑人甲的争吵声便走了过来。
E: Hanya, who is passing by, walks over upon hearing the ruckus that the suspect is making.

C: 你是认真的吗？不开玩笑？
E: Are you serious? Are you sure this isn't a joke?

C: 多添一条亡魂罢了。
E: Another soon to be departed.

C: 也有一半原因在我们信了{F#她}{M#他}的鬼话吧……
E: Well, it's also partly because we believed in {F#her}{M#his} nonsense...

C: 我们俩…就像你看到的，行动不便，能麻烦你过来一下吗？
E: As you can see... The two of us can't really move. Can you please come over here for a second?

C: 那个上面全是「嗯嗯嗯」的密文，冥差他们看不懂的，你去拿回来就行。
E: The directions are written in a cipher, so all they'll see is a mess of mm's and hm's. The spiritfarers won't understand a word. All you have to do is retrieve it and bring it back to me.

C: 根据前人所说，这似乎与*键盘*有关系，似乎「W」为「向上」，「S」为「向下」，「D」为「向右」…剩下的我也不明白。
E: According to that explorer, there seems to be some kind of connection between the letters and the keyboard. The encryption key suggests that "W" corresponds to "up," "S" to "down," and "D" to "right," but I have no clue beyond that.

C: 谢谢你的小知识，我要走了。
