E: Thanks for the bit of trivia. I have to go.

C: 能！
E: Yes, I can!

C: 你批准了也不算数啊，我呢，是想让你去放炮！
E: Your permission doesn't mean anything. What I'm asking, is that you go and fire the cannons for us!

C: 一切花招都逃不过我的耳目。言语会骗人，但肌肉和心跳不会。
E: No flashy technique can deceive my eyes and ears. Though you can lie with your words, your muscles and heart rate tell the truth.

C: 没错。
E: Exactly.

C: 你似乎听到某种细微的声响，像是某种东西被吸入时发出的气流声。
E: You feel like you can hear a faint sound, like the sound of air being sucked inside something.

C: 不好意思，我走错了。
E: Sorry, I have the wrong room.

C: 绿色酒瓶来担任主角。
E: The green bottle will play the protagonist.

C: 开启装置。
E: Activate the device.

C: 你对此嗤之以鼻，圣烛底座上有着扎格列斯的标识，向这位泰坦祈求…还是自求多福吧。
E: This makes you scoff. The base of this holy candle has symbols relating to Zagreus. Praying to this Titan seems a bit... Ah. Best to wish everything turns out well.

C: 我真的世界第一健康！
E: My mental health really is number one in the world! The best!

C: 准备好了！
E: You bet!

C: 还是等忙完了再躺下吧。
E: I should probably finish up before I lie down.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 没错，就是流星。
E: That's right. Meteor.

C: 哦吼？「仇恨」，有意思的角度，尽管不是本狮心中所想的那一样，但却毫不逊色于原本的答案呐——
E: Oh-ho? Hatred? An interesting perspective. Even if it's not what I was thinking, it rivals the original answer...

C: 是啊，据你所知，猫头鹰在白天会将头缩进羽毛里呼呼大睡，看上去就像没有脑袋，到了夜晚才钻出来。「黄昏时起飞」——说的就是这个。
E: That's right. According to your knowledge, owls tuck their heads into their feathers and sleep the day away, so it looks like they're headless. And their heads only pop out at night. "Taking off at dusk" — that's what this is referring to.

C: 就在剪彩的前一日，卜者和卫兵的警告让城主有些心虚，但他仍认为是民众在变着法来阻止他，于是他在桥上跳来跳去，以此证明桥梁的坚固。
E: On the eve of the ribbon-cutting, warnings from the diviner and guard bred some unease in the lord. However, he dismissed it as the people's attempt to stop him, so he began jumping up and down on the bridge to prove its sturdiness.

C: 对局刚一开始，「超智能病毒」就瞬移到你面前，劈面打来暴击率溢出的致命一击。你还没来得及出招，游戏就已经结束了。
E: As soon as the game begins, the Supersmart Virus teleports to you and gives you a Lethal Strike with an overflowing CRIT Rate. The game is over before you can make a move.

C: 请谨记凶手是杀毒软件。
E: Remember that the killer is the antivirus software.

C: 你将半碗列车锅全部吃了下去…你这也太能吃了吧！
E: You devour the remaining half of the Express Special... What an amazing appetite you have!

C: 请大家继续自由使用。
E: Please continue to use this as you please.

C: 呼呼。你问了个好问题，我什么都没有，要是这火苗你不嫌弃的话，就拿走吧。
E: *crackle* A good question. I don't have anything, but if you don't mind this little flame, you may have it.

C: 气球。
E: A balloon.

C: 不过只回答一个问题还算不了什么。就让我再考考你，1加1等于几？
E: Answering just one question doesn't prove anything. Let me ask you another question: What does 1 plus 1 equal?

C: 如此看来，这片乐园里还是有懂行之人的。我很欣慰。
E: It's so nice to know that there are still folks who know their stuff in this theme park.

C: 奸邪恶徒，叛离我主，无视秩序，当受天罚！
E: Vile evildoer, you betray our Lord and disregard Order. Prepare to be judged by the heavens!

C: 在传闻中，{F#她}{M#他}头顶是灰色的，自幼吃垃圾长大，因而天赋异禀，肩膀上面能跑弹珠机。
E: Legend has it that the crown of {F#her}{M#his} head is gray, and that {F#she}{M#he} grew up eating trash. As a result, {F#she}{M#he} has been imbued with extraordinary talent, so much so that {F#her}{M#his} shoulders can support a pinball machine.

C: 忙，都忙，忙点好啊。
E: Busy, busy, guess staying busy isn't so bad.

C: 好浪漫的名字，小家伙窝在麦田里的样子一定很可爱吧！
E: Such a dreamy name! I bet it looks so cozy curled up in the fields.

C: 是因为它一副很好奇的样子，所以叫好好奇美拉吗？
E: Because it's got that super curious look on its face, right?

C: 嗷呜…睡觉，嗷！
E: Awoo... sleepy, awooo!

C: 哀丽秘榭怎么会有大地兽？这显然是个问题，但眼下还有个更大的问题——
E: A dromas? In Aedes Elysiae? That's a big problem, but there's an even bigger one...

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡。靠近时，能依稀听到一些零散的字词，例如…「帝皇权杖」。
E: Bubbles drift through the air. When you get close, you can dimly make out disconnected words, including... "Emperor's Scepter."

C: 会更胖一些。
E: A bit chubbier.

C: 你钓上了…一个泳圈？
E: You caught... a swim ring?

C: 海的那边…是敌人！
E: On the other side... there are enemies!

C: 呼~感觉有点困了…是时候闭上眼睛，去梦里相见啦……
E: *yawn*~ I'm feeling kinda sleepy... Time for some shuteye. See you in dreamland...

C: 不过，「永远」这个词…对人家来说，反倒不太浪漫。
E: But the word "forever"... isn't something romantic to me.

C: 我已经记不清那三千万个轮回…幸好，我还记得这一世的那些黄金裔伙伴，以及{NICKNAME}你……
E: I can no longer remember those thirty million cycles... Luckily, I still remember my Chrysos Heir companions from this life, and you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 告诉我——悬锋城里地位最高的将领，是什么模样？
E: Tell me. What is the highest-ranking general of Castrum Kremnos like?

C: 我见过形形色色的信徒，但会如此美化自己的，你还是第一个。
E: I have met all sorts of disciples in my time, but never have I met one that embellishes their identity like you.

C: …好吧，看来这位信徒的执着远超你的想象。怎么办，你打算如何回答呢？
E: ...Right, looks like this disciple is far more persistent than you could have imagined. How will you respond?

C: （狂敲左边的木壁）
E: (Slam wildly on the left side wall)

C: 你曾藏身其中的木马，前方摆放着那位虔诚信徒献上的供品，看起来似乎很诱人。
E: Before the wooden horse that you were hidden inside are a number of offerings from your pious disciple. They look most tempting.

C: 我的使命在呼唤我。回见，年轻的辅祭，愿未来的门扉始终向你敞开。
E: My calling beckons. Farewell, young acolyte — may the door of tomorrow remain ever open to you.

C: 至于那位亲身前往的神驹，我有段时间没听到它的消息了。
E: As for that divine foal who went there personally, I haven't heard news of it for some time.

C: 你呼唤活火，吉奥里亚的眷从，却并无回应。
E: You call upon the Living Flame, the attendants of Georios, but there is no response.

C: 什么是「火柴」来着？
E: What is a "match" again?

C: 这么一来，所有活火都点燃了。
E: With this, all the Living Flames have been ignited.

C: 其实我一直很好奇，为什么所有戏剧的末尾，获救的人们都要裹条毯子？
E: I've always been curious, why is it that, at the end of every play, the rescued always have to be wrapped in a blanket?

C: …尚未发现秘酿能够完全颠覆个体对外界环境认知的案例。猜想：无名客曾与该个体接触，或有可能影响该数据体认知功能……
E: ...No documented cases of ambrosia completely overriding an individual's perception of external reality. Conjecture: The Nameless previously interacted with this entity, potentially affecting its cognitive functions...

C: 这里的光线，不像其他舱段那么刺眼，很好。
E: The light in here isn't as harsh as it is in other cabins. It's nice.

C: 可惜我还是喜欢这里——这里很黑，所以很安全……
E: Too bad I still like it in here — it's dark, so I feel safe...

C: 比如呜呜伯的短呜和长呜，就是截然不同的含义。
E: For example, Wubbaboo's short and long whines mean completely different things.

C: 尤其是愚人戏方面，很难找到比他更懂的行家了。
E: Especially about Fool's Play. I don't think anyone will know more about it than him.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you all right?

C: 你在这里真的不是在添乱吗？
E: Are you sure you are not causing trouble here?

C: 我还有些事情搞不懂…
E: There's something I can't wrap my head around...

C: 放心，什么时候该冲，什么时候该逃，我心里有谱得很。
E: Don't worry about me, I know very well when I should act and when I should bolt.

C: 只要一闭上眼睛，我就感觉那些身姿怪异的敌人又会出现在我眼前……
E: Whenever I close my eyes, I can feel those twisted enemies appear in front of me...

C: 啊，这一切真的是太可怕了！我不知道要过多久，才能彻底遗忘！
E: Ahhh, this is really terrible! I don't know how long it will take before I can get this out of my head!

C: 对于非人生物权益保障，这个议题非常宏观，如果您时间匆忙，我只能简述一二。
E: The protection of non-human creatures' rights and interests is a rather macro topic. If you are in a hurry, I can only give you a brief introduction.

C: 如何缓解机器人被奴役现状？
E: How can we alleviate the enslavement of robots?

C: 啊！你是谁？怎么突然出现在我背后？难道是故意偷听世玲说话？！
E: Ah! Who are you? How did you suddenly show up behind me? Were you eavesdropping on me!?

C: 波少一般喜欢什么类型的奇物？
E: What kind of Curio does Master Capote usually prefer?

C: 我虽然很容易犯困，但工作的时候不会马虎的！你这家伙，该不会把我当成那种会把止血棉落在患者身体里的那种糊涂医生了吧？！
E: Although I easily feel sleepy at work, I take my job very seriously! Don't think of me as some stupid doctor who would leave hemostatic cotton inside their patient!

C: 如果有身体不适，千万别去医疗科指名我，我每天可忙着呢。
E: If you are not feeling well, do not ask for me in the Medical Department. I am very busy.

C: 能言善辩之人则光鲜亮丽受人敬仰，沉默少言深耕研究却被人称作古板无用。这就是这个空间站的，最应该变革的地方！
E: Eloquent people are well respected while quiet diligent researchers are called old-fashioned and stubborn. This is what the space station should change the most!

C: 所有见过它的人都这么说。作为宠物狗，佩佩不仅有自己的情绪，它还能观察到周围人的情绪。
E: Right? That's what people say! Peppy has a personality. He can sense other people's needs, too.

C: 你会跟无期徒刑的犯人说你刑期长，能分我几年吗？
E: Would you ask someone who's sentenced to life to share some prison time with you just because that person can?

C: 如果喜欢需要理由，世界就一团糟了，很多人会发现自己不配被喜欢。
E: If people need solid reasons to like one another, the world would be plunging into chaos. Soon they'll discover that they don't deserve to be liked.

C: 我是空间站的站长，空间站的事情，你问我是最适合不过了。
E: You've come to the right person. I'm the lead researcher at the station.

C: 你看起来很忙的样子。
E: You seem very busy.

C: 这是我们应该做的。
E: We're just doing what we should.

C: 这样啊…也是，毕竟她那么忙……
E: I see... Well, she has a lot of things on her plate...

C: 以我的身份，还要预约？
E: Do I really need an appointment, considering who I am?

C: 我只是想和你随便聊聊。
E: I'm just here for a chat.

C: 你向它讲述了你跟随星穹列车，穿梭在空间站与其他地方的冒险经历。
E: You share with it how you travel to space stations and other places by riding the Astral Express.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你可以去找我的同族聊聊，我们同为阮•梅的造物，它们对自己的认知在你们看来或许会很有趣。
E: I suggest you have a chat with my peers. Just like me, they are Ruan Mei's creations, and their perception of themselves may sound intriguing to you.

C: 现在究竟是什么情况？
E: What exactly is happening over there now?

C: 强制关机，重新启动！
E: Force shutdown and reboot!

C: 这是怎么回事呢？对此你感到很不解。
E: What is going on? You are puzzled.

C: 你好！欢迎启动心理咨询与闲聊功能，你好！有什么我可以为您做的吗？
E: Welcome to the counseling and chatting function! What can I do for you?

C: 你们也能看到黑屏？
E: You all could see the black screen too?

C: 您觉得现在做什么生意好？{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}注视过的灯盏，还是{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}染过色的绸缎？
E: What business do you think is good now? Lamps that have had {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} eyes gazed upon them, or silks dyed by {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}?

C: 走过路过，不能错过！
E: As long as you're passing by, don't miss out!

C: 我是奥赫玛的希诺，以教授人们论辩的技巧为生。
E: I am Zeno of Okhema. I make a living by instructing people on the art of debate.

C: 人总是倾向于那些宏大而虚幻的理念，又不愿去思考其中的含义。
E: People are always drawn to these grand and fantastic ideals, yet they are unwilling to reflect on their implications.

C: 阿卡索斯的帕门弥德，如你所见，是位修辞学方面的教师。
E: Parmenides of Icatus. As you can see, I am a teacher in the study of rhetoric.

C: 好吧，现在你明白他们俩的主要工作是什么了。
E: Alright, now you know what their main jobs are.

C: 我暂时想不出新的论点，是你们获胜了。但还请注意，我输了，并非意味着你们的立场便是正确的。说到底，辩论无非是驳倒对方的游戏，至于真理……
E: I cannot currently think of a new argument, so victory is yours. However, please be aware that my loss does not mean that your view is absolutely correct. In the end, debate is simply no more than a game of refuting the other party's arguments. When it comes to the truth...

C: 由于城外无法使用传信石版，人们通常会使用这种卷轴来传递消息、确认位置。而这张明显是残次品，根本用不了……
E: Since teleslates can't be used outside the city, people often use these kinds of scrolls to send messages and confirm locations. This one's obviously defective, though, and no use at all...

C: 宁芙的事，你有线索吗？
E: Nympha. Got any clues about her?

C: 有人发现了这条项链…
E: Someone found this pendant...

C: 我好像总是理所当然地认为你会属于我，我们的爱是墨涅塔的旨意，真爱之人自会受到泰坦的眷顾。
E: I kind of always took it for granted that you are mine, that our love was the will of Mnestia, that those truly in love would be afforded favor by the Titans.

C: 我怎么会忘呢？那天，你来了我的铁匠铺，我们一见如故，一直聊到勤劳的哈托努斯都开始打哈欠。然后，我们每天都期盼见到彼此……
E: How could I ever forget? That day, you came to my blacksmith shop, and we hit it off like two old friends, talking up a storm until poor Chartonus was yawning. After that, we'd look forward to seeing each other every day...

C: 唉…阿卡索斯人，真是和大地兽一样犟……
E: *sigh* ...The Icatusians are as stubborn as a pack of dromases...

C: 所以我就买了这么多，还把你名字写在了受益人那栏里。
E: So I bought all of these and listed your name in the beneficiary column.

C: 老哥，帮个忙吧！
E: C'mon bro, help me out here!

C: 都什么时候了，你居然还有闲心看书？
E: It's getting late. You're still in the mood to read?

C: 这有什么，我都没急，你瞎急什么？
E: So what? I'm in no rush. What are you in a hurry for?

C: 这和我作文里立下的宏愿比，还差得远呢。
E: It's far from the magnificent aspirations in my homework.

C: 它？哪个它？
E: It? Which one?

C: 我建议你再观望观望吧，要是有了什么实质性进展，我第一个通知你。
E: I suggest you just wait and see. If there're any substantial developments, I'll notify you in the first instance.

C: 应该是模型的问题。我认为你现在这个太复杂了，中间好像丢失了一段数据，结果自然不对。
E: I think it's a modeling error. Yours is far too complex, and I think there's a section of missing data in the middle — naturally it's wrong.

C: 谁知道呢，总之听起来还蛮危险的。
E: Who knows. In any case, it sounds pretty dangerous.

C: （高傲地喂食）
E: (Feed it pridefully)

C: 加油！我知道你们很会辅助队友，要带着虔诚的心来认真弹唱才行啊！
E: Come on! I know you're great at supporting others. Do it sincerely and earnestly!

C: 突然问我为什么，我不知道啊…
E: Why do you ask me so suddenly? I don't know!

C: 当时，我只是演戏太过投入了。气势汹汹的，就像是被什么附身了，这不能怪我啊。
E: At the time, I was simply too immersed in the performance. It was like... something possessed me! I am not at fault here.

C: 我好像听说过这样的故事。
E: I've heard a story like that before.

C: 自从上次的事以后，大家的帮助让我很开心，我也在努力改变自己，只是……
E: Since that incident, I've been so happy with everyone's help, and I'm striving to change myself. But...

C: 是，这会儿她才八岁。
E: Yes, she's only eight right now.

C: 他拿着一枚石制扩声器，压低声音，努力扮出一位泰坦该有的威严和仁慈。
E: He's holding a voice amplifier made from stone, lowering his voice to imitate the majesty and compassion of a Titan.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，又见面啦！谢谢你带我去见刻法勒！
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, we meet again! Thanks for taking me to see Kephale!

C: 究竟是为什么呢？难道…是怕我抢走他的风头？
E: Why is that, exactly? Could it be... that he's afraid I'll steal his spotlight?

C: 也有被困他处的公民前来避难，我们会好好照顾他们，直到新世界来临。
E: Some citizens trapped elsewhere have also come seeking shelter. We'll take good care of them until the new world arrives.

C: 不管出于什么原因，也不管用了什么方式…豁出性命，让更多人免于死亡的折磨，都是一件高尚的事。
E: Whatever their reasons, whatever their methods... sacrificing one's life to spare others from the torment of death is a noble deed.

C: 我叫希瑞雅，来自一个名叫阿卡索斯的城邦。阿卡索斯它…已经被黑潮淹没了。但我相信，奥赫玛一定不会重蹈覆辙！
E: Serena of Icatus. My home... consumed by the black tide now. But Okhema? Different story!

C: 你知道，刻法勒已经不再言语很久，女孩听到的回应没有那么简单，这个忙帮起来势必有点麻烦。
E: You know, Kephale's been silent for ages. The reply the girl hears shouldn't be that simple. This bit of aid might turn into quite the hassle.

C: 圣城有你，才是真的了不起。
E: The holy city's only holy because it's got you in it.

C: 「——无需担忧，我曾和律法之泰坦立下誓约：我拥有庇佑世人、承载此世全部记忆的权能，代价则是背负世上最沉重的事物，在有人接过权能之前不得脱手——」
E: "—Worry not, I swore with Law Titan: I shall protect all of humanity and wield the authority to every memory in this world. The price will be to bear the heaviest burden until another takes the mantle—"

C: 让陨石把我砸死好了！
E: Let meteors crush me!

C: 这场欢宴是一场幻境，而我是幻境的一簇泡沫。一旦离开此处，我就会消失得无影无踪。
E: This banquet is but an illusion, and I am merely a bubble in this fantasy. Once I leave this place, I will vanish without a trace.

C: 她知晓只是蜃景…？！
E: She knew it was just an illusion...!?

C: 也许那时你便会愈发明白，欢宴于我，于他们…以及于这个世界的意义。
E: Perhaps then you'll better understand what these banquets mean to me, to them... and to this world.

C: 而在明天，你又会回到我的身边。那时的你会面容慈爱，像一尊和蔼的石像。
E: And tomorrow, you'll be by my side again. Your face will be filled with kindness then, like a gentle stone statue.

C: 就是我手里的这瓶……
E: You mean this bottle?

C: 你简单阐述了来意。
E: You quickly explained why you were there.

C: 居然有这么古老的玩意儿…你们还在用这种老式留声机吗？
E: This must be ancient... Is the Express crew still using it?

C: 因为「公司」旗下的音乐平台实在太乱了，像我就是十几个平台的付费会员。
E: It's hard to find the music you want on the streaming platforms managed by the IPC. I, for one, had to subscribe to at least a dozen of them.

C: 之前你在空间站的时候，帮了大家不少忙。多亏了你，我的工作也轻松了不少。
E: You were a great help to folks on the space station — my job was so much easier with you around.

C: 呵呵…是啊。我想，任何人看到这样的风景，都会感到震撼吧。
E: Hehe, I agree... It's hard not to be.

C: 虽说是礼物，但其实也只是孩子们东拼西凑的产物罢了…不成敬意，还请你能笑纳。
E: I say "gift," but it's more like bits and pieces the kids cobbled together. Still, I hope you like it.

C: 可惜，孩子们不像我这样幸运，能够登上列车一探究竟…但只是想象你们随着列车在宇宙中冒险，他们就已经很满足了。
E: It's a shame they're too young to board the Express. Still, your stories of space adventures always put a smile on their face.

C: 虎克到处问大家，有没有可以给虎克当纪念品的东西。然后，三月七姐姐就把这个趴趴玩偶给我啦！
E: I was asking around to see if I could find anything. Then I bumped into March and she gave me this doll!

C: 不麻烦！克拉拉还有很多知识要学习，有很多问题想向姬子大姐姐和帕姆请教。
E: No, it's no trouble at all! I've still got lots to learn, and lots of questions to ask Miss Himeko and Pom-Pom.

C: …啊！克拉拉突然想到办法了——克拉拉可以用手机把这里的风景拍成照片，再拿给史瓦罗先生看！
E: ...Oh! I've got an idea. I can take some pictures with my phone and show them to Mr. Svarog!

C: 史瓦罗，出击！
E: Svarog to the rescue!

C: …对了，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有空的话，也可以回机械聚落看看哦。
E: ...Oh! When you have time, don't forget to come back to Robot Settlement and pay us a visit.

C: 科员们经常需要坐在椅子上办公，有的时候也会抱怨肩颈酸痛。
E: Sadly a lot of our researchers get shoulder and neck pain — they're sat at their desks most of the day.

C: 虽然不贵重，但这是我能想到最能帮上你的东西，请你务必收下。
E: Here, take this. It's nothing expensive, but I'm sure it'll be of help.

C: 我开个安神方子，睡前服用，最好能按一定的规律安排稳定的作息。
E: Let me prescribe you something to soothe your body and mind — take it before bed. It's best that you establish a regular work and sleep schedule.

C: 但说无妨。
E: There's no harm in asking.

C: 你眨了眨眼，再次确认自己看见了什么——的确是她，银狼，一个按理不该出现在这儿的人。
E: You blinked your eyes and made sure that the person you just saw was Silver Wolf — she wasn't supposed to be here.

C: 要不要玩点什么？桌面游戏我也很擅长。
E: Want to play a game? I'm pretty good at board games, you know.

C: 后来有一段时间，有人问她一个人在家害不害怕，她还骄傲地说：「我不怕，我有很多毛绒玩偶妈妈！」搞得天舶司的下属们都在偷笑。
E: I remember someone asked her once if she ever felt afraid being home by herself, and she proudly responded: "I'm not afraid! I've got lots of doll mommies!" Needless to say, the Sky-Faring Commission was very entertained.

C: 列车要装不下了。
E: I don't think it will all fit on the Express.

C: 我还是应该对自己有信心。
E: No, no — I need to believe in myself!

C: 无论是来自裂缝深渊中的敌人，还是来自不轨人心的算计。
E: Whether they are enemies from the abyss or people with ill intentions...

C: 最开始我当然很生气，毕竟这件事，她明明可以跟我商量嘛！闹得这么大，多不好下台啊……
E: Of course I was angry at first. She could have discussed this with me! It became such a huge mess, and it was so hard to sort out my public image...

C: 等过段时日，彦卿剑术大成，还请老师载我一程，去「贝洛伯格」见识见识那些雪国的高手们。
E: I want to spend some time honing my skills... Then, when the time's right, you can take me down, and we'll see what the masters of this snowy planet can do.

C: 而且…就算知道了又有什么用呢？又不见谁去把他拽回来……
E: Besides, what use would that be even if they knew? It's not like they're gonna drag Rocky back...

C: 那位列车长的模样，好眼熟……
E: That conductor looks really familiar...

C: 如果你也有兴趣的话，我们下次叫上佩拉一起去吧。就像上次的露营一样……
E: If you're interested in going sometime, we could ask Pela to come too. It'll be just like the camping trip...

C: 你按这个方子先调一杯。要是喝不惯…那便是糖的问题。本座下次给你带仙舟的糖粉来。
E: You should at least try making one cup. If you don't like the flavor... then it must be the sugar. I'll bring some Xianzhou powdered sugar next time.

C: 三月七除以帕姆…
E: March 7th divided by Pom-Pom...

C: <unbreak>31</unbreak>。
E: <unbreak>31</unbreak>.

C: 有句话是怎么说的来着…哦对了，「学好数理化，入职公司都不怕！」
E: What was that saying again...? Oh, right, "Math, physics, and chemistry are your key to the future!"

C: 拿着吧，别客气~处理客户关系最重要的一点，就是要学会礼尚往来——希望诸位未来也能继续支持我们的工作！
E: There's no need to be modest! The most important thing about consumer relations is the bond between us. I hope everyone will continue to support our work in the future!

C: 咳，我明白了，看来这是你们列车组的共识…放心吧，我不会声张的。
E: Ahem... I understand. Looks like the Crew have similar feelings... Don't worry, I won't tell anyone.

C: 哈？怎么变成你问我了？
E: Huh? You're asking me?

C: 我对着百科研究了很久，还是没搞明白帕姆到底是哪种生物。不过…会说话的动物应该也不多见吧……
E: I've been researching Pom-Pom in the encyclopedia for ages, but I still can't figure out what species they are. Then again, there aren't many species of talking animal...

C: 说来有些冒昧了，不过我观察了你们这位列车长许久，觉得它颇有些不凡之处。
E: I hope they won't take offense, but I have taken notice of your conductor — I find them to be extraordinary.

C: 确实。不过我想，「可爱」只是它的某个侧面。
E: ...Yes, indeed. However, cuteness is but one of many admirable attributes.

C: 我、我听列车长说，列车里好像有过什么看不见的东西…我便仔细观察了一下。
E: Th—The conductor said there might be something invisible on the Express... so, I've been trying to investigate.

C: 嘿嘿～要是能转运就好了。
E: Hee-hee~ Hope you have good luck.

C: 以后这样的机会还很多。
E: You'll have a lot more chances like this in the future.

C: 一直在各个星系中辗转来回，很少有机会能好好看看这浩瀚的宇宙。
E: I've been traveling back and forth between various star systems, and I rarely get the opportunity to really see this vast universe.

C: 哦？又收到了一个「大乐子」消息，我研究研究！
E: Oh? I just received another message — lemme see what kind of fun is inside this time!

C: 有迹可循，问题不大。
E: There are clues. It's not a huge problem.

C: 一颗——两颗——三颗——
E: One... two... three...

C: 我对列车组的审美很有信心！
E: I have great faith in the Crew's tastes!

C: 虽然还是有些不解，但书里也说那些谜语人惯爱破坏语言的确定性，想来他们并不倚赖用文字作答。
E: I don't fully understand it, but the books do say that The Riddlers love to destroy the certainty of language. I imagine they would not answer with words.

C: …既然创造了我，为什么又要把我扔在这里……
E: ...Why would you throw me in here after creating me...

C: 是他要我来的。
E: He made me.

C: 华莱士现年三十二岁又两个月，没有担任任何公职，传闻他整日游手好闲，莱姆士汀家族也不是很喜欢他……
E: Wallace is <unbreak>32</unbreak> years and 2 months old. He's never held a public office, and I hear he's a complete idler. The Limestein family doesn't appear to like him much either...

C: 自打我看完以后，连吃饭都在想象这些动物的模样。
E: Ever since I finished the book, I couldn't stop thinking about how these animals must look like.

C: 如何预约公务处理？
E: How do I make an official appointment?

C: 投丢的信？这倒是属于政务部的业务范围不假，但是……
E: Unsent letters? This falls within the scope of duties of the Administrative Department, but...

C: 你问我最近啊？挺好的，可以说是前所未有的充实。
E: You were asking how I've been recently? Pretty well, but I've been more productive than ever.

C: 以后有什么打算？
E: What's your plan for the future?

C: 再说了，大家都是剧团的演员，我也希望她有一天能在舞台上实现梦想。
E: She is one of us after all. I hope she will see her dream come true on stage one day.

C: 这不算什么值得恭喜的事情啦，小女子只是接了许多小角色，连着赶场可不是什么轻松的活儿～
E: There's nothing to congratulate me for. I've just been landing several small parts. Even just rushing to venues is no easy feat.

C: 你先忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 哎…银鬃铁卫的各位怎么还不下来呀？有他们在镇子上巡逻，我这心里才有安全感啊！
E: Hey... Why haven't the Silvermane Guards come down yet? It only feels safe to have them patrol around the town!

C: 除了这些，还有什么其他变化吗？
E: Any other changes around here besides those?

C: 当然喜欢呀。上层区的孩子们都穿很好看的衣服，还能收到很多精致的小礼物。
E: Course I do! The kids in the Overworld all wear beautiful clothes, and they all get pretty little gifts.

C: 也没啥，就是聊了聊我这矿具能租多少钱。
E: Nothing really. We were just talking about how much I could get if I rented my mining tools out.

C: …啊，我想起来了，想起来了！
E: Ah, I remember! I remember now!

C: 你怎么这么紧张？
E: Why are you so nervous?

C: 怎、怎么会！多亏了铁卫姐姐的奖章，现在我已经帮老爹把债务还清了。
E: No-no way! Thanks to the medal the Guard lady gave me, I've been able to help my old man pay off his debt.

C: 那你现在在做什么？
E: So what do you do now?

C: 一切都在变好，加油呀！
E: Things will get better. I'm rooting for you!

C: 但我和他们可不一样！那些家伙制造机器人就是为了办什么「改造机器人争霸赛」，让自己造出来的东西互殴到底…我反正无法理解那种趣味。
E: But I'm different from them! They make robots for the Modified Robot Fight — the robots they make fight each other... I don't get the fun in it.

C: 我是慕名而来观光的。
E: I'm here as I was attracted by the hotel's fame.

C: 那为什么在地上还有一家？
E: Then why is there another one in the Overworld?

C: 后来，我们这饭店生意越做越大，就有人想要去上层区拓展业务咯。
E: As our hotel's business grew, some people wanted to expand the business to the Overworld.

C: 你都鉴定过什么东西？
E: What have you appraised?

C: 没错。很多遗物的功能和价值，只有完全拆解之后才能准确判断。
E: Right. The function and value of relics can only be appraised accurately after they are disassembled.

C: 是啊。今天收工早，所以我自己出来找点事做。
E: Yeah, we finish early today. I'm out on my own trying to look for something to do.

C: 再见，{NICKNAME}。祝愿你们的旅途一切顺利。
E: So long, {NICKNAME}. I wish you all the best on your journey.

C: 你还在啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: You're still here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你为他们…为我们重新点燃了信念。相信「只要付出汗水和努力，生活就一定会给我们报偿」的信念。
E: You've rekindled hope for them... for us. You know the saying: "As long as we put in the hard work, life will pay out dividends." I believe that.

C: 鼓手是银鬃铁卫的要员之一，名叫佩拉。她经常在外面做义工…最近应该是在广场上给小孩子当导游吧？
E: On drums is Pela, one of the Silvermane Guards. She's always out on duty... These days, she should be out in the plaza watching over the kids.

C: 可见过如今的裂界攻势之后，我的想法也有所转变……
E: But seeing how the Fragmentum attacks have been developing has changed my mind...

C: 啊，是你们！谢谢你们为我和女儿做的一切…你们有什么事也请尽管提，我一定尽力帮忙！
E: Hey, it's you! Thank you for everything you've done for me and my daughter... If there's anything you need, please feel free to ask. I'll do my best to help.

C: …不认识？呃，关系不大，反正就是个玩过乐队的年轻军官。
E: ...You don't know? Huh, no big deal. He is just a young officer who once played in a band.

C: 呃…他确实是铁卫里的高官，但他和他姐老不对付了。
E: Uh... he's a high-ranking officer in the Guards for sure, but he doesn't get along with his sister.

C: 外来者，来聊聊吧——你现在方便吗？
E: Outsider, let's talk. Are you free right now?

C: 哟，欢迎光临劳德的小店！您需要什么尽管说！
E: Yo, welcome to Lauder's humble shop! Don't hesitate to lemme know what you need!

C: 哎呀，老巫婆每天都要对虎克指指点点，很讨厌啦！
E: Bah, all that old witch does is chide and berate me. Annoying!

C: 哟。
E: Yo.

C: 哟！听好——
E: Yo! Listen up —

C: 至于后来…我们俩再见面的时候，就是在姐姐的乐队里了。
E: Later on... we met again in Serval's band.

C: 你是<unbreak>28</unbreak>届搏击冠军？
E: Are you the champion of the <unbreak>28</unbreak>-time fighting champion?

C: 有些事情想问。
E: I have a few questions for you.

C: 所以你是想靠这个敛财？
E: So, you're planning to make a fortune out of this?

C: 小冰原熊歪着脑袋打量着你，扑扇着两只半圆形的耳朵。
E: The little arctic bear cub watches you with its head tilted, flapping its semicircular ears.

C: 它发出了开心的叫声。小熊身下原本压着某样东西——或许是它送给你的礼物？
E: The cub let out a joyous call. There is something laying underneath where the bear was sat... maybe it's a present for you?

C: 小熊好像发觉了你的意图，它挥了挥短小的手臂，似乎在与你告别。
E: The cub seems to have figured out your intentions. It waves its short little arm as if bidding you farewell.

C: 因为琥珀王喜欢蓝色呀。
E: Because blue is the Amber Lord's favorite color.

C: 拉雯妮？信她就完蛋了。
E: Lavonne? Don't trust a single word she says!

C: 女士，我们最近不营业……
E: Ma'am, we are closed for a little while...

C: 我就知道——从你嘴里蹦出来的净是些废话……
E: I knew it — everything that comes out of your mouth is nonsense...

C: 「哞哞」新品酸奶油！
E: Moo-Moo's all-new sour cream!

C: …坏了。
E: ...Drat.

C: 让我考虑一下……
E: Let me think about it...

C: 我们是时候站出来，回报克拉拉小姐了！
E: It's time for us to stand up and repay Miss Clara!

C: 你去找「地火」聊聊呗。
E: Go and talk to Wildfire.

C: 唔…灰宝，坐下！
E: Mmm... Gray, sit!

C: 你随时可以投降！
E: You can surrender any time!

C: 贝洛伯格艺术学院？
E: Belobog College of Art?

C: 外来…外来者…欢迎…迎…迎…迎…
E: Outside... outsider... welcome—come—come—come...

C: 哟，这不是{NICKNAME}嘛！这儿可比咱家那大饭店亮堂多了，你也好好感受一下吧！
E: Hey, isn't this {NICKNAME}? This is so much grander than the Grand Hotel, don't you think?

C: 宝贝，你有什么感想吗？
E: Baby, any thoughts?

C: 原来老板您是在怀疑我的业务水平啊，不用怀疑，我在太卜司里做了小两百年，被符玄太卜亲自赶出太卜司。
E: So, you have doubts about my professional proficiency. No fear, I worked there for almost two centuries, until I was personally ejected by Master Diviner Fu Xuan.

C: 都是些家常菜，没有特别的。
E: It's all home-cooked fare. Nothing special.

C: 还不是为了那个人…我们还不太熟，也没必要和你说太细。
E: Well, it's not for her... I don't really know you, so I don't want to say too much.

C: 你们在这等着，我去找下地衡司。
E: You guys wait here. I'll go find the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 净砚执事好像很能干啊？
E: Officer Jingyan seems very capable.

C: 我有事，下次再来。
E: I have things to take care of. I'll come back again another time.

C: 让我再考虑考虑。
E: I'll mull it over.

C: 连我这点小要求都满足不了，真是无能！
E: They can't even do this one simple thing for me. Useless!

C: 你要是实在好奇，就去地衡司公廨自己打听吧。
E: If you really must know, hit up the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery and ask around for yourself.

C: 「冥想遗忘治疗仪」是？
E: What's an amnesic meditation therapy device?

C: 你和行雪是什么关系？
E: What's your connection to Xingxue?

C: 「不夜侯」离这儿有点远啊…
E: The Sleepless Earl is quite far away from here...

C: 行了，就到这里吧。
E: Alright, that's enough for me.

C: 老弟，你怎么沉默了，接着说呀。
E: Why aren't you talking, dear brother? Go on.

C: 别听我姐胡说，再说了这些公务也不该讲给{NICKNAME}你听。
E: Don't listen to her. Besides, this is official business and we shouldn't be talking about it in front of {NICKNAME}.

C: 不是一家人不进一家门嘛。不过一码是一码，该走流程的事，我绝不会通融。
E: I guess apples don't fall far from the tree after all. These are two separate issues though: When it comes to proper processes, I'll never just give anyone "a break."

C: 哎…现在的年轻人啊…
E: Hmph... Kids today...

C: 最后一个问题是怎么回事？
E: What's that last thing you said? The one about the age?

C: 靠成千上万个像我这样细心又负责的书吏来管理咯。整个十王司系统中上百亿份档案，一直都是纯靠人力来管理维护的，所以书吏的编制一度超过了冥差。
E: Through tens of thousands of attentive and responsible scribes like me. The Ten-Lords Commission's system holds hundreds of millions of files, and they have always been maintained through manpower. That's why the staffing of scribes exceeded even the spiritfarers for a while.

C: …你不喜欢这个答案。
E: ...My response has left you dissatisfied.

C: 你在笑什么？
E: What are you laughing at?

C: 我没有别的事情要咨询了。
E: I've nothing else to inquire.

C: 虽说我在公廨里的地位连一只小谛听都不如，但是我从不气馁，只要我不争气，就没有什么可以生气了。
E: I might be lower in the Chancery's pecking order than even Diting, but I never lose courage. As long as I never try to live up to expectations, there's nothing to get mad about.

C: 你提到过自己是旅行作家？
E: You mentioned that you used to be a travel writer?

C: 所以你为了长生来到罗浮？
E: And so you came to Luofu to experience longevity?

C: 等你上了年纪，你就会发觉自己的身体像一座出了毛病的老座钟…开始你以为只是少上了油，接下来齿轮磨耗、发条松脱，摆子都打不准了…咳咳……
E: Wait until you're old, and you'll find that your body is like an old grandfather clock that's gone wrong... At first, you think it just needs some oil, then the gears wear out, the mainspring loosens, and the pendulum loses its accuracy... *cough*...

C: 所以我决定再观望一下，让他俩再压一压价格。反正也不是第一次了，他们俩也该习惯了，嘿嘿。
E: So I've decided to wait and see. Let them push down their prices again. In any case, this isn't the first time, and they should get used to it because it won't be the last!

C: 还有那令人吃惊的娱乐商品年龄分级制度…我那位在公司娱乐部门的朋友成天为这儿「<unbreak>200</unbreak>岁以下不可观看」的分级制度感到头疼。
E: As for those astonishing age restrictions for entertainment... My friend who works in the Entertainment Division keeps telling me how much of a problem the "Restricted for those under <unbreak>200</unbreak> years old" rating system is.

C: 对他们来说「十年不算长」，就好像是「要不了多久」的程度，你要是不催催他们，在他们的观念里这件事就不太着急。
E: For them, ten years is like a snap of the fingers, so when they tell you things like "soon," you have to keep on pressing them because in their minds, it's not an urgent matter.

C: 所以你提到的那位「带着棺木的行商」既是行商，那棺木里多半就是商品了。
E: So if the "traveling merchant with a coffin" you mentioned is a traveling merchant, there should be goods for sale stuffed inside the coffin.

C: 不需要，我不是生意人。
E: No thanks. I'm no merchant.

C: 让机器把活全干了，我又该干什么呢，胡思乱想？那样一来我不就变成仙舟的不安定因素了？明白了吧？
E: If a machine does this job for me, what am I going to do? Just sit there idling the day away? Why, I'd slowly become a destabilizing factor for the Xianzhou, wouldn't I? Are you starting to catch my drift?

C: 你这业务范围挺广啊？
E: Your scope of operations sounds pretty broad, huh?

C: 这算是给你一个职场小建议吧，主动保留你们一切的交流记录，这会省去一切「记不清了」、「我没说过」之类的麻烦。
E: This is just a small workplace tip for you: Be proactive about recording all your communications. This will cut straight through anyone trying to say "I don't remember" or "I didn't say that."

C: 咦，{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，又是你啊？你来这儿有什么事儿吗，是来参观的还是来找人的？
E: Hey, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, what are you doing back here? Have you come on business? Or to visit or see someone?

C: 我不便再打扰了。
E: I won't bother you any further.

C: 强求那些富贵做什么，出来贩药，迟早要还的…我只想做个普通的…哎……
E: Pursuing greed in medicine will eventually come back to bite you, sooner or later... I just want to live out an ordinary life... *Sigh*...

C: 十王司是做什么的？
E: What does the Ten-Lords Commission do?

C: 护珠人是做什么的？
E: What do Pearlkeepers do?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}你来的正好，我即将成为第一个靠技巧逃出幽囚狱的人，帮我见证下这个伟大时刻。
E: You've come at the perfect time, {F#girl}{M#boy}! I am about to be the first person to ever escape The Shackling Prison using my skills alone. You must be my witness to this great moment!

C: 再说了，我还有一个身份，就是阿合马铁窗集团的首席物流官。犯人们从阿合马那买的东西，还得眼巴巴的等着我给他们送过去呢。
E: Plus, I have another role — I'm the chief of logistics for the Arma Correctional Group. Prisoners have to rely on me to deliver whatever they bought from Arma.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 是啊。那天我正好在送货，远远的看到一群步离人冲杀了出去。
E: I was. I happened to be on a delivery that day, but I saw a group of borisin fighting their way out in the distance.

C: 说不定离开这里也是一桩好事。
E: Perhaps, it's a good thing to leave here.

C: 哈哈哈哈，您是想说「严峻」对吗？那是您多虑了。
E: Hahahaha, do you want to say "harsh"? That's not really the case.

C: 建木之灾前她就算出「卦涨落在艮、坎之间，其势大凶」，然而突如其来的卜卦结果既没能指出时间因由，也无法重现，没有卜官能够采信她。
E: Before the disaster in Ambrosial Arbor happened, she already saw the trigram vacillate between the Mountain and Water trigrams to a terrible degree. Yet, the sign that came suddenly didn't point to a specific time and reason and couldn't be shown again. Therefore, no diviners took her divination seriously.

C: 太卜司的职场环境好像有点…
E: The Divination Commission as a workplace is so...

C: 忘了自我介绍了，我叫法尔杜丝，第一次见面，如果您有玉兆，我可以发送名帖给您，顺带送上一些商务伴手礼。
E: Oh, by the way, my name is Fardus. Nice to meet you. If you happen to have a jade abacus, I'd be happy to send you an invitation letter and some gifts.

C: 你说这些店铺是卖破烂的？
E: Did you just say these stores are selling worn-out trash?

C: 是正经的工作吗？
E: Are your jobs respectable?

C: 金人巷到底有什么特别的？
E: What's so special about Aurum Alley?

C: 嗯，你要是有什么观光心得也可以跟我交流交流。
E: Well, if you have any ideas to share about sightseeing, I'm all ears.

C: 那个主厨还在那里装腔作势地和来吃饭的化外民说：「我们持明生性淡泊名利，就爱吃这一口儿。」哎，真是一言难尽……
E: That chef even put on this pretentious air and told Outworlders, "We Vidyadhara are indifferent to the trappings of fame and fortune, which is why we eat like this." Ack, that was too much...

C: 请细说「燃烧」与「茶」。
E: Please elaborate what "tea" and "combustible" mean.

C: 好说好说，我家卖的都是些不同寻常的珍宝，主打的就是「独一无二」，不敢说样样都是孤品，但至少在仙舟其他店里你可见不着。
E: Let me tell you all about it. Here you'll find nothing but the most unusual treasures, and my motto is "one-of-a-kind." I might not be able to claim that everything in the store is the only copy in the universe, but at least you won't find them anywhere else in the Xianzhou.

C: 我感觉好像少了些什么？
E: Why does it feel like something's missing?

C: 人们崇敬他尊敬他，但又有多少人担忧着他是下个「帝皇」呢？
E: People gaze upon him in awe and reverence, but how many of them are actually worried that he might become the next "Emperor"?

C: 最近生意还顺遂吗？
E: Has business been going well lately?

C: 呃，你好？我才来仙舟不久，冒昧问一句…阁下是？
E: Hmm... hello? I've only been here for a short while... May I know your name?

C: 这要是不行使你的权力，不是亏大发了？
E: Think of all the profits you could be making if you leveraged that!

C: 待在神策府里批阅几个时辰的公文，你就会像我一样期望能有人聊聊天。
E: After poring over documents for hours here, I bet you would be the same.

C: 那倒也不是。主要是，彦卿一直都沉迷于买剑，结果那天突然发现，彦卿的房间已经堆满了剑，快下不去脚了……
E: Nah, that's not it. It's just that I've always been so obsessed with buying so many swords until one day I suddenly realized that my room was full of them, and I had barely enough space to walk around inside my own room...

C: 欸…我就不跟你剧透了，你快点去听吧，听完咱们再讨论剧情。
E: Alas, I won't spoil it for you. Go check it out, and we can chat about the plot afterward!

C: 根本忙不过来！本座向来严于律己，对公务毫不懈怠。
E: I'm snowed under with work! I've always been self-disciplined and taken my duties seriously.

C: 现在嘛，平素里通勤的星槎也有专人为我开。若是真把我塞进星槎里面，我都未必还会开。
E: Nowadays, I have someone to pilot starskiffs for me even when I'm commuting. If I were to be shoved into a starskiff now, I'm afraid I might not be able to fly it.

C: 他每天承受的压力是你我都难以感同身受的，但他又必须表现得举重若轻——因为「将军」不能有半分软弱，也不能有半分动摇。
E: The stress he is under is beyond our imagination, but he must appear to have everything under control. It's because "the general" cannot show a single ounce of weakness or uncertainty.

C: 感谢你诚挚的祝福，可憎的有机体。「我们」将邀请你在最佳观赏位欣赏有机体的毁灭。
E: We appreciate your well-wishes, loathsome organic lifeform. When the time comes, we invite you to admire the downfall of intelligent organic lifeforms from the best vantage point.

C: 要聊聊吗，小神医。
E: Can we have a chat, miracle doctor?

C: 反正我有时间，那就聊聊吧，你想问什么呢？
E: I do have time for a little chat. What would you like to ask?

C: 不如苏打豆汁。
E: It's not as good as mung bean soda.

C: 这有些强人所难，因为吾只是一只机巧鸟。
E: You may be asking too much of a defenseless little cycrane like me.

C: 你平时还线下演出吗？
E: Do you still perform offline?

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 客人若是有别的打算，小店也随时为您服务。
E: If you have other plans, I am always at your service.

C: 像我这样的人，在仙舟上遍地都是，干着没滋没味的工作，几百年一晃眼也就过去了，然后等着魔阴身发作前，十王司的冥差前来接应。我不想这样啊！
E: There were plenty of individuals like me on Xianzhou, laboring away at mindless jobs. Centuries would fly by in the blink of an eye, then you just wait for the Ten-Lords commission's spiritfarers to claim you before you get mara-struck. I don't want any of that!

C: 阿来，你有点飘了。
E: Back'n, I think you're getting a little carried away.

C: 健康的生活方式，平衡的日常饮食，这些都是老生常谈的东西。但真正的秘诀，只有一条——坚持锻炼。
E: Old-timers often recommend a healthy lifestyle and a balanced diet, but the true secret lies in one thing: regular exercise.

C: 不过这仙宫里的好心神仙，冬生有吃有住。那位「不夜侯」的说书先生听咱讲故事便愿意周济咱，真是慈悲心肠呀。
E: But thanks to the kind celestials in this Celestial Hall, I have food and a place to live. That storyteller mister at Sleepless Earl gives me money for listening to my stories. He's so good!

C: 我正在这里执勤，看看有没有人超速驾驶星槎，保障交通安全。
E: I'm on duty here right now, making sure no one is speeding with their starskiffs and ensuring traffic safety.

C: 忘了自我介绍…我叫檀檀，是天舶司的航速测试员。
E: Oh, I forgot to introduce myself... My name's Tantan, and I'm a speed tester for the Sky-Faring Commission.

C: 有时候遇到复杂的状况…比如高峰期有人超速后肇事逃逸…那真的是分身乏术。虽然我如此热爱这份工作，但也偶尔会觉得这份工作太难了。
E: Sometimes, things get really complicated... like a hit-and-run during rush-hour traffic... If only I have a clone to get everything done. As much as I love this job, it's sometimes just too hard to handle.

C: 嘿，你也是跟我一样，现在滞留仙舟了吗？
E: Heh, are you stranded on Xianzhou just like me?

C: 凌解是春分的前一世，所以她也不算是春分的外人…再说了这本笔记就是她专门准备给春分的，是给我的礼物。
E: Ling Jie was my past life, so she's not really "someone else"... Besides, this notebook was especially gifted to me as a present.

C: 你的嘴真甜。不知道{F#小妹妹}{M#小弟弟}这张嘴，已经骗过多少人啦？
E: Oh, that sweet tongue. I wonder how many have been struck down by your glibness, {F#young lady}{M#young man}?

C: …我敢说那姑娘将来肯定能接下驭空大人的职务。
E: ...I dare say that girl is the next in line to succeed Madam Yukong.

C: 强者不会向弱者宣扬自己的强大。强者只需要矗立在那里，便说明了一切。
E: The strong do not parade their ability before the weak. Their mere presence speaks volumes.

C: 不过，来竞锋舰的观众可能对彦卿大人更感兴趣，我们广告词都想好了，就叫「与苏乐达™一起，霜刃一试」。
E: But visitors to the Skysplitter are likely to find Master Yanqing more interesting. We even have the campaign slogan ready: "Chill out with the Frosty Blade. Chill out with a SoulGlad™."

C: 只许买一个哦。
E: You can only get one, dear.

C: …都早些回家吧。
E: ...Let's go home soon.

C: 你耳朵呢？
E: Where are your ears?

C: 「水军」？
E: "Paid bots"?

C: 亲爱的，我好像感受到充满嫉妒的视线了。
E: Darling, I can sense glares of jealousy upon us.

C: 可这家伙长得同星际和平公司通缉令上的肖像一模一样…
E: But this person looks exactly like the face on that IPC Wanted poster...

C: 您是刚到仙舟吗？现在外面不太平，还没找到住处的话，可先到客栈里躲一躲。别担心，老板不收钱的。
E: Are you new to the Xianzhou? Things aren't very safe out there at the moment. If you haven't found boarding yet, come and hide out with us in the inn. Don't worry. The boss won't bill you for it.

C: 我的故乡是一个繁荣的矿业星球。在我祖宗的祖宗还年轻时，那里下起了雪，一下就是十年……
E: My hometown is a thriving mining planet. Back when my ancestor's ancestor was still young, it started snowing for ten long years...

C: 哎，我也没想到。
E: Yeah, who would've thought?

C: 咱是同步过信息的，我听说您比较擅长开玩笑，既然你说不会，我就放心了。
E: We've synced up before, and I hear that you're quite the joker. But if you say you won't, I'll take your word for it.

C: 我又不是在占道经营。
E: I'm not a street hawker.

C: 完成学会的论文…
E: I'm here to complete my thesis for the Guild...

C: 拍了不少素材…传到网上吧
E: I've taken quite a few photos... Time to upload them.

C: 没关系，朋友，无限制格斗的大门永远会为你敞开。
E: Don't worry, my friend. The doors of the Lawless Brawl are always open to you.

C: 想了解阿灼的故事…
E: I'd like to hear Luxie's story...

C: 我看到一位神明崛起，在星海中播撒种子——
E: I see the rise of a god, who scatters seeds throughout the stars...

C: 你在做自我介绍？
E: Was that a self-introduction?

C: 之后我为了去去晦气，就找了个废宅躲了起来。结果又遇到这档子事，哼哼……
E: Then, to shake off my bad luck, I found an old abandoned residence to hide in. And then I ran into this mess *groan*...

C: 岁阳也有自由呜呜的权利。
E: Heliobi have the right to say wooo whenever we want.

C: 那里有我认识的好朋友。
E: I have good friends there.

C: 腾骁将军是个什么样的人？
E: What kind of person was General Teng Xiao?

C: 刚才那一下子还不错，不过力道稍微差了点，换言之，还不够！
E: That last hit was decent, but it was lacking power. In other words, it's not enough!

C: 你仔细看看我，我从不抱怨，反而享受其中…和旁边那些毫无特色的{RUBY_B#公共木人桩}货色{RUBY_E#}可完全不一样，{F#壮小妞}{M#壮小伙}你可得好好记住哟～
E: Take a close look at me: I never grumble, I revel in it... I'm totally different from those mundane {RUBY_B#public wooden dummies}crappy dummies{RUBY_E#}. {F#Strong lass}{M#Strong lad}, you'd do best to remember that!

C: 你怎么知道他们的招数？
E: How did you learn of their moves?

C: 好呀。和你聊天不用在胸中做那许多忖度，正可以当成大脑按摩～
E: Certainly. I don't have to consider or speculate unnecessarily when I'm talking with you. It's relaxing, like a head massage~

C: 这里消费便宜。
E: Because it's cheap here.

C: 你们卜者说话真奇怪…
E: You diviners sure talk funny...

C: 不流失！不蒸发！零浪费！
E: No loss! No evaporation! Zero waste!

C: 完了完了…
E: Uh-oh...

C: 不在，我让他回去休息了。
E: Nope. I let him take a day off.

C: 爸爸，妈妈也在那里吗？我听叔叔说，阿姨和妈妈都在那里面……
E: Dad, is Mom there too? Uncle told me that Mom and Aunt are both in there...

C: 不知道该怎么说，看他们办葬礼，我有点感触…你说，在生命的尽头，究竟会有什么在等着我们呢？
E: For some reason, seeing the funeral makes me feel a bit sentimental... What do you think lies at the end of life?

C: 雅辛忒丝说，吾有一颗赤子之心。希望…吾不会让她失望。
E: Hyacinthia says I have a pure and innocent heart. I hope... I won't let her down.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 呃…嘿嘿…奶奶，我可是忍不住会撒点小谎的，你可别全信啊。
E: Uh... hehe... Granny, I can't help but tell little white lies sometimes, so don't take everything I say at face value.

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 希洛尼摩斯，瞧瞧他长得多结实。刚离家时还满脸稚气，现在啊，他的个头都要把你给比下去咯。
E: Hieronymus, look! He's grown so strong. He was all baby-faced when he first left home, but now, he's even taller than you!

C: 我悄悄和你说一桩事，你可不要说我揭老友的短处。
E: I'll let you in on a secret, but don't snitch on me for exposing my old pal's weakness.

C: 好比…他从不和「凯撒」打招呼，但每逢「凯撒」与人对弈，他却忍不住过去旁观，甚至想要「锐评」一番。
E: For instance... he never greets the Imperator, but whenever the Imperator plays a game of chess with someone, he can't help but watch from the sidelines. He's even tempted to leave harsh critiques.

C: 事到如今，哀地里亚称颂死亡的祷文，已经成了荒唐的妄语。
E: At this point, the prayers that hail death in Aidonia have become nothing but absurd delusions.

C: 呃…这不是，闲着也是闲着嘛，我一时兴起，想给扎格列斯之手来个迭代。
E: Uh... well, I was just sitting around, so I thought I'd tweak the Hand of Zagreus on a whim.

C: 哎，大地兽那些温厚、朴实的性情，我不但一度抛弃了它们，还做出过被老友吉奥刻勒斯视为「背叛」的事情，也险些让最后的逐火万劫不复……
E: Ah, the gentle and honest nature of the dromases... Not only did I once abandon them, but I also did something my old friend Geocles called proclaimed a betrayal, and I nearly brought eternal ruin upon the final Flame-Chase...

C: 我只能说，每个人心中都有一头大地兽——凝视它就仿佛凝视自己。
E: All I can say is that there's a dromas in everyone's heart, and gazing at it is like gazing at yourself.

C: 不分出胜负不罢休！
E: We play until there's a winner!

C: 当贼不动脑，终身是小贼。
E: A thief who doesn't use their brain will forever remain a petty thief.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 年假不按时休，可是会销假的。
E: If you don't take your vacation days regularly, they'll expire.

C: 寒鸦判官派个实习武弁来见我？
E: Judge Hanya sent a warden trainee to look for me?

C: 但仙舟智械大多是工造产物，天性与功能都是被固定设计出来的，智械关节更不是所有生物能模仿的。
E: Unfortunately, most of the Xianzhou Intellitrons are artifex creations. Their nature and functions are all designed to a set template, and the joints of Intellitron are not something all organics can imitate.

C: 才十八年，能学会吗？那也太速成了。
E: You can graduate in just eighteen years? That's definitely some crash course.

C: 翻进来的时候直接坐在云骑军身上了，我这不是也来补票了嘛。
E: I landed on a Cloud Knight when I jumped down the wall... So, here I am, making up for the tickets...

C: 我报名了演武仪典。
E: I signed up for Wardance.

C: 小道消息，比赛有内幕。
E: Gossip here! The results are rigged!

C: 嚯？想不到你对武术有了解。
E: Oh? Didn't think you'd know about martial arts.

C: 你做出当下最合适的决定。当然，你可以随时回来。
E: You made the best decision for the moment. But of course, you can come back at any time.

C: 这广告歌都已经几百年了。
E: The jingle for this ad is a few centuries old.

C: 换言之，他还活着呢……
E: In other words, he's still alive...

C: 你注意到鳞渊境的幽囚狱整体潜伏在古海之下，是不断向下延展的柱状结构。冥差们在这块屏幕前管理着不同囚室、不同囚犯的实时信息。
E: You notice the Scalegorge Waterscape's Shackling Prison is fully submerged under the ancient sea, as a column structure that extends endlessly into the depths. Spiritfarers monitor and manage real-time information of prison cells and prisoners on this screen.

C: 自出生起，我便秉受丰饶的赐福，令我的体型远远超越常人。然后我发现，自己恐高。
E: I have been blessed with Abundance since birth, which caused my body to grow far larger than the average person's. It was then that I discovered I'm scared of heights...

C: 进入休眠之前，你似乎听到有人在说「我想为人类文明保留一颗种子。」
E: Before entering hibernation, you seem to hear someone say that they wish to preserve a seed for human civilization.

C: 「犯我联盟者，必击而破之！」
E: "Those who defy the Alliance shall perish!"

C: 一架古筝，配有完备的智能语音教学、智能语音激励、智能语音阴阳怪气等实用功能。可惜现在没电了。
E: A guzheng that features a comprehensive AI audio tutorial, AI audio encouragement function, AI audio sardonicism function, and many other useful functions. It's a pity that it is out of battery now.

C: 就当是顺便做件好事好了，你可以借助我这鸟随意观察，但是发现了*藏起来的人*就请带我过去。
E: Just see it as doing a good deed in passing. You can borrow my bird and take a look around. Once you've found that hidden person, please bring me along.

C: 你不会一直躲在这里吧？
E: You haven't been hiding here all this time, have you?

C: 一二三四，二二三四……
E: One-two-three-four, two-two-three-four...

C: 我忘记一半了。
E: I've already forgotten half of it.

C: 糟了，我可打不过她啊。
E: Darn it, I don't think I can beat her.

C: 和咱将军是忘年之交。
E: Been buddies with our general for ages.

C: 你说飞剑强还是子弹强？
E: Which do you think is stronger, flying swords or bullets?

C: 铁臂卢卡！无敌拳法！
E: Luka "Strongarm"! Invincible fists!

C: {NICKNAME}教练我们爱你！
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, we love you!

C: 「丹鼎药理」四字占据了广告最显眼的位置，证明了它高贵的出身——六御之一的丹鼎司。
E: The words "Alchemy Pharmacology" occupying the most conspicuous spot on the billboard manifests its distinguished origin — the Alchemy Commission, one of the Six Charioteers.

C: 「牵星锭锚，敢系巨舰于狂渊——工造司监制。」
E: "The star anchor is strong enough to tie a giant ship to an abyss — produced by the Artisanship Commission."

C: 每个人都曾好奇过这种用作摆设的高大瓷器内部装了什么，但俗话也说「好奇心害死猫」，所以还是算了吧。
E: It is hard not to be curious about what is stored inside the tall porcelain used as decoration. However, as the saying goes, "Curiosity killed the cat." Let's forget about it.

C: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
E: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「大敌 • 烬灭」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Nemesis — Ruin."

C: 「目前，玉阙仙舟正在搜寻义侠之首拉曼查的下落，希望与之重新建立联系。」
E: "The Yuque is currently searching for the leader of the Rangers, La Mancha, hoping to rebuild a connection with the group."

C: 出于朴素的道德观念与人道主义精神，你将密封数字单据拆毁，打开了快递盒……
E: Out of simple moral obligation and the human spirit, you tear off the digital label and open the courier package...

C: 爱在成为爱之前叫什么呢？你下意识地思考起这个问题。就在你沉思时，浓雾被一双温暖的手拨开，透进来的光芒驱散了所有阴霾，纤纤玉指点在你的额头，你如梦初醒。
E: You start to wonder: What is love called before it was love? While you are absorbed in your thoughts, a pair of gentle arms brush away the dense fog, allowing light to come through and dispel the gloom. A slender finger taps on your forehead and awakens you.

C: 你抚摸着卵壳表面，炽热强烈的冲击感喷涌而出，顺着你的指尖瞬间抵达天灵盖，有道嘶哑低沉的嗓音在你耳边徘徊不去。
E: You gently touch the surface of the eggshell, and a searing and intense impact bursts out and surges right to your head through your fingertips. A hoarse and deep voice lingers by your ears.

C: 我专程请假过来听！
E: I took the day off to come here!

C: 快查查有什么瓜。
E: Quick, what's the tea?

C: 信仰帝弓司命祂老人家的…
E: We of the Xianzhou Alliance are not the only ones who trust in the Reignbow Arbiter...

C: 听起来是蛮奇怪的，但人坚持了这么久，胜在心诚。既然想见你，你就露个面给呗，给他们个惊喜。
E: That's peculiar, but their determination is admirable. I guess it's the heart that counts. Since they wish to meet you, why don't you show your face and give them a nice surprise?

C: 你不知道束形却邪阵是否还能正常运转，但你闭上眼，幻想自己身躯膨胀至山丘大小，徒手倒拔起阵中间的柱子的身姿该有多惊人。
E: You're not sure if the Evil Binding Matrix is still functioning, but the moment you close your eyes, you imagine your body inflates to the size of a hill. How scary would it be to pluck out the pillar in the middle of the matrix with your bare hands?

C: 酒店公用的梦境电话，可以打给不同「时刻」。据说拨号盘上的眼睛会在通话时活过来。
E: A hotel public dreamphone that can make calls to different Moments. It is said that the eyes on the phone dial come alive during a call.

C: 《在夜幕下与楼同奏》
E: Tower Rhapsody Under the Moonlight

C: 「黄金的时刻」随处可见的电话亭，据说可以和梦境之外联络。但眼前这座暂时无法使用。
E: A telephone booth that is commonly found in the Golden Hour. They're said to be able to communicate with people outside the Dreamscape, but this one is currently out of order.

C: …不知道为什么，这个望远镜里面正在放映「钟表小子」的系列动画。
E: ...For some reason, this telescope is showing a Clockie serial animation.

C: 幽鲁士餐饮连锁的分店之一，家庭宴会和朋友小聚的不二选择。
E: One of Yuluxe's Culinary Chain's branches. It's the top choice for family and friend gatherings.

C: 知更鸟的故事鼓舞了许多人，让他们以为自己能像雏鸟一样飞翔——事实证明，雏鸟总是会跌落的。
E: Robin's story has inspired many, making them think that they could soar into the sky as a nestling... When in fact a baby bird will surely fall to the ground.

C: 这是一家外貌调整店，可以让你像某些游戏的开头一样随心所欲地修改形象——当然，仅限梦中。
E: This is an appearance adjustment shop that allows you to tweak your looks any way you want, just like at the beginning of certain games... Only effective in the dream, of course.

C: 被大大小小、奇形怪状的钟表所环绕的角落，或许是「钟表匠」曾经的工作台。
E: A corner surrounded by clocks big and small, of all strange shapes and sizes. Perhaps it was once the Watchmaker's workbench.

C: 这怪诞的梦究竟何时才能醒来？钟表和你一样想知道答案。
E: When will you rouse from this strange dream? Just like you, the clock wishes to know the answer.

C: 空气中满是令人平静的木头气息——不是活的，而是原生的、经过碾压和漂白的木制纸张。
E: The air is filled with oaken scent that soothes the nerves — not alive, but all-natural, compressed and bleached paper made from wood.

C: 一扇紧锁的房门，门后传来淡淡的灰尘气息，似乎已经很久没有打扫——这并不奇怪，总有人不愿从梦中醒来。
E: A faint smell of dust comes from the space behind the firmly locked door, suggesting that the room has not been cleaned for quite some time. This is not unusual, as there are people who refuse to wake up from the dream.

C: 你望向「尽头」，那里似乎有什么无法窥见的存在，正于永恒静默之中，吟唱着不可言说的赞美诗。
E: You gaze at the "End" — there appears to be some unseen presence there, singing an unspeakable hymn in the ever-silence.

C: 在名为「匹诺康尼」的梦中，被梦见的人醒了。
E: In the dream called "Penacony," the person who was being dreamed about rouses.

C: 闲置的茶具整齐摆在桌面上，曾经的欢谈情景仿佛还历历在目。
E: The idle tea set is neatly arranged on the table, conversations and sights of past still vivid in one's mind.

C: 倘若这是一个飞镖盘，那么它的上靶率肯定低到发指。
E: If this were a dartboard, it would have a ridiculously low hit rate.

C: 没什么好聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 你拥有的力量十分奇特，我好奇你能在梦想之地掀起什么样的波澜。
E: You possess a very special power. I wonder what kind of groundbreaking deeds you can achieve here.

C: 我可得好好把这位爷供着…接送上下班是小事，洗衣做饭烧水搓澡都不在话下！
E: I'll have to treat this client like a king... chauffeuring him to and from work? No problem! Laundry, cooking, scrubbing his back, all part of the day's work!

C: 那当然！
E: Definitely!

C: 家里人是指谁。
E: Who's this family you're talking about?

C: …真的？
E: ...Really?

C: 你的名字…
E: Your name...

C: 超出标准线三根皮皮西手杖的高度，就这你还敢说自己是皮皮西人？
E: That's over the height limit by the length of three Pepeshi canes. And you still dare to say that you're a Pepeshi?

C: 等等…这不对劲。
E: Hang on... something isn't right.

C: 若无其事地离开。
E: Leave as if nothing happened.

C: 现实中的坏消息已经够多了，犯不着在梦境里再去强调它们，是吧？
E: There's already enough bad news out there in the real world, so why go and underscore it in the dreamscape?

C: 乌玛压低了声音。
E: Uma lowers their voice.

C: 你怎么评价现在的音乐？
E: How do you rate modern music?

C: 即便是一模一样的音乐曲调，假如其诞生的年代不同，它所代表的意义和价值也会完全颠覆。
E: Even if the tune is exactly the same, if it was born in a different era, then the meaning and values it represents will be completely subverted.

C: 认识？何止认识……
E: Know her? I more than just know her...

C: 卡什女士面露愠色。你不知道她的怨气指向何方，但至少现在她还表现得十分克制，没有丧失身为旧日明星的那份优雅。
E: Lady Cash looks sullen. You don't know where she is directing her resentment, but for now, she is demonstrating incredible restraint in not losing the elegance of her former celebrity.

C: 维塔利将路灯牵了过来。一见面，它就礼貌地向你点头问好。
E: Vitali leads the Street Lamp to you. When your eyes meet, it nods and greets you politely.

C: 你以为这就完了吗？你以为你可以吃了我的脆筒后扬长而去吗？不！你不可以！
E: Do you think that's it? Do you think you can leave after you ate my cone? No! Impossible!

C: 只要这些道具还能动，它们就该拿出全部的力气取悦观众，为我赚钱！
E: As long as they can still move, they should do their best to entertain the audience and make money for me!

C: 他们说要来匹诺康尼，我就跟着来；他们说要开店，我就帮着打杂。我是他们的儿子，也是最亲近的跟屁虫。
E: When they said they wanted to come to Penacony, I followed. When they said they wanted to open a store, I helped. I am their son and their closest tagger.

C: 有一件事是肯定的——我的确爱着韦和小佩。但我对他们的爱…好像和别人眼里的爱有很大区别。
E: One thing I'm sure of... I love Wes and Pennie. But my love for them... seems different from the love people see.

C: 周围的孩子还在哭着闹着遍地打滚的时候，我就已经习惯了用绘画表达自己的内心世界。凡是能用画笔创作出来的，我都不想浪费言语去表达。
E: While other kids were wailing and rolling on the floor, I had already learned how to express my feelings through paintings. And if my artwork couldn't convey them, I didn't bother to say them either.

C: 好吧…看来我还要继续等下去……
E: Alright... I guess I'll have to keep searching...

C: 同僚？
E: Fellow craftsman?

C: 听起来似乎和钟表没什么联系…但还是谢谢您，我会抽空去看看的。
E: That doesn't sound related to clocks... But thank you. I will make time to check it out.

C: 老婆子我啊，忙了半辈子、累了半辈子，也是时候享享清福了。
E: An old granny like me, after hustling for half my life, it's time for me to enjoy some peace and quiet.

C: 是的，这是音乐家与乐迷们的噩梦！
E: Yes, it's the greatest nightmare for musicians and fans alike!

C: 即使什么娱乐设施都没有，我也愿意待在栏杆边上，对着远处的楼宇发呆一整天。
E: Even if there were no fun and games on offer, I'd be happy to stand by the rail and stare at the distant buildings for a whole day.

C: 也亏是能吓住他们……
E: At least my seriousness scared them into behaving...

C: 建筑师和筑梦师，这两种工作没什么本质区别。虽然在建筑手段上大有不同，但对于我们设计者来说，工作还是一样的工作。
E: An architect and a Dreamweaver, the two jobs have no intrinsic difference. Although there are many differences in the methods of construction, to us designers, the work is the same.

C: 再见，可爱的朋友。
E: Farewell, my loveable friend.

C: 入住期间，如有换房、提前退房等需求，请通过您的「梦境护照」递交申请，我们将在一个工作日内为您办理完毕。
E: If you need to change rooms or check out, please submit your request via your Dreamscape Pass, and we will process it within one working day.

C: 钢琴家正沉浸于自己的世界中。那个世界和谐圆融、自成一体，就如同天体运行、潮汐涨落，而你无法搅扰干涉。
E: The pianist is immersed in his own world, a realm of harmony and abundance, akin to the celestial bodies in motion and the ebb and flow of the tides — something beyond your disruption.

C: …你觉得我还会相信吗？
E: ...Do you really expect me to believe that?

C: 根据字面意义，入梦即进入梦境。
E: Well, "dream" refers to the process of entering the Dreamscape.

C: 对于各类突发状况，酒店都有完备的应对方案，您可尽情享受梦中时光。
E: We have prepared a comprehensive emergency plan to handle various situations, ensuring that you can fully enjoy your dream time.

C: 行了，给你讲了这么多，你先去看几场比赛再找我聊吧。和外行人聊天，我实在是提不起兴致。
E: Alright, I've told you enough. Go watch a few games before coming back to talk to me. I'm not too keen on discussing with laypeople.

C: 你说，是不是这个理？
E: Don't you agree?

C: 在家族的统辖下，匹诺康尼由<color=#dbc291ff>橡木、苜蓿草、隐夜鸫、猎犬和鸢尾花</color>五大家系共同管理。
E: Within The Family, Penacony is governed by five major lineages: <color=#dbc291ff>Oak, Alfalfa, Nightingale, Bloodhound, and Iris.</color>

C: 作为我们之间「友谊」的见证，之后我每周都会为您准备<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak>枚「艾迪恩代币」</color>。
E: As a token of our "friendship," I will provide you with <color=#f29e38ff>ten Aideen Tokens</color> every week.

C: 皮皮西几乎不会允许别人摸自己的绒球——谁又敢让街上的陌生人帮自己掏耳朵呢？不过杰诺并不是真正的皮皮西。
E: Pepeshi rarely allows anyone to touch their fluff ball, just like how a human wouldn't let a stranger pick their ear. However, Jno is not a real Pepeshi.

C: 您真是一位好奇心旺盛的客人！我猜如果这是一家现实中的餐厅，您也会对他们的食材供应链感兴趣，对吧？
E: You are quite a curious customer! If this were a restaurant in reality, you'd probably inquire about their supply chain, right?

C: 你有一个矮个子女同桌，名字叫银狼。在你印象中，她上课时总是偷偷在课桌下打游戏，但即使如此她的成绩仍然很好。
E: You have a short female classmate named Silver Wolf. From what you recall, she often plays games under her desk during class, yet manages to maintain good grades.

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: …你挂断了电话，内心感到有些绝望。日理万机的公司高管生活果然离你还是太遥远了。
E: ...You hang up, feeling a sense of despair. The life of a senior executive juggling millions of things every day feels too foreign to you.

C: 这位客人，你平时最喜欢用的「武器」是什么呢？
E: Hi, may I know which weapon is your favorite?

C: 这是你在「白日梦酒店」的专属停车位，永久保留，不额外收费。可以将购买到的车辆停放在此处。
E: This is your exclusive parking lot at the Reverie. The ownership is permanent at zero extra charges. You can park your car here.

C: 别跟我掰扯花了多少钱，那是你付给车行的。购买凭证只能说明你的所有权，然后呢？占有了我就以为能随心所欲了吗？想得也太轻松了。
E: Don't bother telling me how much you have splurged on me — that's the deal between you and the dealership. What else does the proof of purchase mean other than your ownership? Do you think you are free to do anything you please with that? It's not that simple.

C: 有其他办法吗？
E: Is there anything else I can do besides charging?

C: 打开车灯。
E: Switch on the car's lights.

C: 我完成小鸟们的委托了！
E: I've completed the commission for the birdies!

C: 我们要的是奖励房、奖励房懂不懂？！不是什么情趣房间！
E: We wanted a prize room! You heard me!? Not a love hotel room!

C: 你为什么在这做志愿者？
E: Why are you volunteering here?

C: 不过我相信，终有一天，等到人们被枯燥的现实折磨得遍体鳞伤…他们一定会重新对美好的事物投去目光。
E: But I believe that one day, when people are battered by the monotony of reality... They will once again cast their eyes on happier things.

C: 即便如此，我依旧心怀梦想……
E: Even so, I still have a dream...

C: 羡慕什么？
E: What are you envious of?

C: 他甚至…博识尊在上…甚至妄图将我变为刽子手与帮凶！
E: He even... oh, by Nous... attempted to make me an executioner and his accomplice!

C: 你如何看待美梦？
E: What are your thoughts on dreams?

C: 有次我离开公馆去「黄金的时刻」采购，在路边遇到了一个带货的逐梦客。
E: There was a time I went out to buy something in the Golden Hour. I bumped into a Dreamchaser who worked as a salesman along the way.

C: 是因为开启了推进系统的缘故吗…不对，是因为我好嗨！
E: Is it because I've turned on the propulsion system... No, it's because I'm excited!

C: 俗话说得好：「三个沃尔X，顶个钟表匠。」，我们就在钟表小子雕像前结拜了。
E: The saying goes: "The more Ws you get, the better." So, we vowed to be brothers in front of the Clockie Statue.

C: 摊上这种「结拜兄弟」，可真是…唉！
E: Only I could end up with "sworn brothers" like that... Eugh!

C: 你怎么在这…
E: Why are you here...

C: 可恶啊…动画…动画不应该是给人带来快乐的东西吗？
E: Dagnabbit... Aren't... Aren't cartoons supposed to bring people joy?

C: …都是很久以前的事了。
E: ...It all happened a long time ago.

C: 再往后的事，你也清楚了。作为调饮师的生活很单调，但也很丰富，值得反复回味。
E: And you know the rest from there. Life as a drinksmith is monotonous but rich. It is worth savoring.

C: 少废话。拒绝和比我高的人讲道理，问就是我对！
E: Quit your nonsense. I will not try and reason with people taller than me. I am always right!

C: 它们的故事让我忍不住落泪，我最愿意为美好的爱情而欢呼了。
E: I can't help but cry watching their story. I will always let out a cheer for true love.
(Meow?)

C: 不过…等抓了最后这只老鼠，暂时应该能清净一阵子了，呵呵。
E: But... once I catch the very last rat, everything should stay clean for a while, hehe.

C: 庭中蔷薇美则美矣，却不免怯懦、娇娇滴滴…倒不如教自由的继续自由，支离的愈发支离。
E: The roses in the yard are so gorgeous, yet so timid, so delicate and helpless... We might as well teach the free to continue to be free, and the splintered to become more fractured.

C: 「石剑」抓着你絮絮叨叨地讲了好久操控技巧，看得出他确实在这方面很有心得。
E: Stoneblade grabs onto you and prattles a never ending spiel about his control panel skills. You can tell that he really does have experience when it comes to this.

C: 当然，我只好奇而已，并没有打算窥探你的隐私。毕竟每个人都有自己的小秘密，尤其是像你这样的神秘无名客，对吧？
E: Of course, I'm just curious about all of this — I don't mean to intrude. After all, everyone has their own secrets, especially an enigmatic Nameless like yourself, right?

C: 不过也有坏处。时间久了，片场的所有人都只会用「红哨小姐」这个外号称呼我了…哪怕是我身边的人，知道我真名的也没有几个。
E: However, it has its drawbacks. After a while, everybody started calling me "Miss Red Whistle"... Not even the people in my team knew my real name.

C: 地面是…紫红色，很有弹性，时不时还会轻微颤动…墙面也是，我没敢碰，但它们看起来温热又黏腻…有点恶心。
E: The ground was... it was purplish-red and springy. It would shiver slightly from time to time... The walls too. I didn't dare touch them, but they looked warm and sticky... It was disgusting.

C: 不出意外的话，我果然还是出意外了——虽然找到不少好素材，可我现在找不到回去的路了……
E: If things are as I expect, the unexpected has occurred... Though I have collected a great deal of inspiration, I have lost my way back from here.

C: 你懂的，虽然来不了多少钱，但我至少也吃饱穿暖，过得也挺开心。可父母就知道成天数落我，说我什么用都没有、什么事都做不好……
E: You understand. Even though I'm not making much money, I can eat and sleep soundly. I'm quite content. But, my parents are always criticizing me, telling me I'm useless, and I can't do anything right...

C: 这只是我个人的一点感想。当然，我可能只在第三层，而「钟表匠」在第五层…有机会能当面问问他就好了。
E: These are just my personal views. Of course, I imagine I am still only on something like the third floor when the Watchmaker is up high on the fifth... I would love to have a chance to ask him myself one day.

C: 那些受欢迎的梦里可没有空间给人种田——像什么「黄金的时刻」，早就被高楼挤满了。
E: Those popular dream areas don't have enough space to allow people fields to farm in... Places like the Golden Hour have long since been filled up by giant buildings.

C: 自从并入星际贸易网络后，原本能用来耕作的土地都被铺上了高速路，粮食供应也被星际和平公司一手包揽。再没有饥荒出现，也没有值得开垦的地方了。
E: Ever since we were integrated into the Interstellar trade network, all land that could be used for farming has been paved over with highways and the IPC has taken over our food supplies. There is no more risk of hunger and no more land is worth farming.

C: 有道理，孩子们的天赋不同，擅长的东西也不同，能够扬长避短是最好的。
E: You may have a point. Children have different talents and excel in different areas. It would be best to utilize their strengths and avoid their weaknesses.

C: 听说家族邀请了众多派系的宾客来到美梦，但愿有人能够发现这一点，并且去阻止吧。
E: I heard that The Family has invited many guests from different factions to the dream. Let us hope that someone can discover this and stop it in time.

C: 原来是你…不愧是和拉扎莉娜女士一样的无名客啊！
E: So it's you... Not bad for a Nameless like Madam Razalina!

C: 无论是谁，我衷心感谢所有帮助过流梦礁的人。虽然我并非这里的原住民，但流梦礁几乎已经是我第二个故乡了。
E: Regardless, I am sincerely grateful to those who helped the Dreamflux Reef. I may not be a local of this place, but the Dreamflux Reef has almost been my second hometown.

C: 再见，愿群星铭记列车的旅途，遗忘永远追不上你们的脚步。
E: Farewell. May the stars remember the journey of the Express, and oblivion never match your pace.

C: 历史的美丽之处正在于，它只有寥寥的信息，却能为我们展现出无限的世界。
E: The allure of history lies in its sparse collection of facts, which can nonetheless unveil a boundless world of possibilities.

C: 从那以后起，大家逐渐放下了对我的怀疑，店里的生意也一天比一天好。
E: From that moment forth, everyone gradually let go of their doubts about me, and business at the cafe got better and better.

C: 他现在已经不在了，但我的店即便没有他也天天有顾客造访，这是他留给我的礼物…相信每一位流梦礁的居民，都应该收到过类似的礼物吧……
E: He is no longer with us anymore, but even without him, customers still visit our store. That's a gift that he left behind for me... I trust all the residents of Dreamflux Reef have all received the same gift...

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 嗯…折纸小鸟都喜欢恶作剧呢，最近有人说<color=#dbc291ff>入口那边的灯泡</color>经常闪烁，或许就是某个小鸟的手笔。
E: Hmm... All origami birds love pranks. I hear there's been a flickering <color=#dbc291ff>lightbulb by the entrance</color>. Maybe it's one of the birds' pranks again.

C: 关于你自己…
E: About yourself...

C: 当小镇出现危机的时候，我也会带着大家一起打退那些坏蛋——小家伙们都叫我不好惹的「赤红大哥」啾！
E: When the town is in danger, I also lead everyone in fending off those bad guys. Everyone knows I'm Boss Red, and that I'm not to be trifled with, tweet!

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 小鸟粗暴地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird snatches the coin from you viciously, and then... gobbles it up!

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，苏乐达是小鸟们的最爱，在<color=#dbc291ff>汽水瀑布那里</color>，多半能找到贪嘴的小鸟啾。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Birds love SoulGlad, so you'll have a high chance of finding a greedy bird by the <color=#dbc291ff>soda waterfall</color>, tweet.

C: 直至战争爆发，不善战斗的苏萨为了实现和平的心愿，与犯人们一同奋战，最终在决战中英勇战死。
E: That was till war broke out. Sousa, who was not proficient in combat, stood together with the prisoners and heroically gave his life in the final battle — to realize his wish for peace.

C: 哦！居然还能遇到喜欢玩具的成熟体有机生命，真是令人欣喜！
E: Oh! To have the fortune to meet a fully grown organic lifeform who likes toys. What a delight!

C: 回见，愿您度过愉快的一天。
E: Goodbye, have a wonderful day ahead.

C: ——除了兢兢业业之外。
E: Well... apart from your diligence.

C: 我所感受到的欣喜，与我发现贝壳时的欣喜，显然并不是同一种事物。
E: The joy I felt was on a whole other level compared to when I found the shell.

C: 咦？您…您……
E: Huh? Y—You...

C: 来，这是人家给客官准备的礼物，请好好珍惜啾~
E: Here, this is a gift I've prepared for you. Please treasure it, tweet!

C: 啾？客官想要跟人家聊天吗？随时奉陪啾！
E: Tweet? Do you want to chat with me? You're welcome any time, tweet!

C: 船长，咱们下次再聊，我得继续打广告了。
E: Captain, let's catch up another time. I'll go back to advertising.

C: 刚才没注意你在旁边，我是不是念得太大声吵到你了，抱歉抱歉，以后我会注意点的……
E: I didn't notice you were here. Was I too loud? I'm sorry, I'll pay more attention next time...

C: 如果这样的生活继续下去，我还有空弹贝斯吗？如果继续这样，我会不会有天连怎么弹琴都忘了？这里也没有练习的地方，员工休息区虽大，却容不下我的箱头和箱体。
E: Will I even get the time to play the bass if I keep up with this job? Will I forget how to play the bass one day? There's no place for me to practice here. The staff lounge may be spacious, but it's not meant for my amp head and cab.

C: 生活不应该是这样的…我小时候可没想过会有这么一天，长大了就变成工作的奴隶，怎么想都觉得可悲……
E: My life shouldn't play out this way... Even as a child, I never ever imagined growing up to become a slave to my job. This is pathetic, through and through...

C: 您想选哪一种呢？
E: Which would you prefer?

C: 嘿嘿～我只是说了我的心里话。大副鼓励我要发挥自己的特长，没事就勤说话。所以我都是心里想到什么就说什么，尽量不让嘴巴闲着。
E: Hehe, I'm just saying whatever comes to mind. The first mate always encourages me to show off my strengths and talk more when I have nothing to do. That's why I always say whatever comes to mind and try not to let my tongue be idle.

C: 我采取的管理策略是基于每个生物的个体特点，定制个性化的成长计划。
E: The management strategy I've adopted involves customizing a personalized development plan based on the characteristics of each individual.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 船长好！
E: Hi, captain!

C: …谢谢，不用了。
E: ...Thank you, I'm good.

C: 匹诺康尼有许多智械，知识：无机生命的生活和人类并无不同。
E: There are many Intellitrons in Penacony. Knowledge: The life of inorganic lifeforms is not different to that of humans.

C: 知识应当流通与分享。
E: Knowledge is meant to be circulated and shared.

C: 它美好得像一个电影的结局，不是吗——邪恶商人的阴谋被揭穿，正义的伙伴名扬天下，从头开始，幸福又快乐地追逐着梦想……
E: It would have been the perfect ending to a movie. After all, we had exposed the shenanigans of unscrupulous merchants and under the banner of justice, we could happily chase after our dreams with a clear conscience all over again...

C: 这种商机谁都能想到。而在匹诺康尼，所有人都知道的赛道自然会遇到无数竞争者。
E: These are common business ideas anyone can come up with. And if you venture into such trades here on Penacony, you'll only find yourself up against a stampede of competitors.

C: 皮皮西！皮皮西！皮皮西！
E: Pepeshi! Pepeshi! Pepeshi!

C: 呼…这种人还只是蠢，已经算好的了。有另一种是坏——
E: Phew... These people are just plain stupid, which is almost a relief. It's the truly malevolent ones we need to worry about...

C: 要是在现实里，这就是…谋杀！就是因为有这种渣滓存在，我的家人才会……
E: If this was real life, this would simply be... murder! It's because of scum like them that my family...

C: 真是精彩纷呈的一出大戏啊……
E: What a wonderful show...

C: 总之这很难不让人去怀疑，事情背后是否有什么阴谋。比如一场家族针对学生们秘密进行的精神实验，再比如梦境的结构发生根本改变…
E: Either way, I can't help but suspect that there is some kind of secret plot behind all this. I mean, what if this is some kind of secret psychological experiment that The Family carried out on students? Or maybe the structure of the Dreamscape itself suddenly experienced a fundamental structural transformation...

C: 美梦多彩，理想自由——折纸大学的校训始终如此，作为学院代表，我们理应做出表率，将这种精神贯彻下去。
E: Color your dreams, free your ideals — this has always been Paperfold University's motto. As a representative of the academy, we should lead by example and uphold this spirit.

C: 美梦多彩，理想自由——折纸大学的校训始终如此，作为学院代表，我们理应做出表率，将这种精神贯彻下去。
E: Color your dreams, free your ideals — this has always been Paperfold University's motto. As a representative of the academy, we should lead by example and uphold this spirit.

C: …跟你在这较劲也没什么意思。演出都结束了，从结果来看，咳…你们也算完成了任务，虽然我是不明白这种音乐到底哪点好了。
E: ...It's pointless to argue with you. The show is over, and from the outcome, ahem... I suppose you've all completed the assignment, though I still don't get what's so good about this music.

C: 真是，想起来就生气！这种人还能当上学院代表，简直不可思议，要我说，不如把财富学院的资源都给我们，省得那群人闹出更多笑话来！
E: Gah, just thinking about it makes me angry! It's preposterous that such a person could even become an academy representative! If you ask me, how about diverting all of Fortune Academy's resources to us? That'll at least save us from even more embarrassment!

C: 当然记得。
E: Of course I do.

C: 这是你的副业吗？
E: Is this your side hustle?

C: 你还记得睡蕉小猴吗？
E: You still remember Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 有个杀手带着他的受害者走进黑暗的丛林深处。受害者说：「我害怕！」杀手生气地说——
E: A killer takes his victim deep into a dark forest. The victim says, "I'm scared!" The killer angrily replies:

C: 是曾经收到的一份礼物。交到我手中时，是完全空白的。
E: It was a gift I received, and it arrived blank.

C: 沉思的人偶表示，让它沉思了百年的就是这个问题。
E: The puppet in contemplation says: This is precisely the issue I spent a century deciphering.

C: 你静静地观察着这一切，恍惚之间，你几乎生出一种自己是观察者的疏离感。
E: You silently observe everything. In a daze, a sense of detachment from being an observer nearly takes over you.

C: 宁静而典雅，还有数不尽的宝物…这正可谓是猫儿理想中的生活。想必被赠予这层幻境的人，也会因为猫儿的品味而感动不已吧！
E: Peaceful and elegant, overflowing with untold riches... This is the dream life. Whoever receives this fantasia will also be moved by my impeccable taste!

C: 八成装着皮皮西人。
E: Probably because it has a Pepeshi person inside.

C: 说不定今天还能遇见。
E: Maybe I can meet her again tonight.

C: 那么火爆的大明星…
E: Such a popular celebrity...

C: 呃…它不算无机生命吧。
E: Uhm... It doesn't count as an inorganic lifeform, right?

C: 要不干脆摆了吧！
E: Can we just give up?

C: 我在现实就指望它了！
E: I'm counting on it in reality!

C: 你说，如果梦里有宝箱…
E: Say, if we could get a real treasure chest in the dream...

C: 看招！
E: Take this!

C: 元年苏乐达限时特卖！
E: Epochal SoulGlad! Only for a limited period of time!

C: 客房的修缮方案…
E: About the restoration plan for the guest rooms...

C: 要说还是你靠谱啊，直面偶像竟然还能面不改色。走吧，咱们现在过去假装偶遇，趁机要个签名！
E: You're so awesome! You've managed to keep your cool while facing your idol. Let's just pretend to "accidentally" bump into her and maybe ask for an autograph!

C: 为什么啊，那个不是挺好的吗？
E: Why? Wasn't it good enough?

C: 所以我们究竟还要等多久啊？这都已经快两个小时了吧！
E: So just how much longer do we have to wait? It's almost been two hours!

C: …等等，你这到底是看上了个什么玩意？
E: ...Wait, what kind of nonsense has got you hooked this time?

C: 终于达成了，我们的夙愿…过了快半个琥珀纪，我们总算攒够了追梦的钱。
E: It's finally here, our long-held wish has come true... It's been half an Amber Era, but we finally saved enough to come and chase our dreams!

C: 您对本次比赛的预测…
E: Your prediction for this round...

C: 当然是盛会巨星。
E: To be the Festive Superstar, of course.

C: 我可以带他回去找几个专业团队……
E: I can take him back and look for a few professional teams for him...

C: 「应该」？你们还没清查完吗？还有遗漏的「按钮」吗？万一出什么事，那就闹大了呀。
E: "Shouldn't"? Are you not done with the checks? Are there still missing "buttons"? It'll be a disaster if something happens.

C: 传说中的晖长石号…
E: The legendary Radiant Feldspar...

C: 再让我看看风景…
E: Let me admire the scenery a little longer...

C: 我们已经破产了！
E: We are bankrupt!

C: 真奇妙啊…
E: How wondrous...

C: 传说中的晖长石号…
E: The legendary Radiant Feldspar...

C: 除非这晖长石号改名！
E: Unless the Radiant Feldspar changes its name!

C: 这段时间意外太多了…
E: There've been too many unexpected events lately...

C: 嘿嘿，不好意思啦！
E: Heh-heh, sorry about that!

C: 我不信任公司的人……
E: I don't trust IPC's people...

C: 还是以谐乐大典为重。
E: The Charmony Festival comes first.

C: 你敲敲柜子，没有回应——很好，看来里面并没有什么亟需你拯救的小可怜。
E: You knock on the locker, but there is no response. Good, looks like there's nothing inside that requires rescue.

C: 印着帕姆笑颜的珍藏款拖鞋，帕姆严令禁止你将它穿出房间。
E: These limited-edition slippers, adorned with Pom-Pom's smiling face, come with strict orders from Pom-Pom themselves: You're forbidden from wearing them outside the room.

C: <size=28>飘浮在中央舞台上方的折纸小鸟气球！</size>
E: <size=28>An origami bird balloon floating above the center of the stage!</size>

C: 请容我向你介绍——这位就是折纸小鸟中的传奇巨星，引领当代音乐潮流的「鸟王」！
E: Allow me to introduce to you — the legendary superstar among Origami Birds, the pioneer of trending music: The Bird King!

C: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
E: *dial tone*

C: 《原始博士的隐秘身份》…公司真以为我会对街边小报里的故事感兴趣？
E: Dr. Primitive's Secret Identity ...Does the IPC really think I'd be interested in such street tabloids?

C: …非常抱歉，目前没有对象能够接通您的「窥梦来电」。请确保您的通讯录中有至少一位朋友正处在深度睡眠中，然后再试一次。
E: ...I'm sorry, but there is currently no one available to connect you to your Dreampeek Call. Please ensure that at least one of your friends in your contacts is in deep sleep and try again.

C: 亲爱的无名客，现在是一个科技昌明的时代。列车常用的电灯，理论使用寿命接近一个琥珀纪。
E: Dear Nameless, we are in an age of technological advancement. The lightbulbs commonly used on the Express have a theoretical lifespan approaching an entire Amber Era.

C: 淋浴间正在呼唤你——花洒、壁挂架和每一块瓷砖都注视着你，邀请你开始一场酣畅淋漓的淋浴。
E: The bathroom calls to you — the faucet, wall-mounted rack, and every tile watch you, inviting you to indulge in a hearty and refreshing shower.

C: 心灵得到净化，人生得到重启，你感觉自己焕然一新了！
E: Your soul is cleansed, your life replenished, and you feel utterly refreshed!

C: （看看「超智能病毒」）
E: (Look at the Supersmart Virus)

C: 受{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}黄金之茧{RUBY_E#}的垂青，命运为我们带来了一对罕见的孪生大地兽——卡斯托尔与波鲁克斯！诞生自{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}磐岩之脊{RUBY_E#}的它们拥有非凡的自信与默契，就像两位尚未接受洗礼但命中已注定成为英雄的黄金裔！
E: Through the {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Chrysalis of Gold{RUBY_E#}'s grace, we present to you a rare pair of twin dromases, Castor and Pollux! Hailing from {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, these two boast impressive teamwork and confidence, much like two Chrysos Heirs gearing up for their heroic fate!

C: 重生之我是藏书所老板。
E: The time I was reincarnated as the librarium owner.

C: 名为朱诺的妇人脸色惨白，一边不断小声咒骂着，一边仓惶离去。
E: The face of the dame named Juno pales as she hurries off, muttering curses under her breath.

C: 让您见笑了，规矩谈不上，这家餐厅只有一条底线：绝对不可以糟蹋食物。
E: I'm sorry for any misunderstanding. We don't have rules, just one principle: Never disrespect food.

C: 你不确定刚才眼前的景象和对话的人是否是*真实*的，或者那只是欢宴之神赐予的幻觉。好在文字的完型破坏以及重影皆已消失，你眼中的世界也重归秩序。
E: You're unsure whether the strange scene before you and the person you conversed with was real or just a hallucination from the God of Banquets. Fortunately, the destruction of language and blurry visuals have vanished, and the world around you has returned to its natural order.

C: 「砰！」的一声，你变成了一只…小奇美拉？
E: "Bang!" With a sudden jolt, you've transformed into... a little chimera?

C: 能听懂奇美拉对话的风堇，不知能否听懂「风堇，是我！」，但你只是发出「嗷呜」。
E: Can Hyacine, who understands chimera talk, understand "Hyacine, it's me!"? But all you can manage is an "Awoo."

C: 嗷呜呜，嗷嗷嗷呜。
E: ...Awoo! Ah... ah awoo.

C: 还没呢。
E: Not yet.

C: 你一定好奇，我在这里，怎么做饭。
E: You might wonder how I cook now in this city.

C: 它有着一颗垃圾桶的心！
E: This basket has the soul of a trashcan!

C: 本大侠也是一种自然现象。
E: But I'm part of nature, too.

C: 毕竟，漆黑的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}可不需要任何人顶礼膜拜，也不会对任何命不该绝的人赐予祝福嘛。
E: After all, the pitch-black {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} never needs adoration, and won't bestow blessings on anyone whose life is not meant to be over.

C: 哦——别往心里去，老身倒也没有非要拉着你坐下唠唠的意思。你忙你的，挺好、挺好！
E: No need to feel obligated, really. I'm not trying to guilt-trip you into sticking around. Just handle your business! No stress!

C: 啊，请不要误会，会籍并不能带来折扣或是积分之类的东西。硬要说的话，这份支出类似于献给法吉娜的礼物——
E: Ah, please do not misunderstand, membership does not include discounts or membership points. Simply put, this payment is akin to a gift for Phagousa...

C: 随意问吧。敞开心扉的闲谈，有时比起沐浴更能令人身心松弛。
E: Ask as you please. There are times when speaking from the heart can be even more relaxing than a good, warm bath.

C: 在情感波动比较剧烈的时候，*我们*会下意识地共享给彼此。比如说，有一人不小心撞到脑袋，另外两个也会疼得叫出声来。
E: When our emotions are too intense, we will subconsciously share them. For example, if one of us accidentally bangs our head, the others will feel the pain.

C: 下次再聊，缇宝明天见！
E: Let's talk another time. I'll see you tomorrow, Tribbie!

C: 最近我会去学别人向塞纳托斯祈祷。我恳求他带走我，让我见到我的战友们。但每次，回答我的只有我自己的呼吸声。
E: Recently I've been praying to Thanatos like the others do around here. I beg Thanatos to take me and allow me to see my comrades again. However, the only response I ever get is the sound of my own breathing.

C: 你要说这个我可就不困了啊！我家中藏品目前大大小小总共八百三十九件——不包括还没到货的订单和那些重复购买的——全都是和「全世之座，刻法勒」有关的艺术品。
E: Now that you bring this up, I'm not sleepy anymore! I have a total of <unbreak>839</unbreak> items in my collection — excluding orders that haven't arrived yet and those I've bought multiple times — all of which are art pieces related to the "Throne of Worlds, Kephale."

C: 要是想买刺绣、挂毯之类的，可以去阿芙罗的裁缝铺转转，小姑娘手艺一顶一的好，很多时候成品做出来的效果都能超出你的预期。
E: If you want to buy embroidered works or tapestries, then you can rummage around Aphrea's tailor shop. The young lady there has exquisite skills, and more often than not, the finished craftsmanship will surpass your expectations.

C: 唔…虽然没太听懂你说什么，但应该是在认可我对刻法勒深沉的热爱吧？哈哈，谢谢你！
E: Uhh... Though I don't fully understand what you mean by that, it sounds like you're expressing approval of my deep love for Kephale? Haha, thank you!

C: 你这收费贵吗？
E: Do you charge a lot?

C: 这样。您当就没见我搞过这一出——买卖不成仁义在，以后要是您哪天想打听香料的事情，还记得云石市集里有这么一位阿普里斯，那就再好不过了。
E: Whatever. Pretend you never saw that — the deal didn't work out, but the friendship remains. If you want to ask more about spices later, it would be beyond great if you could keep humble Hapries from the Marmoreal Market in your thoughts.

C: …曾经，在我生活过的那个城邦，也有一位这样的店长。以前我还经常劝他，说我们那个穷乡僻壤订单太少，开裁缝店又那么累，不如退休算了。
E: ...Once, back in the city where I once lived, there was also a shopkeeper just like this. I used to always urge him that he may as well retire, because there were too few orders in our remote little town, and running a tailoring business is hard work.

C: …很不幸，那位老爷子并不是幸运者之一。
E: ...Unfortunately, that old timer was not one of the lucky ones.

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的云顶之城——它的选民总是充满信仰的热情。大部分吧。
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s cloudtop city — that god's chosen people are always filled with religious fervor. Most of them.

C: 这里很空旷，很适合放松，对吧…您慢慢逛。
E: This place is quite spacious. It's perfect for relaxing, don't you think? ...Take your time browsing.

C: 废什么话，揍一顿再说。
E: Nonsense. I'll beat them up first and we can talk later.

C: 你将侍者的名号报出，话没说完，对方的脸色骤变，立刻鞠躬道歉，一溜烟跑没影了——
E: As soon as you mention the attendant's name, the group's faces drop. Without saying a word, they bow in apology and run for the hills...

C: 啊啊，那些闹事的客人来自悬锋城，他们有人认得我…算是给了我这个老乡一个面子吧。
E: Ahh, those troublesome customers were from Castrum Kremnos. Some of them recognized me... Let's just say they showed their fellow countryman some respect.

C: 当然。您要是有想了解的事，请说，我尽量回答。
E: Of course. If there is anything you wish to know, I shall do my best to answer your questions.

C: 师傅，你是做什么工作的？
E: What do you do for work, sir?

C: 侍者能讲的都是工作的故事，如果您不介意的话——
E: The only stories an attendant has are work stories. If you do not mind, then...

C: 说到这里，老兵露出了匪夷所思的笑容，似乎为自己的这个称号感到骄傲。
E: With this, the veteran lets out a freakish smile, as if he feels pride for this nickname.
