C: 尤利克赛斯如豹子般迅速地弯腰，伸手向你的腿部扫去。就在你打算格挡前，他又把手收了回来。
E: With the speed of a pouncing leopard, Ulixes bends down and sweeps his hand towards your legs. Just when you are about to block it, he pulls his hand back.

C: 真打起来我未必是你的对手。但只要善加运用技巧，我这个老头也能从年轻人身上讨到便宜。
E: Though I may not be a match for you in an actual battle, I can still gain an advantage over you young'uns by utilizing my techniques.

C: 我是尼卡多利的祭司，自然支持王的决议。我也参加过其他泰坦的祭典，根本没有这么热闹，像是小姑娘刺绣。
E: I am a priest of Nikador, and naturally uphold our king's decision. I have also partaken in festivals of other Titans. They are never as bustling as ours — more akin to a woman's embroidery than a festival.

C: 下次…记得带秘酿来…多带点……
E: Next time... remember to bring ambrosia... More...

C: 万敌，也形容过——「血浸多了。」
E: "Drenched in too much blood," said too Mydei.

C: 就聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave it there for now.

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: …你脑中浮出一位故人的身影……
E: ...An acquaintance's figure appears in your mind...

C: …即使不太理智，你还是决定拨出那串号码……
E: ...Even if somewhat irrational, you decide to dial that string of numbers...

C: 你听见一阵低沉的天外之声，像是本无生命之物用尽力气发出的叹息。
E: You hear a low celestial sound, like something inherently lifeless sighing with every fiber of its shell.

C: 聆听你那时的心声。
E: Listen to your heart's voice during that time.

C: 还好吧，不是很重要。
E: It's not a big deal.

C: 那就是——「黎明机器」的光亮并非一成不变，使用最高精度的透镜观察时，可以看到极其微弱的明度变化，虽然不明显，但确实存在！
E: That is — the light emitted by the Dawn Device is not constant. When observed through the highest precision lenses, one can detect extremely subtle fluctuations in brightness. Although these changes are not readily apparent, they are indeed real and measurable.

C: 他究竟在看你，还是在看你身后的某块云雾？
E: Is he truly looking at you, or is it the mist behind you that's caught his gaze?

C: 但是，是土做的。要防大地兽。
E: House made of earth. Must protect from dromases.

C: 我就是路过的。
E: I'm just passing by.

C: 是我先前的表述有误。我曾来自阿卡索斯，那是我的故乡，黑潮来临前，我携带所有财产逃来了奥赫玛。我来自尚未覆灭的阿卡索斯，这点千真万确。
E: I made a mistake in my last remark. I originally come from Icatus, and that is my home. Before the black tide descended, I took all of my worldly belongings and fled to Okhema. I come from an Icatus that has not yet been destroyed. This point is absolutely true.

C: 要是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问「奥赫玛」与「悬锋城」是否也该真实存在？「神悟树庭」与「哀丽秘榭」是否也真实存在？
E: If "Icatus" truly exists, do "Okhema" and "Castrum Kremnos" also truly exist as well? What about "Grove of Epiphany" and "Aedes Elysiae"?

C: 嗯…悄悄说，其实你能吃的东西，它们大多都能吃。吉奥里亚只是给了它们消化大地精华的能力而已。
E: Uh... just between us, they can actually eat most of what humans can. Georios just gave them the ability to digest the essence of the earth.

C: 你和他们都是一路货色，开口闭口就是入浴、泡澡，恨不得吃喝拉撒睡都在水里！
E: You and them are cut from the same cloth, constantly talking about bathing and soaking, as if you want to eat, drink, relieve yourselves, and sleep all in the water!

C: 那位勇士不厌其烦地跟我讲艾格勒的故事，说永夜也是因为它的眼睛睁不开，让我看开些。后来才知道，那位勇士也在战争中掉了条腿，接了个粗糙的假肢。
E: That warrior tirelessly told me the story of Aquila, saying that the evernight was due to their eyes that couldn't be kept open, advising me to take it easy. Later, I learned that the warrior had also lost a leg in the war and replaced it with a crude prosthetic.

C: 那么，快给我讲讲吧——你的「家乡」是个怎样的地方？你又是如何一路来此、路上可有遇到什么稀奇事？
E: Okay, so talk to me. What is your home like? And what did you encounter on your road here?

C: 不，我不是，我没有。
E: No, I'm not! I didn't!

C: 就是占用了我一刻钟进餐的时间，胡乱编出来的文章…等等，你又是谁？
E: Just the paper article I quickly put together during a 1-quint meal break... Wait, who are you again?

C: 关于花园的功能…
E: About the Garden's function...

C: 一般来说，菲莉丝兽被认为是传说中「猫」的原型。当然，也有证据说猫也是和菲莉丝兽一样真实存在的生物…不过这种学术争论我们可以按下不表。
E: Typically speaking, the Felys is believed to be based on the legendary "cat." Of course, there is also evidence that cats existed for real, just as real as the Felys... but let's set aside that academic debate for now.

C: 我们这一派精于对「体能与心理」的研究实践——不仅在体育锻炼、竞技活动中追求「人类的极致」，往往也能在思辨活动中强有力地击倒对手。
E: We are proficient in the practical study of physical and mental acuities. We don't just pursue the limits of humanity in physical training and competitive activities, but also exercise our prowess in felling our opponents in battles of wit.

C: 怎么样，想不想为奥赫玛的知识传播出份力？
E: How about it, do you want to contribute to spreading the knowledge of Okhema?

C: 想要和你聊聊。
E: I want to chat to you.

C: 杜老板。
E: Boss Du.

C: 感觉你怎么比我还自闭——啊，不是骂你的意思，我是说——你怎么比我还怕生哇，明明长得这么高大，心思却这么细腻敏感……
E: You seem even more introverted than me — not that it's a bad thing! I mean, despite your size and strength, you're incredibly sensitive and thoughtful.

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 他之前也这么忽悠过我！
E: He scammed me like this before as well!

C: 小甜饼已经派完了，你要是早半刻来，正好能赶上最后一盘呢。
E: The last of the sweet treats has just been given away. Had you arrived a moment sooner, you could have snagged the final batch.

C: 能教我做甜饼吗？
E: Can you show me how to make these sweet treats?

C: 想听听缇宝经历的故事。
E: I want to hear about Tribbie's experiences.

C: 温暖而不炎热，凉爽而不寒冷…疗愈心灵的秘境，本就应该能让不同的人感受到相近的安心啊。
E: Warm, but not stifling. Cool, but not chilly... A sanctuary of healing should bring everyone the same sense of comfort, even if they themselves are different.

C: 在遥远的黄金世，人人都拥有没有尽头的漫长生命。直到塞纳托斯降临，疾病、痛苦和死亡才开始降临大地。
E: In the ancient Era Chrysea, everyone had endless, immortal lifespans. It wasn't until Thanatos descended that illness, suffering, and death arrived.

C: 我对你印象还不错，所以{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，以后要是缺钱了，可以随时来找我帮忙——鉴于你的贵客身份，我可以不要利息。
E: I've got a good impression of you, so if you ever find yourself short on cash, {F#young lady}{M#young man}, feel free to come to me for help. Given your status, I won't even charge interest.

C: 我从小看着负世泰坦长大的！
E: I grew up watching the Worldbearing Titan!

C: 人生一世，能真正接触并熟悉的人不过数百…但戏剧提供了一扇窗口，能让我们近距离凝视一些平常不会触碰的人性角落。
E: Life is short, and the people we truly know and understand might number only in the hundreds. But theater opens a window, letting us gaze closely into corners of humanity we'd otherwise never touch.

C: 我还记得一些逝者的*临终遗言*，如果你也感到好奇的话……
E: I still recall the last words of some of the deceased, if you're curious...

C: 如今想来，那奇迹仿佛就在昨日。但现在…它已经许久未曾开口了。但我始终，这沉默或许也是一种考验。
E: Now, looking back, that miracle feels as if it happened just yesterday. But now... it's been a long time since Kephale spoke. But I always think... maybe this silence is a test too.

C: 当然了。
E: Of course.

C: 我这是在…什么地方？
E: Where... am I?

C: 我理解。
E: I understand.

C: 与我，无关。这些，不想听到。在那之前死去，一切，都会白费！
E: Not my concern. Don't want to hear about it. Dying before then, everything, wasted!

C: 即便是私心上说，我也希望能在创世后找到女儿。
E: Even if it's just for a second, I'd love to be able to see my daughter again in the newly created world.

C: 亲爱的帕门弥德，事到如今我不愿再用离奇的问题来刁难你，我只问一句：你怎么不跑呢？
E: Dear Parmenides, I won't plague you with strange questions anymore — just one: Why don't you flee?

C: 我害怕…浴场的大伙们害怕…没有人不害怕……
E: I'm scared... the people at the baths are scared... no one isn't scared...

C: 危机还在，没空想这些。
E: The crisis is still here. No time to think about that.

C: 嗯…有位织者向往传说、渴望和英雄们一起冒险。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅壁画上</color>，向画中蝶诉说心中困惑呢。你得擦亮眼睛才能发现它。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for legends and adventures alongside heroes. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>within a mural</color>, telling the painted butterfly about their confusion. You must sharpen your eyes to spot them.

C: 贵客，这里尚且安全，若是感到疲惫了，请在此小憩片刻吧。
E: Esteemed guest, this place is still safe. If you are weary, please take a short rest here.

C: 嗯…有位织者好奇天外的世界。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天象画壁前</color>，准备航向未知的世界呢。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver who was curious about the world beyond the heavens. The golden threads brought news, it is now <color=#dbc291ff>before the celestial mural</color>, preparing to sail toward the unknown.

C: 嗯…有位织者见惯了冬之民城邦的凛冬。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一个通风口上</color>，试图用寒风吹去它的汗珠呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is accustomed to the harsh winters of the Winterfolk city-states. The golden thread brings tidings: They are resting on <color=#dbc291ff>a ventilation shaft</color>, trying to blow away their sweat with the cold wind.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝需一路向东；西风会赐你一双捷足，勿让这份祝福消失。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You must head east. The west wind shall grant you swiftness — do not squander its blessing."</color>

C: 我也正纳闷呢。怎么刚到田地里，一天就已经过去了迷……
E: Huh, weird. I just stepped into the field, and the whole day's already gone, mem...

C: 刺刺球蜜饯、刺刺果酿、炉烤刺刺球派、刺刺沙拉、刺刺球果酱，我们这里应有尽有，请随意挑选迷~
E: Candied Quillorb Berries, Quillorb Fruit Brew, Oven-Baked Quillorb Berry Pie, Quillorb Salad, Quillorb Berry Jam — we've got it all, memi! Please, take your pick!

C: 又见面了，贵客。
E: We meet again, my esteemed guest.

C: 请谅解，贵客。我需要更多与记忆相关的力量，来增强自身感知若虫的能力。
E: Please understand, my esteemed guest. I need more power associated with memories to heighten my sensitivity to nymphs.

C: 「乐章演奏的最高潮处。」嗯…哀丽秘榭的妖精一族喜爱音乐，善于演奏竖琴，以其乐声来营造载歌载舞的氛围。
E: "At the climax of the symphony." Hmm... The fairies of Aedes Elysiae have a passion for music, excel at playing harps, and use their melodies to create a festive atmosphere.

C: 有的若虫是真BUG啊！
E: Some of those nymphs really are bugs!

C: 你一定是经历了一场难以想象的冒险，才能够得到它吧。或许在未来的某个时刻，它会起到重要作用也说不定。
E: You must've gone through a tough adventure to get your hands on it. Who knows? Perhaps one day, it'll prove to be vital.

C: 呀，又有一个可爱的倒影冒出来啦。
E: Oh my, another charming reflection has appeared!

C: 那，该做些什么好呢？
E: Well then, what should we do next?

C: 哈哈哈，开玩笑的。来，干杯！
E: Hahaha! I'm kidding. Bottom's up!

C: 抑扬顿挫，又澎湃激昂……
E: Rhythmic and forceful, yet surging with passion...

C: …先说好…我、老身并非贪杯，此乃…此乃「出神」体验…喝得越多…就越、越容易聆听见神谕……
E: Ahem... Let me be clear... I, old though I am, am no drunkard. This is... a state of ecstatic communion. The more I drink... the clearer... the divine prophecy becomes...

C: 结，结果他说，第二天才发现，辩论场里一共三个人——他自己，海瑟音大人，凯撒大人。
E: B—But he said, he realized the next day that there were three people in the Forum — himself, Lady Hysilens, and the Great Imperator.

C: 不用了。
E: I'll pass.

C: 「让命运为你指点迷津——推石上山的若虫经历了多少次失败？」
E: "Let fate illuminate your path — How many times did the nymph fail to push the boulder uphill?"

C: 呵呵…贵客，哦不，应该叫你店长才对。最近生意还红火吗？
E: Hehe... My distinguished guest, oh no, I should call you manager. How's business these days? Still booming?

C: 更谨慎的主厨？
E: A more cautious chef?

C: 真是好难抉择迷！
E: It's so hard to choose, mem!

C: 这个名字是我为自己起的，取自妖精中流传的一个传说迷。
E: I chose it myself. It comes from a legend among the fairies, mem.

C: 更可恨的是那些人还专挑那些好摊位，各种各样的工艺品齐刷刷摆好几排；结果你上去一问价，好家伙——展示、已出、自留、纪念。
E: What's more irritating is that those people even nabbed the good spots. They displayed all kinds of crafts in neat rows, but when you go up and ask for the price, everything is for display only, already sold, reserved for themselves, or their own fond treasure.

C: 嘘！小点声。那叫科学研究，懂不懂？
E: Hush! Keep your voice down. I did not cause trouble. It was a scientific research, got it?

C: 他们用一个机械装置将扮演{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}从天而降，公平公正地用法律的手段拯救了王子，皆大欢喜！
E: They used a mechanical device to showcase {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton's{RUBY_E#} descent from the sky, using justice and fairness to save the prince and deliver a happy ending!

C: 要远离迷信…
E: Stay away from superstition...

C: …嗷呜？
E: ...Awoo?

C: 大概就是这种逻辑感，让我更愿意研究它们吧。
E: It's probably their sense of logic that makes me want to study them.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 答案就是——无论身在何处，都没有绝对的安全！
E: The answer is, no matter where you go, no place is absolutely safe!

C: 喏，瞧见没，这个小玩具。可别觉得是给小孩儿玩的！这辆装甲车跑过的路，比我喝的酒都多！这个小模型，里头完美复刻了原型的机动轨道呢。
E: Here, check this out. Don't think this is some child's plaything! The armored car this miniature model is based on has traveled on more roads than I could count! This model even has a perfect replica of the real thing's mechanized track.

C: 嗷呜…我也不清楚，我一直跟着荒笛大人的身后，它迈起脚步，我也迈起脚步…如今它已经离开了，我反而不知道该怎么走了。
E: Awoo... I'm not really sure. I've always just followed Lord Terravox. When they took a step, I took one too... Now that they're gone, I don't know where to go.

C: 藏在这里也能发现吗…你这家伙，不和你玩了喀。
E: You can find me even in this place... That's it, I'm done playing with you, crrk.

C: 水车为什么会坏掉？一定是有虫故意让我上不去，想要逼我绕远路…
E: Why did the water wheel break? There must be a bug who is intentionally keeping me from getting up there, trying to force me to take the long way around...

C: 你知道吗？每有一个人升降水面，就会有一只怕水的虫受到伤害。
E: Did you know that every time someone ascends to the surface of the water, a hydrophobic nymph will get hurt?

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，不太熟练地炼化。
E: The tailor takes the Memory Crystal Shards and refines them rather clumsily.

C: 我的本能告诉我，你应该提供一个名叫<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>的东西。
E: My instincts tell me you should offer something called <color=#dbc291ff>"Memory Crystal Shard"</color>.

C: 或许只有当四周皆是深渊时，人们才会意识到，足下的「大地」究竟多么弥足珍贵。
E: Perhaps only when surrounded by the Abyss do people truly realize just how precious the "Earth" beneath their feet really is.

C: 还有瓜？细说！
E: Got more tea to spill? Do tell!
...All right.

C: 它，话唠。
E: This one. Chatterbox.

C: 唉，你不知道我的经历有多离谱，我的应激症状恐怕治不好了。
E: *sigh* You have no idea how absurd my experience was. I fear my trauma cannot be healed.

C: 那么，如果云石天宫修缮完成…呢？
E: So, what if the Marmoreal Palace is fully restored...?

C: 每、每道菜我都想吃迷！那家餐馆还在吗？
E: Oh my gosh, I want to try every single dish! Is that restaurant still there?

C: 像蜜花乘着风，飘向更广阔的世界…来自小小村落的妖精，终于登上了更大的舞台迷！
E: Like a honey flower carried by the wind, drifting toward a vaster world... The fairy from a tiny village has finally stepped onto a grander stage, mem!

C: 那么，我们更要刻苦练习，用舞蹈赢得所有人的心迷！
E: Then we must practice even harder and win everyone's hearts with our dance, mem!

C: 要说年龄，我们相隔了上千年，却有种一见如故的亲切。咳，让任何人初见的时候感到亲切，也是她的天赋之一吧。
E: In terms of age, we are more than a thousand years apart, yet I feel a strange kinship, as if meeting an old friend. Ahem... I suppose making anyone feel comfortable upon first meeting is another of her talents.

C: 然后，好多个*我们*，把东西送到！
E: And then, a whole bunch of us can deliver everything!

C: 嗯！大家都会永远、永远相聚在美好的明天！
E: Yes! We'll all be together, not just tomorrow, but forever and ever and ever!

C: 为了对抗天外降临的外星入侵者，我和某个…老朋友一起踏上旅途，想要一劳永逸地解决这个威胁。
E: Just to fight alien invaders from beyond the sky. An... old friend and I embarked on a journey to end that threat once and for all.

C: {NICKNAME}，列车长有安排，我得干活去了。
E: {NICKNAME}, the conductor has plans for me. I have to go to work.

C: 别装了，你其实根本没有看过《冒险鼹鼠队》对吧？不然，你告诉我书里的三个主人公都是谁？
E: Stop pretending. You haven't actually read it at all, have you? Tell me who the three protagonists are in the book.

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》的每本书我都看过，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}是想问什么来着？
E: I've read all of The Adventurous Moles. Anyway, what was it that you wanna to ask?

C: 嗯？你问这小子啊…这说来话长了，这小子可怜得很哪。
E: Hmm? You mean the kid... Well, that's a long story. He's had a pretty tough life so far.

C: 矿车工平时都负责些什么？
E: What does a mine cart operator usually do?

C: 滴、答…你是…你是谁啊？
E: Tick, tock... You're... Who are you?

C: 滴、答，小宝贝，你是想跟我搭话吗？
E: Tick, tock. My pretty, you wish to speak with me?

C: 呜呜…舞台的灯光好刺眼…为什么大家都看着我……
E: *sob* The lighting on stage is so bright... Why is everyone staring at me...

C: 嘶——我的表盘好沉重，刚刚在做什么来着？噢噢，魔术倒计时……
E: Ugh, my dial feels so heavy. What was I doing just now? Oh, magic countdown...

C: …真的吗？可我连「矮星」难度都会卡关…人与人之间的差距果然比塔利亚星的大鸿沟还夸张……
E: ...Really? I can't even clear it on the Dwarf Star difficulty... I guess the differences in skill between people is even bigger than the drop of the Grand Chasm on the planet of Talia...

C: 我吗？
E: Me?

C: 「哟，你好啊，屏幕那边正在焦头烂额的朋友！」
E: "Hello there, distressed friend at the computer terminal!"

C: 不好。
E: It's not alright.

C: 那些垃圾短信是…
E: What are those spam messages all about?

C: …呸呸呸！怎么又是那个晦气的老头子？都说了快了快了马上画完，还催！
E: ...Pah! That wretched old man again!? I told him, soon, soon — I'll finish it soon! Quit bugging me!

C: 如果吃不到<color=#dbc291ff>岩烧洞螈</color>，我来下层区究竟有什么意义？我的灵魂还算完整吗……
E: If I can't eat some <color=#dbc291ff>stone-grilled olms</color>, why on earth did I even come to the Underworld? Is my soul even complete in that case...

C: 看起来这些宝物都在下层区…{NICKNAME}，可能要麻烦你去找找看了。
E: Looks like these treasures are all in the Underworld... {NICKNAME}, can I please task you with finding them?

C: 在那之后，母亲大人踏上了执政生涯，并以她的人格魅力获得了全城人民的支持。在她督办下，银鬃铁卫终于得以反攻裂界…尽管那代价过于惨重。
E: After that, mother embarked on her career in governance, and with her charismatic personality, gained the support of the entire city. Under her supervision, the Silvermane Guards were finally able to counterattack and reclaim the Fragmentum... though it comes at too high a cost.

C: 这样的话……
E: In that case...

C: 嗯，拜托你了。
E: Sure, take as much time as you want.

C: 那么，回见了，{NICKNAME}，感谢你为贝洛伯格作出的贡献——你永远是我们心目中的英雄。
E: See you later, {NICKNAME}. I thank you for your contribution to Belobog — you will forever be our hero.

C: 反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
E: An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.

C: 博物馆内如此温暖，你有些担心它们身上的冰是不是已经开始融化了…你说这只是个模型？好吧，那没事了。
E: The museum interior is warm, so you were a little worried whether the Voidrangers have started to melt... This is only a model? Oh well, it's nothing.

C: 一组过去的剪报及其附录。
E: A set of newspaper clippings and their appendices.

C: 晴霓小姐放心，我身为十王司的判官，会妥善处理相关一切的。
E: Miss Qingni, don't worry. As a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I promise to handle this case properly.

C: 我看你们出现在司辰宫，应该是来找我的。
E: Seeing you at the Palace of Astrum, I suppose you are here for me.

C: 抱歉，我对此并无头绪，想来这不过是荒诞的传说罢了。
E: I'm sorry. I have no idea about it. I believe it's just an absurd legend.

C: 岁、岁阳会被人强烈的情感所吸引，会根据你的经验和记忆产生幻觉……
E: A h—heliobus will be attracted by one's strong emotions and produce hallucinations based on your experiences and memories...

C: 我忘了…
E: I forgot...

C: 呜呜伯似乎想要你再拍一张。
E: Wubbaboo apparently wants you to take another photo.

C: 电视，没了，无聊，无聊。
E: TV, gone. Boring, boring.

C: 所以，话既然说到了这里……
E: So, now that we're here...

C: （取出小吃）
E: (Take out the snack)

C: 金人巷码头营收要如何改善？
E: What can we do to fix Aurum Alley's balance sheet?

C: 交给我好了。
E: You can count on me.

C: 我这个人最讨厌面试了。
E: I hate job interviews.

C: 这…这还要道歉。
E: I... I guess we do.

C: 这金人巷交给公司管理有什么不好的。你们这些迂腐的家伙别耽误大家挣钱啊！
E: Is letting the IPC take over management of Aurum Alley such a bad thing? Besides, what's it to you if I make some extra money?

C: 你这就是在承认商会肯定经营不好码头。
E: So you admit that the Merchant Guild mismanaged the dock.

C: 就凭你践踏了他人的努力，就凭你使用了肮脏的手段！
E: Because you used dirty tricks to trample all over the honest work of others!

C: （适当地沉默）
E: (Appropriate silence)

C: 走就走。
E: Hmph... Rude!

C: 怎么，你是在小看我吗？
E: What? You think I'm not popular enough?

C: 随白露、素裳去往下一处拍照地点。
E: Follow Bailu and Sushang to the next photo spot.

C: 去拍摄「{NICKNAME}与{F#她}{M#他}的小伙伴」。
E: Shoot "{NICKNAME} and Friends."

C: 会长，他们到了。
E: Mr. President, they've arrived.

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 我们又何尝不是呢？
E: I've matured as well, right?

C: 我会以「个体经销商」的身份与你合作，我向你承诺，码头会有源源不断的运单需求，不过它们都会有「正当的名义」，都来自金人巷的商铺。
E: I'll cooperate with you as a "sole distributor." I promise you that the docks will be drowning in an unending stream of orders, with each of these orders being "legal" and coming from the shops of Aurum Alley.

C: 美馔阁现在还没有…我答应你，小店以后会支持的。现在还得麻烦你。
E: Delicacy Pavilion doesn't use that... I promise you, we'll get it later. So right now it's still all up to you.

C: 我说的是，不要香菜！
E: I said, no coriander!

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}嘛，我认识的，是我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}。
E: Well, if it isn't {NICKNAME}, my {F#good sister}{M#good brother}.

C: 上一次的病假证明备份？
E: A copy of medical certificate from last time?

C: 我明白你什么意思，你认为我是在做无用功。
E: I get what you mean. You think my job is useless.

C: 小少爷将码头看作优势，但是对商会来说，商铺才是最大的卖点。
E: As Xiaohan mentioned, the IPC sees the dock as the most valuable asset the Alley has to offer, but for us, the local shops are what makes the Alley special.

C: 请出示你的证件。
E: May I please see your credentials?

C: 你知道「深度学习」吗？我仔细研究了仙舟机巧的交通规则，又观看了<unbreak>500</unbreak>年前到现在为止所有的机巧鸟交通事故影像资料。
E: Ever heard of "deep learning"? I've been carefully studying traffic rules for Xianzhou cycranes, and also viewed over five hundred years of cycrane traffic accident recordings.

C: 没错，客制运单完成之后，客户也会承认了码头物流的业务能力，更加信赖金人巷商会，并且追加更多的合作。
E: Exactly. Once we start providing custom orders, our customers will really see how good we are and they'll have even more trust in the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. And that means they'll be more willing to work with us down the line.

C: 我把所有投诉都看了一遍，我发现投诉的内容不是说「外卖丢了」就是「送错餐品」。
E: Actually, I read through all the complaints, and all of them were about "lost delivery" or "wrong dishes delivered."

C: 若是在实战中尝试，未免太危险了。不如，先在这里试试看吧。
E: Trying it out in combat would be risky. Better to first put it into practice here.

C: （两记上勾拳）
E: (Two uppercuts)

C: 没问题，我立刻为您安排！
E: No problem. I'll make arrangements immediately!

C: 正所谓「投资艺术家的最佳时机，就是在艺术家还没出名的时候」。等世玲之后名气大了，这份配方可就有说法了！
E: You know the saying, "Get in on an artist early before they blow up." My recipe is gonna be worth a lot when I become famous in the future.

C: 好像是错觉，你感受到眼前的售货机似乎正在…瑟瑟发抖？
E: You may be hallucinating, is the vending machine... shivering?

C: 不会是我看错了吧？这里刚才应该有个售货机的啊……
E: Am I mistaken? There should be a vending machine here...

C: 雪堆下面似乎藏着什么东西…你能感受到积雪正在微微颤抖。
E: Something seems to be hiding beneath the Snow Drift... You can feel the layer of thick snow trembling lightly.

C: 可是我记得没人来这里贴过海报啊……
E: But I've never seen anyone pasting up poster in this spot...

C: 确实，他一直都在重复地说这几句，好奇怪。
E: It's true, he kept repeating these few sentences, what a weirdo.

C: 基本就是这样。我要去琢磨新段子了，有问题再说！
E: That's the gist of it. I'm off to work on some new jokes now. Let me know if you have any questions!

C: 以上就是参与本届美食庆典的所有餐品了，感谢您一贯对商业街与钟表餐厅的大力支持，咱们明年再会！
E: Those are all the dishes featured in this year's festival. Thank you for your ongoing support of the Business District and Clock Diner. See you next year!

C: 你成功交付了这批苏乐达，但监狱的严打并未因此减弱——隔壁分区的狱卒每天都会打开牢房，搜出一瓶又一瓶苏乐达，然后将它们尽数摔碎。
E: The batch of SoulGlad is successfully delivered, but the crackdown on SoulGlad within the prison has yet to abate. The prison guards carry out spot checks in the cells every day, confiscate bottle after bottle of SoulGlad, and then smash them all.

C: 接下来，我们要去寻找其他失散的同伴，然后用自己的意志改变这里，让美梦小镇变成真正的乐园。
E: Next, we'll look for our lost companions and transform Dreamville into a true paradise through sheer determination!

C: 他真说了这么多？
E: Did he really say all that?

C: 为了你的精神健康，还是不要接近这些积木为妙。
E: For your mental health, it's better not to get close to the building blocks.

C: 您准备好了吗？我们一起动身去白日梦酒店揭露真相吧。
E: Are you ready? Let's head out to the Reverie to unveil the truth.

C: 咳，总之，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们先开始收集线索吧？你走前面，我会努力跟上……
E: Ahem, anyway, maybe we can start gathering clues, {F#miss}{M#mister}? You go ahead, and I'll try to keep up...

C: 我现在有充足的理由相信，这位服务生的经历一定跟白日梦酒店崩溃有关。无论家族希望指派他去执行什么秘密任务，他肯定没能好好完成……
E: I now have ample reason to believe that this attendant's experiences must be related to the Reverie's shutdown. It doesn't matter what secret assignment it was that The Family gave him, he definitely didn't manage to complete it...

C: 辛格勒头顶的绒球竖了起来，脸上摆出一幅势在必得的表情。她的执着和自信获得了你的赞许。
E: The fluffy ball on Singler's head stands upright, her face a visage of determination. Her resolve and confidence have earned your commendation.

C: 注意到那些路边的屏幕了吗？家族的技术人员在努力抢修了，但还是有少量屏幕的信号源没能恢复正常……
E: Have you noticed the roadside billboards? The technicians from The Family have pulled out all the stops to fix the signal issue, but a handful of screens are still yet to be restored...

C: 感觉好麻烦，我能拒绝吗？
E: Sounds like a lot of trouble. Can I say no?

C: 别骗人了！
E: Stop bragging!

C: 你试图换台，播放乌玛和她的同事们录制好的节目，但屏幕闪烁了片刻后，却没等来你想要的频道与画面。
E: You try switching the channel to play the pre-recorded show done by Uma and her colleagues. The screen flickers for a while, but the channel you want still doesn't come on.

C: 在这里工作得久了，自然会懂得观察。理解顾客可是每位调饮师的必修课。
E: I've learned to pick things up from my experience here. Being able to understand the guests is a must for every drinksmith.

C: 呵。那就当是我言过其实吧，但你确实很擅长和人交流，不愿意承认吗？
E: Well, I might be exaggerating things, but I'm sure you know how good you are at connecting with people.

C: 我不说话。
E: I'll stay silent then.

C: 要是你真的一点兴趣没有，那又是什么驱使你来到这里的呢？多余的感情？
E: If you aren't into mixing drinks in the least bit, what made you come here? Your overflowing sentiments?

C: 后面我要暂时离开，但怪物们还是会定期光顾，酒吧就得拜托你打理了。缺少了这里提供的饮料，我担心它们的情绪会变得不稳定。
E: I'll be gone for a while, but the monsters will still drop by from time to time. Please tend the lounge for me. Without the drinks here, I'm worried those monsters might get angsty.

C: 好啦，工作了这么久，你肯定也累了。先去休息吧。
E: Now, you must be drained after a long shift. Take a break.

C: 从吧台走过来就这几步路，至于花这么久？
E: The lounge is just a few steps away. What took you so long?

C: 你的表有问题吧？
E: Is something wrong with your timing?

C: 您想想，这儿所有的怪物都很喜欢您，一下子收获这么多倍的快乐，不也挺好吗？
E: Think about it, all the monsters here like you. Isn't it amazing to have so much happiness all at once?

C: 感谢您发现了人家的真实想法。这下可没法再逃避了呀。
E: Thank you for helping me realize my true feelings. I won't run away anymore.

C: （得尽快通知舒翁……）
E: (I should inform Siobhan as soon as possible...)

C: （淑女和忧郁派的关系还真好啊，喜欢它们表演的人挺多的嘛。）
E: (Lady and Melancholy are really close. Lots of people are fond of their performances.)

C: 你很适合「惊梦酒吧」。我代表所有成员向你表示欢迎。
E: You're a perfect fit for Dreamjolt Hostelry. On behalf of all the members, welcome aboard.

C: 走这边，汪！
E: This way, woof!

C: 别紧张，开个玩笑而已。你似乎有些烦恼，让我为你抽张牌如何？
E: Chill out. Just kidding. You seem a little troubled. How about I draw a fortune card for you?

C: 等等，你先别冲动！
E: Hold up! Not so fast!

C: 现在列车上的储物室里还放着不少无名客寄来的礼物呢……
E: The storage room on the Express still holds plenty of gifts sent by many of the Nameless.

C: 我会知无不言。
E: I'll tell you everything I know.

C: 为了以防万一，咱们最后再回画里搜索一趟。
E: Just to be sure, let's go make a final round in the painting.

C: 被猎犬扣押在大剧院里的那几位，待会儿得好好审审。
E: We'll have to interrogate those few that the Hounds have got detained at the Grand Theater.

C: 好的，我去了！
E: Fine, I'll go!

C: 请您劝说它们停止输出垃圾观点吧……
E: Can you please convince them to stop spewing their trashy opinions...

C: 这是线索，请仔细阅读。
E: Here's the clue. Please read it carefully.

C: 不过，看来您已经凭借自己的实力找到了宝物之所在。这份线索交给您，或许能对您的寻宝之旅有所帮助。
E: However, it seems you managed to find the treasure all by yourself. This clue is for you. Maybe it'll help you along your treasure-hunting journey.

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 导演，我们的影片越来越火了，之前跑掉的投资人全都后悔了！
E: Director, our film is all the rage now! Those investors who pulled out before are regretting their decisions!

C: 不过…观众的影评里除了对动画本身的褒奖，还有许多奇怪的分析与考据，猜测我们的故事是关于某种东西的寓言或隐喻……
E: There's one thing about the viewers' reviews though. Aside from compliments for the animation itself, there are many bizarre analyses and references speculating that our story serves as an allegory or metaphor for something...

C: 您知道吗？就连鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」都希望找我们合作。近期「惊梦剧团」制造的案件增多，他们想通过钟表小子的<unbreak>IP</unbreak>来挽救自己的形象。
E: You know what? Even Sweet Dreams Troupe from the Iris Family has reached out to us for collaboration. The crimes committed by Dreamjolt Troupe are on the rise lately, so they want to salvage their reputation by associating themselves with the Clockie <unbreak>franchise</unbreak>.

C: 不，它是可以有内涵的。
E: No, it can be meaningful too.

C: 观众们都很开心…看来哪怕看不出背后的深意，这部影片本身也很有趣。
E: The audience is pleased... Even if they can't discern the deeper meaning behind it, the movie itself is quite fun.

C: 没问题，随时欢迎您回来参与制作！
E: No problem. You're always welcome to come back and be part of the production!

C: 我弄丢了很重要的东西——请帮帮我吧，折纸小鸟！
E: I lost something very important to me — please help me, origami bird!

C: 等等！
E: Wait!

C: 「轰然砸下的罗盘号砸晕了为害一方的忆域迷因，但也就此损坏，无法再度起航。」
E: "The Compass, flaming and hurtling, rams into a vile Memory Zone Meme, rendering it unconscious, but is damaged in the process, and cannot take off again."

C: 好嘞，各就各位，三、二、一……
E: All right, places everyone, three, two, one...

C: 「喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！」
E: "Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, make your dreams a blast!"

C: 再等一下…
E: Hang on a second...

C: 来，让我们开始创作吧——
E: Come on, let's get creative in here...

C: 「于是，汽水先生开始调配一种神秘的饮料，这是为了用甜美抚平镇民的痛苦 / 赚一笔大钱 / 用汽水控制镇民的心智。」
E: "And so, Mr. Soda began to brew up a mysterious beverage. All of this was to soothe the people's pain with sweetness / make a huge sum of money / use the soda to control the minds of the people."

C: 「美梦小镇很快陷入了绝境，镇民们争执不断——还好聪明的钟表小子找来了木头老爷帮忙，在木头老爷的劝说下，镇民重新团结了起来。」
E: "Dreamville soon fell into desperation and the townsfolk bickered endlessly — but fortunately, clever Clockie sought out help from Old Man Wood who persuaded the townsfolk to reunite once again."

C: 它们勤劳又聪明，在猫头鹰老师与五位头领的指挥下，创造了许多神奇的建筑——就和梦境一样！
E: Hard-working and clever, they have created many magical structures under the watchful guidance of Professor Owl and their five leaders — just like the dreamscapes!

C: 咳咳，好了，这份故事就交给你吧。
E: *cough* Alright, I'll leave this story in your hands.

C: 仓鼠球骑士外传的广告上映了。
E: The trailer for Hamster Ball Knight's extra story has been released.

C: 关于仓鼠球骑士。
E: About Hamster Ball Knight.

C: 抄就罢了还不给冠名费！
E: Using my name is one thing, but not giving me compensation!?

C: 你们在梦境的荒野上开着破旧的老爷车，喝着冷风、呛着黄沙、还被一只凶残的忆域迷因挡住了去路……
E: You're driving an old clunker through the wilderness of the Dreamscape, braving the cold wind, choking on the dust, and suddenly, a fierce Memory Zone Meme blocks your path...

C: 那个…你平时都是这样表达「失望」的吗……
E: Uh... Do you usually express disappointment this way...?

C: （跪地求饶）
E: (Get on my knees and grovel)

C: 二位有着卓越的表演才能，预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: Both of you possess excellent performative talent. I wish you all the best!

C: 来吧，试着将这一幕的悲欣交集——用精准的演技传达给我吧！
E: Give it a shot. Try and convey this bittersweet scene to me — bring it to life with precise and emotive acting!

C: 难道…我只是个废案吗？
E: Am I... just a failed experiment?

C: 「呱、呱、呱」——仍是三声青蛙的叫声。
E: "*croak* *croak* *croak*" It's again the sound of that frog.

C: 触碰录像带。
E: Touch the tape.

C: 我从你的「终末」而来，追寻无形的{RUBY_B#溯洄者}储君{RUBY_E#}。
E: I come from your Finality in search of the {RUBY_B#one against the current}shapeless prince{RUBY_E#}.

C: 作为交换，我也会给予您丰厚的回报，作为协助我的报酬。不知您是否愿意将那些{RUBY_B#未来}往昔{RUBY_E#}的梦境分享于我呢？
E: I'll reward you generously for your help. Would you be willing to share your {RUBY_B#future}past{RUBY_E#} dreams with me?

C: 请携天子剑，斫下旄头星。
E: Please take up the Sword of the Emperor and carve your path to greatness.

C: 我猜三月你根本没考虑过…
E: I don't think March has given it any thought at all...

C: 我无法否认，我始终忘不掉那一天的事情。
E: I can't deny it. That fateful day left a mark on me.

C: 你要是说到做到，咱也佩服你。
E: I'll respect you too if you keep your word.

C: 嗷！嗷呜——
E: Awoo! Grrr...!

C: …我、我是握不稳。你不是握都握不了吗？
E: ...S—Sure, I can't hold it steady. But I'm better than you — you don't even have hands!

C: 咱们这位九叔…没有徒弟。
E: Our Uncle Jiu... has no disciples.

C: 其实之前我听说尾巴大爷说，能够将「学剑」的记忆直接灌输给我的时候，我必须承认，我当时有那么一点点心动，当然也只是一点点而已——
E: It's about when Mr. Tail said that the memories of swordplay practice could be channeled into me — I have to admit that I was the teeniest bit tempted. Just a tiny bit!

C: 喂！你们仨要干什么，玩不起就别玩啊！
E: Hey! What's the deal with you three? If you can't play fair, then don't play!

C: 「我们决定，让你亲口坦白你的一切罪行，你那扭曲的欲望，将由我们取走。」
E: "We have decided to make you confess all your crimes in person. The time for change is now, your twisted desires will be stripped away by us."

C: 啊…为什么会突然想起这些事？这是走马灯吗？我是不是…已经死了……
E: Ah... why am I suddenly remembering these things? Is my life flashing before my eyes? Am I... dead...?

C: 懒鬼，还睡懒觉…跟你说了多少次，信用点会睡懒觉吗？自由市场会睡懒觉吗？看不见的手会睡懒觉吗？算了，这个一会儿再说。
E: Sleeping... Heh, how many times do I have to tell you? Do credits sleep? Does the free market sleep? Does the invisible hand sleep? Forget it, we'll discuss this later.

C: 可是…爸爸，他的腿就是我故意撞断的，我若是不送他去医院，别人该怀疑我了……
E: But... Dad, I broke his leg on purpose. If I hadn't taken him to the hospital, others would have suspected me...

C: 我明白了，我会给你让路。但等到有一天，我像这样战胜你的时候，请你接受我的心意。
E: I'll step aside for you. But when the day comes that I surpass you in the same manner, I hope you'll acknowledge my intentions.

C: 它身后的王冠，一定就是「最扭曲的欲望」了！
E: The crown behind him must be his most twisted desire!

C: 啊？你不同意啊？可是现在已经晚了，貊泽已经把事情办妥了。
E: Huh? You don't agree with my methods? Hmm, but it's already too late. Moze has already taken care of things.

C: 混账，不许跑！
E: Stop there! Don't you dare run away!

C: 来了来了，您要的「灵丹妙药」，我装在保温盒里给你们带来了。
E: Here it is, the miracle elixir you wanted. I've stored it in this thermal box for you.

C: 从药材角度看，它们已经足够「灵丹妙药」了。
E: Basing off the herbs, they are enough to create the miracle elixir.

C: 「赤龙」不过是椒丘设下哑谜，如果妾身没猜错，你们所寻之物远在天边，近在眼前。
E: The Crimson Dragon is nothing more than a guessing game concocted by Jiaoqiu. If I'm not wrong, the item you seek far and wide, is right before you.

C: 我、我也宕机了！像是高速运转的机器进入到脑子里。
E: I—I've BSODed too! Like some high-speed whirring machine has entered my brain.

C: 哎，既然你俩都不喝，鄙人就勉为其难地喝下吧。
E: *sigh* Since the both of you won't drink it, I shall drink it with great reluctance.

C: 椒丘，你就别逗他们俩了，你这瓶子里装着的是夕红果汁吧。
E: Jiaoqiu, stop teasing the both of them. This bottle just contains Redsunset juice, doesn't it?

C: 毕竟我天生灵感圣体，机械灵魂肯定是愿意和我好好交流的。
E: After all, I'm born with a strong sensitivity to spirits. I'm sure the Mechanical Souls will be willing to communicate with me.

C: 对于凡人来说有些过于深奥了。
E: That's too profound for mortals.

C: …好像能够理解。
E: ...I think I can understand that.

C: {NICKNAME}，多谢你了。有了这些照片，我去收容那些忆质就方便多了。
E: Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}. These pictures will make collecting and containing the memoria much easier.

C: 什么？！我的秘密，这么快就败露了？确实，这并非我的本名，而是我按照我最爱的动画起的圈名，是六个小桶靠爱与魔法拯救世界的故事。莫非…你也是同好？
E: What? My secret got exposed already? Indeed, that is not my real name. It is a pseudonym that I created based on my favorite anime. It's the story of six trashcans that save the world using the powers of love and magic. Are you... also a fan?

C: 说好要向贝洛伯格的伙伴借用「友谊魔法」，可你并未瞧见任何「朋友」在场……
E: The agreement was that you would borrow the Magic of Friendship from your Belobogian friends, but your "friends" are nowhere to be seen...

C: 一阵金光闪过，小桶宝力获得了{NICKNAME}的「友谊魔法」。
E: With a bright flash of light, Litter Pony obtains {NICKNAME}'s Magic of Friendship.

C: （努力回忆桑博身上的闪光点）
E: (Strain to recall good points on Sampo)

C: 第一次出球，难免不适应。
E: It's your first time away from home, so it must be hard to get used to things.

C: 以及来自贝洛伯格代表队的——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: And representing the city of Belobog — Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 胜者是——「铁臂」卢卡！
E: And the winner is... Luka "Strongarm"!

C: 单论格斗技巧，银鬃铁卫的精锐小队也就无非是这个水平了。
E: In terms of martial prowess, the average Cloud Knight appears to match even the most elite Silvermane squads.

C: 真受不了。这雪鸮不是公司的员工吗？怎么这么真情实感？
E: Ugh, unbelievable. Isn't that snowy owl an IPC employee? Why's he getting so sentimental?

C: 哈哈，没想到吧？你在一个莫名其妙的圈子里红得一塌糊涂。
E: Haha, who would've thought? That you'd be so immensely popular in some weird circle.

C: 抱歉抱歉，我是说…你也来看病啊？
E: Fine! Sorry, I mean... Are you here to see a doctor too?
Hmm...

C: 我！卢卡！一定会赢的！我一定会打败彦卿的！
E: I! Luka! Will definitely win! I will defeat Yanqing!

C: 你是说那位传奇战士？我当然知道！他率领第八铁军与{RUBY_B#反物质军团}天外的入侵者们{RUBY_E#}奋勇战斗的故事我从来听不厌！
E: You mean the legendary warrior? 'Course I have! I'll never tire of the story where he led the Eighth Iron Legion and engaged in a furious battle against {RUBY_B#Antimatter Legion}the invaders from beyond the sky{RUBY_E#}!

C: 小子，我认真劝你一句，退赛吧。你不是我的对手。
E: Lemme give you some real advice kid — drop out now. You ain't in my league.

C: …你们不要这么看着老子！老子长得像心理医士吗？
E: ...Stop looking at me like that! Do I look like a psychiatrist to you?

C: 先去做十组引体向上复健吧！
E: Now go do ten sets of pull-ups to warm up!

C: 唉…他在逃避问题。追上去看看吧。
E: Ugh... He is avoiding the problem. Let's catch up and see how it goes.

C: 你那个小粉丝——玛吉，她和病痛斗了一辈子，最后也没斗过。你说说看，她输了吗？
E: That young fan of yours, Margie. She fought with her illness her entire life, and she didn't make it through in the end. Tell me, did she lose?

C: 这玉兆损毁太严重了，我尽了最大努力，也还是只能修复出一小部分记录。
E: This jade abacus is too severely damaged. Even with my best efforts, I can only restore a small part of the record.

C: 而另一位，是来自「丹轮寺」的武僧，奢摩！他们会为我们带来——
E: And the other contestant is a fighter monk hailing from Claretwheel Temple, Samatha! They will be bringing us —

C: 那姑娘刚才说了啥？
E: What did that girl say?

C: 什么…奢摩小姐是个逃犯？
E: What... Miss Samatha is a fugitive?

C: 记好了，用你这只配当老子尿壶的铁脑袋牢牢记住我这句遗言，因为那些还活着的赏金猎人会追你到银河的任何一个角落，将你熔成一滩铁水。
E: Remember this, and etch it into that metallic head of yours that's only fit to be my chamber pot. The bounty hunters that are still alive will hunt you down to the end of the cosmos and melt you down into a pool of molten metal.

C: 但，世事无常。
E: But worldly matters are impermanent.

C: 但我想要展示的，并非是杀戮的意愿。因为在杀戮之上，我已寻得更伟大的力量……
E: But what I wish to demonstrate is not the intent to slaughter. Because beyond that, I have always found an even greater power...

C: 不过，我还想要看到另一个人的决心。
E: However, I still wish to see the resolve of another person.

C: 护法僧毗梨、智众经师驮那、皈依弟子善逝，及修行僧奢摩，请卢卡施主赐教！
E: Dharmic Monk Virya, Revered Master Dhyana, Converted Disciple Sugata, and Revered Monk Samatha, humbly beseech Patron Luka for guidance!

C: 现在只能寄希望于复活赛，但愿一切顺利吧。
E: Now we'll just have to place our hopes on the repechage and pray everything goes well.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: {NICKNAME}教练真是太谦虚了！
E: Coach {NICKNAME} is too modest!

C: 战术调整要看准时机…
E: It's all about opportunity when you revise your strategy...

C: 我无话可说…
E: I'm speechless...

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 我、我代表贝洛伯格的《水晶日报》向你提问！
E: I—I have a question on behalf of Belobog's Crystal Daily!

C: 我不对比赛规则评价…
E: No comment on the tournament rules...

C: 能走到这里已经超越我的预期了，接下来走一步看一步吧，享受比赛的过程更重要。
E: My expectations have already been exceeded by coming so far. It's just one foot ahead of the next right now. Enjoying the journey is much more important.

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 虎克，你是不是偷看了我的笔记？怎么把我的战术全都说出来了，彦卿要是全知道了，我岂不是白准备了。
E: Did you sneak a peek at my notes, Hook? How could you reveal all my tactics? If Yanqing knows everything, my preparation will go up in smoke!

C: 体力耗尽了，我恐怕撑不了太久了…
E: I'm out of stamina. I don't think I can hold out much longer...

C: 卢卡选手被压制住了！这下他该怎么办！
E: Luka is on the defensive! What will he do?

C: 卢卡！他们人多势众，但个体能力不如你，尝试各个击破他们！
E: Luka! They have the numbers, but their abilities are not on par with yours. So try and take them down one by one!

C: 这真是一场非常精彩的比赛。
E: What an exciting match.

C: 史瓦罗！不要输哦！
E: Come on Svarog, don't lose!

C: 卢卡选手击落了彦卿大人的飞剑！
E: Luka has knocked down Yanqing's swords!

C: 感觉身体好重，胃在抽搐，拳头也挥不动了，我需要休息。
E: My body feels so heavy... My stomach hurts... And I can't swing my fists anymore... I need to rest.

C: 铄金好好打，替我揍扁卢卡！
E: Fight well, Shuojin! Give Luka a good beating!

C: 显然现在更吓人。
E: It's obviously made everything more creepy.

C: 枘凿六合天下第一！
E: Hexanexus is the best!

C: 今年的年度游戏就是它了！
E: The game of the year is gonna be this!

C: 怎么总差几个货物啊？
E: Why are there always a few items missing?

C: 好玩，爱玩。
E: Fun. I love it.

C: 哇，这位猴友居然知道社长！看来我们的忍术流派正在发扬光大啊。
E: Woah, our monkey friend knows the chief! Our ninjutsu school is getting quite popular, it seems.

C: 都认识这么长时间了，我当然愿意相信你的品行和能力。
E: We've known each other a long time. Of course I'm going to trust in your conduct and capability.

C: …我是来正经演奏的。想搞无聊的炒作或者扮演游戏别来找我。
E: ...I'm here to perform a serious show. You can excuse me if you're into pointless hype and role playing.

C: 我想…忍首的意思是，音乐就在我们身边，希望你能到处看看，帮她收集作曲的灵感。应该…是这样吧？
E: I think... what the Chief Ninja means is that music is always around us, that you can take a look around and help her collect inspiration for compositions. That's... probably what she means?

C: 嗯！不愧是与在下共同作战的忍众，阁下真是深得我心！
E: Yes! This is why you're a friendja. You're after my own heart!

C: 原来你真会作曲啊？
E: So you really know how to compose then?

C: 我是键盘手。
E: I'm the keyboardist.

C: 美梦小镇进行曲还有更困难的演出方式，欢迎随时来和我们合奏啾！
E: The Dreamville's marching song has even harder performance methods. You're welcome to play with us again, tweet!

C: 对不起。
E: Sorry.

C: 汪！汪汪…汪汪汪汪！
E: Woof! Woof woof... Woof woof woof woof!

C: （越来越好奇了…乱破所谓的音忍特训到底是什么样的啊？）
E: (More and more curious... What exactly is this special sound ninja training that Rappa's conducting?)

C: 你的乐队炸团了！
E: Your band imploded!

C: 要是观众都看不到我的脸，登台还有什么意义？不行不行。
E: But what is the point of being on stage if the audience can't see my face? That won't work for me.

C: 我…我问过了。但她说比起演奏，更在乎现在的实习工作，就让我继续顶替了……
E: I... I spoke to her before. But she said that she was more interested in her current internship than performing, so she asked me to keep substituting for her.

C: …在下算是深切体会到，忍首之位并非那么轻松了。
E: ...I have come to a deep realization that fulfilling the role of a head ninja is no simple task.

C: 先说清楚，我只是暂时以乐队顾问的身份陪你们训练，并没有真正加入。
E: Let me make this clear. I am only practicing with you as a band consultant. I have not formally joined.

C: 喔喔，没有键盘手的乐队是不完整的！
E: Ahh, a band without a keyboardist is incomplete!

C: 听明白了吗？明白了就赶紧出去！这是乐队专用的排练室，闲杂人等不得入内！
E: Got that? Get out of my sight if you do! This is the band's rehearsal room. No unauthorized personnel allowed!

C: 主公！吉他•忍徒始终未归，而敌方人数众多，在下迫切需要你的协助。
E: Sound Master! Ninja Initiate Guitar has not returned since, and the enemy number many. I am in dire need of your aid.

C: …原来这么简单吗，跟我想的不太一样。
E: ...That was too easy. Totally the opposite of what I had in mind.

C: （看我悄悄溜上舞台……）
E: (Let's quietly creep onto the stage...)

C: 折纸大学的音乐派对还会持续很长时间，没有你们的演出，整场活动都会失去很多乐趣吧，学生们也会觉得无聊的。
E: Paperfold University's music party will continue for a very long time. Without your performances, the entire event would probably lose its luster aplenty, and the students would be bored too.

C: 噢，原来是这样。那就没什么好担心的了，最近这种裂界生物活动得很频繁啊。
E: Oh, so that's how it was. Nothing to worry about, then. Fragmentum creatures such as these have been pretty lively recently.

C: 说实话，我先前从来没想过…这种毫无意义的记录，还能成为创作灵感。
E: Honestly, I never once thought that... such a meaningless record could be used to inspire creativity.

C: 大哥！唱了这么久都没有回应，我们该不会是来错地方了吧？
E: Big Bro! We've been singing for so long, and still no answer. Could we have the wrong place?

C: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
E: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

C: 但老桑博可是打算去喝一杯咯！
E: But I intend to go have a drink!

C: {NICKNAME}！靠你了，快想想办法！
E: {NICKNAME}! It's up to you now. Do something!

C: 越是令人恐惧的事物，越需要被解构和祛魅。
E: The more terrifying an event is, the more need there is to deconstruct and demystify it.

C: 令人忍俊不禁。
E: You sure are a tin can of laughs.

C: 运输鼻行兽。
E: Transport the Nosewalkers.

C: 列车长也很意外帕。是黑塔女士把它送来的，说要它在这里进行一段时间的「业务交流」，作为{NICKNAME}协助测试模拟宇宙的谢礼。
E: Pom-Pom is very surprised too. It was Madam Herta who gave it to us, saying that it was going to be here for a while for a "professional exchange." It's a gift for {NICKNAME} who helped out with the Simulated Universe tests.

C: 我刚刚放这的，这么大的一堆垃圾呢？谁拿走了！
E: I placed it here, and it's such a huge pile of trash. Who took it?

C: 你耐心聆听了一会儿规律的啾啾声，最后确认这是折纸小鸟的呼噜。
E: You patiently listen to the rhythmic tweets, finally confirming that they are the snores of an Origami Bird.

C: 「有心事的石雕群像」。
E: A group of stone statues that have something on their minds.

C: ……零分！
E: ...Zero points!

C: 拍得不错嘛，你们真是拍广告牌的高手。
E: Not bad at all. You guys sure are good at taking billboard photos.

C: 呼，总算走了…已经不想再拍垃圾桶了！
E: Phew, that's them gotten rid of... I don't want to shoot trashcans ever again!

C: 一把筝？
E: A guzheng?

C: 好…好酷的名字！我喜欢！
E: Wh... What a cool name! I like it!

C: 嘘，最后一批奖项就要公布了！
E: Shh, they're about to announce the last batch of awards!

C: 大家在你和三月七的指导下，站在了合适的位置。
E: Instructed by you and March 7th, everyone stands in their appropriate spots.

C: （听说…她并没有搭理任何向她伸出援手的居民，是害怕陌生人吗？）
E: (I heard she ignored every resident who offered a helping hand... Is she afraid of strangers?)

C: 尼卡多利，面对我——
E: Nikador, face me—!

C: 凡人莫要妄想染指神的显耀。
E: Mortals should not foolishly aspire to the lofty glories of gods.

C: 凑近点，把眼睛闭上——
E: Come closer, and close your eyes...

C: 我决定了！
E: I've decided!

C: 太、太失礼啦！灰宝，对缇宝老师要尊重点。但我们…嗯，我们不会输的！
E: H—How rude! Grayie, you need to be more respectful to Tribbie. But we... yes, we won't lose!

C: 呵。现在该向你们揭示我的真实身份了。我，本奇美拉，就是「自由之角」的管理员！
E: Heh. I should reveal my true identity to you all now. I, am the administrator for Horn of Freedom!

C: 果然，即使有差分宇宙的支持，靠这点忆质的残渣就想构建翁法罗斯的模型，还是太勉强了。
E: As expected, even with the support of the Divergent Universe, trying to construct a model of Amphoreus from these mere scraps of memoria is still a bit of a stretch.

C: 别管老三样能不能套公式解开泰坦的秘密，程序能跑不就得了？不要在意这些细节。
E: As long as the program works, it doesn't matter whether these three old variables can be formulaically used to unlock the Titans' secrets. We shouldn't get caught up in the details.

C: 好狂妄！站在你面前的是，拥有超过千只小海豹的海豹搭配师。以你现在的水平，修炼修炼再来吧。
E: What arrogance! Standing before you is the Seal Master with over a thousand seals. With your current level, go train and come back later!

C: 这位选手，不用这么拼命的。说不定活动还会复刻的，以后还有机会的！
E: Sir, you don't have to go all out like this. The event might get a rerun — you'll have another chance in the future!

C: o((-'ω´- )o「当然是我们啦，还能是那只奇美拉吗？」)∋
E: o((-'ω´- )o "Of course it'd be us, who else? Certainly not that chimera!" )∋

C: 这…谁干的？这么狠心……
E: What... who did this? How cruel...

C: 我们悬锋人的字典就没有「刻板印象」这几个字。
E: There is no word for "stereotype" in the Kremnoan language!

C: 对的对的。
E: Yes, that's correct.

C: o((■ω■- )o「泡泡…你相信引力吗？」)∋
E: o((■ω■- )o "Say, Bubbles... ever heard of a little thing called gravity?")∋

C: 好啦！赛事要紧，我宣布——{NICKNAME}选手从淘汰赛阶段晋级，请收下这枚「金盏徽章」，你已经赢得了冠军赛的宝贵资格。
E: Alright! As the contest must go on — {NICKNAME}, congratulations on advancing from the Elimination Rounds! Please accept this Golden Chalice Badge — you've earned a coveted spot in the Championship.

C: *愤怒地*呜嗡——
E: *Enraged* Urrhh... uuuhhhh—

C: 快把冠军的奖杯还给我！
E: Give me back the champion's trophy!

C: 她在挑衅，好明目张胆。
E: She's really throwing down the gauntlet, isn't she?

C: 灰子你太可爱了，就当你同意了。
E: Gray Mystery, you're too adorable. Let's just pretend you agreed to it.

C: 醒一醒……
E: Wake up...

C: 黑厄势力？你在说什么？
E: Pie-non's Legion? What are you talking about?

C: 好家伙，这还是生死局。请你一定要参加！
E: Goodness, a do-or-die situation. Please do participate, then!

C: 泡泡绝不会让{NICKNAME}输的，我已经感受到了，我们有种命中注定的默契！
E: Bubbles won't let {NICKNAME} lose. I can already feel it. Our incredible teamwork is written in destiny!

C: 那么泡泡，有什么话想对{NICKNAME}选手，以及你曾经的豹友们说吗？
E: So Bubbles, is there anything you want to say to {NICKNAME} or your former teammates?

C: 作为青年才俊们的聚集地，折纸大学自然也是我们游戏的主要投放场所。如今《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》的游戏机就在眼前，不打算来体验一下吗？
E: As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?

C: 哦，看样子你已经通关了——恭喜你，朋友，介意和我分享一下你的游戏体验吗？
E: Oh, looks like you've already finished it — congratulations! Mind sharing your thoughts on the game with me?

C: 好好好，下次一定…
E: Alright, alright, maybe next time for sure...

C: 这是那个黑客送我的车…
E: This is the car that hacker gave me...

C: 谢谢你，幽灵小鸟。但是「我俩是同行」这句话，请不要用在你的诅咒对象上。
E: Appreciate that, Ghost Bird. But maybe don't say "See? We're in the same profession" when talking about people you've cursed.

C: 没错，我们需要对诅咒的触发条件、诅咒诞生的根源等等信息调查一番。
E: Right. We need to understand what triggered the curse, where it came from, and gather more details.

C: 青雀女士你就先继续陪幽灵小鸟玩下去吧，我们找来的帮手就快到…嗯？
E: Miss Qingque! Just keep the Ghost Bird busy with games until then! Help is on the way... huh?

C: 缭乱忍侠•AKA乱破，参上！
E: Dazzling Ninja a.k.a. Rappa, reporting for duty!
$%Tweet, R^$%!

C: 你将青雀小鸟摆放在街机上
E: You place Qingqird on the arcade machine

C: 你谁来着？
E: Who are you again?

C: 现在看来，一时半会儿还回不了英灵座。
E: Seems like I won't be heading back to the Throne of Heroes anytime soon.

C: 能说人话吗？
E: Layman terms please?

C: 让我摸摸！
E: Let me touch it!

C: 那是谁？好古怪的名字。既然是位受你认可的调饮师，也带过来让我见见呗。
E: Who's that? What a peculiar name. If they're a drinksmith worthy of your respect, you should introduce us sometime.

C: 在追觅调饮真理的求谒之路上，它惨遭被摧毁的厄运。所幸来自异界的旅者伸出援手，让它能够浴火重生。
E: In its pursuit of mixological perfection, it endured devastating destruction. Thankfully, a traveler from another world provided aid, enabling its glorious rebirth.

C: …嗯？哈哈哈，不错，调饮起效了！交给你果然没错。
E: Hmm? Hahaha, wonderful! The drink actually works! I knew I could count on you.

C: 「又幻想了」。
E: "Daydreaming Again."

C: 「你说的都兑」。
E: "Waterver You Say."

C: 这种调饮可以影响饮用者的人格，或许对你的人偶有帮助？
E: This blend seems to affect the drinker's personality. Could be useful for your puppet?

C: 按照配方来看，这杯调饮能让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>成长为潜意识里自己想成为的样子</color>。
E: According to the recipe, this drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>grow into their true essence, as they subconsciously aspire to be</color>.

C: 来都来了，也喝一杯吧。
E: Well, since you're already here, why not have a drink?

C: 大君已至阵前，有劳「星穹」仙舟的{NICKNAME}将军统筹。将军，请校阅各仙舟事宜吧。
E: The Lord Ravager has arrived at the front line. General {NICKNAME} of the Xianzhou "Star Rail," the command is yours. Please review the mobilization across the Xianzhou ships.

C: 难不成酒吧已经过气了？
E: Has the lounge already gone out of style?

C: 意料之外的味道呢…像是极光。
E: Unexpected flavor... like the aurora.

C: 剧本上这么写，我们便这么做了。
E: The script said so, so we did it.

C: 我对在空间站看烟花秀没兴趣，你体内那颗星核，还是留着自己用吧。
E: I've got no interest in a space station fireworks display. That Stellaron inside you? Keep it for yourself.

C: 放心交给我吧！
E: Consider it done!

C: 理解，草率的决定是生意场上的大忌。
E: Of course. Hasty decisions are a cardinal sin in business.

C: 我说砂金，你上把在搞什么啊？你真有好好计算过损益吗？
E: Hey Aventurine, what were you thinking last time? Did you even run the numbers?

C: 这东西原来不值钱啊……
E: So it's not worth anything...

C: 敬请购买《冒险鼹鼠队》！
E: "Rules are made to be broken!"

C: 我果然没有看错你。能完成这些试炼，说明你是一个值得信赖的人。
E: So I was right about you. Being able to complete these trials proves you a trustworthy person.

C: 嘿嘿，吓一跳吧。
E: Heehee, freaked you out, right?

C: 您既然亲眼见过幻胧，能给在下讲讲它长什么样子吗？
E: Since you've seen Phantylia before, could you tell me a bit more about what it looks like?

C: 我就按着小衍剧本念的啊，他的第一稿向来都很粗疏草率，不碍事。
E: I'll just follow Xiyan's script. His first drafts are usually pretty sloppy. It doesn't matter.

C: 这里本来就是培育星槎的地方，附近应该有不少，我们就地取材，在附近找找看吧。
E: It's always been a starskiff nursery here, and there should be plenty nearby. Let's take a look around and see if we can use what we've got at hand.

C: 接下来，该选一颗星槎种子培育剑柄良材了。
E: Next, it's time to choose a starskiff seed from which to cultivate some good material for the sword hilt.

C: 也就是说先注入<color=#dbc291ff>「无根纯水」</color>，再加入<color=#dbc291ff>「天火熔金」</color>，等到它将纯水全部蒸发，就加入<color=#dbc291ff>「冷却液」</color>。完全冷却之后，将<color=#dbc291ff>「建木柄材」</color>放入，再加入<color=#dbc291ff>「无根纯水」</color>，剑材与剑柄连为一体，宛如天成。
E: What that means is, first add the <color=#dbc291ff>Bona Aqua</color>, then add the <color=#dbc291ff>Ignis Aureliae</color>. When the Bona Aqua has completely evaporated, add <color=#dbc291ff>coolant</color>. After it has completely cooled, put in the <color=#dbc291ff>hilt-wood from the Arbor</color>, then add more <color=#dbc291ff>Bona Aqua</color> to fuse the hilt with the metal into a single instrument, as though they have always been one.

C: 我依稀记得…藏宝图应该就在这附近了……
E: I vaguely remember... The treasure map ought to be around here somewhere...

C: 哦，你说的是素裳。
E: Oh, you must mean Sushang.

C: 哪有那个时间呐，我俩只是相声爱好者，工作日咱俩还得在码头干活呢。
E: Because we simply don't have the time. We're just crosstalk lovers, and we've got work to do at the dock on work days.

C: …要不我俩录一段相声吧？
E: ...How about us two record a crosstalk show together?

C: 若是还不松口，那你就报上我的名头，说金人巷那边要是想开我的话本专场，想借他们的相声录音来热热场子。
E: And if they're still hesitant, just tell them that I'm planning to start a storytelling show in Aurum Alley, and that I'd like to use their crosstalk as a warm-up act.

C: 你将茶一饮而尽，辛辣的口感令你怀疑你喉咙是否在燃烧。
E: As you chug down the tea, its spicy taste sets your throat ablaze.

C: 这么说来，方才那方子是要不得了。来，再尝尝这个，我换了道七比三的方子，保管不会出事！
E: Looks like that recipe is not going to work. Well, I've got another one for you to try! This one has a ratio of seven to three, so it's totally safe!

C: 请留步，这位朋友，玩了这么久的以太战线，你难道就没有感到过一丝反感吗？这些以太灵虽然只是数据，但谁又能否定数据的权益呢？
E: Hold it right there. My friend, having played Aetherium Wars for all this time, do you not feel a little disgust? Aethers may only be data, but can we really deny data their own rights?

C: 你仔细想想，是以太复印欸！这套技术，我只在星核猎手那位小姑娘手里看到过……
E: Seriously, think about it, it's Aether copying! I've only ever heard of that Stellaron Hunter girl using this kind of tech.

C: 您听起来是个厉害的大人物…怎么会出现在这里呢？
E: You seem like a pretty important person. What brings you to this kind of place?

C: 我该如何参加庆典？
E: How do I participate?

C: 正有此意。
E: Sounds like a plan.

C: 就叫它「次元扑满」吧。
E: I've got it! Let's call them "Warp Trotter!"

C: 在庆典里拿下冠军吧！
E: Let's go for gold!

C: 正巧，两位也都在这里——不如就让我来教两位如何收集游离数据吧。
E: Since you're both here, let me give you a lesson on gathering roaming data.

C: 让我看看…你们还没有点亮这片区域的所有灯炉——那我可不能放你们继续前进了。
E: Looks like you haven't bothered to light up all the lamps in this area yet... I can't just let you off the hook.

C: 哼哼，哼哼哼，哼！
E: Oink! Grunt! Oink, oink!

C: 欸，你不这么觉得吗？我还以为你也乐在其中呢。
E: What's the matter? I thought you were having fun.

C: 感觉今天是来不及了…不如我们就在歌德宾馆休息一晚，明天再乘列车出发吧？
E: Buuuut it's already getting late... How about we head back to Goethe Hotel for a bit and then set out on the Express tomorrow?

C: 哼哼！哼！
E: Oink, Oink, oink!

C: …啊，听着怎么像是在损我自己……
E: ...There's nothing wrong with being a casual player.

C: 是我们冒昧了。
E: We were out of line.

C: …你确定不是来搞破坏的？啊，星核猎手不会还在打{NICKNAME}的主意吧？
E: ...So you're not here to start trouble? You're not still after {NICKNAME}, right?

C: 果然是你…
E: As suspected...

C: 我好像渐渐习惯这个玩法了……
E: I think I'm starting to get the hang of this...

C: 陪你玩倒是没问题。不过要记住：娱乐第一，比赛第二。「赢」并不是游戏的全部，可别让好胜心控制了自己。
E: I don't mind playing with you, but don't forget: Fun first, competition second. "Winning" isn't everything with games. Don't let your competitive nature take over you.

C: 对了，如果你能再夺冠的话，制作组说不定还会推出以你为原型的赛季冠军皮肤哦。
E: By the way, if you can take the Championship again, maybe the developers will release a Season Champion Skin based on you!

C: …你居然有领取第三份奖励的资格？真的是这个赛季刚开始玩的吗？
E: ...You're qualified to claim the third reward? Did you really only start playing this season?

C: 闲言碎语不要讲，给您来段看家戏！
E: Words and whispers hold no sway, better get ready for the grand display!

C: ——前「冠军首席」托帕小姐！只有在与她的对决中获得胜利，你们才能获得问鼎冠军的资格。
E: The previous champion — Miss Topaz! Only by emerging victorious against her can you become eligible for true championship!

C: 稍后再说。
E: I need more time.

C: 实不相瞒，这正是那位<color=#dbc291ff>「高手玩家」</color>的愿望——她希望能和两位堂堂正正地对决。
E: You heard right. The <color=#dbc291ff>elite player</color> wishes for nothing more than a fair and respectable duel against the both of you.

C: 虎克非常满意！满意到都想让你加入鼹鼠党了！
E: Hook is super-duper happy! I'm tempted to ask you to join The Moles...

C: 走吧～我们去找下一个纹样！
E: Let's look for the next one!

C: 藿藿是判官，我是云骑，十王司有调遣责无旁贷。{NICKNAME}嘛，也是为罗浮出过力流过汗的天外友人……
E: Huohuo is a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission and I'm a Cloud Knight — we must answer the call to the best of our abilities. And {NICKNAME} is an outworlder who's done great things for the sake of the Xianzhou...

C: 我就说吧！…但云吟术真能做到这个效果吗？
E: That's what I was just saying! ...But can cloudhymn magic really do that?

C: 记得回去分享一下账号情况。
E: Remember to share the account updates.

C: 咱们…咱们开个作战会议吧…我觉得这么穷追猛打不是个办法，要用脑袋……
E: Let's... let's try a new strategy... I don't think we can beat them like this. We need to use our heads...

C: 万事俱备，去吧，<color=#dbc291ff>将白露赶进藏月瓠的阵法之中</color>吧！
E: All is set. Now go on, <color=#dbc291ff>drive Bailu into the matrix of the Lunaumbra Gourd</color>!

C: 很好，你们的选择正如法眼所见。你们应该明白，这个谜题自始至终只有唯一的答案，这就像命运的道路只有一条！
E: Well done. Your choices are as the omniscia foresaw them. You should know that there was only one answer to this puzzle from the beginning, just as destiny has only one path!

C: 站定
E: Stay put

C: 家人啊，我觉着这应该只是某种恶作剧…也不排除是有人想拿这个当噱头，提升幻戏的销量。
E: Guys, I feel like this is just some sort of prank... or a marketing stunt to boost ticket sales.

C: 你没事吧？你该问这位云骑伤着了没。
E: Are YOU alright? You should be asking the Cloud Knight.

C: 你们向景元讲述了在祈龙坛上的遭遇。
E: You tell Jing Yuan what happened on Dragonprayer Terrace.

C: 胜生败死，战场的法则和宇宙的法则一样，并无区别。剑术是胜利的艺术，只有胜出的剑才能传承下去，败北的剑全都埋于荒冢之间了。
E: The laws of the battlefield are no different from the laws of the universe — life for victory and death for defeat. Swordsmanship is the art of victory, and only the victorious swords can be passed on — swords defeated are buried among the barren wastelands.

C: 很好，是你…赢了。
E: Impressive... I am bested...

C: 倒了本大爷的血霉，遇见了这个女鬼…我是说判官。
E: ...My luck took a sour turn when I ran into this demoness... I mean, judge.

C: 嗯，不止咱们几个，十王司的冥差们也会暗行调查。
E: Mm. Plus, the spiritfarers from the Ten-Lords Commission will be carrying out their own investigation in secret as well.

C: 至少现在，你回来了不是吗？
E: But at least you're back now, right?

C: 附身
E: (Possess)

C: 哎呀，你也来下棋？
E: Oh, are you here to play chess, too?

C: 归根到底，还是要战斗啊…
E: So after all that, it still ends in a fight...

C: …你注意到了吗？这位文远先生，好像他没有被附身。而这岁阳也不太寻常…事情比想象中要复杂一些……
E: ...Did you notice? This is Mr. Wenyuan, and he doesn't seem possessed. And this heliobus is also quite unusual... Things seem to have gotten more complicated than anticipated...

C: 藿藿怎么了吗？你们收回了岁阳，却好像有些失落。
E: Huohuo, what's wrong? You've recaptured a heliobus but still seem frustrated about something?

C: 我能理解文远先生的感受，接受「离开」并不容易，我也一样。
E: I can understand Mr. Wenyuan's sentiments. It's hard to accept someone leaving; I'm the same.

C: 勤劳的青雀，太卜不喜欢吗？
E: Do you not like Qingque now that she is a motivated worker?

C: 你还好吧，青雀？有没有觉得哪儿有点不对劲？头疼、恶心、做了奇怪的梦什么的？
E: Are you okay, Qingque? Have you been feeling out of sorts at all? Headache, nausea, strange dreams?

C: 哈？你不要吓我，我哪儿有这个精力和胆子来着。
E: What? Don't be crazy! As if I have the energy or the guts for that!

C: （糟糕，这个岁阳试图用这种方式困住我…）
E: (Oh no! The heliobus is trying to use this as a way to trap me...)

C: 出发！
E: Let's go!

C: …事不宜迟，现在就看看。
E: ...No time to waste. Let's go now.
...Save... Me...

C: 你毫无头绪，也许应该找找这里的线索。
E: You have no idea what it could be. Perhaps there are clues around?

C: （将房产证交给他）
E: (Hand the deed over)

C: 据我所知，有些岁阳相当狡猾，会专门选在受害者毫无防备的时候偷袭！
E: As far as I know, some heliobi can be really crafty and deliberately choose to ambush victims when they're completely off-guard!

C: …快，快搭把手。
E: ...Quick, help me out.

C: 这种话你都说得出来？
E: How can you even say this?

C: 哦。
E: Oh.

C: 走吧，去下一处景点——建木玄根。
E: Let's go to our next stop — Roots of the Arbor.

C: 岁阳，对你们人类很危险，对吧？所以我，还是回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
E: Heliobi are very dangerous to humans, aren't they? I guess it's better for me to rest in the dark.

C: 感觉是个不错的主意——用它把列车组都排查一遍的话， 就能找出那个被岁阳附体的家伙啦。
E: That sounds like a great idea. We can use it to check every member of the Crew, and we will be able to find the one possessed by the heliobus in no time.

C: 去履行你的职责吧，我也该回到黑暗里再睡一阵了。
E: Carry out your duty, then. I shall return to slumber in the darkness for a while longer.

C: 你总是能做出正确的选择，并且不后悔。
E: You can always make the right decision, and you never regret.

C: 先从你的提问开始吧，你都收集了哪些问题呢？
E: Let's start with one of your questions. What did you get?

C: 你知不知道为了求证你随口编的灵异故事，咱们浪费了多少精力。
E: Do you know how much effort we put into proving whether these supernatural stories of yours were true or not?

C: 对于这一原理，目前还不能明确，但我们可以尝试能否还原出近似情况。
E: This hypothesis is not yet confirmed, but we can try to see if we can approximate the situation.

C: 造物们拒绝在此处进食，并对你的行为表示鄙夷。
E: The creations refuse to eat here, and are disgusted by your behavior.

C: 你已经很好看啦，不知道阮•梅会不会第一时间发现我……
E: You already look great. I wonder if Ruan Mei will be able to notice me straight away...

C: 啊？这是在讽刺我吗？！
E: What? Are you being sarcastic!?

C: （好像不太对，再想想吧。）
E: (No, that doesn't seem right. Think again.)

C: 不管用什么方式，喊你们的管理员过来。否则…就等着瞧！
E: I don't care what you do. Just get your administrator. Or else!

C: 即使没拿到那把钥匙，你依旧打开了房门。
E: Even without the room card, you managed to open the door.

C: 回去…回哪里？
E: Come back... but where?

C: 汪！我们好像没准备这么多种类的材料哇……
E: Woof! I don't think we have all those ingredients...

C: 不，现场还有更合适的人选。对吧，新来的调饮师？
E: No, there are more suitable people available. Right, newly-minted drinksmith?

C: ——庆祝酒吧终于要开始营业了哇！
E: ...Time to celebrate the grand opening of our lounge!

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: （大杯，大杯…该选哪个款式的杯子呢？）
E: (A large, huh... What style of glass should I choose?)

C: （用饮料泼它。）
E: (Pour the drink on it.)

C: 忧郁只是表象啦，您不觉得那位的气质很特别吗？就是那种…疏离感，若即若离的氛围，才华横溢的孤独，实在太迷人了！
E: I'm not talking about his looks. Don't you find his demeanor special? I mean, the kind of... detachment and iffy vibe! The kind of solitude you'd expect from a genius! It's just fascinating!

C: 舒翁这么有魅力，性格也温柔，想和她约会的人可多了，人家当然有兴趣。但邀约过好几次，都被拒绝了，就只能转移目标了呀。
E: Siobhan is so attractive and kind, and everyone wants to date her. I was interested too and asked her out a few times, but got rejected. So, I had to find someone else.

C: 我向你道歉，希望修复我们之间的关系。所以你看，下次那位红色客人来的时候，能不能帮我说点好话？不用夸奖，多提提我的名字就好！
E: I apologize for that, and I hope we can be on better terms. So you see, next time that guest comes around, could you put in a good word for me? No need for flattery. Just mention my name more often!

C: 舒翁和你交代了些什么，要好好修复我们？
E: What did Siobhan tell you? To fix us up?

C: （感觉它不是光顾酒吧的客人，更像是…来试探我的？）
E: (Feels like he's not just here for a drink, but more like... testing me?)

C: 记录「小星星」的情况。
E: Record information about Starlet.

C: （…没想到啊，情绪问题解决后，它的性格会变得这么正经。）
E: (...Didn't expect it to become so serious after resolving its emotional issues.)

C: （它的性格真的改变了好多啊。）
E: (Its personality has really changed a lot.)

C: 要求这么多？
E: Wait, so many requirements?

C: （好了，其余怪物的问题都得到了解决，该和小星星好好聊聊了。）
E: (Alright, now that I've resolved all the other monsters' problems, it's time to have a chat with Starlet.)

C: 就到这里吧，我还会再来光顾，希望你能喜欢这份工作。
E: That's all. I'll come back again. Hope you enjoy the job.

C: 启动调饮模拟器！
E: Activate the drinksmith simulator!

C: 还是很让人恼火！
E: You still make my blood boil!

C: 你觉得我会信吗？
E: Do you think I'd believe you?

C: 也是，小时候的我…哪能跟你这个大个子比啊！合理，非常合理！
E: Yeah, you're right... You can't expect a kid to beat a game as fast as an adult! That totally makes sense!

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

C: 汪  汪      汪
E: Woof  Woof      Woof

C: 不<rhythm>要<rhythm>紧<rhythm>张
E: No <rhythm>need <rhythm>to <rhythm>fret

C: 铛<rhythm>铛<rhythm>铛<rhythm>铛
E: Ding <rhythm>Ding <rhythm>Ding <rhythm>Ding

C: 每天<rhythm>都是
E: The same <rhythm>everyday

C: <color=#f29e38ff>新的折纸小鸟</color>将加入合奏，来试试不一样的节奏吧。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>New Origami Birds</color> are about to join the ensemble. Let's try a different beat.

C: 新的立牌将会出现，试试不一样的节奏吧。
E: New stands are about to appear. Let's try a different rhythm.

C: 退出
E: Exit

C: 游戏期间如有任何问题或意见，欢迎随时向我反馈。您的支持将会是我们前进的动力。
E: If you have any doubts or feedback while playing, please approach me anytime. Your support is what motivates us to do better.

C: 你什么时候黑进来的？
E: When did you hack your way in?

C: 你猜，猜对了就告诉你。
E: Take a guess. I'll tell you if you get it right.

C: 你要我ID卡做什么？
E: What do you need my ID for?

C: 这么简陋的Demo也好意思拿出来测试，我果真不该抱有任何期待……
E: I can't believe they have the nerve to release such a crude demo for testing. Shouldn't have expected better...

C: 您做得非常好。事实上，对于DIY模块，我们还设计开发了其它玩法，只是本次测试中尚未实装。
E: Nicely done! We actually designed more game modes for the DIY module, but they haven't been implemented. Not for this test, anyway.

C: 街机启动，啾！
E: Arcade Machine, it's tweetin' time!

C: 所以下次别奶了，祖宗。
E: So please, stop jinxing it.

C: 呵，少嘚瑟，待会先来与我大战三百回合！
E: Hah, don't be so cocky. Later, let's have a one-on-one battle!

C: 啾啾！来陪我玩捉迷藏啾~
E: Tweet tweet! Come play hide and seek with me, tweet!

C: 又见面啦，卢卡，{NICKNAME}。
E: Good to see you again, Luka, {NICKNAME}.

C: 虽然我们三个已经算是熟人了，但我还是郑重地通过组委会那边传达了合作意愿。
E: Even though we are acquainted, I had formally expressed my intention to collaborate with you through the committee.

C: 你怎么总惦记着贝洛伯格？
E: Why do you keep focusing on Belobog?

C: 舆论这东西嘛…和这香炉里的烟一样，只会随着风飘来飘去。风向总会变的，不是所有的风都会吹向你。
E: Public opinion... it's like the smoke in this incense burner, drifting with the wind. The wind will eventually shift, and not all of it will blow against you all the time.

C: 这…我分明用自己的实力赢得了比赛…怎么会变成这样……
E: I won the match fair and square... How did it come to this...

C: 公司的机甲和你的武术同根同源是吧？之前你怎么不想起来？是公司用钱唤醒你的记忆了吗？
E: The IPC's mechs and your martial arts share the same roots? Why didn't you mention this before? Did the IPC's money help you remember?

C: 这该不会是托帕安排的吧？
E: Could this be arranged by Miss Topaz?

C: 提问：既然波尔卡女士不想加入模拟宇宙，她又为何要主动落入我们的陷阱？
E: Question: If Madam Polka does not wish to join the Simulated Universe, why would she intentionally walk into our trap?

C: 收集「学派战争」的数据，复现出完整的「权杖」系统，到那时，鲁珀特二世的遗产自会告诉我们答案。
E: Collect data about the Scholars' Strife and replicate the complete Scepter system. Then, Rubert II's legacy will naturally show us the way.

C: 只不过，如今的列车，车厢数量远比不上过去。「客房车厢」只有四间房间。严格来说，三间。丹恒甚至睡在资料室。
E: It's just that the current Express has far fewer cars compared to the past. The Passenger Cabin only has four rooms — well, three, technically, since Dan Heng has been sleeping in the Archives.

C: 咚咚…就是这里了帕！
E: Ta-da! We're here!

C: 我不想喝咖啡…
E: I don't want to drink coffee...

C: （人类不能失去电竞房，就像星际和平公司不能失去庇尔波因特。）
E: (Humans can't afford to lose the gaming room, just like the Interastral Peace Corporation can't afford to lose Pier Point.)

C: 藏品的摆放还是随心所欲一些为好。无名客的生活总是充满疲惫，在这种小事上，不妨就放过自己吧。
E: Arranging collectibles is best done as you please. A Nameless's life is always full of fatigue, so why not give yourself a break on these small matters?

C: 这玩意叫「香皂」？？？
E: This thingamajig is a bar of soap?

C: 非常合适！
E: Perfect!

C: 带我去旧城探索吧。
E: I'm ready for our adventure. Lead the way to the ancient city.

C: 总之，我们还是继续前进吧。
E: In any case, we had better press on.

C: 通过这片区域之后，应该就是存放宝藏的金库了吧。算算距离，差不多也该到尽头了……
E: Past this area should be the vault where treasure would be stored. By estimating how far we've traveled, it seems like we're close to our goal...

C: …令人震惊，这些是货真价实的古代遗产。而且这块石板保存得相当完好，堪称极品！
E: ...How extraordinary. These are genuine pieces of ancient heritage, and this slab has been preserved surprisingly well. An exquisite relic indeed!

C: 没有任何含义，它只是在单纯的呜呜叫。
E: Just simple sounds of happiness.

C: 这不争气的！
E: What a disappointment!

C: 事不宜迟，我们来看看驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大成长得如何吧？
E: Let's not waste any time. Shall we check in on how Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's coming along?

C: 哈哈，看来灰宝和驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的关系确实很好呢~
E: Haha, looks like you and Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas are really getting along~

C: 它说了你能听懂？
E: You can understand what it's saying?

C: 你是不是一直在等露脸的机会…
E: Were you just waiting for your chance in the spotlight...

C: 这头大地兽名为「贝茜摩丝」，领受过吉奥里亚的祝福，可以与其他大地兽共享感官。通过它的双眼，整个旅团都能目睹驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的表现。
E: This dromas, named "Behemoth," has received the blessing of Georios and can share its senses with other dromases. Through its eyes, the entire troupe can witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's performance.

C: 呜嗡！（只要再长大一些，我就能走上兽生巅峰，成为大地兽中的大地兽啦！
E: Grumph! (Just wait until I grow up a bit more. I'll rise to the very top of the beast world and become the dromas among dromases! Just you wait!)

C: 人无完人。
E: No human is perfect.

C: 呜？！呜嗡嗡嗡——（没什么！我们先回家吧！我想多练习一下祷言。你会陪我的对吧，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？）
E: Woo?! Grumphhh— (It's nothing! Let's go home! I want to practice my prayers a bit more. You'll stay with me, right, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}?)

C: 呜嗡——（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我好像知道你在想什么——）
E: Grumph— ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I think I know exactly what you're thinking right now—)

C: 你轻轻将「土块」送入嘴里，用牙咬下一小口，试着感受那份苦涩中的心意。
E: You gently place the dirt in your mouth, taking a small bite and trying to taste the sincerity in its bitterness.

C: 大爷，您先冷静，听我再说一遍——您这件是新的，毫无争议的新，上周刚造的那种新。
E: Sir, please calm down, and let me say this again — your item is undeniably new, freshly made last week.

C: 就是就是！
E: Exactly!

C: 这样吧，我来仔细鉴定下。不过您要做好准备，结果不会有任何不同。
E: Allow me to conduct a thorough appraisal. But be prepared, the result will be no different.

C: 关于学习鉴宝…
E: About learning appraisal...

C: 这宝贝什么来头？
E: What's the story of this treasure?

C: 嘶嘶。给你给你。回去吧，在哪里跌倒的，就在哪里站起来。嘶嘶。
E: Zztzzt. Here you go, take them. What doesn't kill you only makes you stronger. Zztzzt.

C: 是这样的，空间站有一套自研的模拟战斗工具，目前是我俩在接手——
E: So, here's the thing: the space station has a self-developed combat simulation tool, and right now, it's just the two of us handling it —

C: 敌人怎么有点眼熟？
E: Why does this enemy look kinda familiar?

C: 这位巨人被后世尊称为「川伯」，它所化的石碑则是「川伯的丰碑」。念及其恩泽的人们纷纷前来祭奠，久而久之，那堤坝竟成了一方圣地。
E: The giant was later revered as "River Elder," and the stone monument it turned into became known as "River Elder's Monument." People who remembered its benevolence came to pay their respects, and over time, the dam became a sacred site.

C: 于是三折河爆发了有史以来最大的水灾，冲毁了堤坝和沿岸城市。即使有星际和平公司协助，重建工作依旧花费了数年时间。
E: And so, the Three-fold River experienced its worst flood in history, destroying dams and cities along its banks. Even with the Interastral Peace Corporation's assistance, the reconstruction took several years.

C: 「竟然！主人公不仅察觉了世界的本质，还说出了非常不得了的台词。但人家必须指出，扮演上层叙事者是犯规的哦！」
E: "Incredible! The hero has uncovered the essence of the world... and even spoke a line that's truly beyond expectation! But I must remind you... taking on the narrator's role is against the rules!"

C: 别看老师反应这么冷淡，刚到这里的时候，他可是最激动的那个。
E: Don't let the professor's cold demeanor fool you. When we first arrived, he was the most excited of all!

C: 一边念叨着：「这是…炼金术的奇迹！」，一边就扑向了那群小家伙！哎，当时我都担心老师会把妖精们丢进法阵里呢。
E: He was going on and on: "This is... a miracle of alchemy!" And then dove right toward those tiny critters! Honestly, I was worried he'd toss the fairies into a matrix right then and there.

C: 就是很厉害呀。四星级代表着妖精们的最高认可，是莫大的荣誉哦！
E: It's really impressive, actually. A four-star rating means the highest possible praise from the fairies. It's a huge honor!

C: 希望是个好的开始。走吧。
E: Here's hoping it's a great start. Come on, let's move.

C: 唔，要向左挪一点。对，再向左！
E: Um... a bit more to the left. Yes, more to the left!

C: 万敌带着几个妖精忙碌了起来。不多时，厨房门口便架起了一口大锅。
E: Mydei and the fairies spring into action. Before long, a massive pot is set up right outside the kitchen door.

C: 不行不行，怕忙不过来，给大家添麻烦。
E: Nuh-uh. I'd just slow everyone down.

C: …不会又要学好久吧？
E: ...This isn't going to take forever to learn again, is it?

C: 答案是甜食！*我们*知道，没有人能抵抗住甜品的诱惑。
E: The answer is sweets! We know no one can resist the charm of desserts.

C: ——拭目以待迷！
E: Let's see what'll happen!

C: 甜蜜蜜节圆满结束，餐馆经营也越来越顺利。真是充实的一天呢。
E: And with that, the Sweetie Festival comes to a perfect close. The restaurant's doing better than ever. What a fulfilling day.

C: 确实感觉累了。
E: Yeah, guess it does make me a bit tired.

C: 不过，纵情欢宴总需要恰当的氛围，大快朵颐同样如此。餐馆唯独缺少了一份奏乐与酣饮，我会将所需物件悉数列出，以便置备。
E: But you can't throw a real feast without the right atmosphere. A good meal needs music and drinks to match. I'll jot down everything we'll need to set the mood.

C: 这就是你徒手作战的原因？还是说，悬锋城的菜谱里只有火烤一种方式？
E: Oh yeah? That's why you fight bare-handed? Or is grilling the only thing people in Castrum Kremnos know how to do?

C: 别把悬锋人跟蛮族混为一谈，{RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}。
E: Watch your mouth, {RUBY_B#numbskull}HKS{RUBY_E#}. Don't lump us in with the barbarians.

C: 白厄是餐馆最初的厨师，土生土长的哀丽秘榭人，他制作的菜品，或许会更适合妖精们的口味。
E: He was our restaurant's very first chef, born and raised right here in Aedes Elysiae. His dishes probably suit the local fairies' tastes more naturally.

C: 万敌身为成名已久的大厨，带领悬锋孤军辗转世界各地，充分吸收了诸多城邦的美食文化。论经验，他的地位恐怕难以撼动。
E: He's a world-class chef who's led the Kremnoan Detachment across the world, learning from many city-states' cuisine. His experience alone makes him hard to beat.

C: 该请遐蝶出场了。
E: Time to bring out Castorice.

C: 而万敌阁下对哀地里亚的传统炖菜做出了改良，增添了用以提鲜的酸味，汤底浓郁却不会感到腻，北地特有的刺激口味被淡化，只留下了温暖的感受。
E: Meanwhile, Lord Mydei has reimagined Aidonia's traditional stew with a touch of acidity that lifts the flavor. The broth is hearty without being heavy, and the bold northern spices have been mellowed into a warm, comforting finish.

C: 「蜂蜜裹炸八爪鱼」，请。
E: "Honey-Crusted Fried Octopus!" Enjoy.

C: 一个南瓜吃一年。
E: One pumpkin's all, from spring to fall!

C: 最简单的，当然就是降价大促销啦。既能清空库存，还能赚波大的，两难自解！
E: Honestly, the easiest thing would be a big fat discount sale! Clear everything out, make a nice profit, and poof — no more problem!

C: …赛法利娅。
E: ...Cifera.

C: 锵锵，场地都布置好啦，是不是还挺像模像样的？
E: Ta-da! The venue's all set up. Not bad, right? Looks pretty official!

C: 具体想聊些什么？
E: What exactly do you want to talk about?

C: 餐馆经营本就众口难调，选择甜食作为最初的主题无疑很明智，符合食材储备状况，也能最大限度地满足顾客要求。
E: Running a restaurant means you can't please everyone, so choosing sweets as the first theme is definitely a smart call. It works perfectly with our current ingredient stock while delivering maximum customer satisfaction.

C: 呵…说起来，还未去问她中意的新衣款式呢。
E: Heh... come to think of it, I still haven't asked which dress style she prefers lately.

C: 一切顺利。农田送来的食材很充足，餐馆的主推菜品也相当受顾客欢迎，就是人手有点不够，每天都忙得手忙脚乱的。
E: Things are going smoothly. The farmland's supplying plenty of ingredients, and our signature dishes are a big hit with the customers. We're just a bit short on hands... the kitchen's absolute chaos every day.

C: 你遇到了「休整」事件。
E: You found a Respite event.

C: 接下来，列车长将对本轮值日的工作成果进行整体评估。
E: Now, the conductor will perform an overall evaluation on the outcome of this round of duties.

C: 神王返乡，信使归去，命运无从观晓，但却值得铭记。\n自旅途间见证的品格，前往书中将其写下。
E: The god-king had returned home and the messenger had departed. Their fates can no longer be scried, but are worthy of remembering.\nThe testaments of character witnessed during your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 总是对你好奇
E: Can't Help Being Curious About You

C: 如果你又发呆
E: If You're Spacing Out Again

C: 出生就被生父扔下悬崖，\n坠入冥海，漂流九年之久。
E: Cast off a cliff by his father at birth,\nhe plunged into the Sea of Souls and drifted for nine years.

C: 可在哀地里亚的风雪中，\n男人也曾落下过一滴，\n绽作染血的百合。
E: But in Aidonia's blizzards he once did cry,\nA tear shed among the storm and frost,\nThat bloomed into a lily stained with blood.

C: 「回头吧，宠儿。」\n泰坦奄奄的谕宣，\n勾不住少女命运的弦。
E: "Turn back, chosen one."\nThe Titan's fading proclamation,\nCannot pull back the string of the girl's destiny.

C:
口是心非莫过于此——

习惯于死亡的人，
未必擅于道别。
E:
Such is the epitome of lies —

One who's grown used to death,
Remains inexperienced with farewells.

C: 「耽误了姐姐的人生， 就此结束也罢。」 少女放弃了挣扎， 却看见一道身影刺破水面——
E: "I've been the weight upon my sister's wings... Let this be where it all comes to rest." The girl gives up her struggles, Only to see a figure pierce through the water's surface —

C: 于无天无地的冥界，\n盛开着名为<color=#9e5738>「安提灵」</color>的花，\n赏花者徒余一人。
E: In the nether realm without an earth or sky,\nA flower named <color=#9e5738>Antila</color> blooms,\nits beauty witnessed by but one soul.

C: 只是彼时，女孩尚未察觉，\n那日人们贪图的并非一支华簪，\n而是她体内<color=#9e5738>金色的神血</color>。
E: However, back then the girl did not realize\nThat the people did not covet one simple pin,\nBut the <color=#9e5738>golden blood</color> flowing beneath her skin.

C: 可一阵风拂过，\n少女却已将它逮住，\n「想逃？你的命可仰赖我的『诡计』。」
E: But a gust of wind brushed past,\nAnd the girl had already caught them.\n"Running for it? Your life was saved by my 'trickery,' you know."

C: 不知何时，你作为死的种子，\n在<color=#9e5738>「记忆」</color>的囚笼中，\n再度醒来。
E: At some point, you awake once more\nas a dead seed\nin the prison of <color=#9e5738>Remembrance</color>.

C: <color=#9e5738>众人将与一人离别，\n唯其人将觐见奇迹……</color>
E: <color=#9e5738>All shall bid farewell to one,\nand that person alone will witness the miracle...</color>

C: 「你是万千生灵之祖，」\n「一定要保护好兄姊弟妹……」
E: "You are the oldest of countless beings"\n"And must protect these brothers and sisters..."

C: 「禁伤无辜生灵的法令即将颁布…」\n「只需你未来替逐火出一次手。」
E: "A decree to protect innocent lives is about to be issued..."\n"All I ask is that you lend a hand to the Flame-Chase in the future."

C: 史载：临渊的战役中，\n龙骑军因荒笛倒戈而溃退，\n开山者卸甲，坠崖身亡。
E: Records state: In the battle of the abyss,\nThe Dromas Riders were broken after Terravox's betrayal,\nThe Mountainbreaker shed his armor and fell from the cliffs to his end.

C: 「是吗…就在过去……」\n孩童沉入追忆的安眠，\n发出启示的呓语…
E: "Really...? In the past..."\nThe child sank into a peaceful slumber of recollection,\nWhispering revelations in their sleep...

C:
那位公主来自天外，
流星如冰晶，
穿透了永夜之帷的迷雾。

她与泰坦结下友谊，
每当<color=#9e5738>长夜月</color>降临，
二人都会相聚。
E:
That princess came from beyond the sky.
Her shooting star,
like crystal ice, pierced the fog of the Veil of Evernight.

She made friends with the Titan,
And whenever the <color=#9e5738>Month of Evernight</color> descended,
They would meet again.

C:
若要学艺，必先拜师，
而我拜了两位师父。
所以我有时跑圈，有时举重，
有时既跑圈又举重。
E:
To master a skill, one must first find a mentor,
And I ended up with two of them.
So sometimes I run laps, sometimes I lift weights,
And sometimes I do both at the same time.

C: 「现在看来，那面照片墙应该是记忆的力量。」 ——丹恒 「之前就想问，衣柜在哪里？」 ——{NICKNAME} 「你猜？」 ——三月七
E: "Looking at it now, that photo wall must be the power of memories." — Dan Heng "By the way, I've been meaning to ask — where's the wardrobe?" — {NICKNAME} "Take a guess." — March 7th

C: 虚妄的仇恨点燃了战火，\n黎明的墙垣在围攻中飘摇。
E: Hollow hatred ignited the flames of war,\nThe besieged walls of dawn tottered.

C: 我梦见凯撒的雕像树立在负世祭坛前，\n与神的视线齐平。
E: I dreamed that the Imperator's statue stood before the Worldbearing altar,\nHer gaze level with that of the god's.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n「丰饶」星神的不死信众，\n还是棋手指尖翻涌的罡风？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who will win?</color>\nThe immortal faithfuls of the Aeon of Abundance,\nOr the storms dancing between the chessmaster's fingertips?

C: 当学者求教医术，\n她才猛然发觉，\n<color=#9e5738>善良</color>也能开枝散叶。
E: When scholars seek medical help,\nShe realizes with a startle,\nThat <color=#9e5738>kindness</color> too can grow into its own bloom.

C: 彼时，晨昏已失了眼睑，\n永夜在世间延绵，\n少女与医者再次行于世间。
E: By that time, the twilight already lost their eyes,\nAnd the world drowns in evernight,\nWhile the girl and the healer again traverse the world in gloom.

C: 百代的族怨，千载的仇隙——\n这是少女从未医治过的病症。
E: A feud unbroken by countless years,\nA chasm carved by blood and spears —\nThis was a sickness beyond the girl's touch.

C: 「务必小心。\n驱使你挥剑的并非职责，而是仇恨。」
E: "You must be careful.\nDuty does not drive you to wield your blade, but hate."

C:
那是他不愿回首的时光——

遍走四方，追寻谶语，
证明祭司口中的不是注定。
E:
It's a time he refrains from looking back on —

Traveling all lands, chasing prophecies,
Trying to prove the priests' words were not unchangeable foresight.

C: 「身作丝线的未来，当然只有一个——」 「那便是为人织作华美的衣。」 她牵起孩童的手， 邀*她们*一同步入池中， 要用温暖的池水冲淡挂虑。
E: "There's only one future for silken threads —" "That is, to weave magnificent clothes for others." She takes the children's hands, Inviting them into the pools, Intending to use warm water to wash away their concerns.

C: 炉火在壁炉里跳动，发出噼啪的响声。直到又一条面包吃完，沉默才得以打破。
E: Fire crackles and dances in the hearth. The silence was only broken when another piece of bread was finished.

C: 「是我听错了吗…嗯，该去和昔涟见面了，可不能因为睡午觉错过正事。」
E: "Was I hearing things...? Well, I should go meet Cyrene now. Can't miss something important just because of an afternoon nap."

C: 「小伊卡发生了很少见的后天性基因突变。它的胃袋因过量的食物刺激而不断发生变异，并向大脑反向回馈饱食的欲望。按现在的变异进度…再过上一年半载，不要说你，哪怕是整个树庭的食物储存加起来…都不够它吃的。」
E: "Little Ica has developed a rare acquired genetic mutation. Its stomach keeps mutating due to excessive food stimulation, creating a feedback loop to the brain that amplifies its hunger. At the current rate of mutation... in a year or so, forget about your supplies, even all the food stored in the Grove combined won't be enough to satisfy its appetite."

C: 沉默许久的遐蝶也抬起头。「白厄阁下说的对。成为一名厨师，意味着…甘愿为他人味蕾的幸福，献上自己的全部。」
E: Castorice, who had stayed silent for a long time, lifted her head. "Lord Phainon is right. Becoming a chef... means offering all of yourself up to satisfy the taste buds of others."

C:
针对十二因子的定期记录，以辅助铁墓的深度学习。
