E: Team 5

C: 嘿，亲爱的观众，这次故事的主角是我们熟知的超级大坏蛋——石头老板！很久以前，他奴役着『噩梦小镇』的镇民们，在镇中无恶不作，只为得到宝贵的石头。他会拿这些石头换取钱财，充盈他的钱包，然后买更多石头——他就是这么无聊的鳄鱼。\n
E: Hey there, viewers. The protagonist of this story is the one big bad egg who we're all very familiar with: Boss Stone! A long time ago, he subjugated the townsfolk of Nightmareville and did all kinds of wicked deeds — all so he could get his hands on precious stones. He would trade these stones for money, amassing more wealth to buy even more stones — that's how boring he was.\n

C: 岁阳阴乐节
E: Heliobi Spooktacular Music Fest

C: 风堇亲卫队
E: Hyacine's Royal Guard

C: 你邻家的友善无名客
E: Your friendly neighborhood Nameless

C:
我当年为你做的实际上名为「扫帚」，是外面的世界里必不可少的关键工具。采集三十片和你手臂一样长的树叶，再用草绳将它们捆扎在一起，最终就能完成。
如果数不清数，就找村长帮你一起做吧！

祝你成功。总有一天我们能够在旅途中碰面。到时候，我会把所有故事都讲给你听。
E:
That thing I made for you back then is actually called a "broom" — an essential tool in the outside world. All you need are thirty leaves, each as long as your arm, and some sturdy grass rope to bind them together.
If counting to thirty's a bit much, just ask the chief for help!

Best of luck to you. I know our paths will cross again someday. And when they do — I'll tell you every story I've ever lived.

C: 光是拥有智库这一点，星穹列车已经比宇宙中大多数地方都优秀不少。\n\n未来若有机会，兴许还能在此处举办学术讲座。
E: The Astral Express is already light-years better than many other locations in the cosmos due to the presence of its data bank.\n\nShould the chance arise, I might even host an academic conference here in the future.

C: 没错，世界本就矛盾，我们无计可施。
E: That's right. The world is paradoxical, and there's nothing we can do.

C: 「唔，这里的敌人还真是难缠…啊，{NICKNAME}，让你见笑了，看来要保护好贝洛伯格的居民，靠我自己远远不够——{NICKNAME}，请允许我再次借用你的力量吧。」
E: "Mmph, the enemies here are tricky... Ah, {NICKNAME}, sorry you had to witness that. Looks like I have ways to go to protect Belobogians on my own... {NICKNAME}, please lend me your power once more."

C: 「{NICKNAME}，这儿的东西可真是不得了！如果我在铁卫的时候发现了这个遗迹，说不定就是贝洛伯格的首席发明家了…开个玩笑，还是『永动』更适合我。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, the things here are really incredible! Had I discovered this ruin when I was with the Silvermane Guards, maybe I would be Belobog's chief inventor by now... Just kidding. The Neverwinter Workshop suits me better after all."

C: 目标达成后，恢复<color=#f29e38ff>#1</color>点耐力值。
E: After accomplishing the objective, recover <color=#f29e38ff>#1</color> Stamina.

C: ——这里充斥着危险的气息，四周挤满了凶猛的敌人。
E: — Danger percolates the space as fierce and aggressive enemies flood the place.

C: ——「支援」能力的敌人可以鼓舞周围的同伴，增强其他敌人的能力。
E: — Enemies with the Support ability can inspire their comrades and strengthen other enemies.

C: ——镇守遗迹的强敌藏匿着门卡，想要将其击败，就先破坏强化它们的掩体吧。
E: — Formidable foes that guard the ruins have the door card on them. To defeat them, you should firstly destroy the covers strengthening them.

E: — Within the ruins, you seem to detect a familiar silhouette...

E: — A huge number of Trotters appear in the ruins. Quick, capture them!

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Safe House</color>: In this level, there will be no enemy encounters.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Gang Up</color>: Take note of enemy formations and act with caution.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Razor's Edge</color>: After defeating all enemies, you can activate the teleporter.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>United in Malice</color>: Take note of enemy formations and act with caution.

C: 「货币战争」中，<color=#f29e38ff>前台</color>角色会<color=#f29e38ff>自动使用秘技</color>进入战斗。
E: In "Currency Wars", <color=#f29e38ff>on-field</color> characters will <color=#f29e38ff>automatically use Techniques</color> in combat.

C: 施放终结技时，飞霄可以消耗所有飞黄，对<color=#f29e38ff>所有敌人</color>造成多次伤害。
E: When using Ultimate, Feixiao can consume all Flying Aureus to deal multiple instances of DMG to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>.

C: 搜集大墓装置在此空间投影出的<color=#f29e38ff>泰坦符文</color>，以继续推进。
E: Collect the <color=#f29e38ff>Titan Runes</color> projected by the tomb device in this space to proceed.

C: 降低【征服或被征服】的生命值可恢复对应角色的可回复生命上限，并且角色在攻击自身对应的【征服或被征服】时可造成更多伤害。
E: Reducing the HP of "Conquer or Be Conquered" restores the corresponding character's Maximum Restorable HP, and the character can deal increased DMG when attacking their corresponding "Conquer or Be Conquered."

C: 敌方的【黑潮热】状态在【在毁灭中狂欢】状态结束时立即解除，我方的【黑潮热】状态在自身生命值回复到上限时立即解除，免受该持续伤害。
E: The enemies' "Black Tide Fever" is immediately dispelled when the "Revel in Destruction" state ends. Allies' "Black Tide Fever" is immediately dispelled when their HP is fully restored. Units will not take the DoT damage after this state is dispelled.

C: 可以查看对当前角色推荐的<color=#f29e38ff>套装</color>、<color=#f29e38ff>主属性</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>副属性</color>。套装和主属性数据来自近期活跃玩家的统计数据。
E: You can view the recommended <color=#f29e38ff>Set</color>, <color=#f29e38ff>Main Stat</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>Subsidiary Stats</color> for the current character. The Set and Main Stat data are based on statistics from recently active players.

C: 在探索中，有时可以发现<color=#f29e38ff>金色的记忆尘影</color>，代表<color=#f29e38ff>目标位于另一个时空的此处</color>。
E: You may discover <color=#f29e38ff>Golden Memory Dust</color> when exploring, indicating that the <color=#f29e38ff>target is located here in the other space-time</color>.

C: 在翁法罗斯，各处都可以看到残留有记忆的物件。在开拓者靠近它们时，可以看到它们覆有一层能量的波纹。此时，通过<color=#f29e38ff>长按按键的方式可以施放「欧洛尼斯祷言」</color>，将它们回溯至一段时间之前的状态。
E: In Amphoreus, memory-laden objects can be found everywhere. When the Trailblazer approaches, they reveal an energy ripple over them. At this point, by <color=#f29e38ff>holding down the button, you can use "Oronyx's Prayer"</color> to rewind them to their previous state from a certain time ago.

C: 利用场景中的<color=#f29e38ff>公正天秤</color>，完成欧洛尼斯的考验。
E: Use the <color=#f29e38ff>Scales of Justice</color> in the map to complete Oronyx's test.

C: 部分角色的技能可以<color=#f29e38ff>解除</color>敌方目标拥有的<color=#f29e38ff>增益效果</color>，在与部分<color=#f29e38ff>拥有增益效果</color>的敌人交战时可发挥奇效。
E: Certain characters have abilities that can <color=#f29e38ff>dispel</color> enemies' <color=#f29e38ff>buffs</color>. This can be very useful when fighting <color=#f29e38ff>buffed</color> enemies.

C: 在具有<color=#f29e38ff>藏宝能力</color>的敌人中，会出现携带宝藏的扑满。敌人会根据你的行动进行倒计时，在计时结束前击败「扑满」可以获得遗迹中的道具。该敌人会直接出现，但<color=#f29e38ff>不会封锁周围的区域</color>。
E: A Trotter with treasure might appear among enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Treasure Abilities</color>. The enemies will start a countdown based on your actions. Defeat the Trotter before the countdown ends to obtain items in the ruins. This enemy will immediately appear, but <color=#f29e38ff>will not lock down the surrounding area</color>.

C: 在磐岩镇斗技表演赛中，玩家每回合获得的增益不再固定，可以自由选择
E: While competing in the Boulder Town Martial Exhibition, players can now freely choose the buffs they receive each round, instead of having fixed ones.

C: 「小桶宝力」在战斗中会<color=#f29e38ff>继承</color>「魔法师」的部分属性数值和<color=#f29e38ff>增益效果</color>。\n「小桶宝力」攻击敌人或受到敌人攻击时，会为「魔法师」<color=#f29e38ff>恢复能量</color>。
E: Litter Pony will <color=#f29e38ff>inherit</color> the Magician's certain stat values and <color=#f29e38ff>buff effects</color>.\nWhen Litter Pony attacks an enemy or is attacked by an enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>regenerates Energy</color> for the Magician.

C: 成员的<color=#f29e38ff>值日等级</color>越高，其对应的值日报告<color=#f29e38ff>基础评分</color>也会越高。
E: The higher your members' <color=#f29e38ff>Duty Level</color>, the higher the <color=#f29e38ff>base score</color> of their corresponding Duty Report will be as well.

C: 击破带有<color=#f29e38ff>苏乐达标志</color>的道具，则可以给<color=#f29e38ff>「钟表时间」技能槽</color>充能。
E: Break items with the <color=#f29e38ff>SoulGlad insignia</color> to charge up the <color=#f29e38ff>Clock Time ability bar</color>.

C: 敌人血量降低至0时<color=#f29e38ff>不会死亡</color>，再次受到伤害会<color=#f29e38ff>传递给全体敌人</color>。
E: When an enemy's HP reaches 0, it <color=#f29e38ff>will not die</color>. The next time it takes DMG, that DMG will be <color=#f29e38ff>transmitted to all enemies</color>.

E: The venue has <color=#f29e38ff>unique booths</color> from all over the cosmos. You can invite familiar characters as <color=#f29e38ff>assistants</color> to run the exhibition together.

E: Your mission is to <color=#f29e38ff>resolve</color> the monsters' <color=#f29e38ff>Emotional Troubles</color>. You'll be able to see your progress here.

C: 点击进行下一步。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to proceed.

C: 接下来，我将要前往齿轮星球。那里由邪恶的公司统治，所有员工都不知疲倦地劳作着，永远不会停歇。我要把他们从工作的痛苦中解救出来。
E: Next up, we need to head to the Cogwheel Planet. There, the world is ruled by an evil corporation, and the employees are constantly working without end, without rest. We must save them from the pain of their labor.

C: 听起来就很厉害！那么…不如来直接看看哪些武器和配饰可以发生共鸣吧！
E: Sounds pretty powerful! Then... why don't we see which accessories and weapons can trigger Resonance Effects?

C: 快去选择<color=#f29e38ff>不冻灵泉</color>，向我们的第一把传说武器前进吧！
E: Go select some <color=#f29e38ff>Evergreen Spring</color> and push toward getting our first Legendary Weapon!

C: 希望我的出现，能帮他们放个长假！
E: Hopefully, my appearance can help them take a long holiday!

C: 邪恶的气息更加浓厚了。接下来的敌人会更加强大，但相应的，奖励也会更加丰厚哦！
E: The sinister aura is getting stronger. The upcoming foes will be even stronger, but the rewards will also be better!

C: 很好，我正需要厉害的对象来试试这根最强球棒的威力。别害怕，一鼓作气地冲进去吧！
E: Perfect, I am just in need of a strong target to test the power of this Ultimate Bat. Don't be afraid and charge in with vigor!

C: 常规的挑战阶段结束后，还新增了「魔王挑战」，可以任由你尽情发挥，获取更高的积分~
E: When the regular challenges conclude, there are also new Demon King Challenges that you can engage in at your leisure to obtain higher scores~

C:
他们曾唤你救世主，他们为你编织面容。
你的名字千千万万，你的过去朦朦胧胧。
可是，星星们复念着你的选择，
故事牵着你的衣角，如同你印下的每道车辙。
无名的人哪，你只需不停地迈出脚步——
向着最明亮的那颗启行。
E:
They once called you Deliverer and wove your visage.
Your names are countless, your past shrouded in mist.
Yet, the stars echo your choices.
Stories cling to your hem, like every track you've left behind.
O nameless one, you need only keep stepping forward.
Toward the brightest star to begin your journey.

C: 三月，记得先顾好自己，不用管我们。
E: March, stay with the group, don't rush off.

C: 你…别靠近我的同伴。
E: You... Keep your distance.

C: 每天和大家生活在一起，似乎任何人都不会发生改变。只有离开很久的人，才会产生某种惊人的变化……
E: When people live together it seems like nobody ever changes. Only when they're away from each other for a long time do surprising transformations occur...

C: 去吧，{NICKNAME}，身为自己故事的主角，就该披荆斩棘，一往无前。
E: As the protagonist of your own story, it's up to you to overcome and forge ahead.

C: 阿刃，准备好迎接「狩猎」了么？
E: The hunt beckons, Bladie. Are you ready?

C: 得快点展开攻势。
E: We have to go on the offensive.

C: 大剑得时刻保持干净才行。
E: You should keep your sword sharp at all times.

C: 而你们将会，痛苦万倍！
E: Let me pay you back — tenfold!

C: 不战斗的话，还能做些什么？
E: If there's no danger here, then I'm needed elsewhere.

C: 骨碌碌~
E: Time to twirl!

C: 看我一雪前耻！
E: I'll avenge this!

C: 啧。
E: Ahhh.

C: 早点给你个痛快。
E: Let me end your misery.

C: 闭上嘴吧。
E: Enough.

C: …解决了！
E: ...That did the trick!

C: 史瓦罗：目标威胁指数上升。
E: Svarog: Target threat index raised.

C: 以前关系不错，现在的关系…可能还不及和她弟弟。
E: We used to be good pals, but now... Let's just say her brother put in a bad word for me.

C: 还不整些新花样？
E: Can we bring out the big guns already?

C: 鼹鼠党，解散！各回各家睡大觉！
E: Moles dismissed! Sleep well and see you tomorrow!

C: 从以前开始它就最喜欢亮晶晶的东西，比如金币、宝石啦…经常吃得圆滚滚的，就像膨胀的账务一样~所以账账，其实是「账胀」啦。
E: They've always liked shiny things — gold coins, gems, you name it. They're like a big fat investment account accruing interest... Guess I should've just named them "Piggy."

C: 保障绝大多数人的利益，这是我选择这条职业路线的初衷。公司给了我一个绝佳的平台，让我能够实现自己的目标…对此，我没什么可抱怨的。
E: Protecting the interests of the vast majority of people is the reason I chose this career path. The IPC has given me an excellent platform to pursue my goals... and for that, I have nothing to complain about.

C: 好棒的公司福利~
E: Pretty good perks~

C: 小女子随「鸣火」见过的生灵，大多有迹可循，也有理可说。无法沟通的生灵才最为可怖，意味着它们并不利用「语言」令人屈服……
E: Most of the lifeforms I have seen with the Whistling Flames have an origin and a reason. The creatures that cannot be communicated with are the most terrifying, as it means they do not conquer using language...

C: 晚些时候，得闲就顺路去趟不夜侯，图热闹就聊上几句，图清闲就看人猜茶，权当练眼力的小添头，也有趣得很。
E: If I have time, I head over to the Sleepless Earl when it's late. If I want company, then I chat with the patrons there. If I want leisure, then I watch people drink tea and toss dice in order to practice reading people. It is quite fun.

C: 永眠非终焉……
E: Eternal sleep is not the end...

C: 凡夺取的，必将偿还！
E: That which is seized, must be repaid!

C: 你看，这不就回来了么。
E: You see? I've returned.

C: {NICKNAME}…我不认识你。这对你而言，是件好事。
E: {NICKNAME}... I don't know you. Consider that a good thing.

C: 你挡路了。
E: You impede me.

C: 谢了，搭档。
E: Thank you, comrade.

C: 符太卜想当将军…别的不说，先改改她一开口大家就想睡觉的毛病吧。
E: So, Diviner Fu wants to be the general... Well, firstly, she needs to fix the issue where everyone just wants to nap as soon as she starts to talk.

C: 不该是…现在。
E: Not yet... not now.

C: 饮月君的功罪，我无意评说。若有机会，他的名号我也想抛下…但动用了这份力量，其后果便只能由我承担。
E: I have no interest in commenting on the deeds and sins of Imbibitor Lunae. Given the choice, I would like to cast his name aside... Even so, the consequences of his power will be borne by me alone.

C: 她同我一样，是戴罪之人，只是她已无偿还罪孽的可能与必要，因而走向歧路。
E: Just like me, she carries the burden of guilt. But, unlike me, she doesn't have the chance or need to atone for her wrongdoings, which has led her down a dangerous path.

C: 又升职了？这到底是「今日运势」中的吉，还是凶呢……
E: Promoted again? ...Is that good or bad...?

C: 难、难道要我在十王司待上一辈子吗……
E: D—Do I have to spend my whole life in the Ten-Lords Commission...?

C: 有福自然同享。
E: Good fortune should be shared.

C: 不攻自破！
E: You're falling apart on your own!

C: 对匠人来说，真正的浪费是「明珠暗沉」。我将那些夺来的剑存进「熔兵剑炉」的铁水里，并不是销毁它们，而是能在合适的剑主到来之前，保护它们……
E: For a craftsman, a pearl hidden from the light of day is a true waste. The reason I stash away all the swords I find into Molten Remains is not to destroy them, but to protect them until a suitable swordmaster arrives...

C: 这香炉名唤「烟萝琼枝」，是施行医术的必要设备。我受学于朱明龙尊炎庭君一脉，研习医术「金鳞燃犀」，要用上这香炉方能随心应手。至于这炉中所炼的烟兽…就当它是秘传吧~
E: This incense burner is called "Ruby Tendrils." It's a necessary device for practicing the art of healing. I studied under the lineage of the Zhuming's high elder, Ardens Regia, and researched the "Piercing Gaze" art of healing. Only by using this incense burner can one practice this art with ease. As for what creature is inside the burner... Let's just say it's a trade secret~

C: 就这样？
E: Like that, huh?

C: 怎么才……？行吧。
E: That's it? Guess it'll have to do.

C: 遥远朦胧的记忆中，家乡时有雷雨，女孩们害怕湿了妆容，总是随身携带妆具。虽然缘由与过去不同…但我依旧保留着这个习惯。
E: In the hazy memories of my distant hometown, there were often heavy thunderstorms. Fearing their makeup would be ruined by the rain, girls carried makeup with them wherever they went. I have no reason to do so anymore, but the habit still remains.

C: 愿这首乐曲，与黑天鹅小姐的舞步相称。
E: I hope this piece of music matches the steps of Miss Black Swan's dance.

C: 愿你能在歌中寻得安宁。
E: May you find peace in song.

C: 有没有旋律构写的谜题……
E: Is there a puzzle about composing melodies...

C: 我会为自己夺得胜利。
E: I will claim victory for myself.

C: 我将越过荆棘。
E: I will overcome the thorns.

C: 这种「开拓」…着实新奇。
E: This kind of "Trailblazing"... is truly novel.

C: 「慈玉女士」？只是捐赠几笔微薄的善款而已，没什么值得称赞的。宇宙中的善行都是暗藏价码的交易——名为「恩情」的契约，比白纸黑字的合同坚固得多。
E: "Lady Bonajade?" These are just my small contributions. There's really nothing to thank me for. Most "benevolence" in the universe has a hidden price tag, but true kindness is stronger than any contract.

C: 几千年前，人们用「波提欧」这个名字称呼那些叫人打死的枪手。你看，这不是个属于活人的名字，而我正好也算不得什么活人，哈！
E: A few thousand years back, folks called those dead gunslingers "Boothills." You see, it ain't exactly a name meant for the living, and well, I guess I ain't quite what you'd call "alive," ha!

C: 万缕千丝，在我指尖。
E: Countless threads, all within my grasp.

C: 捂耳朵~
E: Cover your ears~

C: 动起来！别让炙热的身躯冷却。
E: Move already! Don't let our fervor die.

C: 三脚猫功夫…
E: Amateur...

C: 钱是变出来的，不是省出来的。那些元老院的大人物，能把一块红土吹成跨时代的艺术品——和他们相比，诡计之神也要甘拜下风呐。
E: You get rich by making money, not saving money. Those bigwigs in the Council of Elders can hype up a piece of redsoil as a revolutionary work of art  — even the god of trickery has to bend the knee to that level of lying.

C: 等到下一次鲜花绽放，如果还能在新世界再见，请别忘了我们的约定。
E: When flowers bloom again, if we're lucky enough to meet in the new world, remember our promise.

C: 我曾踽踽独行，就像落单的蝴蝶不知该往哪儿飞去…或许是逐火之旅和奥赫玛的伙伴，或许是一路上遇到的人们，让我寻到了下一次振翅的方向。
E: I once stumbled alone like a solitary butterfly that did not know where to go... Perhaps it was thanks to the Flame-Chase Journey and my friends in Okhema, or perhaps it was the people I encountered along the way that helped me find the direction for my next flight.

C: 磨砺自己的时刻到了。
E: It's time to temper myself.

C: 我没事。
E: I'm fine.

C: 赛飞儿大人，跑得太快我就追不上啦！
E: Lady Cipher! If you run that fast, I won't be able to keep up!

C: 有海瑟音大人的歌声在，大家便不会那么疲倦了。
E: Folks wouldn't feel so tired with Lady Hysilens's song around.

C: 想不到吧？这也被我发现啦。
E: Didn't think I could find that, did you?

C: 紫色的小蝶鱼…我喜欢她写下的诗歌，还为它们编写了深海的曲调。来日，让我们一同在重聚的欢宴上，唱起那些优美的歌曲吧。
E: The purple little butterflyfish... I like the poems she writes. I even composed melodies of the deep ocean to accompany them. Let us sing those beautiful songs together in the future, when we feast in reunion.

C: 真是个破坏气氛的家伙。
E: Talk about ruining the mood.

C: 放心交给我们。
E: We've got this.

C: 我马上跟上。
E: I'll catch up.

C: 盛宴已至，奏响凯旋的舞曲吧。
E: The feast is here. Let the music of triumph ring out.

C: 「存护」的种子一直都在贝洛伯格，我只是重新唤起了这座城市生存的意志…即使微弱，它也未到熄灭的时刻。
E: The seed of Preservation has always been within Belobog, and I simply re-ignited this city's will to live... That will may be weak, but this was not the time for it to go out.

E: Sprint

E: Skip ride to the next stop

E: Walk

E: Character Trial

E: Dissonance

E: Shock Force

E: Kind Praiser

E: Alchemy Miracle

E: Ally chimeras' <color=#f29e38ff>probability-based abilities are guaranteed to activate</color>, and they'll enter an <color=#f29e38ff>Oblivion</color> state that makes them sound super adorable!

When companions use attack/Follow-Up ATK: If the attacked targets are affected by "Oblivion," immediately deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> DMG to them.

E: After <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s): The strongest Toasty Dragon in the team increases its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by a value equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of its current <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP.

Each successful revival halves the revival chance.

E: Deals massive Imaginary DMG and inflicts "Vulnerability" to all targets in battle against "White Guard." The DMG and Vulnerability effect are <u>distributed evenly</u> among the targets. The more "Titankins" on the field, the higher the DMG dealt.

E: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to targets in battle against "White Guard."

E: Deals Quantum DMG to locked-on targets, with a certain chance to inflict Entanglement on the attacked targets.

E: Light the Future

E: Through the Darkness

E: Black Tide Inrush

C: 大丽花和流萤遭遇游荡的惊梦剧团。流萤启动「火萤IV型」机甲，速战速决。
E: The Dahlia and Firefly encountered the wandering Dreamjolt Troupe. Firefly activated the Fyrefly Type-IV mech to wipe them out swiftly.

C: 太一之梦的消散需要时间，这将引起星期日的注意，机会稍纵即逝。银狼宣布，另外两重梦境由星核猎手搞定。
E: The dissipation of Ena's Dream would take time, which would inevitably attract Sunday's attention. You had to seize this narrow window. Silver Wolf declared that the other two dreamscape layers would be handled by the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 你阅读大丽花的留言。大丽花称，你是注定带来「终末」的人。这片银河不只为你而存在，但它永远等待着你的拯救。
E: You read The Dahlia's message. She claimed that you were the one destined to bring about the Finality. The cosmos does not exist solely for you, but it would always await your salvation.

E: Sweet

C: 黑天鹅竟然要离开了，回想起来，她…████奇怪，你什么都回想不起来。
E: Black Swan is actually leaving... Thinking back, she... ████████████████ Strange, you can't remember anything at all.

C: 通过原始忆域非常顺利地潜入了匹诺康尼，尽管代价非小。接下来，要想办法进入「十二时刻」了。
E: You slipped into Penacony through the Primordial Memory Zone without a hitch, though it came at a heavy cost. Now you have to find a way into the "Twelve Hours."

C: 奇怪的视觉偏差…出现问题的，会是流萤还是梦境本身呢？\n无论如何，原始忆域危险重重，先进入「十二时刻」再说吧。
E: A strange visual glitch... Is the problem with Firefly, or the Dreamscape itself?\nEither way, the Primordial Memory Zone is treacherous. Let's focus on getting into the "Twelve Hours" first.

C: 黄泉竟是「虚无」的令使…零点任务重于一切，绝不能让她在{NICKNAME}的身边拔刀。
E: So Acheron is an Emanator of the Nihility... The Zero-Point Mission is everything. I can't let her draw her blade anywhere near {NICKNAME}.

C: 在她们看来，梦主并未倒向「秩序」，可其他的命途又完全无法联想到一起。她们将要展示的证据，恐怕远远超出我的认知。
E: In their eyes, Dreammaster hasn't sided with the Order, yet the other Paths can't be connected in any way. The evidence they're about to present will likely far exceed my understanding.

C: 以黑天鹅将你唤醒作为分界，由于太一之梦的存在，你此后的记忆，都不能再以从前的视角看待。\n为你的记忆，亲自写下开场白吧。
E: Being woken up by Black Swan was a watershed moment. Due to the existence of Ena's Dream, your memories from that point onward can no longer be viewed from the same perspective as before.\nWrite a prologue for your memories.

E: Find a quiet spot

C: 你似乎很了解我的过去…
E: You seem to know a lot about my past...

C: 「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」
E: "The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration."

C: 你对我做了什么？
E: What did you do to me?

C: 不久前，发生了一场意外。他病得很重，短时间内，恐怕无法以人形现身了。
E: There was an accident not long ago. He's gravely ill, and I'm afraid he won't be able to appear in his humanoid form for a while.

C: 放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
E: Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?

C: 家族仍在一刻不停地编织美梦，匹诺康尼也向来不与外界交恶……
E: The Family never stops weaving their sweet dreams, and Penacony has always maintained good relationships with the outside world...

C: 每次这么说，享受的人，好像都是你自己吧。这一次，还是别太过火了。
E: Every time you say that, it's always you who seems to be having fun. This time, try not to go overboard.

C: 无论那是什么，我相信，总会起到作用。在他们回来之前，不妨去找找看。
E: Whatever it is, I believe it'll be of some use. Let's go look for it before they come back.

C: …你比我想象中镇定。
E: ...You're more composed than I expected.

C: 可浮现在我脑海里的，却是那样一句话——
E: But what surfaced in my mind was that one sentence...

C: …作为格拉默铁骑的最后一战。
E: ...my final battle as a Glamoth Knight.

C: 和格拉默铁骑一样，它们没有被赋予自我，「离群」的那一刻，就已经死去。失熵症，也是如此。
E: Just like Glamoth's Iron Cavalry, they weren't given a sense of self. The moment they stray from the "hive", they're already dead. The same goes for Entropy Loss Syndrome.

C: 什么动静都没有…难道已经离开了？
E: There's no sign of anything... could it have already left?

C: 我知道这样于事无补，但…实在抱歉。无论「梦主」出于什么目的，也没有让任何人牺牲的权利。
E: I know it won't undo what's been done, but... I'm sorry. No matter what purpose the Dreammaster has, it doesn't give him the right to sacrifice anyone.

C: 太迟啦——你已经身处秘密之中。来吧，只需要随便走几步，就算我赶你离开，你也不会愿意的。
E: Too late. You're already caught up in this secret. Come on, just a few steps more. Even if I tried to turn you away, you wouldn't want to.

C: 赌局结束了，我赢得了一场大胜。
E: The game's over, and I scored a big win.

C: 利用一整个世界的意志，推动一位星神的降生…这场对决绝不是单纯力量的交锋。为了匹诺康尼的未来，不能只有你们在舞台上战斗。
E: They've harnessed the will of an entire planet to create an Aeon... This confrontation is far more complicated than a simple power struggle. To secure Penacony's future, fighting on the stage alone is not enough.

C: …出发前，「命运的奴隶」告诉我，此行会让我得到难以忘怀的收获。他给出的剧本只有寥寥数行，却让人难以忽视。
E: ...Before I left, Destiny's Slave told me that this journey would bring unforgettable rewards. Even though the script he gave me only had a few lines, I couldn't ignore them.

C: 若欲使人心怀希望
E: To keep hope alive in people's hearts

C: 有失远迎，流萤女士。
E: My apologies for keeping you waiting, Lady Firefly.

C: 有星际和平公司在，银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。
E: With the IPC around, the cosmos doesn't need a second "Order".

C: …星核猎手？
E: ...A Stellaron Hunter?

C: 那一刻，我会屏息聆听。
E: I'll hold my breath and listen for that moment.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>即使你成为了唯一的星，阻止所有人飞上天际——他们也会因你的光芒，产生向往，奋力拍打自己的翅膀，无论是否曾在坠落时受伤。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Even if you become the only star and prevent everyone from soaring into the sky... they will still be inspired by your radiance, flap their wings with all their might, regardless of whether they've been hurt in their fall.</color>

C: 但现在…你应该向往我。
E: But you should be envious of me now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>愿此行，终抵群星！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>May this journey lead us starward!</color>

C: 花火
E: Sparkle

C: <color=#dbc291ff>万物生长，自然而然。行至尽头——人世，亦应托于人手！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>All life shall grow as nature intended and reach its end. This mortal world... should rest in mortal hands!</color>

C: 醒来吧，这场梦该结束了。
E: Wake up. It's time for this dream to end.

C: 你还尚未回忆起的结局，它会告诉你真相——但你必须做好准备。
E: It will tell you the truth regarding the ending you haven't yet remembered... but you must be prepared.

C: 好，我们就在这里告别吧。
E: Alright. Let's say our goodbyes here.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>很久以前，你答应过我：如果我能做梦，你会让它成为一个美好的白日梦。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Long ago, you promised me that if I could dream, then you would make it a beautiful daydream.</color>

C: …失熵症？
E: ...Entropy Loss Syndrome?

C: 还有要做的事。
E: There are still things to do.

C: 只要给其他奇美拉放假，让进度落后的小奇美拉继续工作不就好了？在其他人放假时工作，也是一种加班。你管这个方法叫「加班相对论」。
E: Why not just give other chimeras time off and let the little chimera who's behind schedule continue working? Working while others are on holiday is also a form of overtime. You've dubbed this method the "Theory of Relative Overtime."

C: 你曾听说繁育沾染的星球，孢种甚至能在旅者的鼻壁上生根发芽。为了你的鼻腔健康，或许不应该离它太近。
E: You've heard about planets tainted by the Propagation, where spores can even take root in travelers' nasal cavities. For the sake of your olfactory health, you probably shouldn't get too close.

C: 对于曾眺望过这番景象的那些世界而言，能做的只有祈祷和等待。
E: For worlds that had witnessed this sight, all they could do was pray and wait.

C: 似有若无的香气悬浮，盘旋之处绵密得堪称结实，空隙之处又无比稀疏。你置身的这片空间似乎拥有不均的质地。
E: A faint fragrance lingers in the air, dense enough to feel almost solid where it swirls, yet incredibly sparse in the gaps. The space in which you find yourself seems to have an uneven texture.

C: 等等，先给我解释下…
E: Hold on, let me explain first...

C: 商店中出现了装备！每只奇美拉能拥有<color=#f29e38ff>一件装备</color>，并且装备可以<color=#f29e38ff>替换</color>哦。
E: Equipment has appeared in the Store! Every chimera can have <color=#f29e38ff>one piece of equipment</color>, and their equipment can be <color=#f29e38ff>changed</color>.

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 蚀心影魔
E: Corrupting Shadowfiend

C: 「困难」难度可挑战
E: Hard Difficulty can be challenged

C: 关于自己•背叛
E: About Self: Betrayal

C: 来了一位难缠的舞伴呢。
E: Here comes a difficult dance partner.
